This God Powered Cannon was supposed to be extremely powerful and unrivalled all across the land. It’s destruction capabilities had been witnessed first hand by many people and yet it actually choked up right at this crucial moment?

The Flaming Sun Princess and her companions’ faces turned ashen. They then turned their glances towards Xu Que who was inhaling his smoke, filled with immense satisfaction!

"He must’ve sabotaged the cannon!"

The Flaming Sun Princess was certain of this. How was it ever possible that her father’s terrifying God Powered Cannon produced such underwhelming results when it was directed at him?

Xu Que’s expression was utterly devoid of all fear. It almost seemed like as though he knew something like that would happen for he didn’t look surprised at all when the cannon was brought out. He could even take out a cigarette and position it where the flame would meet the tip of his cigarettes. He must’ve done something to it!

Zi Xuan had interacted with Xu Que before as well and felt the same way as the Flaming Sun Princess. The reason why the cannon would’ve failed so spectacularly was definitely because of something fishy that he did!

But, how did he manage to do it?

The God Powered Cannon had always been stored in utmost secrecy ever since it had been brought back to the Imperial Palace. Nobody had any access to it. When did he get the opportunity to sabotage it? Could it be that he already discovered it even before the Emperor brought it out?

The Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan were both filled with immense suspicion.

At the same time, they looked up at the skies to see Xu Que still hovering while his face was filled with mockery. The pair of them felt a myriad of complex emotions within their hearts, unable to truly describe what they were feeling.

"Dog Emperor, your cannon is not too bad and rather effective too. All it needs is a spirit stone and it lit my cigarette up for me. Are you trying to win me over now by being so courteous? Let me tell you, even if you fall on your knees and beg for your life, it’s not going to be of any use." Xu Que who was in the air, took a deep drag out of his cigarette and laughed out wretchedly.

Xu Que looked at the Emperor who was visibly enraged and extremely confused at the outcome.

Xu Que was immensely elated by this. This was one of his favorite things in life. To watch others filled with an expression of frustration and anger and yet couldn’t do anything about it.

Everyone around in the crowd had three black lines running down the side of their cheeks.

Big brother, can you stop being so narcissistic?

The Emperor is trying to win you over?

Look at the Emperor’s expression. He wants nothing better than to break every bone in your body and flay your skin before leaving you out to dry under the sun for seven days!

The Emperor would probably only win you over if his brain was damaged!

The Sky Incense Valley watched on suspiciously as their eyelids twitched, sensing that something was amiss.

"Why is this master Xu Que is so similar to our master Hua Wu Que?"

"Except for the fact that his appearance and powers are different, their mannerisms and behaviors are so similar!"

"Could it be that everyone from the Heavenly Explosion Faction all have such mannerisms?"

"Fuck me, this Heavenly Explosion Faction is too crazy. All of them speak the same way. Who would ever dare to mess around with them?"

The few disciples felt their faces turn pale while their hearts rejoice in relief. After all, Sky Incense Valley didn’t have any bad blood with Heavenly Explosion Faction!

Because no matter what the outcome of today was, the Fire Emperor’s face had been thrown away without recourse!

Even if Xu Que was eventually killed, it wouldn’t change how embarrassing this moment was to the Fire Emperor!

First, he sent out a dozen of his best Imperial Guards but they were all killed almost effortlessly by Xu Que!

Soon after, he called on his four Generals to lead the troops into battle with Xu Que. They surrounded him but suffered numerous casualties. One of the Generals was even severely wounded. In fact, he was still lying on the ground now, unable to get up!

And now, the Fire Emperor took out the God Powered Cannon with such confidence. Even the name of the Cannon was so terrifying. When it started activating, its sound and appearance was so scary. At last, it only emitted a sliver of white energy which was probably the most underwhelming and anticlimactic ending which nobody had expected.

As everyone watched the sliver of energy move slowly towards Xu Que, he even lit his cigarette with it. The God Powered Cannon looked like it was specially designed to light his cigarette!

The Fire Emperor was obviously enraged by this result as his body started trembling in anger.

All these hundreds of years, he had never been so furious as he was today. The killing intent within his heart along with the fire roots within his body were ablaze. He had long been unable to control it and his eyes almost spat fire.

"What have you done to my God Powered Cannon?" The Fire Emperor gritted his teeth and glared at Xu Que intently.

"Aren’t you supposed to be the powerful, all seeing Dog Emperor? Why have you suddenly gone blind? Couldn’t you see that I didn’t do anything at all? I was just standing here, like an honest and normal civilian, waiting for you to use your God Powered Cannon to light my cigarette for me! As for other matters… Eh! It actually looks like I didn’t do anything at all? No… Actually, you’re right. I let out a small fart earlier on! What? Do you want to come here and sniff it?"

Xu Que’s words caused the Fire Emperor’s face to turn a deep shade of red. The rest of his servants and concubine who stood beside him were trying their hardest not to laugh after hearing what Xu Que had said because they knew that they mustn’t laugh no matter what.

The entire crowd felt the exact same way. Everyone wanted to laugh very badly but didn’t dare to. It was such a terrible feeling. Xu Que was way too vicious!

"You... My God Powered Cannon is unrivalled in power! You must’ve sabotaged it!"

It’s been many years since his rule and nobody had ever dared to be so defiant and disrespectful towards the Fire Emperor. He was truly furious as he pointed at Xu Que. He almost looked like he was about to explode into a mountain of fire!

"Are you trying to blame me? Obviously, it’s because of your lowly intelligence and retarded brain. You actually decided to use the God Powered Cannon, which was forged by my Heavenly Explosion Sect, against me? Tell me, are you a retarded child or not? Tell me, are you a stupid boy?" Xu Que’s expression was filled with a certain helplessness as he spoke. In actual fact, he had never imagined that this retarded Fire Emperor would actually use the God Powered Cannon, which he had personally forged, against him.

When the crowd heard this, they were all astonished as their faces lost color!

Damned it. This God Powered Cannon was forged by the Heavenly Explosion Faction?

Fuck me. Looks like the Fire Emperor wasn't lying about the power of it. It’s just that the God Powered Cannon wouldn’t ever attack its own owner!

This was such a strange moment. There were so many people present and so many other civilians outside the palace were watching this scene unfold. It looks like the Fire Emperor’s face… had been thrown down the drain!

The Flaming Sun Princess and the rest of the nobilities watched on, their mouths were dangling from their faces as their minds were blank!

The Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan didn’t believe in the Heavenly Explosion Faction. They knew that all this was about Xu Que pretending.

But this God Powered Cannon… was actually created by Xu Que?

How… How was this possible? Such a terrifying weapon was actually forged by his own hands?

The Fire Emperor was stumped as well. He never would’ve expected such an ending.

He had guessed it right but he didn’t expect to be right for another reason. He had assumed that Xu Que had sabotaged the God Powered Cannon but never expected the cannon to be Xu Que’s own creation.

What was more terrifying was the power of the Heavenly Explosion Faction who was supporting Xu Que.

The Fire Emperor first thought that the sect was just a small time group.

But now, the weapon which he was so proud of, the weapon which he wanted to conduct research on to emulate, the weapon he wanted to use to increase the strengths of the Fire Nation, was actually the product of creation by the Heavenly Explosion Faction!

The biggest slap to his face was how he took out the God Powered Cannon, filled with confidence in its powers. He wanted to use it to act tough before everyone and even laughed at Xu Que for not recognizing a powerful weapon when he saw one. That ignorance…

All the boastful words he spoke about the cannon had been completely rejected and sent back to him in the form of a vicious face slap. The heat and pain from the slap was immense!

"Everyone, today, we take a step further into the advancement of science... No! We take a step further into the Fire Nation’s Imperial Palace. I shall uncover the ugly features of the Fire Emperor’s face before everyone." Xu Que looked at the crowd and spoke loudly.

(T/N: This line was taken from the popular chinese documentary called Approaching Science)

The black pair of wings behind his back were still flapping powerfully. He then puffed his chest out and spoke confidently and sonorously, "Why did a 90 year old woman die on the streets? Why did several hundreds of female donkeys scream loudly in the middle of the night? Why were female undergarments belonging to Sky Incense Valley being stolen repeatedly? Who was the culprit in the case of serial rapist taking advantage of sows? Old ladies experiencing knocks on their doors in the middle of the night, is it human or ghosts? What was the meaning of several hundred female dogs dying in the middle of the night? Was the reason for all this happening the lost of human morale or the prevalence of human perversion? Today, I shall reveal everything about the Dog Emperor!"

(T/N: Taken from the opening statement of Approaching Science and mentioned once in chapter 88 when Xu Que tried to recruit people into his faction.)

chapters.title: Chapter 210: You’Re Crying Out For Injustice?
chapters.body:
Chapter 210: You’Re Crying Out For Injustice?

Chapter 210: You’re Crying Out For Injustice?

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"Pu!" several Sky Incense Valley disciples were drinking tea and spat everything out.

Damn it, why did that sound so familiar?

What did he say about the undergarments of female cultivators from Sky Incense Valley being stolen repeatedly? Who the hell are you?

The Sky Incense Valley elder was stumped as well. Although they weren’t at the testing grounds personally, they had heard many stories of Hua Wu Que. In fact, the stories of Hua Wu Que had been circulating within the entire sect for ages. Everyone knew about the Star Miscanthus that he had burnt for the permanent writings within their sect domains!

He had even said this exact same line earlier. Something about 90 year old woman dying tragically... It was extremely strange!

Now that they heard Xu Que say this once again, the Sky Incense Valley disciples were unable to compose themselves.

"This person wouldn’t happen to be master Hua Wu Que, right?"

The few of them started having such thoughts in their heads.

The crowd all around were shocked as well. 90 year old woman dying on the streets? Several hundreds of female donkeys scream loudly in the middle of the night? Female undergarments belonging to Sky Incense Valley being stolen repeatedly? There was even the case of serial rapist taking advantage of sows…

Fuck me, could the Fire Emperor be such a person in private?

In that moment, many people looked up at the Fire Emperor in shock!

The Fire Emperor nearly spat out blood as his face was filled with rage. He pointed out at Xu Que and shouted out, "Outrageous! How dare you malign myself? Today, under the heavens, nobody would be able to save you!" Once the Emperor is enraged, blood shall be spilt for thousand of kilometers.

Indeed, the Fire Emperor couldn’t hold his anger back for much longer. If he decided to attack Xu Que, this would have a negative impact on the Fire Nation’s Qi but he didn’t care and lashed out at Xu Que regardless!

He turned his palms up as the air around him started to coalesce and swirl violently. Within seconds, a golden colored, resplendent looking fire which took the form of a majestic dragon had been conjured. The terrifying aura which emanated from the dragon engulfed the entire palace!

He’s enraged!

He’s truly enraged as the monarch of the nation!

His actions will have a direct consequence on the health and well-being of his nation.

That was why the Emperor must never act out unless absolutely necessary, for the consequences could be dire.

This was also why the Emperor had been tolerating Xu Que and dispatched all his subordinates to finish him.

And yet it reached a stage where uncle could tolerate it, but auntie couldn’t any longer.

If he didn’t do anything about it, this little bastard would continue to spew rubbish from that foul mouth of his!

In the face of such great power, Xu Que’s expression remained the same as he hovered in the skies and shouted out, "This Dog Emperor is an evil and vile person in private. Let’s speak about this God Powered Cannon. This was our gift to a small sect out in the borderlands. We never expected this Fire Emperor to steal the God Powered Cannon from them. How despicable!"

"What?"

When the crowd heard this, they were appalled!

The God Powered Cannon was stolen?

Everyone casted astonished glances towards the Fire Emperor once again.

The Fire Emperor was so upset, he was nearly going mad . The old eunuch beside him was stumped as well and his face was filled with indignance as he pointed at Xu Que, "You… You little orphan. How dare you malign the Emperor this way? This God Powered Cannon was traded by one of the Generals in exchange for numerous treasures with Great Change Sect. How… How could you speak such accusations without proof?!"

"Oh?" Xu Que heard this and was rather surprised.

When he looked at the old eunuch, it seemed like he was speaking the truth and felt immense relief wash over his body. Looks like the safety of Great Change Sect wasn’t compromised then!

The reason why he made that groundless accusation was to test the Emperor and to learn of how he had managed to acquire the cannon from Great Change Sect. Looking at the situation now, it’s seemed rather unlikely that he had acquired it by force.

Then again, so what if it wasn’t stolen?

Xu Que had already intended to obtain it from him.

Great Change Sect was just a small matter. The vengeance he needed to exact was for the humiliation and injustice he had suffered earlier under the hands of this Emperor!

The memories within his mind would never be rid. They remained freshly imprinted within his mind as though the experience only happened yesterday.

He knew that he needed to have his revenge today, regardless of the outcome!

"You can stop trying to explain. Trying to explain means you’re concealing the facts and the fact is that you’re evil and vile. With your despicable nature, how could it ever be that you used treasures to trade for the God Powered Cannon?" Xu Que gave a cold harrumph as he turned his gaze to the crowd and shouted out.

"As for his other low down acts, I shan’t go into details. Scratching the surface, about six years ago, this Dog Emperor used Concubine Fantasy and disguised her as the Flaming Sun Princess. She even gave me her virginity, all just to plunder my innate fire roots. The feeling of sleeping with her felt so good… Pui, no, I mean, how despicable are they?"

"Some time ago, he even dispatched the Flaming Sun Princess to intercept me on my travels. She pretended to be under attack by hired killers. At last, she drank the Yin Yang Wine and had to sleep with me or else she will die. But are you so naive to think I wouldn’t see through your ploys?"

"Why did I have to become so handsome, so talented and so powerful? The most important aspect of it all is that I have such an innocent and kind hearted soul. When I saw that she had consumed the Ying Yang Wine, I couldn’t leave a damsel in distress. Hence, I willing gave my body to her in order to save her from death, even though I was aware of her evil deeds."

"And yet I never would’ve expected that being so handsome would mean I was the subject of envy and thus became the victim of reckless and violent attacks. There were two consecutive occasions where I was humiliated because of my good looks. And you… You still refuse to let me off. Madam Ya had also fallen for me but she’s the sister of the Dog Emperor!"

"What’s the big deal with falling in love with me? I’m so handsome! And so talented! Even female mosquitoes fall in love with me and refuse to leave my skin. What’s wrong with Madam Ya loving me? Tell me, what’s wrong with that?"

"The Fire Emperor was being completely unreasonable by locking her up within the Great Lake. Tell me, is nobody afraid of divine retribution for committing acts of atrocity any longer? Are there no longer any laws? Is it my fault that I’m so good looking? So you think I chose to be so handsome?"

Everyone watched him give his speech and were extremely intrigued. Some of them were even eating seeds while watching and the more Xu Que spoke, the more riled up he was. Xu Que knew that this was an extremely rare opportunity for so many people to be gathered together to listen to him speak. How could he not show off his talent for public speaking then?

With a single breath, Xu Que told the crowd of all the injustice he had faced. When the crowd heard this, they all turned dizzy and felt extremely sorrowful. Most of them were rendered speechless.

As soon as Xu Que spoke these words, the Flaming Sun Princess turned pale as her body went numb and she almost fainted. Thankfully, the astonished looking Zi Xuan was watching her and held her up.

The Fire Emperor didn’t hear most of it, except when Xu Que mentioned that the Emperor’s favorite daughter had also slept with Xu Que…

At this point, a loud roar rang out within the Fire Emperor’s brain as he trembled in anger. He then hurriedly turned to the Flaming Sun Princess, "My daughter, you… You were actually… by him?"

"..." The Flaming Sun Princess didn’t say anything as her face lost all color!

The Fire Emperor paused in shock. The daughter which he loved the most had actually been… by him…

He was in utter disbelief and yet he was raging. His mind was a complete blank at having to endure setback after setback.

At the next moment, there was a "pu" as the Fire Emperor was so enraged that he spat out a mouthful of pink blood.

This elite fighter of level six Infant Transformation Stage, actually couldn’t handle the effects of such humiliation.

The crowd were terrified and shocked, their eyes and mouths were wide open!

Everyone looked at Xu Que in the air as they were extremely confused and appalled!

You… You actually slept with the Emperor’s Concubine Fantasy and then you slept with his daughter. You won’t even let his younger sister off and you actually ran all the way here and cry out for injustice?

Fuck man, big brother, you are truly one in a million!

chapters.title: Chapter 211: Three Mystical Flames! Merge!
chapters.body:
Chapter 211: Three Mystical Flames! Merge!

Chapter 211: Three Mystical Flames! Merge!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Everyone in the crowd who were eating seeds while watching Xu Que were seeing green.

The green which was in their eyes was a lush shade of green. It was bright and verdant. It was the color of envy and overcame everyone.

Xu Que’s words were too shocking!

He alone had slept with the Fire Emperor’s daughter, his concubine, and now even his sister was about to join the group of ladies. Just hearing this alone was enough to cause anyone to vomit blood.

It was too green!

"Boom!"

The Fire Emperor’s lips were stained with fresh blood and yet he didn’t hesitate to strike out right at this moment!

The air around the Emperor started twisting and convulsing as a formless wave of energy twirled around his palms. It became bigger very quickly as a large ball of flame appeared in his hands. It started elongating, till it took the form of a dragon. The heat from it was immense that it seemed to be capable of burning everything under the heavens.

"Chi!"

The air around the Emperor heated up and was burning, causing white steam to rise up. This flame was more than capable of engulfing the entire training ground, killing everyone!

Color left the faces of the crowd who watched on in awe.

"I didn’t expect that the Fire Emperor’s Flaming Dragon has already reached such a powerful stage!" Someone sighed out.

"It’s been said that only the true son of heaven, someone with royalty in their blood would be able to inherit this spell. Today, I’ve finally seen it for myself!"

"This has something to do with the fact that the imperial family is related to dragons. It’s been said that the Eastern crypts where the Imperial Tombs are located rests atop the dragon veins. That’s where the source of power comes from and is all channeled into the palace. The fact that the Fire Emperor is able to wield his Flaming Dragon spell from here is very impressive!" An old cultivator spoke gravely.

"It’s obvious that Xu Que has infuriated the Fire Emperor. If not, he wouldn’t resort to using this spell. This is his ultimate killing spell."

"Looks like Master Xu Que is going to bear the brunt of the Emperor’s rage!"

"That’s for sure! He actually humiliated the Emperor right in front of everyone. It would be surprising if he wasn’t killed here!"

Everyone shook their heads realizing that this was Xu Que’s consequence for playing with fire. He could’ve offended anyone but chose to offend the Fire Emperor!"

Xu Que, however, didn’t look the least flustered or afraid. He hovered in mid air and laughed out, "Your ultimate spell? Do you think I’m without one as well?"

As soon as his words landed, he flipped his right hand, facing the heavens as he conjured the Bone Freezing Flame. On his left hand, he conjured the Molten Green Lotus. He then raised both hands up, causing the mystical flames to burn brightly.

At the next moment, he called out the Eight Waste Destruction Flames as well. The black flames emitted a thick smoke and emanated immense threatening auras. This black flame seemed to inch away the other two flames as if showing a hint of superiority.

After all, this mystical flame was ranked sixth in terms of power and had strengths that could shock the heaven and earth. When it was used as his pair of wings, its power was more or less being subdued. Conjuring the flame out on his palms caused Xu Que to feel its true power and found it hard to control it.

Thankfully, Xu Que had already cultivated the Buddha’s Fiery Lotus up to 30% capabilities and thus he could summon the three mystical fires at the same time. Additionally, his soul strength was rather strong as well. To effectively exert control over these three mystical flames at the same time wasn’t easy.

The crowd down on the ground looked up and watched Xu Que in fear.

"How’s this possible? He actually cultivated three different mystical fire skills!"

"And that white flame is producing coldness instead of heat. The other black flame and green flame feels extraordinarily hot. It almost feels like the three of them are not supposed to coexist besides each other. That feels so unnatural and yet he managed to cultivate the three of them together within the same body?"

"That’s too terrifying. This Xu Que’s physical capabilities must be extremely powerful! If not, this wouldn’t even be possible!"

Everyone watched as Xu Que controlled the three different colored flame that was producing immense heat. The crowd was stumped by the sight!

Everyone was guessing if Xu Que’s three flames were as powerful as the Fire Emperor’s Flaming Dragon.

Indeed, at this point, Xu Que made another move which shocked everyone to their cores.

Xu Que clapped his hands together as he pulled out a sliver of energy from within the air. Using this energy, he trapped the three mystical fires together and brought it up to his chest.

"Boom!"

In that second, the three mystical fires fused together, causing burst of sparks to appear. The intensity of such an act was immense and it almost seemed as though the three flames would explode from his hands at any moment!

The faces of everyone turned ashen.

"What… What’s he doing?"

"Is he crazy? He’s actually attempting to fuse all these three flames together!"

"He’s tired of living! Fuck me. Let’s get out of here!"

"This kid probably wants to kill himself and the Fire Emperor at the same time. Once the three fires break out of his control, nobody around here has any chance of survival!"

"What a joke! The Fire Emperor and the Flaming Sun Princess have the protection of the Imperial Qi from any harm but we don’t! This kid is doing something useless and would end up dying in vain!"

"Let’s go! We mustn’t stay any longer!"

Many people within the crowd couldn’t stand the thought of being there for another second. It was hard to withstand the crazy amount of pressure emanating out from the three flames.

Everyone started to jostle around in the crowd, trying to find a way out!

Many people within the palace didn’t dare to stay any longer as the flames within Xu Que’s hands looked out of control. They also knew that once the flame exploded, nobody would be able to survive.

In the blink of an eye, the entire palace was thrown into pandemonium and panic. Even the civilians standing outside the palace didn’t dare to stay as they retreated further into the distance. Only after moving away for several hundreds of meters did they stop shuffling.

Indeed, the expected explosion didn’t happen.

Xu Que had successfully fused the three flames without issues. His ten fingers were moving rapidly and erratically as he brought the three raging flames under his control using core energy. He kept them suppressed in his palms.

"Xiu, xiu, xiu…"

The air around the combined flame started rippling across in a frenzied manner. The flames seemed to be at its peak and yet it didn’t explode out uncontrollably. Everything looked as if it was under the control of Xu Que’s ten fingertips.

His long hair was blown back by the strong winds as his robes flapped unceasingly, making a rustling sound. When everyone turned to look at him, the person they saw was the king of demons!

"I finally understand how he managed to fuse those three mystical flames!" At this point, the Sky Incense Valley elder exclaimed.

"In order to do this, his soul strength had to be incredibly powerful. He needed to be able to exert full control over the mystical fires. Only someone who’s concentration skills are top notch would be able to do this. If he faced any distractions while combining the flames, it would mean suicide. This kid…"

"This kid is too fearsome to actually resort to such terrifying methods!"

"But how did he managed to do something like that? He combined three different flames which were of different characteristics!"

"Could this be a hidden art only exclusive to immortals and had been lost for many years?"

As soon as the Sky Incense Valley elder discovered this, many of them were beyond astonished!

"Boom!" The Fire Emperor had conjured the Flaming Dragon spell which caused his body to erupt in flames. Along with it, he carried boundless energy as he soared towards Xu Que.

As he was soaring the skies, he resembled a flying dragon.

The gargantuan Flaming Dragon had enveloped the entire skies and obscured it from view!

"No matter what you do, you will always be nothing more than an ant to me!" The Fire Emperor’s expression was ashen as he shouted out.

The capabilities of a monarch was naturally extremely fearsome. Nobody felt that Xu Que had the slightest chance of surviving this ordeal!

After all, this was a level six Infant Transformation Staged elite cultivator. When he conjured his Flaming Dragon spell, nobody could do anything about it.

Xu Que could also feel the immense power emanating out from the dragon. The sense of danger and foreboding was particularly strong in this instance. In fact, it was so powerful that his heart was trembling under the pressure.

However, he exerted control over his soul strength and composed himself. He then congealed the mystical fires within his hands, as his ten fingers moved in an bizzare and frenzied manner such that they couldn’t even be seen!

"Sou!"

At that moment, a fiery lotus was birthed in his hands, looking impressive.

This lotus had three colors on each petal. It was black, white and green. It looked extremely resplendent as faint embers surrounded the lotus. Within the lotus, however, terrifying energy was convulsing within. It almost seemed like the energy inside the lotus was about to explode out with its intense activities.

The crowd held their breaths and their hearts trembled.

He… He actually succeeded. He even fused the three fires and transformed them into a single lotus? What was this spell called?

"Dog Emperor, you’re just a little fart! You wish to act tough before me? Do you think your movements are very impressive? To me, you can’t even be compared to a piece of shit. Die now!"

As soon as the lotus was formed, Xu Que lashed out. His black wings flapped once as his shadow moved in a blur. Xu Que then tossed the fiery lotus towards the Emperor!

chapters.title: Chapter 212: I Throw This Bolt Of Lightning At Your Mum!
chapters.body:
Chapter 212: I Throw This Bolt Of Lightning At Your Mum!

Chapter 212: I Throw This Bolt Of Lightning At Your Mum!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Sou!

The three colored fiery lotus shot into the air, and moved graciously like a leaf floating above the surface of water.

The Fire Emperor took the form of a large, majestic golden dragon in the air. It produced a terrifying aura around it as it soared towards Xu Que.

At this point, the three colored fiery lotus appeared right before his eyes.

Everyone’s eyelids jumped. Compared to the Fire Emperor’s Flaming Dragon, Xu Que’s three colored lotus couldn’t really compare in fearsomeness. Could the fiery lotus really survive the Fire Emperor’s skill?

At the next moment, the fiery lotus exploded!

The three colored mystical flames ejected out of the lotus in sync, causing an immense explosion.

The power emanating from the explosion was at least 30 times stronger than his Killer Book with full Glory!

"Boom!"

The skies erupted in terrifying explosions as though it was about to swallow the heavens along with it.

The Fire Emperor’s body had been completely engulfed in flames, with him being right in the middle of it all. A huge ripple of energy coursed out from the epicenter as it dispersed through the skies.

The shockwave from the blast richoted throughout the entire land. The imperial palace was swaying from the impact of the blast while the ground beneath cracked.

Even Xu Que wasn’t expecting such power from the three colored lotus. The shockwave was sent out in all directions for several hundred meters.

Emerging out from the explosion, the Fire Emperor was falling uncontrollably from the skies before he landed on the roof, directly atop the throne room.

"Boom!"

The gold plated rooftop of the palace couldn’t handle the immense size and weight of the Fire Emperor who had taken the form of a huge dragon. A large crater formed within the roof and broke through, causing the Fire Emperor to fall right through into the throne room. When he landed, a loud crash could be heard.

The explosion was still chaining out in rapid succession, causing huge fiery ripples to crumple within the skies, painting the entire sky a bright shade of red.

The people on the ground were astonished by this sight.

A single lotus stalk could cause such devastating damage and immense strength! Even someone as powerful as the Fire Emperor was sent flying!

This… This was truly something that could destroy the heaven and earth!

"It’s too scary. The Fire Emperor is at level six of the Infant Transformation Stage and yet he was unable to defend himself successfully against the lotus!"

"What kind of fire was that? It even caused the air around to burn and contort!"

"A youth of the Original Infant Stage could muster such a powerful spell? Could it truly be given to him by Duan Jiu De?"

"But is Duan Jiu De really that powerful?"

"If he had directed that terrifying energy towards the ground, the entire Imperial Palace would explode and collapse!"

Many of them were beyond afraid and they felt like their hearts were about to jump out through their throats!

The Flaming Sun Princess and the rest outside the throne room watched on in utter disbelief with their eyes wide open.

To them, the most powerful cultivator they knew was the Fire Emperor who was of the Infant Transformation Stage level six. However, he had been defeated just like that!

That Xu Que… Truly, how strong is he?

The few of them turned to look into the throne room. The Fire Emperor’s body had broke right through the ceiling and even caused a huge crater on the ground. Furthermore, rocks and debris were strewn all around!

What was most scary was that the Fire Emperor didn’t budge an inch as he remained lying down on the ground!

"How… How’s this possible?" Concubine Fantasy’s face turned pale as she cried out.

Someone as awe inspiring and powerful as the Fire Emperor couldn’t even endure this blow? Has he suffered such severe injuries that he had passed out as a result?

The few of them looked at the Fire Emperor and were appalled. A certain sense of dread and fear overwhelmed them.

As for Xu Que, he had already flown back and was hovering over the throne room.

Earlier on, even he was thrown back in a short distance from the impact but wasn’t hurt at all. His face was filled with smiles as the system rang out consecutively within his head, telling him of the amount of act tough points he had earned.

At this point, he shouted out in an exaggerated voice once again, "Dog Emperor, come on out!"

"Are you afraid? But that was only just a warm up!"

"Quickly come out and fight it out with me! Fuck, I haven’t even activated my true powers yet!"

"Come, come, come... If you come out now, I shall give you a handicap... I shan’t use my legs!"

"Hello, hello, hello... Is anyone there? Hurry up, won’t you? If you don’t, the sun is going to set!"

Xu Que’s voice was very sonorous and it was filled with confidence as it echoed across the walls of the palace.

Everyone’s lips twitched into a snarl. Damn it, must you be so dramatic?

"Boom!"

All of a sudden, there was finally some reaction from within the throne room as a loud sound rang out. The Fire Emperor’s body shot up from within the room and back into the skies as killing intent surrounded him once more.

However, the Emperor was in an extremely poor shape right now.

His lips were stained with blood and the expensive and immaculate looking set of dragon embroidered robes had become tattered and torn from the force of the blast.

"Hssss!" The crowd inhaled deeply as they were astounded to see their monarch in such a pathetic state!

Besides, that set of dragon robe was a Six Star magical weapon yet it’s been destroyed!

Even those people who were standing extremely far away from the point of impact could feel the terrifying power of the three colored lotus. Indeed, everyone had underestimated its capabilities!

The fiery lotus had exploded right in front of the Fire Emperor which meant that he had absorbed the full impact of the blast. If it weren’t for the fact that his cultivation level was very high, along with the dragon robes which helped to absorb some damage as well as the Imperial Qi which protected him, he would’ve turned into ashes!

And yet he was still alive. The formless Imperial Qi which protected him meant that he was undefeatable here within the domains of the palace.

"Looks like the Fire Emperor has wasted a considerable amount of Imperial Qi!"

"The source of this Imperial Qi comes from the Imperial Tombs which was located on top of the dragon veins. The Imperial Qi also represents the prosperity of the nation. Strong Imperial Qi meant that the nation was doing well and its people were protected. However,in this battle, the Fire Emperor used a significant amount of Imperial Qi to protect him."

"Do not forget that within the Imperial Tombs, there are several generations of previous Emperors who are in deep sleep. Even though they’ve been in hibernation for a long time, they can still defend the integrity of the Fire Nation!"

"Don’t underestimate the Emperor, for he has many more tricks up his sleeves. That was to be expected of someone from the royal family!"

Everyone broke out in hushed discussion.

Indeed, the Fire Emperor hovered in mid air. His face was downcast but he stared at Xu Que and laughed out, "You cannot kill me. I am ordained by the heavens as your Emperor. No matter how strong you are, you won’t be able to destroy my body. And now, it’s my turn to strike!"

As soon as his words landed, the Fire Emperor waved his clenched fist, causing the ground beneath the palace to tremble. Stones and debris flew in all directions as an unspeakable wave of power seemed to roil from underground. When it finally emerged, the energy surrounded his body!

"This…"

Flaming Sun Princess and the rest of them watched the situation with their eyes wide open. "Father is using the hundred year old Imperial QI. This… This would cause our Fire Nation to become weaker since he was drawing the ancient energy!"

"Fire Emperor has already made up his mind to kill Xu Que despite the cost!" Zi Xuan shouted out.

Indeed, Xu Que who was hovering in the air laughed out, his lips curled into a snarl, "Dog Emperor, are you going to show me yet another ultimate skill? Come, come, come.. This time, I shall let you eat some of my Monkey Blocks Lightning skill!"

As soon as he said this, he raised his palms to the skies. Immediately, it started to rumble as streaks of lightning appeared!

"Weng!"

A sharp sound rang out which shattered the silence and pierced through the air. At the next moment, frenzied rays of electricity started to form on Xu Que’s palms as it became bigger!

Everyone watched on in amazement.

This… This kid has so many spells. He really has an arsenal of weapons to choose from!

And isn’t he a citizen of the Fire Nation? How could he exhibit such powerful looking lightning spell? And it feels so powerful even from here!

The Fire Emperor’s expression fell as well. Even he was astonished. It was hard for him to believe that within a year, this person had improved so rapidly.

What have you gone through to become so strong?

"Boom!"

"I throw this bolt of lightning at your mum!"

(T/N: Or can also be "Fuck your mum!")

At this point, the lightning arcs within his hands had increased in size, such that it was as huge as his body. He then tossed the entire ball of electric energy towards the Fire Emperor!

"Ignorant little worm!"

The Fire Emperor cleared his throat as he clapped his hands gently. The Imperial Qi which had been seeping out from the cracks in the ground immediately formed a wall of energy which can defend him from any projectiles.

At that moment…

A loud "boom" rang out as the huge ball of electrical energy appeared right before him and exploded with immense intensity!

chapters.title: Chapter 213: Que De, Lacking In Morals
chapters.body:
Chapter 213: Que De, Lacking In Morals

Chapter 213: Que De, lacking in morals

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

As the ball exploded, boundless of electrical energy surrounded the Fire Emperor threateningly. The arcs of electricity were buzzing all around him unceasingly.

At the same time, right within the nucleus of the ball of energy bore a small trace of purple electricity. This had been acquired when Xu Que was undergoing his Tribulation. Despite the size of the purple electrical energy, it’s powers were unthinkable!

Since Xu Que had the Killer Book which was at full Glory, any attack had its strength increased by 30 times!

It was obvious that the Fire Emperor was in for a tragedy!

"Pu!"

Despite the ancient Imperial Qi’s protection, the Fire Emperor spat out a mouthful of blood.

After being surrounded by so many arcs of electrical pulses, he was starting to convulse and twitch involuntarily.

This wasn’t because he was too weak. It was because Xu Que had used such immense power!

By itself, the Lightning Tribulation spell was exceedingly powerful. When its strength was multiplied by 30, it far surpassed what the Fire Emperor could withstand!

It was fortunate for the Fire Emperor that he could summon the Imperial Qi to his aid as it significantly reduced the effects of the lightning. If not, he would’ve probably been burnt to a crisp with no chances of survival.

Spitting out a little blood meant that he was exceptionally lucky to come out relatively unscathed.

The Fire Emperor’s heart was filled with fear. He found it extremely hard to believe that apart from the three colored fiery lotus, Xu Que had other spells up his sleeves.

How… How was this possible?

It had only been a year. How could he have gotten so strong?

The Fire Emperor was inching extremely close to insanity. However, there was nothing he could do at this point. He could only keep drawing on the Imperial Qi to absorb the powers of the lightning arcs!

Everyone’s faces was filled with dread and they were all stupefied by this scene.

The Fire Emperor had spat out blood again?

A level 6 Infant Transformation elite fighter was being beaten up by this level seven Original Infant. Can you believe it?

And… And he even had to rely on the Imperial Qi to absorb the damage. If it weren’t for the Imperial Qi, would the Emperor have been murdered?

Everyone thought about this as their bodies started to tremble and their scalps turned numb. Even their backs started dripping cold sweat.

Scary… He’s really too scary!

Heavenly Explosion Faction’s Xu Que. This name had been imprinted on the minds of the disciples from the great sects and all the other cultivators and civilians of the Imperial City.

Nobody would ever forget that this young man managed to make the Fire Emperor spit blood out. Not once, but twice!

In fact, this youth even slept with the Fire Emperor’s concubine, the Flaming Sun Princess, and was about to make his advances on the Fire Emperor’s sister!

He was truly insane and no words could be used to accurately describe him!

"Haha! Dog Emperor, so it seems like you’re afraid of lightning! Indeed, for something as despicable as you should be struck by lightning repeatedly. Fine. I shall give you another two Monkey Blocks Lightnings!" Xu Que raised both his palms and concentrated for a second before another two balls of lightning appeared.

"Buzz" The sound of electricity rang out from Xu Que’s palms. Likewise, these two balls of electricity started becoming bigger again.

The crowd drew in a breath of cold air.

"Hssss, this kid is way too powerful. He’s way too fucking powerful! I’ve never seen anything like him!"

Just a single ball of lightning energy was enough to make the Emperor spit out blood and now he conjured another two balls for him.

But… This seemed like it wasn’t going to work. Although the Fire Emperor did spit out blood, to an Infant Transformation Stage cultivator, that meant that it was only a light injury!

If the Fire Emperor used a stronger killing spell, Xu Que would die without questions!

Everyone sighed out within their hearts.

At this point, the Fire Emperor conjured more Imperial Qi as another thick layer of white energy surrounded him.

The Fire Emperor was drawing on the ancient Imperial Qi to his defenses. In actual fact, he was drawing the power from his Imperial Tombs!

People who understood such matters knew that the entire palace was surrounded by a large powerful spell. This spell was closely related to the power of the Imperial Tombs.

A person with the blood of the imperial family flowing within their veins could draw on the Imperial Qi as long as he was standing nearby the source of the power. In fact, this person could make use of the Imperial Qi to acquire a very mysterious energy!

"Today, I shall vanquish you!" The Fire Emperor shouted out, his voice reverberating across the entire palace!

At the door of the throne room...

"Emperor father has already started it!" The Flaming Sun Princess whispered, her face revealed a grave expression.

As a member of the imperial family, she could feel the mysterious energy on the Fire Emperor as well!

This energy was called the Emperor’s Energy and originated from the ancestors of the Imperial family. Despite the fact that they were already dead, their bodies still lingered within the Imperial Tombs and were perfectly preserved.

However, there was a certain tradition within the imperial family. That tradition was that after knowing that his time is up, the Emperor would walk into the Imperial Tombs and lie on the stone. Just before he dies, he has to hold his breath. This last final breath wouldn’t change for all eternity and would be sealed in his body within the tomb!

As long as this spell was in place, the Imperial family could use their ancestors’ final breath and use it to cultivate to increase their strengths whenever the need arose.

However, the accumulation of such strength was extremely slow and could only rely on time to increase its potency. Besides, using this once meant that there was one less time to use it in the future.

The Emperor had started using this particular energy. It clearly showed the extent of which he wanted to kill Xu Que- that he would risk anything.

Xu Que didn’t notice this as he continued conjuring the pair of lightning balls. Indeed, he had added a purple streak of lightning to each of his two lighting balls.

Before long, he held up a large pair of Monkey Blocks Lightning balls and were bigger than his own body!

The electric energy are spinning and convulsing within the spheres violently.

"Dog Emperor, catch this!"

Xu Que then raised his hands high above his head before throwing the pair of balls with all his might. The size of the balls were so immense they almost resembled a pair of flying mountains, moving towards the Fire Emperor!

However, the Fire Emperor didn’t catch it this time.

With a flash, the Imperial Qi enveloped his body as he dodged the pair of lightning balls with incredible speed.

The Emperor believed that as long as he continued keeping this up, allowing the Emperor’s Energy to congeal within him, his cultivation powers would increase tremendously. In fact, he might even be able to advance to the Void Refining Stage and possess terrifying powers.

"Yo, stop running! Are you terrified yet!?" Xu Que watched as the Emperor retreated while taunting him!

At the same time, the ability from God of Hell’s Compulsion allowed him to control electrical energy. At this point, it finally showed its usefulness.

All he had to do was to concentrate and the pair of lightning balls which the Fire Emperor had already dodge turned around and shot straight at the Emperor once again!

Concurrently, Xu Que started beating his dark black flaming wings, causing a tornado. His shadow became a blur as he shot towards the Fire Emperor with startling speed!

At that precise moment, something unexpected happened!

The Fire Emperor didn’t retaliate by using his powerful spells. Instead, he decided to use his normal skills. Yet, his speed wasn’t by any means slow as he managed to dodge both the balls of electrical energy once again as well as roll out of the way of Xu Que’s strike!

Everyone watched on, completely bewildered.

The Fire Emperor was… being pursued?

Only the Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan understood what he was trying to do.

He was holding out for as long as he could, up to the final moments. Then, he would use all the Emperor’s Energy which he had been condensing and increase his cultivation level!

Such a method was as good as summoning his forefathers into battle and helping to increase his cultivation!

"Dog Emperor, why are you running? Are you trying to charge another great ultimate skill? It’s no use. Watch out for my fearsome blade! Everytime I wield it, it takes a life!" Xu Que was laughing icily as he drew his Infinity Edge. Increasing his speed once again, he maneuvered himself in such a way that he ended up behind the Emperor.

At the next moment, the blinding flash of a sword could be seen!

"Chi la!"

The torn and tattered dragon robes which had been worn by the Emperor was sliced and completely torn this time as it broke off the Emperor and fell to the ground.

Hence, the great monarch of the Fire Nations had nothing to conceal his modesty and was completely naked. Every inch of his body was subjected to scrutiny by everyone present!

The people down below fell into silence. They were all shocked by such a scene.

Even they could tell that Xu Que’s sword attack wasn’t to harm or kill him. It was fairly obvious that Xu Que had intentionally slashed his robes off, causing the Emperor to look extremely foolish!

"This… This kid is extremely unorthodox in his ways!"

"Who would’ve expected that in such a fierce battle for life and death, he would actually think about how to humiliate his opponent."

"He is indeed the disciple of Duan Jiu De. Such an erratic personality, he is exactly the same as how Duan Jiu De has been described!"

"That’s not all! When you compare them, it even seemed like Xu Que’s more bizarre than his master!"

"Why do you say that?"

"Have you forgotten what happened earlier? Have you ever seen someone hurl shit while he was fighting?"

"Gulp…"

The group of them remained speechless.

This Duan Jiu De and now Xu Que!

This kid… The pair of them are oddities. One of them is called Que and the other is called De.

Damn it! When you put their names together, it becomes Que De!

(T/N: Que de means unscrupulous, or lacking in morals)

chapters.title: Chapter 214: Stories About The Dog Emperor
chapters.body:
Chapter 214: Stories About The Dog Emperor

Chapter 214: Stories About The Dog Emperor

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"Boom!"

Boundless energy exploded out from the Emperor’s body and it wrapped around him, covering him from everything else.

The rage on his face was evident and he looked extremely fearsome!

Xu Que’s methods of fighting, with no morals or principles, would certainly cause everyone to feel enraged! He was too unorthodox.

What happened to the blade which you said would claim lives every time you wield it?

You only used it to rip apart his robes. In this cultivation world, only people with no moral standards would do something like that! All the cultivators often adhered to a strict moral code, despite the amount of hate. Nobody would resort to such underhanded methods to humiliate someone.

The Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan were taken aback by this. The Fire Emperor was the monarch of this nation yet Xu Que had repeatedly humiliated him. Regardless of the outcome today, the Fire Emperor would’ve lost his face. That was for sure.

Concubine Fantasy’s eyes were wide open in shock. She understood Xu Que the best among all this people and was stumped to see him act this way.

Was this still the same person from before? The same well mannered, shy and respectful young man?

They’ve been apart for less than a year and yet the changes in his personality was so vast, it seemed almost impossible.

"Hahaha! Dog Emperor, you’re just… Hehehe." Xu Que’s laughter rang out uncontrollably from the skies.

Xu Que thought about how the Emperor looked when he was naked and couldn’t help but laugh out.

Everyone around was wondering what Xu Que was up to again. What was the reason for him to laugh so loudly?

"Everyone! Everyone… After fighting for half a day, I’m tired too! Why don’t I tell you more stories about this dog Emperor? What do you say?" Xu Que was beaming as he spoke, withdrawing his smile soon after.

Stories about the Emperor?

Damn you Xu Que, how many stories and secrets have you heard about the Emperor and the royal family?

Everyone around was extremely curious especially about the internal affairs within the Imperial Palace. Who wouldn’t love to listen to such tales?

It was only that nobody dared to reply Xu Que or show the slightest interest in whatever he was saying. However, they straightened their postures and pricked their ears to listen. They were all waiting in anticipation for more juicy gossips regarding the Fire Emperor.

"Ai? Why is everyone so quiet? Since silence means consent, it means that all of you wish to hear more! Sure, I shall accept your request! Dog Emperor, I shall count to three. If you remain silent, it means that you’re in agreement as well and that I should tell them everything about you…"

As soon as he said that, Xu Que rattled off the numbers rapidly, "One, two, three! Done! Looks like you agree too! I shall tell them then…" Xu Que’s shameless and thick skinned behavior rendered the entire crowd speechless as they opened their eyes, astonished at how crazy this person was. The Fire Emperor was down below, very close to spitting blood once again.

To meet someone as shameless as this person… was impossible! Nobody could ever beat this Xu Que in a shamelessness contest!

Xu Que clearly didn’t care about what people thought about him. He thus gave an approving look as he started speaking excitedly, "Once upon a time, this dog Emperor was feeling rather ill and unwell, and thus invited a doctor over…"

When the people down below heard this, they were curious. "Yo, this story is about the Emperor falling sick but… The Fire Emperor is of the Infant Transformation Stage and his body is incapable of falling ill. How could this be true?"

What Xu Que was about to say, was probably fabricated, considering how he’s so lacking in morals.

However, the group of people down below who were eating seeds and watching the entire conflict didn’t care whether Xu Que was lying or speaking the truth.

After all, he had lived within the palace for so many years and was the Lord Prince Consort! Especially something as intimate about the Emperor seeing a doctor, only people who were close to him like Princesses and Prince Consorts would ever know about this.

Hence, everyone listened attentively to Xu Que. The Fire Emperor called for a doctor in. What was the reason for that?

Besides, Xu Que was exceptionally good at tricking people and was a master of telling stories, being able to captivate attention everywhere he went!

Seeing that he had gained the attention of the crowd, he sniggered once more. Since they were now at his disposal, he continued the story, "The dog Emperor secretly called the doctor to visit him and told him strictly that no matter what he saw, he must not laugh. The doctor nodded his head earnestly and promised not to laugh. However, the Emperor still didn’t believe him and reinforced his point once more, this time, threatening the doctor, saying that if he laughed, he will be killed."

Hearing this, the crowd felt extremely curious. What sickness did the Fire Emperor get? Why did he insist that the doctor must not laugh?

"After the doctor made three consecutive vows that he wouldn’t laugh, the dog Emperor finally called the doctor over before gradually pulling down his pants."

Xu Que continued speaking as he looked down and saw the Fire Emperor below, shaking in anger. He then laughed out and continued the story, "As soon as the doctor saw the Emperor’s privates, he couldn’t help but burst out laughing. While he was laughing, he was asking, ‘why was it so small? Hahaha! Why was it so small?"

As soon as Xu Que finished speaking, everyone simultaneously turned their heads to look at the Fire Emperor. Although he was shielded in fire which covered most of his naked body, everyone could still faintly see his privates. And indeed… It was, cough, cough, very small!

However, this wasn’t a big deal!

Regardless of how small the Emperor was down there, nobody dared to laugh!

Still, as soon as Xu Que broached this subject, a small group of people couldn’t hold their laughter in and started laughing.

‘Boom!’

"Outrageous! What are you laughing about? If you continue laughing, I shall put you to death!" The Fire Emperor had been angry for a long time now. After seeing the crowd burst out laughing, he raged out at them and shouted angrily.

Who would’ve expected that as soon as he lashed out, Xu Que pointed at him and shouted even louder, "Yes, yes, yes, correct! As soon as the doctor laughed out, the dog Emperor said the exact same thing! If you continue laughing, I shall put you to death…"

That was the exact situation!

After Xu Que had said this, the crowd could almost imagine the scene which he had described. All of them could envision the doctor, doing his utmost best to stop laughing and the enraged Fire Emperor standing across.

However, the Emperor was truly angry at this point and almost took his rage out onto the people who were laughing.

At this moment, the group of people who were laughing held a hand to their mouths to stop themselves from laughing further. Their faces had turned red because even if they found it funny, they knew they couldn’t laugh!

"Yes, yes, yes! The doctor looked exactly the same as all of you right now! It isn’t easy to be a doctor as well! After seeing something so hilarious, he can’t even laugh. But all this was caused by… Ai, all this was caused by the dog Emperor in the first place…"

Xu Que sighed out and shook his head as he continued to speak, "After trying his hardest, the doctor finally managed to hold his laughter in. He had no choice! If he continued laughing, he would lose his life! Hence, he inhaled deeply and squatted down to look at the Emperor’s tiny little brother. He then asked sincerely, ‘Your majesty, may I ask what’s the problem with your dragon? Can you tell me now?’"

At this point, the group of people eating seeds down below were extremely curious as to what the ending of Xu Que’s story might be. However, they were also afraid of the Emperor’s rage. But they wanted to know what the Emperor’s sickness is.

The Fire Emperor glanced across with intense hatred. However, he didn’t wish to fall into Xu Que’s trap and waste all the Imperial Qi which he had been charging up and ruin his own plan. Hence, he stood there and endured the story. His heart was almost about to explode from anger but he maintained his composure.

He knew that once the time was right, Xu Que would die. There was no question about that!

Right at this point, Xu Que laughed out and continued his story.

"The doctor knelt down and asked the dog Emperor what the problem was. However, the dog Emperor still couldn’t relax and reminded the doctor once again. ‘Once I tell you, you must not laugh. You really must not laugh.’ At this point, the doctor felt like he could control his emotions. Isn’t it because it’s very small? He had already realized this point and he wouldn’t laugh anymore. Hence he made the promise, saying that he wouldn’t laugh."

After countless more promises, the dog Emperor could finally relax. He then pointed at his private part and told the doctor, "My dragon… is swollen!"

chapters.title: Chapter 215: Yo, You’Re Trying To Cheat Me?
chapters.body:
Chapter 215: Yo, You’Re Trying To Cheat Me?

Chapter 215: Yo, You’re Trying To Cheat Me?

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Swollen?

Fuck me!

It was already swollen but it’s still so small!

The crowd who acted exactly as the doctor did and tried to control their laughter, couldn’t hold it in any longer. Everyone burst out in uncontrollable laughter.

Many of them laughed till tears rolled down their cheeks!

Some of them laughed till their stomachs hurt and they fell to the ground and started rolling around, unable to get up.

Damn it, why was this kid so low?

He could actually fabricate such a story to mock the Emperor’s little penis!

Outrageous!

This was truly outrageous!

When Xu Que first started telling the story, it did sound like a true story about life within the Imperial Palace.

When he reached the end of the story and recounted how the Emperor said "it’s swollen", everyone knew that the story was fabricated from start to end.

But…

Why was it so darned funny?

Once a person started laughing, he couldn’t stop!

This was especially true after everyone looked at the Emperor and saw his expression of anger. It was the main reason why everyone couldn’t stop laughing.

Indeed, Xu Que’s foolery had caused the Emperor to feel so angry that smoke was almost coming out from his nostrils. However, he was disciplined and endured the anger wordlessly floating in the air.

When he saw Xu Que tossing over the Monkey Blocks Lightning, the Emperor could only passively dodge the projectiles.

Everyone within the crowd were laughing so hard, they couldn’t straighten their backs. If only they knew how angry the Emperor was and that he was so humiliated, he could conjure a spell to kill them all, they probably wouldn’t behave this way.

And yet when they looked up, they realized that the Emperor didn’t look like he wanted revenge from Xu Que. He was just standing there, hiding away from everyone. Was… Was this really their Infant Transformation Stage, unrivalled Fire Emperor?

"Dog Emperor, fuck your mum!"

"Dog Emperor, if you have the guts, stop hiding…"

"Dog Emperor! Hello, hello, hello, can you try a little harder?"

"Dog Emperor, I heard you were very powerful? What happened to your strengths?"

"Dog Emperor, quick look… Your little brother is swollen!"

Just like that, Xu Que was rejoicing in the Fire Emperor’s humiliation as the Fire Emperor has an ashen look across his face. He was dodging most of the attacks, occasionally sending out some weak spells. However, he was clearly in a defensive stance. It didn’t even seem like he was interested in using some massive spell to overcome his taunting foe.

As time went on, the crowd started getting puzzled.

"What’s wrong with the Fire Emperor? Why is he always on the retreat?"

"There’s no reason for him not to fight back!"

"No, it’s hard for him to withstand Xu Que’s powerful spells. Besides, Xu Que has the three colored fiery lotus and numerous lightning balls, which shouldn’t be underestimated!"

"I understand now. The Fire Emperor doesn’t wish to waste too much of his Imperial Qi defending his blows. After all, doing so is very detrimental to the health of the nation!"

"But dragging the fight this way isn’t a good plan as well. Look at Xu Que. His energy and strength hasn’t dwindled ever since the start of the fight. His core energy looks abundant, never getting close to being diminished!"

"It’s too scary. This youth is probably the youngest elite cultivator all across the five nations and the most talented!"

"It’s such a waste! He’s gotten on the wrong side of the Fire Emperor!"

"Could he really be the same Prince Consort from all those years ago? After the Emperor and Concubine Fantasy schemed to harm him, he’s really going all out to pursue his revenge!"

"That’s probably the case. If not, his methods wouldn’t be so vile and merciless!"

Everyone had started to become suspicious of the Fire Emperor and believed that Xu Que was truly the Prince Consort. It made sense that he was coming back for revenge after going through such hardships caused by the Emperor.

At this point, Xu Que had started to realize that something wasn’t right. The Fire Emperor was an elite cultivator, level six of the Infant Transformation realm. How could he endure so much humiliation by dodging his attacks without retaliation?

And he was being chased after and pursued in front of so many people. Rumors were going to spread for sure!

At first, Xu Que thought that the Fire Emperor was charging up some massively powerful spell. He was thus prepared to purchase some high grade defensive items and weapons to counter it.

However, even if he was charging a powerful spell, it wouldn’t take that long. Besides, he didn’t even look like he was doing anything. What was going on?

Xu Que thus started to feel suspicious. He halted his flight, still hovering in mid air.

Although his attack speed was very quick, the Emperor had the Imperial Qi to protect him. At this point, the Emperor’s own defense had far surpassed that of the Infant Transformation Stage and yet he was still draining the nation’s reserves in order to fight it out with Xu Que.

Under such power, Xu Que’s three colored fiery lotus along with the lightning balls wouldn’t be able to kill the Fire Emperor. The worst case situation would probably just the same as the current, causing the Emperor to lose more face in front of everyone.

But if this was allowed to continue, what if the Fire Emperor managed to pull a rabbit out of the hat?

If you really wanted to act tough well, you have to prepare for emergencies!

Because there’s a wise saying that goes something like this...

Acting tough is only for the prepared.

Hence, he decided not to waste any more time and called out for his system.

"System, check for me, what on earth is that dog Emperor doing?"

"Ding! Detection successful. The target is doing a certain palace ritual and accumulating the Emperor’s Energy. His current completion is 40%!"

"What is that? Emperor’s Energy?" Xu Que was rather astonished.

"The Emperor’s Energy is a ritual. In simpler terms, it’s the last dying breath of each Emperor, held in his mouth for all eternity. It’s considered rather precious and can be drawn upon by his successors. This energy is extremely powerful and can be used to increase one’s cultivation level during emergencies."

"Fuck! Are you trying to say that the dog Emperor is sucking on his ancestors breath? That’s damn disgusting!"

When Xu Que finished hearing this, he frowned before asking, "When he completes up to 100%, how much increase will his cultivation level be?"

"The current target is already at 45% completion of the Emperor’s Energy. When he finally reaches 100%, he will be at the Void Refining Stage level one. His strengths would be unrivalled. With the host’s current capabilities, this system recommends that you flee for your life immediately."

"What the? Ascend to the Void Refining Stage?" When Xu Que heard this, he was stumped.

"Damn it, this dog Emperor is already at the Infant Transformation Stage level six. Together with his Imperial Qi to protect him, his powers are disgustingly strong. If he was allowed to transcend to the Void Refining Stage, I won’t be able to do anything to him!"

"Original Infant level seven and yet it’s not even going to be enough. Even with the Killer Book at full Glory, it would be hard to withstand the might of the Fire Emperor especially since he’s drawing on such powerful ancient energy!"

"Fuck me!"

"Thankfully I’m such an intelligent person. If not, instead of acting tough, I would be eating grass."

"I probably still can fight this Infant Transformation Fire Emperor. But once he ascends to the Void Refining Stage, I probably run for my life!"

"On the other hand, as the king of acting tough…"

"How could I tuck my tail between my legs and flee just like that?"

"And to flee after creating such a grand stage for me to act tough?"

"If I actually flee now, isn’t there no difference between that and eating grass?"

"If one doesn't act tough, how is he different from a calf?"

"No!"

"I cannot run!"

"I cannot hide!"

"I must be strong!"

"If not, I will probably despise myself."

Xu Que thought in his head calmly as his eyes flickered. He had a plan!

"Dog Emperor, you’re trying to trick me. Heheh… I’m certain you haven’t read . I shall show you how a General thinks and see what you can do about it!" Xu Que laughed coldly. He was elated at having thought of a plan.

chapters.title: Chapter 216: The Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 216: The Plan

Chapter 216: The Plan

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

At that exact moment…

Xu Que’s glance fell upon the Fire Emperor who was once again inching away, trying to avoid him.

Xu Que’s expression froze on his face as he shouted out coldly, "Dog Emperor, stop wasting your Imperial Qi. This Imperial Qi is supposed to uphold and maintain the stability of the Fire Nation and directly affects the well-being of your people. I, Xu Que, wouldn’t want to bring suffering upon the innocent lives just because of our personal vendetta!"

When everyone heard this, they were shocked.

Hm? Why did this kid had such an abrupt change? All of a sudden, he’s worried about the safety and well-being of the innocent lives?

But that’s not right, isn’t it? Although it’s true that the Imperial Qi determines the prosperity of the Fire Nation, it only means that the country’s wealth and life was affected. That has nothing much to do with the actual lives of the civilians!

What is he trying to do now?

Many cultivators within the training grounds looked up at Xu Que with looks of astonishment written across their faces.

Most of these cultivators around had already gotten used to Xu Que’s eccentric and deceptive nature. When they saw him behaving like this, in such a self-righteous manner, they felt that something strange was happening.

The Sky Incense Valley disciples watched Xu Que warily, certain that there was definitely some hidden meaning to his words.

Not right!

There’s something not quite right here!

A ploy!

A ploy is going on right now. This kid is from the Heavenly Explosion Faction and everyone of them are cunning and will never have such sentiments for the civilian lives!

However, there were many other civilians who couldn’t see through Xu Que and were moved by his words.

When they heard that the Fire Emperor was presently endangering the lives of innocent civilians, they felt rather anxious. This was especially since they were just normal people and had no way to stand up for themselves. The only thing they could do was to sit and worry about their futures.

As soon as they heard Xu Que’s words, they felt extremely touched.

"What a good kid!"

Within the group of civilians, one of them was a frail old man who’s holding on to a walking stick for support. He was trembling as he spoke out.

"In order to ensure our safety, he actually decided to put aside his own need for personal revenge!"

"Ai, he’s such a good man. Why did life have to be so unfair to him?"

"Today, we shall all remember the name Xu Que!"

Many normal civilians were moved by his actions and they sighed out regretfully.

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 80 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 100 act tough points!"

Right at this point, Xu Que was hovering in the air as the system notifications rang out within his head but he didn’t pay it any mind.

Xu Que sighed out deeply as though he had given up on the thing which mattered most to him in this life. His face was filled with sadness and disappointment as he looked up towards the skies and spoke out, "An eye for an eye makes the whole world blind. Dog Emperor, I’ve already exposed all your misdeeds in the past. Seeing as to how you’ve been a good Emperor to most of these people here and how I’ve beaten you so many times today but you still refuse to retaliate against me, I guess you’re also feeling guilty and ashamed to face me after all the wrong you’ve committed. Is that right? Fine. Since that’s the case, I shall let you off!"

As soon as these words were spoken, everyone was stupefied!

Fuck. This kid isn’t going to fight anymore?

The Fire Emperor is feeling guilty for all the wrong he commited and thus decided not to retaliate? So that’s why he’s been acting that way!

Many civilians around were shocked by this as well.

"This young man is so concerned for us mortals that he even decided to discard his hatred and need for vengeance!"

"He’s truly different from the other cold blooded cultivators. He’s a good man!"

"Such a forgiving magnanimity is truly deserving of admiration!"

Within the blink of an eye, the shadow of Xu Que had become a symbol of goodness and benevolence!

However, the Fire Emperor was stunned by whatever he had said. The main reason he had been hiding and dodging for so long was to not waste Imperial Qi by taking damage from Xu Que. In fact, he started to draw upon the Emperor’s Energy rather than draining the country’s reserve of Imperial Qi. All he needed was a little more time and he would be able to increase his cultivation level to the Void Refining Stage and flay Xu Que’s skin from his meat before killing him!

Yet now, Xu Que abruptly said that he no longer wished to fight? That completely took him by surprise.

Fuck!

Why… is he so eccentric and unpredictable?

If he doesn’t wish to fight anymore, who am I going to use my powers and skills on?

The Fire Emperor felt extremely anxious now.

He had painstakingly chose to draw on the precious Emperor’s Energy. All of these energy was extremely rare and had been left behind by his ancestors. Once he started the process of extracting the energy, there was no way of giving it back. Then… Wouldn’t all this go to waste?

Also, what was most important was that he had been pursued and beaten by Xu Que countlessly in front of everyone. To the audience, his face had already been thrown for losing in several bouts. Indeed, he was like a turtle recoiling his head into his shell.

That was the reason he chose to draw on the energy and amass his powers before killing Xu Que after reaching his peak. His plan was to ascend into the Void Refining Stage and overwhelm Xu Que and thus reclaim his pride and dignity from him!

His chance to do all that would require a little more time!

Now that Xu Que had turned around and was about to leave, the Fire Emperor was so upset, he almost vomited blood.

His whole body was trembling and yet he was still holding his fiery anger in. The Fire Emperor then shouted out, "Xu Que, if you really have a vendetta against me, let’s settle it today! If you leave now, it would mean that you are like a turtle who’s hiding in its shell!"

The crowd heard this and froze in shock.

The Fire Emperor still wishes to fight?

What was going on? When Xu Que wanted to fight, you were running and dodging. Now that he decided not to fight, you want him to stay and continue?

Could it be that the Emperor was addicted to the feeling of fleeing from his enemies?

The Emperor has… such a strange addiction?

The hundreds of mortal civilians were standing around in shock as well. However, at this point, anger started to well up within their hearts.

Xu Que is such a good kid. He didn’t want to harm the Fire Nation’s Imperial Qi and decided to voluntarily place down his need for vengeance.

But you, as the monarch of the FIre Nation, wished to continue wasting the Imperial Qi just for a fight? Are you still human?

Fire Emperor, you bastard!

The crowd glared at the Fire Emperor in anger, their hearts were cursing out at him angrily!

At the same time, the act tough points kept coming in, announced by the system within his head. He was laughing out for joy in his heart!

His face however, had a look of composure. He frowned before scolding the Emperor, "You still wish to fight? Are you even human? If you have the guts, dissipate your Imperial Qi now and fight with me. Stop using the futures of these innocent people as a shield!"

When the Fire Emperor heard this, he sighed in relief. As long as Xu Que didn’t leave, there was still a chance for him to reclaim his dignity.

But to scatter his Imperial Qi? Truth be told, he didn’t dare to. That’s because he had already experienced first hand a pair of Xu Que’s spells and they were terrifying.

However, as the Emperor of a nation, he was shrewd and had more tricks up his sleeves.

The Fire Emperor then replied, "The reason I’ve used the Imperial Qi is to weaken your three colored fiery lotus and lightning balls for those skills would destroy my entire city and harm innocent lives. If I scatter the Imperial Qi, you must not use those two spells as well. Also, you cannot use any spells which are too destructive in nature. Why don’t we have a proper comparison of who is more powerful?"

When Xu Que heard this, he was elated. He wasn’t allowed to use his Buddha’s Fiery Lotus and Lightning Balls? No problem! The main point here was to get rid of the Imperial Qi. As for killing you, I have a hundred other ways!

Dog Emperor, you’re indeed very sneaky. Do you really think I don’t know what you’re up to? What a joke! Standing before the act tough king, how can you ever dream to act tough?

At that moment, Xu Que replied without hesitation, "Sure. As long as you don’t use the Imperial Qi, I won’t use those spells. Today, we shall resolve this vendetta between us. Bring it!"

chapters.title: Chapter 217: I Want This Jade Seal!
chapters.body:
Chapter 217: I Want This Jade Seal!

Chapter 217: I Want This Jade Seal!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

He agreed?

As soon as these words were spoken by Xu Que, the crowd was bewildered once more!

This kid actually agreed to the Fire Emperor’s request to not use those spells? Fuck! Then how was he going to fight?

Many people within the crowd were still eating seeds but had no idea what was happening. They couldn’t understand why either party was acting the way they did!

One gave up his Imperial Qi shield protection, while the other gave up two of his most powerful spells. What were they trying to do? Are they speaking the truth about not wanting to harm the innocent?

"That’s not good. Does that Xu Que have more spells which he can use?"

"For a person to ever cultivate two equally powerful spells within his lifetime was extremely rare. Much less the fact that he only had a year of cultivation. He most definitely wouldn’t have other spells to use!"

"However, if he gives up those two powerful spells, the Fire Emperor’s strength without his Imperial Qi is still formidable and would be enough to kill Xu Que!"

"Looks like the youth was too brash and fell into the ploys of the Fire Emperor!"

"He’s indeed too young and inexperienced, sigh!"

Everyone around shook their heads. Most of them assumed that Xu Que had been angered by the Emperor and thus lost his sense of intelligence in the moment. That was the only plausible explanation as to why he would agree to such a request. At this point, it was impossible for Xu Que to back down after agreeing!

However, the Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan thinks otherwise.

Back in the wilderness, they still remembered what Xu Que had said about himself. That he "doesn’t live up to his own words"!

This kid had no limits in anything he did, ignored boundaries and was extremely unconventional in the way he handled problems. He promised that he wouldn’t use those two spells? Haha! Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan felt that it was impossible that he would keep his words!

"He would most certainly use those two spells!" Zi Xuan shook her head and laughed out bitterly.
