If you don’t learn anything, they will refund you,

800 excavators in line,

There are some perverted students and other lecherous ones.

All the teachers are professors,

Look for friends, search for some enemies,

Everyone would try chrysanthemums,

Only with aspiration will success follow,

Lanxiang is a good place.

To learn skills and to ply your trade in the east.

Three thousand beds that aren’t made of steel…"

(T/N: Translated to english, this doesn't make any sense. But this is supposedly a quote boasting about how good the Shan Dong Lanxiang Vocational School is, where they teach skills of a foreman)

The elder was completely astounded.

The few students were in a daze as well.

What the hell?

What’s this dude talking about?

Why didn’t I understand a single sentence that he said? One minute, you spoke of Lanxiang, another minute, you spoke of the east. Where are you from exactly?

"Boom boom boom!" The excavator had dug out almost half of the soil needed to reach the bottom.

The amount of earth piled up by the side had already reached a considerable size.

The elder and his disciples stopped speaking as they watched him at work from the foot of the mountain. The more they watched, the more surprised and curious they became.

They’ve never seen any grave robber making so much noise in their lives. In fact, it even seemed like he wasn’t afraid of being caught!

"Boom!" The excavator was digging deeper and deeper as the mound beside it was becoming taller.

At last, as success doesn’t evade the hardworking, Xu Que finally hit concrete.

At this point, several Moving Mountains Sect disciples outside the boundaries used their spells and flew high up into the skies, staying away from the defensive spell boundaries. They watched Xu Que curiously.

As soon as the concrete could be seen, the elder’s expression turned to one of severity as he whispered, "That is the walls to the tombs. It contains immense powers and is impossible to break through. Besides, the walls are fortified so that it would be hard to break through from outside."

"Master, then how is he going to dig his way in?" A disciple asked.

The elder shook his head, "I’m afraid he’s not going to be able to progress further and will end now. Look, he’s even stopped. Obviously, there’s nothing more to be done!"

Xu Que had indeed stopped, but this wasn’t because he was at a loss. Instead, he retrieved his Killer Sword.

Since there were spells restriction within the domains of the Imperial Tombs making the mountains and tomb walls invulnerable to spells, the Killer Blade would be rather effective here.

Xu Que whipped the Killer Blade out and slung it by his waist as he hopped back onto the excavator. Now, the excavator was digging at an increased strength of 30!

He raised the arm of the excavator high up before slamming it down against the concrete walls of the tomb!

"Boom!" A loud crash rang out as the walls completely caved in.

The elder’s expression froze on his face as his lips curled upwards in a snarl. This was too embarrassing. He had been proven wrong in front of his disciples consecutively.

From the first moment at the outermost spell, he was proven wrong. Next was about being able to dig through. Now, he had been wrong again about the tomb walls. Each time, he told his disciples that Xu Que wouldn't succeed but he had been proven wrong every single time.

The elder simply couldn’t stand it, his face was devoid of all feelings.

However, he couldn’t be blamed for being wrong. Under the heavens, Xu Que was the only person in history to ever make it so far. And he had spent nearly 10,000 act tough points and only managed to reach this point. Clearly, robbing the Imperial Tombs wasn’t a simple affair at all.

"Heheh… I’ve succeeded! Never knew that digging through tombs was so easy! Guys, does any of you wish to go in and take a look with me?" Xu Que’s face was filled with smiles as he jumped off the excavator and clapped his hands once, looking at the group of cultivators.

The few disciples and elder was filled with shock. Go and take a look in the tombs? The Imperial Tombs?

There are many generations of Emperors lying down below, all the way from the very first Fire Emperor. It was even rumored that an Emperor who had attained the Form Synthesis Stage was lying under. Evidently, there were also the bodies of other grave robbers who had failed as well.

Forget it, forget it. Who would ever dare to go in?

The few of them shook their heads, clearly unwilling to enter.

Xu Que was elated by this. Though if nobody went down with him, it would mean that he’d act tough without anyone watching. However, for now, he had something urgent to do. He placed the excavator back within the system inventory and wanted to jump into the hole he had dug, into the tombs.

The elder who was floating in the air shouted out, "My friend, can I ask which sect are you from? Or can you tell me your powerful name?"

Xu Que raised his head to look up as a gust of wind blew across his hair and the sunlight shone down radiantly across his handsome face as he smiled out.

"This humble subject’s name is Zhang Qi Ling from Heavenly Explosion Faction’s Lan Xiang Vocational School. My nickname is Oil Bottle!"

As he finished speaking, he turned around and jumped into the hole within the walls of the tomb and disappeared into the darkness.

chapters.title: Chapter 226: What The Hell Do You Want?
chapters.body:
Chapter 226: What The Hell Do You Want?

Chapter 226: What The Hell Do You Want?

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

The Moving Mountains Sect elder and disciples were all stumped.

Heavenly Explosion Faction’s Lan Xiang, Zhang Qi Ling, nicknamed Oil Bottle?

They had never heard anything about this person’s nickname. But they knew that after today, this person’s nickname within the circle of grave robbers would be extremely renowned!

After all, forcing entry into the Imperial Tombs had never been succeeded by anyone in history!

Many grave robbers would get stuck within the first outermost spell and end up dying there since they couldn’t leave.

It could even be said that nobody had ever touched the concrete walls of the tombs before.

And now, this black robed youth managed to dig through the earth and even broke the walls of the tombs before jumping in so bravely. Just thinking of this was enough to raise hairs.

Hence, this old man started to feel that after today, when word gets out, Zhang Qi Ling from Heavenly Explosion Faction would be very popular.

"That big brother is so powerful!" Several of the disciples started to let out sighs of admiration.

The eyes of the female disciples were fixated on that mysterious hole within the ground. They started to recall how that big brother had leapt into it without much hesitation and their hearts were unable to stop hammering for a long time.

After all, Xu Que looked extremely cool while doing that.

At the same time, within the Imperial Palace...

Everything was wrecked and in utter chaos. The Imperial Palace had almost been reduced to ruins, with most of it leaving nothing more than mere rocks and debris. Many other places around the palace had been reduced to similar fates.

This was especially after the Fire Emperor accidentally ate those pieces of shits. He was so enraged that his anger was scary to behold. He had vented his anger out on many other buildings around him. After crossing over to the Void Refining Stage, he almost nearly wrecked his entire palace till there was nothing left standing.

The Sky Incense Valley elder knew that he had made a mistake and was afraid to the Fire Emperor’s fury. He thus took his disciples and fled as soon as he knew that the wrath was approaching.

As for the other great sects, they were so astounded that they had left as well. Some other busybodies within the city had ran all the way to the great lake to watch the scene unfold. It was then that they realized it was true. A protective spell had been placed all around the lake! They were astounded.

Tang Liu Feng had taken this opportunity to flee as well. He was still loyal to Xu Que and played his part by spreading the tales of the Emperor to as many people as he could. These tales included how the Emperor had harmed the Prince Consort and was even made a cuckold. There was even the important scene of how he was defeated by the Prince Consort and at last, was convinced to eat shit.

The Imperial City was completely shocked as the news spread like wildfire across the entire nation.

The Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan had been standing outside the throne room for a long time, unable to regain their senses.

After several breaths, Zi Xuan finally sighed out, "Princess, was it truly alright for us to give him the map? He would definitely head for the Imperial Tombs now. What if the Imperial Tombs will be destroyed as well?"

"That’s impossible!" The Flaming Sun Princess shook her head, her expression was as cold as ice. "I underestimated him from the start and never imagined that his powers would be stronger than fathers. He even managed to win over Emperor father several times. But what can he do at the Imperial Tombs? Once he enters, he wouldn’t ever be able to come out for all eternity."

Zi Xuan was still worried, "But… He’s managed to create so many miracles and did the impossible on numerous occasions."

"This is one miracle he will never be able to accomplish. My Emperor Grandfather once told me that long ago, one of our ancestors of the Form Synthesis Stage knew that his life was soon ending. He wasn’t willing to spend all eternity within the Imperial Tombs and thus decided to enter the Tombs prematurely to retrieve some treasures to prolong his lifespan. However, he never managed to step out. How strong can Xu Que be? He can’t even match up to a Void Refining Stager, much less a Form Synthesis Stager." The Flaming Sun Princess sounded very certain.

"Besides, even if he enters the Imperial Tombs, he wouldn’t be able to get near the source of the Imperial Qi- the Dragon Veins. That’s because… It’s no longer within the Imperial Tombs."

"What?" Zi Xuan heard this and was astounded. How was this possible?

If there wasn’t any Dragon Veins, where did the Imperial Qi which the Fire Emperor drew out come from?

"Actually, that isn’t really a secret anymore. Several hundred years ago, our ancestors sank in all the way down to the core of the earth. The Dragon Veins are now floating in molten lava in the center of the planet. Apart from anyone with the blood of the Imperial Family who would be able to draw on it, nobody would ever be able to seek it out! Hence, even if Xu Que managed to gain entry into the Imperial Tombs, he wouldn’t be able to come out and wouldn’t be able to destroy the source of Imperial Qi. That’s why I willingly allowed you to give him the Fire Nation’s Imperial Tombs map!"

As soon as the Flaming Sun Princess said this, she exhaled deeply before speaking, "Now, I wish that he would fall into our trap and enter the Imperial Tombs. All this mess can finally be put to a halt! With his lowly status, it would be an honor for him to die within the Imperial Tombs!"

"..." Zi Xuan bit her lips and fell into silence.

She had this nagging feeling that Xu Que wouldn’t just disappear so easily.

It was hard to say, but one day, he could appear again and start killing everyone who had wronged him.

Meanwhile, within the eastern end of the Imperial Tombs...

Xu Que had no idea how long he had been in the free fall but he hadn’t landed yet.

His body was still in descent. It was clear that this Imperial Tomb was extremely huge.

As soon as he entered within the Imperial Tombs, the restriction on spells had vanished and he could start conjuring spells.

Without a moment’s hesitation, Xu Que conjured the Lightning Haste spell, causing a pair of lightning bolts to form at his heels. He then increased his speed as he continued going downwards.

"Boom!"

Before long, his feet finally touched ground and he stopped falling. He concluded that he was probably within the center of the Imperial Tombs.

Everything around him was dark but it wasn’t enough to completely obscure his vision.

After scanning his surroundings, Xu Que could be sure that he was standing within a very spacious tomb.

He was surrounded by four solid walls, with a door on one side of the walls. Apart from this, there was nothing else around him.

Xu Que frowned. This wasn’t in the most desirable situation to find himself in.

He retrieved the maps of the Imperial Tombs and opened it.

He saw that there were many confusing lines all across the maps and fell deep in thought.

"Woosh!"

All of a sudden, Xu Que felt something hot within his robes as though something was struggling to get out. Heat and light was emanating out from beneath, shining through the layers of his clothes.

Xu Que paused before he reached his hand into his robes and pulled it out.

When he took it out, he realized that it was a piece of black jade tile with strange and complex inscriptions across. There was even a unicorn inscribed onto this tile and was emitting off a mysterious scent along with a powerful aura.

But this piece of jade tile…

Xu Que frowned, trying to recall when he had obtained this. He then realized that he acquired this while he was still out in the borderlands.

Before killing the members of the Blood River Sect, a strange old man had come to eat his delicious chicken wings. After quarreling with him, the old man finally gave him this piece of jade tile.

That old man’s cultivation level wasn’t low at all. In fact, he was so powerful that Xu Que couldn’t tell his level then. However, he was certain that it was more powerful than the Infant Transformation. That was why he only just scolded him and didn’t resort to fighting.

If not, with how that old man was acting so strangely, Xu Que would probably have given him a severe beating.

Right before they parted ways, the old man gave him this tile.

(T/N: Chapter 44 if anyone wishes to re-read the chapter!)

Xu Que didn’t pay it much attention then. After all, this jade tile didn’t look special at all. However, he never expected that the jade tile would be activated as soon as he had entered this ancient Imperial Tomb. The jade tile was emitting bright light now and was starting to get hotter. It even gave off a powerful aura as it radiated across the entire tomb.

"That’s strange. What on earth is this thing?" Xu Que thought to himself before tapping it once, trying to think as hard as he could.

Right at this point, behind a door which led to complete darkness, came a loud sound which sounded like thousands of horses charging in this direction.

Xu Que jumped up in shock as he glared into the distance and held his ground. He conjured a Bone Freezing Flame within his palms in anticipation and waited.

All of a sudden, several shadows shot past the door. It was hard to see their form and it’s impossible to tell what their cultivation levels were.

An angry and irritable voice sounded in the distance.

"Damn it, you’re here again? Speak clearly now, what the hell do you want?"

chapters.title: Chapter 227: Xu Que Chooses Names
chapters.body:
Chapter 227: Xu Que Chooses Names

Chapter 227: Xu Que Chooses Names

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

What the?

Xu Que froze in shock.

I’m here again? Fuck. This is my first time here! And I don’t want anything! I was just passing through!

"Hu hu…" Beyond the door, into the depths of darkness, rustling sounds which sounded like a spirit crying and a wolf howling rang out!

Xu Que frowned before he shouted out, "Cry, are you crying because you’re mentally retarded? Do you believe that I will use my unicorn hands to slap you to death?"

"What the hell do you want now?" The angry voice rang out once again from the darkness.

"I don’t want anything!"

Xu Que was rather irritated at this. Obviously, this was his first time here and he didn’t even get to act tough before someone came around making it seem as though he had bullied them before.

"Then what the hell do you want?"

"I truly don’t want anything!"

"The last time, I gave you everything. What the hell do you still want now?"

"Fuck! You come out now!"

"What the hell do you still want from me?"

"Damned retarded cripple, COME OUT NOW!" Xu Que was enraged as he sent our waves of core energy rippling out.

"What the hell do you still want from me?" A voice rang out from within the darkness.

Xu Que managed to locate the source of the voice with the immense wave of energy.

The powerful core strength transformed into a gigantic hand and pinned him to the ground, all in the dark.

"Boom!"

Xu Que charged towards the voice and lashed out, punching and kicking as soon as he reached it.

"Fuck your sister!"

"What I still want?"

"What the hell do I want?"

"Do you think you’re a movie star? Repeat that rubbish again! Ask me what the hell do I want again!"

"Boom! Boom! Boom!"

"Ah... Aiya!!!" Screams of pain rang out from within the shadows.

Xu Que was scolding out harsly as he dealt several punches and kicks in the dark, causing groans of agony to sound out.

The beatings only stopped after the person lurking within the shadows wisened up and shouted, "I was wrong, senior. I was wrong!"

Xu Que’s eyebrows were raised as he paused and let go of the shadow as he laughed out, "So you can say more than just ‘what the hell do you want?’"

At the same time, the black shadow started taking on a clearer form.

Xu Que squinted to see what it was before reaching an understanding.

This was a spirit. After he had died, something unknown happened to him which caused him to remain in this world and yet he was unable to leave this Imperial Tombs.

The black shadow retreated to the side gingerly after Xu Que had let go of him, and spoke out apologetically, "Senior, I was wrong!"

"Eh?" Xu Que looked at him and was taken aback.

At the corner wasn’t just one black shadow. In fact, there were dozens of spirits huddling at the side and they were all trembling in fear.

Xu Que was extremely confused. There were so many spirits. Why were they here? And it even seemed like they recognized me?

He then asked out warily, "Do you know who I am?"

The few spirits at the shadows shrank back into the corner and didn’t dare to speak. All they could muster was the "woowooo" sounds.

Only the spirit which Xu Que had beaten up earlier stepped forward and spoke, "Although we are unable to see how this senior looks like, we can recognize your powerful aura. All these hundreds of years, you were the only person who stepped in here and managed to walk out alive. How could we not know?"

They definitely could remember. Many years ago, that senior cultivator came here and caused havoc. Likewise, he grabbed one of them and started beating him savagely, scaring all of them senseless.

Xu Que then asked them several more questions and found out that the senior cultivator who had came previously was looking for a particular treasure within the Imperial Tomb. He was searching for a Luminous Grail which was unique in this world and there was only one around. It’s use was that it would glow at night- that was all.

The ghosts started weeping and sobbing as they told the previous senior, "If you wanted to look for the Luminous Grail, all you had to do was ask. Why did you come and beat us? It really hurt, senior!"

At last, every single spirit within the Imperial Tombs were activated to seek out that Luminous Grail and handed it to him. Only after much convincing and persuasion did they finally manage to make the senior leave the tombs.

Never would they have expected that even before a hundred years was up, the mighty aura of the senior cultivator showed up once again. This thoroughly terrified the spirits here and thus led to the recent spade of events.

"Aura?" Xu Que listened eagerly to the spirits before finally realizing what they meant.

He cast his glance down at the jade tile which was glowing and giving off a powerful aura.

No wonder. This jade tile was supposed to give off energy and light at places where negative energy was strong. These spirits probably remembered the aura of the jade tile and mistook him for the previous trespasser.

Ai, that’s not right. That means to say, a hundred years ago, that old senior came here and managed to leave alive?

Xu Que regained his senses and was astounded.

That old senior was so powerful? He snuck in without anyone realizing just to look for a bullshit glowing cup and nobody found out?

Fuck! Looks like I was right to not have gotten into a fight with him. If not, I probably would’ve gotten beaten up savagely!

Xu Que gasped in relief as he thought to himself before shooting a glance at the spirits, "Since you’ve already recognized me, fine. Let’s do it the same way. I shan’t beat you up if you help me with a few errands!"

"Senior, please ask away!" The spirits didn’t even listen to his requests yet and eagerly promised to do it.

Xu Que touched his chin and scanned his surroundings before speaking, "The first thing, tell me how you’ve survived up to this point."

This was an important question. These spirits cultivation levels were extremely low but they were able to survive up to now. By this logic, it was possible that the spirits of the previous Fire Nations Emperors were still around. Xu Que had to make preparations in case they were!

"Ah?" Indeed, as soon as the spirits heard this request, they looked at each other with expressions of of confusion. Their eyes spoke of suspicions and doubt, as though they themselves didn’t know the answer to this question!

"What? You don’t even know how you’ve survived up till now?" Xu Que glared at them and raised his voice to appear angry.

The spirit who was beaten up by Xu Que earlier waved his hands, "Senior, we really can’t remember. Most of our memories in our earlier lives had already gone. Some of us can’t even remember how to speak."

"Then do you know what your name is?" Xu Que asked suspiciously.

The spirit scratched the back of his head before shaking it, "Forgot… I forgot it! Senior, can you give us names?"

Xu Que looked at them and was certain that they weren't lying and had no choice but to agree, "Alright then. Since you’ve been so sincere, I shall give you names. The names you shall receive must be extremely cool!"

He looked around at the few spirits standing before him and started to ponder hard. After all, they were spirits of the Fire Nations. Alright then.

At this point, he pointed at the first spirit and shouted out, "You shall be Kim Fatty, you shall be Kim Fatty Two. You shall be Kim Fatty Three… Gulp, That name is already taken. Alright, you shall be Kim Fatty Two Plus One or Kim Fatty One Plus Two! Take your pick!"

(T/N: Kim Jong Un’s name in chinese is Jin San Pang which sounds like Kim Fatty Three.)

Kim Fatty Two Plus One?

Kim Fatty One Plus Two?

The spirit were all stumped. What kind of stupid name are these? Is there a difference between Kim Fatty Two Plus One and Kim Fatty One Plus Two? Isn’t 2+1 the same as 1+2? Why don’t you just call him Kim Fatty Three?

Also…

"Senior, I… We… Aren’t very fat as well!"

"I like these names and they shall be fixed! Forget about it, don’t think about it anymore. You lot look really stupid when you think! The reason I gave you two names is because I favor you. In the future, your name shall be Kim Fatty Two Plus One and your last name shall be Kim Fatty One Plus Two. Let’s get a nickname for you as well! We shall call you… Kim Fatty Fat Fat!"

"Gulp… Many thanks senior for the names and… For your favor!" The spirit didn’t dare to say more and nodded his head and bowed.

Xu Que waved his hands as though he brushed it of, "Alright, that shall do then. The second matter. I wish to search for the Fire Emperor’s coffins. And also the location of the Dragon Veins."

"Fire Emperor? Senior, you… Are you going to look for those few evil and vicious people?" Kim Fatty Two Plus One was taken aback, his face was filled with fear.

"What? Should I be afraid of them?" Xu Que raised his voice once again.

To be frank, it was true that he was afraid. But if all that’s left of those Emperors are spirits, he wouldn’t be afraid. The best way to deal with spirits, would be to use Monkey Blocks Lightning!

Kim Fatty Two Plus One hurriedly nodded his head, "Senior, we know where those evil men are. But there’s no way to get there. Besides, I have no idea why, but we heard them shouting out in anger earlier. We cannot afford to mess around with them!"

"What rubbish. Do you know why they were screaming out today? It’s because their grandson was being beaten savagely by me and now I’m here for them. Please cut the crap and take me there now!" Xu Que spoke out as he picked up Kim Fatty Two Plus One and threw him forward, flying a great distance.

chapters.title: Chapter 228: Clearing The Imperial Tombs
chapters.body:
Chapter 228: Clearing The Imperial Tombs

Chapter 228: Clearing The Imperial Tombs

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Dong! Dong!

Within the dark tombs, the sounds of Xu Que’s heavy footsteps rang out.

The dozens of spirits were in front, leading Xu Que in a neat and orderly file.

They were floating in front of him, carefully moving across. The speed of their movement were rather well paced. It was evident that all of them were afraid of this unreasonable Xu Que and were scared that he would start becoming violent towards them again!

However, Xu Que was definitely more reasonable than the old man. He wouldn’t assault these spirits without any reason.

His vision was constantly scanning the environment as he walked.

Many of these tombs were empty and lacked even simple paintings or inscriptions along the walls.

Xu Que noticed this and couldn’t help mumbling to himself about how empty some of these crypts were.

This was heard by Kim Fatty Two Plus One, who replied, "Many years ago, the walls of these tombs were indeed filled with drawings and carvings. However, after many decades and even centuries, they’ve all ran away."

"What? Ran away?" Xu Que was taken aback. How could drawings run away? Did they grow legs to flee or are you bloody trying to lie to me?

"It’s true. On the very last day where the tombs were open, I saw all it disappear into dust and vanished into thin air!"

"Damn! You are truly a retard. Have you never learnt science? It’s called oxidation! The paint particles were being oxidized!" Xu Que shouted out in anger.

Kim Fatty Two Plus One paused for several moments as though he couldn’t understand what that term meant. However, he nodded his head profusely, "This senior is so intelligent and filled with knowledge."

The other spirits started nodded their heads in approval, "Elder is very talented!"

"Lower your voice. Watch how loud you speak. I’m not the type of person who enjoys being praised and complimented. Quickly, show me the way!"

Xu Que gave a stoic expression, but his heart was filled with elation. These spirits are truly impressionable and obedient too. ‘If only I could bring them away from here, it would be nice to have them as my little brothers!’

As he walked along, he was deep in thought. Before long, Xu Que finally walked into a room which had a long passageway within.

There were a pair of statues beside the entrance of the room. Both these statues were of demons with strange features and evil looks. They were extremely lifelike and their eyes possessed a certain fearsome look, as though they could almost come alive and devour someone.

This passageway was rather wide and strange looking. On both sides of the wall, there was a long horizontal concavity which looked almost like a ditch on the wall. The ditches on both sides extended a long distance, deep into the room.

However, everything within the ditches had already dried up and nothing remained.

Xu Que senses that something wasn’t quite right and started muttering an incarnation before walking forward.

"Senior, be careful!" At this point, Kim Fatty Two Plus One tried to stop him and explain, "You can’t go through here. Some time ago, an entire group of us tried to cross as well but our spirits were all scattered and blasted off. There’s a powerful spell here and it seems like it can destroy everything around."

"Rubbish. The spell here is only upheld because of the powerful geomancy of this location. It’s obvious that you won’t be able to cross because spirits are charged with negative energy. It’s only too easy for me to pass!" Xu Que replied plainly.

The spirits around were all stumped as they looked at Xu Que with strange expressions and felt curious. Could this senior truly bypass the spell?

Xu Que also didn’t speak further as he called out the system and spent a little act tough points to receive two different types of water.

While Zhang Qi Ling’s skill with the knife was rather useful, his other skillset which Xu Que had acquired were also handy at this point. For example, to break through several preventive spells which had been placed.

Hence, as soon as Xu Que recognized the situation, he instinctively knew what to do. He purchased some river water and some well water before placing these newly acquired water along the drain on the wall. The water flowed magically as though it defied gravity.

As soon as the water started flowing on both sides of the wall where the ditches were, the entire Room shook violently.

"Bloop!" A soft thudding sound rang out as a ray of light flashed across before their eyes, before disappearing into darkness once again.

"Alright, we can go now!" Xu Que smiled as he walked further into the room.

The spirits looked rather afraid and opened their mouths to protest.

However, Xu Que was very confident and unbridled as he continued walking before he realized that the spirits weren’t following him. He then shouted, "What are you staring at? Quickly come!"

The dozens of spirits hesitated, clearly still worried.

"We should go in now. After all, getting killed by the spell would mean instant death, whereas getting beaten to death by this senior would hurt!" Kim Fatty Two Plus One thought to himself and mustered his courage. He gritted his teeth and took a big step forward. He successfully gained entry into the tomb room and was indeed unscathed.

The other spirits noticed this and were appalled. Even Kim Fatty Two Plus One was surprised by this, for he’d expected to be vanquished but still, he was alright!

"Senior, you are fantastic. How did you do it?" The spirits looked at Xu Que and asked.

Xu Que laughed out, "That’s simple. On one side of the tomb, I placed well water, and on the other side, I placed river water. As the famous saying goes, well water wouldn’t interfere with river water or in other words, everyone should mind their own business and nothing untoward would happen to anyone!"

"Hssss!" The spirits sucked in a cold breath of air and were all shocked at Xu Que’s wits. Conversely, they were also surprised at how dumb they were.

They had been here within the ancient tombs for so many decades and had never thought about this before.

Thinking further, they then realized that there wasn’t any well water here. Although they would probably have to dig underground to get it. River water was easily obtainable however.

Xu Que had successfully acted tough and gained several points. Although it wasn’t much, a little was better than none.

The group of them then proceeded inwards.

Once they proceeded down the passageway, these spirits didn’t know the route anymore. In fact, they were rather foreign to this place and had never seen it before.

Xu Que opened the map once again and realized that the real tombs had only began from this point on.

Besides, there seemed to be many funeral items and objects around here in comparison to the previously empty rooms which he had found himself in.

At this point, Xu Que’s eyes lit up, "Kim Fatty, Kim Fatty Two, and Kim Fatty Fat Fat, hurry up and bring everyone here!" Xu Que waved his hands and led the group of spirits as they walked into the very first tomb.

After passing through the corridors, they arrived at the entrance of the first tomb where a glowing light flickered up ahead.

The floor was filled with numerous weapons and formed an extremely huge pile. It almost looked like a mini mountain but was glittering and gleaming, with all sorts of weapons imaginable!

These weapons were all Two Star or Three Star grade as well. In fact, there was a single Four Star grade flying sword, which glowed and shone brightly. From time to time, a red glow would run down the length of the sword and looked extremely magnificent!

"I’ve struck gold!" Xu Que rejoiced at finding these weapons and opened the system inventory to place all these cool weapon within.

In the past, he had annihilated an entire sect and gained access to their treasure rooms. All the items and weapons there weren’t even worth taking. That was because the system sold cooler and better weapons.

But now, he was standing in front of weapons owned by Emperors and it definitely wouldn’t be of low quality. Xu Que couldn’t give up an opportunity like this so he took as much as he could.

He had decided to keep those which were worth keeping and sell the rest. Or he could let the system keep it in exchange for Essences. Regardless, he still profited from this discovery!

The spirits weren’t the least interested in these weapons as they started daydreaming while Xu Que shifted all these items in excitement.

Soon after, under Xu Que’s guidance, they walked towards the second tomb.

This time, the tomb was filled with treasure chests. The lid on these chests remained open and precious gems of all variety could be spotted. The chests were all so full that treasure was leaking out onto the floor.

Up against the walls were wooden shelves and were filled up with an assortment of potions, herbs and pills!

There were plenty of One Star, Two Star and Three Star grade pills and potions. However, there were only a few Four Star grade pills. The words which were written on the vials had long smudged and thus the nature of these supplements couldn’t be discerned.

Xu Que didn’t seem to mind it as he took every single vial from the wooden shelves and placed it within the system’s inventory. In fact, he didn’t even need to check its contents and took everything greedily.

After all, when it came to doing something like this, only three things matter. They were "speed, precision and ruthlessness!"

Only in achieving these traits would one truly get a sense of satisfaction and feel extremely good about himself!

This was especially true when a person was robbing the tombs of the Fire Emperors!

Hence, after completely clearing the second tomb till nothing remained, Xu Que strolled towards the third tomb.

This time, the shelves were filled with books. However, many of these books were old and ancient and were rather average and nothing spectacular. There were many manuals and spell books as well.

Xu Que also knew that the truly good stuff would still be within the Imperial Palace. However, there were also some high quality items which would be placed within the coffins of the deceased Emperors. Hence, he wasn’t surprised to see that most of the items he had taken weren’t fantastic.

With a wave of his hands, after he had cleared all the spell book and skill manuals, he started walking a level down, towards the next tomb.

When he reached outside this tomb, Xu Que realized that this room was huge and extremely spacious.

Xu Que looked in and realized the entire room was filled with coffins!

The spirits peered in and their faces were filled with dread and fear.

"Heavens! This… This place… How many people are buried here?"

"It seems like even our bodies are buried here. It’s so sad!"

"Or it could also be that our bodies have long decomposed and we might not even have a coffin for some of us might be failed grave robbers!"

Xu Que stood outside the room and was somewhat taken aback. He looked at the dozens of spirits and shook his head, "None of you are talking about what truly matters."

"Ah?" The dozens of them paused in shock.

Xu Que ignored them and called out the system, "System, would you buy coffins in exchange for anything?"

chapters.title: Chapter 229: Past Soul Emperor
chapters.body:
Chapter 229: Past Soul Emperor

Chapter 229: Past Soul Emperor

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Within the extremely spacious tomb, there were tens of old and decomposing coffins which were stacked up like a pagoda of coffins. This was a tower of dead people and looked rather queer.

After so many years, the coffins were badly decomposed and holes started to form. Xu Que could even see the shrivelled bodies lying within.

Seeing this, Xu Que was rather confused.

Since there were so many coffins here but why didn’t he see any spirits? Then, where did the dozen spirits behind him came from?

Xu Que shook his head and couldn’t figure it out. He thus gave up thinking and turned to look at the system interface.

Earlier on, he had asked the system if it would take these coffins and the system thus started calculating. On the interface, he could see several numbers and figures as if the system was estimating the worth of whatever stood in front of him.

Before long, the system gave him a reply.

"Ding! The material of these coffins were rather high quality. Although it’s already decomposed, the system can retrieve these coffins and transform them into weapon Essences!"

"Yo, that’s great! Alright, alright, alright, then take it all!" Xu Que was elated after hearing the system’s reply!

With so many coffins around and the state of decomposition they were in, Xu Que couldn’t possibly keep them all within his system inventory. He had actually asked the system in jest and never expected that the system would accept it as well. Hearing this good news filled Xu Que with joy.

After all, he was here to rob the Fire Emperor’s Imperial Tombs. Hence, he would take as much as he can get. What’s the motive you might ask? That’s right, to send a message out, that I won’t even let off your fucking coffins!

Hence, Xu Que stepped forward.

As soon as he stretched his hands out, the system activated the automatic item picking function. The entire pagoda of coffins started vanishing one by one. Following that, the shriveled up bodies all fell to the ground.

Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh!

As the system tallied up the total numbers, Xu Que’s mind was filled with system notifications. The Weapon Essences has also started accumulating, until he had a total of 500 Essences!

The spirits standing outside the door were all appalled by this. This senior won’t even show mercy to the coffins? He’s truly a vile person!

Within minutes, Xu Que had swept up all the coffins which were stacked up earlier. He then glanced across at the corpses on the ground, his eyes were filled with anticipation as he asked, "System, do you accept dried, shriveled up corpses?"

"NOPE!"

"Oh!" Xu Que gave an extremely disappointed expression. Without any options left, he retreated away from this tomb and started making his way to the fifth.

However, things weren’t as simple here in the fifth tomb. Xu Que and the rest of them were prevented access by a huge stone door!

The entire door to the tombs was extremely thick. There were many carvings of dragons along the door and it looked very lifelike. There were also inscriptions of spells on the door. Every single line was so complex that it was hard to understand and it even exuded an aura of power from it!

All the mysterious inscriptions, along with the drawings of the dragons formed the defensive spell of this tomb. In fact, the spell was powerful enough that warning energy was pulsating from the door as it guarded the contents of this tomb.

Kim Fatty Two Plus One looked extremely uneasy, "Senior, we can feel something. We think that the evil persons you’re looking for might be inside!"

"Oh? Could this be where a Fire Emperor was laid to rest?"

Xu Que took several steps back when he heard this as well. He then looked around and counting something on his fingers. According to the geomancy calculations of the location of this tomb, it seems like this could be the master tomb here!

"System, do you have any methods to break through this protective spell?" Xu Que thought and asked the system.

The system remained silent for half a second before replying.

"Ding! The system has checked and found that there’s a way to break through the spell. However, it would cost 500 act tough points!"

"..." Xu Que pursed his lips. Your mother’s ovaries! Why are you always so damned calculative?

Fine, you’re cheap!

"Break the spell!" Xu Que shouted out in anger!

He only had 2,000 act tough points remaining and was now forced to spend another 500. This truly hurt his heart.

However, Xu Que desperately wanted to gain entry into this tomb. In fact, tens of thousands of act tough points won’t even stop him.

Even though he had spent more than 10,000 act tough points at its peak, Xu Que wasn’t worse off after spending it. After all, a large portion of it had been spent on the system to upgrade its capabilities and purchase several skills. In fact, the best part of it all was that he even acquired the skills of the famous Oil Bottle!

The skills which he had gained would be of great use when he decided to rob the graves of the other nations!

Despite the fact that Xu Que felt an immense heartache, he was extremely confident in his own act tough capabilities. Even after spending it, he was certain that he would earn it back again. He had to earn it back!

"Ding! The system has began breaking through the spell!"

"Ding! The system wishes to inform the host that behind this protective spell are several very powerful spirits. Please make your battle preparations to prevent getting beaten up!" The system rang out consecutively.

When Xu Que heard this, he was elated. How can big brother ever get beaten up? What a joke! Who am I? I am the Act Tough King! How can I ever be defeated? Since you asked me to prepare myself, I shan’t prepare at all. That’s how powerful I am. In fact, I shall lie down here and wait for them to come…

Alright nevermind, maybe I should prepare myself!

Xu Que then conjured a pair of lightning balls. It wasn’t that he was afraid. He was just slightly uncertain.

After all, the spirits behind this door were powerful Fire Emperors of the past. According to what he knew, the first Fire Emperor was at the pinnacle of the Form Synthesis Stage and he had several other successors who had ascended to the Form Synthesis Stage as well.

Only during the last few generations did the cultivation level of the Emperors halt at the Void Refining Stage.

Of course, the present Fire Emperor was much weaker. He was stuck at the Infant Transformation Stage for very long. Only after using the Emperor’s Energy did he manage to step into the Void Refining Stage, although that was still rather powerful.

Hence, Xu Que felt like maybe he should guard himself against these ancient spirits. He must not fail in acting tough and eat grass instead. If not, that would be an eternal blemish and humiliation to him!

"Chi!"

Right at this point, he held a pair of lightning bolts which buzzed threateningly, filled with purple, powerful energy. At once, the lightning arcs within the balls started to vibrate and move violently.

When the dozens of spirits saw this, they screamed out in fear and retreated a long way back.

To spirits, lightning was one of the most terrifying elements, for they were completely powerless against it.

If they were to take the slightest damage from any electric spells in their current spirit form, they would suffer immense injuries!

What’s more, Xu Que’s powerful balls of lightning had completely absorbed all the powers from the Tribulations along with the purple streak of electricity from the Lightning Pools.

The power emanating out from those spheres were immense.

"Don’t be afraid, I won’t kill you, don’t stand so far. Come and watch me act tough!" Xu Que turned his head back to look at those few spirits who were trembling in fear while Xu Que sniggered.

The entire group of spirits huddled together by a corner and only dared to stick their heads out to see, but didn’t dare to get close at all!

"Boom doom!"

Right at this point, a resounding crash sounded from the tomb door, as though there were some powerful force clashing against it ferociously. Debris and dust were thrown high up into the air.

Xu Que’s face froze.

"Ka cha!"

The spell on the door stopped pulsating all of a sudden as cracks started to form all across the door. Within a fraction of a second, the entire door was filled with web like cracks!

"Ding! The door has been broken through. The system suggests that the host uses his soul strength, so that things will be easier!" the system rang out.

Xu Que was astonished, "What do you mean? Use my soul strength so that it will be easier?"

"Ding! Warning! The system has detected 4 Form Synthesis Staged spirits nearby. The system suggests you upgrade your musician talent to Four Star as soon as possible. If not, you would be in danger!"

"Fuck! My Monkey Blocks Lightning isn’t good enough? Now you still wish for me to upgrade my musician talent to Four Star? Where should I get the act tough points from? I’m not even at Three Star yet!" Xu Que replied the system. He wondered how the system can still be in a mood to rob him in the face of danger.

Four Star Musician? That’s going to cost a bomb and now I only have 1,000 act tough points. It’s not enough.

"Ding! Congratulations to host. After the system has been updated to version 3.0, the system is now able to provide you with a low interest rate loan with 0 collaterals needed, low processing fees and fast waiting time. In fact, only 30 seconds is required to approve the loan!"

chapters.title: Chapter 230: Even If A Loan Has To Be Taken, Acting Tough Is A Must!
chapters.body:
Chapter 230: Even If A Loan Has To Be Taken, Acting Tough Is A Must!

Chapter 230: Even If A Loan Has To Be Taken, Acting Tough Is A Must!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Lo-Loan?

Xu Que was appalled by what he had just heard. Hearing what the system had said was akin to him seeing a ghost! The system was getting more brazen with each level it had ascended and was becoming more crafty. Now, it even suggested lending Xu Que act tough points with interest rates? Why don’t you fly a kite?

I won’t take a loan. I will never take a loan!

Xu Que hardened his heart, knowing that he must never bow to the system.

However…

"After careful calculations, the host’s strength wouldn’t be able to compare with your enemies at this point. Although the host can consider fleeing, he wouldn’t be able to act tough if he fled!" The system sounded out once more, causing Xu Que to freeze on the spot.

Unable to compare with my enemies? Can consider fleeing?

Is my Monkey Blocks Lightning spell still not strong enough after being strengthened by the full Glory Killer Book? I won’t be able to handle those Fire Emperor spirits?

Xu Que was suddenly thrown off guard and felt rather uneasy. And yet he realized that it must’ve been true, for he was only at level eight Original Infant Stage. If he could defeat an Infant Transformation staged cultivator, it would already be extraordinary!

Even though he was only facing against spirits and spirits were extremely weak against lightning spells, these spirits were of at least in the Void Refining Stage. And so he felt that he might still stand a chance against the Void Refining Stage spirits.

As for the Form Synthesis Stage spirits… Xu Que was not the least confident!

The system wouldn’t trick him at this point. Although Xu Que knew that the system was very sly, whenever it provided such conclusions after calculations, it was always correct.

Of course, the most important thing to Xu Que was being unable to act tough!

This caused a certain sense of anxiety and urgency in Xu Que!

Unable to act tough? Then what was the point of living? How was he different from a calf if he couldn’t act tough?

After all, it was only a loan. Come on then! Even if I have to take a loan, I must do it for the sake of acting tough!

"Tell me more. How should I proceed to take the loan?" Xu Que thought in his mind and asked the system for more information.

As soon as these words were thought, a strange melodic sound rang out within his head. Soon after the music faded, Xu Que heard that the cold system’s voice had abruptly changed tone. It started sounding extremely warm, as though it was handling a big customer!

"Welcome host for accessing the newly implemented ‘Act Tough Loan’. The Act Tough loan is very unique in the sense that there’s no collateral required, along with the low interest rates and you can receive the cash on the exact same day. The application procedure is very simple, convenient and swift. We wish to serve you effectively and ensure that your career is benefited from this loan!"

Pu!

Xu Que nearly spat out a mouthful of blood.

This… Sounded too human! Like a salesman trying to do business. It was indeed extremely hard to tolerate.

The system then continued speaking.

"In view of the host’s extraordinary acting tough skills, the system is willing to offer a reduced interest rate of 2.3% per annum. Payment is a combination of interest rate along with a percentage of the principal amount. It’s a carefree and easy method of repayment!"

"..."

"The system would like to ask if the host is keen on activating the ‘Act Tough Loan’?"

"Let me ask you something. What happens if I’m unable to repay the loan?" Xu Que asked as he smiled.

"If the host is unable to repay the amount by the stipulated date, the system shall activate ‘Debt Collector Beats Debtors’ function. Regardless of whether you borrowed money in this world or others, there will always be someone chasing after you for debts!"

Yo!

As soon as Xu Que heard this, he was elated. Oh you’re threatening me now? Since that’s the case, I’m NOT going to return it! Since this loan was forwarded to me based on my acting tough skills, why should I return it? I’ve earned it!

Hm, who’s afraid, huh? I’m so darned powerful. We shall see who would come and chase after me for my debt!

After deciding to borrow and not return it, Xu Que then accessed the system store interface and searched for the musician skill book.

In actual fact, the system was right about this. The musician talent would positively affect the user’s soul strength and mental capabilities. In a sense, this was something like a spell to boost the user’s stats!

When it came to soul strength, possessing this skill would strengthen it tremendously!

It’s just that… After he saw the price of the Four Star Musician skill book, Xu Que felt a sharp stabbing pain in his chest once again!

A Two Star Musician skill book needed 1,500 act tough points. However, after he gained the achievement of Act Tough Tyrant, he received a little preferential discount on this item.

Yet, he had already purchased this skill book and ascended to the Two Star Musician before he received the discounts.

And now, a Three Star Musician skill book costs 3,000 act tough points!

And a Four Star Musician skill book costs 5,000 act tough points!

Hence, if he wanted to defeat the group of Fire Emperor spirits, he would have to spend 8,000 act tough points!

But what was so scary about that amount? He could always take up a loan!

"I wish to borrow one billion act tough points!" Xu Que shouted out in his head loftily.

"Ding! The system’s credit rating isn’t good enough at this point. The loan amount is restricted to 10,000 act tough points!"

"My… My credit rating isn’t good enough? Fuck! I’m such a trustworthy and dependable person and you only extended the loan amount to 10,000 act tough points?" Xu Que was so angry that he almost imploded.

And yet no matter what he said to the system, it refused to budge and insisted on lending Xu Que 10,000 act tough points at most.

Xu Que had no choice as well and temporarily borrowed 8,000 act tough points and chose the option to repay the debt over two years!

At the same time, he purchased both the Three Star and Four Star Musician skill books!

"Shua!"

His body lit up twice consecutively in a flash of white light as his understanding of the musician ability became more profound!

"All the modulations of the voice arise from the mind and the various affections of the mind are produced by things!"

When Xu Que next opened his eyes, his pupils seemed to have gained a certain depth within!

It almost seemed like he had gained enlightenment just like that!

There were 3,000 ways to reach enlightenment and ascend the dao and music was one of those ways!

As soon as Xu Que ascended to Four Star grade, his understanding and analysis of music became very pronounced and profound!

One song could be played by different artists in different styles, evoking different responses from different people. This was the mysterious power of music!

As soon as Xu Que understood these points, he started to feel extremely confident about handling these Form Synthesis Stage spirits!

Four Star Musician would almost certainly ensure that Xu Que could win any Infant Transformation Staged cultivators effortlessly!

Against a Form Synthesis Staged spirit, Xu Que hoped that it wouldn’t be too much of a difference!

"Ding! The spell has already been deactivated. Please prepare yourself!"

As soon as the system rang out, the cracks along the stone door started multiplying exponentially and almost looked like it was filled with spiderwebs!

Xu Que then retrieved an electronic keyboard from his system inventory and ensured that it had an audio mixing function. He then held it up and faced the stone door.

The few spirits hiding behind him were all stumped!

What’s going on? What is this senior trying to do? Is that strange looking thing so powerful as a weapon?

"Boom!"

Right at this point, the tomb which had been sealed shut by the spell started to reveal what’s within.

The few blocks of stone which lined the door started falling off in clumps of debris and dust.

Soon after, several large black shadows with immense auras enveloped his surroundings!

"Roar!"

The few black shadows gave a terrifying roar and sent out crushing pressures, causing the entire tomb to tremble violently.

The few spirits hiding at the corner were so terrified by this roar that they were screaming out in fear as they scattered all around and broke their group.

"We’re doomed! These evil spirits had been let loose!"

"Senior, run!"

"If you won’t flee, we shall flee first!"

"See you around senior!" Kim Fatty Two Plus One screamed out as he started to leave along with his companions.

After all, those few spirits who just appeared was too powerful. Just their auras could kill.

Even before they made a move, the amount of pressure released from them was way too scary!

Fire Emperor’s spirits are truly powerful!

Xu Que’s eyes gleamed. Although he didn’t know how or why these people became spirits, they had probably been around for centuries. However, all these centuries old spirits are nothing but rubbish compared to his Four Star Musician talent!

So what if you’re at the Void Refining stage?

So what if you’re at the Form Synthesis stage?

You’re the ancestors of the Fire Nation?

Haha! You’re still useless!

Everything under the heavens is mine! I’m Xu Que, the Act Tough King!

"Zeng zeng zeng!"

Xu Que raised his hands up and spread his fingers apart before slamming them down on the electronic keyboard. His fingers moved in a frenzy, creating a melody.

At the next moment, he condensed the energy within his dantian, opened his eyes wide and shouted, "The eighth episode of the nation’s secondary schools warm up exercises begins! We are being called upon…"

(T/N: This was a televised broadcast for students to do stretching exercises in the morning before classes began)

chapters.title: Chapter 231: Spirit Prison Pagoda
chapters.body:
Chapter 231: Spirit Prison Pagoda

Chapter 231: Spirit Prison Pagoda

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"Hua hua hua hua zeng zeng zeng zeng…" The sounds of the electronic keyboard, flute and piano sounded out in a harmony as it reverberated across the entire tomb!

The few Fire Emperor’s spirits who had just came out of their tombs paused abruptly as their faces were filled with fear.

Although all that was left of them were mere spirits, their expressions and faces could be seen very clearly as they retained their looks before they passed away!

The spirits of Kim Fatty and the rest of them had already fled several hundred meters away. When they heard this sound, all of them halted as their eyes opened wide in shock and were extremely frightened.

They didn’t mean to stop intentionally. It was just that the music caused them to stop involuntarily.

"What’s going on? What’s senior doing?"

"Why does it feel like my body is beyond my own control? I feel like... Dancing!"

"Me too!"

"Wooo wooo wooo!"

Kim Fatty Two Plus One and the rest of the spirits were stumped. None of them could understand why the melody had such an effect on them, to the extent that they couldn’t even control themselves.

At the entrances of the tombs, the few Void Refining Stage Fire Emperor spirits opened their eyes wide. It almost seemed like they didn’t know how to speak and could only open their mouths as though they had lost all memories of their past!

Xu Que ignored them and continued playing his musical instruments filled with fervor. He then looked at them and shouted out loudly.

"Ready… Go! One two three four five six seven eight, two two three four five six seven eight, three two three four five six seven eight, four two three four five six seven eight, stretching exercise begins…"

"One two three four five six seven eight…"

At that exact moment, Kim Fatty Two Plus One along with all his spirit companions and the Fire Emperor spirits all started moving vigorously as they did their gymnastics stretching exercises.

Al their movements were very uncoordinated and out of sync and yet they couldn’t control themselves. They were moving and dancing with strange actions. Some of them even half squatted and started doing tai-chi moves, while others kicked and punched the air!

Xu Que turned his head to look at everyone around him as he scanned his vision around the tomb entrance.

Even the Form Synthesis spirits couldn’t avoid the immense control the music had on them and were doing their own stretching exercises as well.

"That’s right. Even if you’re at the Void Refining or Form Synthesis stage, everyone has to do the warm up stretching exercises together. There’s no escaping it!" Xu Que nodded his head elatedly as he supervised their movements sternly.

The way he looked and monitored them, he was clearly the legendary ‘disciple master’ keeping a close watch over them!

The strange music continued as Xu Que shouted out the counts for them, giving them a beat to move to!

"Four two three four five six, jumping jacks, one two three four five six seven eight…"

"Shoulder rotation, one two three four five six seven eight, two two three four five six seven eight…"

"Chest stretching exercise, one two three four five six seven eight…"

Under the quick paced beats, the few spirits strangely listened to his count and switched positions whenever he ordered them to. The more they moved, the better they became at it as their form improved.

The music continued as this track was on a loop!

At this point, Xu Que was already tired of shouting. Hence, he activated the automatic ability from the system and allowed the system to draw on his soul strength and continued shouting out the counts.

Soon after, Xu Que placed his hands behind his back and wore a severe expression across his face. As the discipline master and fitness teacher, he walked across and surveyed the movements of these few generations of Fire Emperor spirits.

The leader of the Fire Emperor spirits stood right by the tomb door and was an old looking man. His face was downcast and his eyes revealed a ferocious glare as he stared at Xu Que. His entire body was shaking as powerful energy emanated out from it.

Xu Que had seen a painting of this old man hung atop the walls of the Fire Nations Palace. This was the father of the present Fire Emperor!

"What are you staring at? Do you believe that this Prince Consort will spank you? Raise your legs higher. Higher!"

"And you! Please don’t think for a second that I didn’t notice you. You’re the grandfather of the current Fire Emperor, huh? Hurry up. Raise your arms higher. Don’t be lazy!"

"And you over there! Why are your psychomotor skills so poor? Watch the others and learn from them!"

"Fuck me, aren’t you the very first Fire Emperor? Wow! Impressive. Form Synthesis Stage? Can you jump up properly? You’re twisting and turning like this. What are you trying to achieve? We’re doing our morning warm up stretches, not pole dancing, big brother!"

"Yo yo yo, who’s that over there? Can you not jump up so vigorously? Your pants are falling off. Pull them back up. Damn it, this men in the Imperial family all have the same genes. You inherit each other’s small penises. Seems like I can’t really blame the current Fire Emperor for having such a small dragon as well!"

"Fuck me, big brother, why are you moving so vigorously as if you’re familiar with the entire set of exercises? Slow down! Your head is almost falling off!"

Xu Que walked by the side and watched the entire group of Fire Emperors doing their stretching exercises as he shouted and scolded them.

Indeed, nobody could do anything to Xu Que, for spirits were weak in soul strength. Much less the fact that Four Star Musician talent needed an extremely strong soul strength to resist. Hence, regardless of how powerful in cultivation these Fire Emperors were, even if they were at the Form Synthesis Stage, they were powerless!

"One two three four five six seven eight…" The broadcast was still playing at this point.

Xu Que also had his fill of scolding them.

He stood by the side and observed.

Since he already gained complete control over these spirits, killing them would be such a waste. Especially since he had spent so much act tough points on them.

"System, would you accept spirits? I can sell you a Form Synthesis spirit for one billion act tough points!" Xu Que asked the system.

The system replied coldly, "No!"

"One hundred million act tough points?"

"No!"

"Fuck. Your bargaining skills are not bad. Alright then, what about 100,000 act tough points!"

"..." The system ignored him completely and chose not to reply.

Xu Que realized that the system wouldn’t accept these spirits for anything and was rather frustrated.

If the system wouldn’t accept them, it means they are truly rubbish and worthless! Damn it. The system even accepted rotting coffins but wouldn’t accept these spirits!

After thinking for some time, Xu Que’s eyes lit up as an idea came to him.

He was extremely elated as he asked the system, "System, can these things here be exposed to sunlight? Would they die if they saw light?"

"These spirits remained here for some reason and thus wouldn’t ever be able to leave. The system suggests to host to purchase a high level Soul Pagoda to bring them out if he wishes!"

"Fuck. You’re trying to scam me into spending more!" Xu Que’s face sunk immediately.

A high grade Spirit Prison Pagoda could cost a thousand act tough points!

However, a single Spirit Pagoda could contain several spirits. Keeping them within it would mean he could release them out anytime he wished.

When Xiao Rou had died, Xu Que had purchased a Soul Pagoda for Xiao Rou. Although these sound almost the same, they are extremely different items.

The Soul Pagoda could only contain a single spirit and at the same time, could nurture and nourish the soul within. As time passed, this spirit would become stronger!

The Spirit Prison Pagoda was different for it was a prison and was used to torment spirits. The conditions within were extremely poor.

When Xu Que had to purchase a Soul Pagoda for Xiao Rou, he didn’t have much options since he had just started his career and was limited in act tough points. Hence, he could only purchase a Soul Pagoda to keep Xiao Rou within and couldn’t do anything for the rest of the villagers who had died.

Everytime Xu Que thought about this, he sighed out in regret.

Now, his mission was to collect the five special Genesis Herbs to revive Xiao Rou. Since he had already gained entry into the Fire Nation’s Imperial Tombs, he was nearing his very first spiritual herb!

However at this point, he also wanted to exact his vengeance upon the Fire Emperor and destroy his powerful cultivator’s body!

"Alright then. It’s only 1,000 act tough points. I wish to purchase the Spirit Prison Pagoda. When I’m done with all this, I shall release the entire host of dancing Fire Emperor spirits out and scare the living daylights out of the current Emperor!"

chapters.title: Chapter 232: Your Majesty, Something Bad Has Happened!
chapters.body:
Chapter 232: Your Majesty, Something Bad Has Happened!

Chapter 232: Your Majesty, Something Bad Has Happened!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

He then acquired the Spirit Prison Pagoda which was the size of his palms. The entire body of the pagoda was green and was made of bronze, containing many ancient inscriptions.

At this point, Xu Que only had less than 900 act tough points and even owed the system 8,000 act tough points!

Xu Que had returned back to square one with how much act tough points he had left. In fact, he’s at the lowest and felt like he was in poverty.

However, Xu Que wasn’t too worried about this. Concentrating hard, he looked at the Spirit Pagoda before scanning his surroundings.

Taking advantage of the fact that these Fire Emperor spirits were still doing their stretching exercises and wouldn’t be able to resist, he started sucking them into the pagoda!

Boom!

As soon as a spirit was absorbed into the pagoda, the entire pagoda would tremble violently.

Xu Que closed his eyes and used his mind’s eye to peer into the pagoda and could see every single spirit within clearly. Each of them were being restrained by iron chains and couldn’t escape or move much!

After all, this was a high grade Spirit Prison Pagoda and thus had the features of a high grade item.

Seeing them restrained put Xu Que at ease. With a wave of his hand, he placed the Pagoda back within his system inventory.

He then collected the electronic keyboard and the broadcast stopped playing at last.

Everything within the ancient tombs were silent once again.

The few Fire Emperor spirits were resolved effortlessly like that. However, it also costed Xu Que a considerable bit of act tough points in having to take up the loan!

Kim Fatty Two Plus One and the other spirits finally regained their senses. They were filled with shock.

"Senior, what was that all about?"

"Why couldn’t we control ourselves?"

"And that item. Is it a powerful magic weapon?"

"But I couldn’t feel any powerful spiritual presence within it!"

Among the dozen of spirits, only a few of them were capable of speech.

Although Xu Que had earned several more act tough points from these spirits, he was rather irritated by them. He then frowned and asked, "What? Are you addicted to the stretching exercise? Do you believe that I can make all of you become extremely fit through permanent exercises?"

"..." The few spirits all fell into silence.

None of them dared to agitate Xu Que after seeing what he was capable of. They witnessed how he had dealt with the Fire Emperor spirits so effortlessly. Hence, they started to feel immense fear towards Xu Que once again.

Xu Que then ignored them as he looked into the tomb which had just been vacated by the Fire Emperors.

This was the place where these Fire Emperors had been laid to rest. It was extremely spacious and several coffins were arranged orderly within. Unlike the previous few coffins which Xu Que had seen which were made of wood, these coffins were made of expensive and precious black gold.

Xu Que couldn’t tell the exact grade of gold and thus called out for the system once again.

"System, quick. I’ve brought you yet another business proposal. Quickly, take all these coffins in! Logically speaking, these should be valuable enough to earn me some act tough points, right?" Xu Que asked expectantly.

"Ding! Successfully acquired. The system shall reward the host with 3,000 weapon forging Essences!"

"Weapon forging Essences? I want act tough points!"

"..." The system ignored Xu Que completely and returned to cold silence.

Xu Que felt so much anger and hatred towards the system now but there was nothing he could do.

After all, the system existed within his head. If Xu Que wanted to beat it, he would have to beat his own head. Xu Que thought about it for a little while and realized that it wasn’t worth it. So, he stopped considering it.

As soon as the system acquired all the black gold coffins, the corpses of several generations of Fire Emperors fell to the ground.

Additionally, the several items in which these Emperors had brought with them to sleep fell on the floor.

One of these items was a bright red ruby stone which sparkles and gleam. Within it contained boundless of powerful energy stored by its owner, a Fire Emperor. The energy within it was extremely concentrated that it almost bore a liquid form.

Xu Que picked up the ruby. He shook it and saw that it was moving inside.

"Quality stuff!" Xu Que was elated to receive something like this.

The ruby stone looked extraordinary. If he’d used this ruby to forge a weapon and imbue it within, it would be extremely powerful!

After he kept the stone, Xu Que then glanced around, looking for other interesting items.

There were many spiritual pills, weapons and countless of spell books!

It could be observed that several of these Fire Emperors had created these spells before they had died.

Clearly, these spells were anything but ordinary.

Xu Que looked at them casually.

Indeed, even the lowest amongst them was of the earth ranked, the second highest level of skills sold within the system store. There was even a sky ranked spell manual. It was called Sword of the Heavens and had a single emerald embedded in the middle!

When Xu Que saw the name of this spell book, he was visibly shocked!

Sword of the Heavens, such a powerful and awesome name which truly sounded like the equivalent of heaven itself!

Xu Que didn’t underestimate the powers of this spell manual. After all, it was of the sky rank and thus meant that its powers were certainly justified.

However, Xu Que wasn’t lacking in spells himself. Hence he only glanced at it casually before placing it within his system inventory and decided to take a proper look another time!

Soon after, he acquired a pair of Four Star grade weapons and placed them within his inventory as well.

His true motives for today was to first blow up the tombs and secondly, to blow up the Dragon Veins in order to retrieve the spiritual herbs!

When Xu Que looked at the few corpses on the ground, his lips parted in a smile, "Emperor’s Energy, huh? Heheh... let’s see how I can destroy it!"

As soon as these words were spoken, Xu Que waved his hands and retrieved a normal looking dagger. He then started to pry the mouths of these Emperors open!

"Chi!" a waft of air which felt like the might of a dragon was released from his mouth!

Xu Que hurriedly raised his hands to his nose and covered it. The smell was extremely pungent!

All this couldn’t do anything for him, since he didn’t have blood of the imperial family within his veins. It was thus hard to keep this Emperor’s Energy for himself.

Kim Fatty who stood by the side along with Kim Fatty Two revealed greedy expressions as they inhaled the air deeply and manically, trying to absorb this Emperor’s Energy!

"Fuck, this Emperor’s Energy is smellier than ass and you can inhale it so happily and blissfully? You are really talented!"

As soon as Xu Que spoke these words, he waved his dagger once again and started prying open the mouths of the remaining Emperors, releasing the Emperor’s Energy from them. This prevented the current Fire Emperor from using it ever again!

However, for one of the corpses, prying open his mouth didn’t release any energy!

Xu Que was rather stumped by this.

Since there’s none in his mouth, let’s try his arse!

"Whoosh!"

Within a moment’s hesitation, Xu Que held two fingers up and conjured a flash of light and shot it towards the bottom of the Emperor and…

"Chi!" The light penetrated the Emperor from the bottom up!

Indeed, there was still no movement, which meant that no Emperor’s Energy was released from this corpse!

"Shit, I almost forgot. During the big fight earlier, the Fire Emperor had also used some Emperor’s Energy. He probably took it from this Fire Emperor!"

Xu Que then realized this fact. Hence, seeing a body or two without Emperor’s Energy was normal!

When Xu Que was done releasing all the Emperor’s Energy, he turned around to look at the rest of the spirits and received a shock!

The dozens of spirits seemed to have entered into meditation states. Their eyes were closed as though they were about to break through their cultivation levels!

Xu Que didn’t know whether to laugh or to cry. He didn’t expect that these spirits would gain from this Emperor’s Energy and actually savour it.

However, he ignored them and started looking for the Dragon Veins around the area!

At the same time, in the Imperial Palace...

The Fire Emperor sat atop his destroyed ruins of a palace. The additional cultivation powers which he had temporarily received were starting to diffuse away from him.

Before long, he was back at the Infant Transformation stage but his expression was still monstrous and intimidating.

"Report!" An Imperial Guard ran over to pass the Emperor some news.

"Your majesty, something bad has happened. A person managed to dig his way into the mountains of the Imperial Tombs! And that person named himself as Zhang Qi Ling of the Heavenly Explosion Faction. His nickname is Oil Bottle!"

"Pu!"

As soon as the Fire Emperor heard this, he spat out some blood and his injuries worsened!

chapters.title: Chapter 233: The Disappearing Dragon Veins
chapters.body:
Chapter 233: The Disappearing Dragon Veins

Chapter 233: The Disappearing Dragon Veins

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

First, he was beaten up savagely by Xu Que for an entire afternoon. Soon after, he was made to eat shit. After tolerating Xu Que’s antics, he was ready to have his revenge but Xu Que had escaped scot free.

Now, news had arrived that his Imperial Tombs had been dug up and it was done by someone from the Heavenly Explosion Faction!

The Fire Emperor had received several crucial setbacks and was further injured with each blow. He didn’t even get the chance to recover as more injuries were piled onto him each time!

Dug up the Imperial Tomb?

Heavenly Explosion Faction dared to dig up my ancestor’s tombs?

Was this the actions of Xu Que or was it someone sent by Xu Que?

The Fire Emperor’s vision went black and he felt himself on the verge of passing out.

He opened his eyes in a fury and glared at the Imperial Guard, gritting his teeth as he spoke, "Did anyone get a look at the appearance of the intruder?"

"This… This humble subject doesn’t know. This matter was reported by Moving Mountains Sect. Apparently, they saw it for themselves. Besides, we also could feel that the Imperial Tombs had some movements within!" The Imperial Guard fell to his knees and replied anxiously.

The Fire Emperor was so enraged that he couldn’t even speak and killing intent radiated out from his body.

Zi Xuan and Flaming Sun Princess had heard the news as well and hurriedly rushed over.

"Emperor Father, please don’t worry about this matter. Anyone who enters our Imperial Tomb wouldn’t ever walk out alive! Regardless of whether the person who broke in was Xu Que or not, he wouldn’t survive it!" Flaming Sun Princess exclaimed.

Only after hearing this did the Fire Emperor finally calmed down. Several seconds later, he nodded his head, "That’s right. Our ancestors built this tomb themselves. It’s much easier to enter than to come out of it. After all these years, there had been people who managed to enter but nobody succeeded in coming out!"

"Hence, father Emperor should recuperate and recover. As for the matter of rebuilding the palace, let your daughter handle it!"

"Alright!" The Fire Emperor nodded his head and closed his eyes once more.

The Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan then retreated away from him.

When they reached an adjourning hall, the Flaming Sun Princess then whispered, "Indeed, he’s managed to break his way in. Looks like this muddled headed man has finally been resolved!"

Zi Xuan pursed her lips, a look of worry fluttered within her eyes. She was still feeling uneasy and felt that it was highly possible that Xu Que could break out!

All because this Xu Que was full of miracles and surprises!

The news dispatched by Moving Mountains Sect had already made its rounds across the entire Imperial City.

Countless of cultivators and civilians alike were extremely shocked!

"Someone actually broke into the Imperial Tomb?"

"Heavens! The last time someone attempted to break in was a hundred years ago and now we have another intruder?"

"And the person is from Heavenly Explosion Faction! Looks like Xu Que has some help. He was just here in the Imperial City wreaking havoc and someone helped him out by creating more problems within the tombs!"

"So what? Of all the people who had broken in thus far, nobody managed to come out alive!"

"No. According to the rumors, Duan Jiu De managed to break in and even stole the Luminous Grail!"

"That story sounds fake. How can someone like Duan Jiu De break in just for a stupid glowing cup?"

"That’s right. Those stories are probably false. Even the Fire Emperor didn’t bother about such rumors spreading!"

"The spells within the Imperial Tomb are unbreakable. Even if a Form Synthesis cultivator breaks in, it would be hard for him to come out!"

"It looks like Heavenly Explosion Faction would lose one of their genius disciples then!"

Nobody ever thought that it was possible for Zhang Qi Ling to escape from the Imperial Tomb alive. Still, breaking into the tomb was no small matter and attracted a significant amount of attention throughout the entire city.

Once again, a member of Heavenly Explosion Faction has created a name for himself!

However, this matter was soon forgotten for another important piece of news started making its way around the Imperial City.

"Another nobility is visiting the Fire Nation!"

"I’ve long heard about it. The Empress of the Water Nation is coming!"

"Yup. It’s been said that the final round of recruitment test for Sky Incense Valley’s new disciples was to be held here in our Fire Nation. It probably has something to do with fire then!"

"Gosh, I never thought that it would ever be possible for me to see the legendary Water Empress whose beauty was said to be unparalleled!"

"It’s been said that this Water Empress had a complex history. She was the leading disciple of Sky Incense Valley and is now the Empress of Water Nation. There are also rumors saying that she’s the only daughter of one of the biggest clans in the world!"
