"Regardless, these few days would certainly be eventful. Look at how all those Imperial Guards are stepping up once again, looking so stern!"

"The Imperial Palace is being rebuilt as we speak. Looks like Fire Emperor really respects this Water Empress!"

"Haha! It’s also been said that the Fire Emperor has lusted after her for a very long time!"

"Shhh... such things cannot be said! Be careful of the words which leave your mouth!"

The entire city was filled with discussions about the Water Empress’ impending arrival. The story of Xu Que breaking into the tombs was thus overshadowed!

At this exact moment, Xu Que had already delved further into the depths of the Imperial Tomb.

After he had released the Emperor’s Energy from the corpses, Kim Fatty and the other spirits fell into meditation. It was as if those energy was extremely useful and vital to them!

Xu Que didn’t interrupt them and allowed them to cultivate while he started making his way onwards!

According to the maps of the Imperial Tomb, the Dragon Veins was directly beneath the tombs.

There were many other powerful spells guarding the entrance towards this passage. Each of these spells was powerful enough to kill off an Infant Transformation staged cultivator and even cultivators of the Void Refining Stage wouldn’t dare to mess around with such spells!

It was a pity that for someone like Xu Que who had the system with him, unravelling these spells were only too easy. As he stood before a protective spell, all he had to do was to spend 50 act tough points and it would be broken instantly!

"Ding! A protective spell has been detected ahead of you. Would you like to spend 50 act tough points to break the protective enchantments?"

"Break it!"

"Ding! A protective spell has been detected 300m ahead of you. Would you like to spend 50 act tough points to break the protective enchantments?"

"Break it!"

"Ding! A protective spell has been detected ahead of you. Would you like to spend 50 act tough points to break the protective enchantments?"

"Break it!"

As a local tyrant of the streets, everytime Xu Que met with a hurdle, all he had to do was to spend some points to see it completely dissolve before him. He hardened his heart and set his goal on digging out the Dragon Veins to destroy it. He shall ensure that the Emperor wouldn’t have access to Imperial Qi any longer before retrieving the Fire Genesis Herbs!

Indeed, after walking deeper, he had already spent 500 act tough points and broke through ten different protective spells which had prevented him from advancing further.

After passing his tenth protective spell, he arrived before an entire lake of fiery magma!

"Gruuuuu..."

The entire area around him was a natural crater filled with magma which was moving powerfully around the crevice. Xu Que could also feel numerous spells preventing him from getting close.

The heat from the magma was extremely strong and steam filled the crater.

Even before Xu Que could move nearer, he could already sense danger up ahead.

He then frowned and conjured the system, "System, where are the Dragon Veins?"

"Ding! After checking, the system found out that the Dragon Veins had been subjected to heaven defying methods and was placed somewhere beneath this sea of maga. The system can feel the existence of the Dragon Veins but cannot determine the exact location. The system suggests that the host cause sorrow to the existing generations of the Imperial family in order to detect the exact location of the Dragon Veins!"

"Fuck!" Xu Que shouted out in anger.

After going through numerous of hardships and painstakingly arriving at this location, after spending numerous act tough points, he had been tricked. The Dragon Veins had been hidden? Who else could the culprit be? Of course it’s all of those old Fire Emperors!

That means at this point, he has to inflict some pain on the Fire Emperor and cause him to feel sorrow in order to detect the location of the Dragon Vein.

"Wait a second. System, are you playing around with me? What the hell is sorrow?"

"Sorrow means to make the subject cry tears of heartache and sadness. Only when a member of the Imperial family feels sorrow within his veins can the Dragon Veins be drawn out. Apart from this, there are no other methods!"

"..." Xu Que was stumped. If the system wanted the Fire Emperor’s own veins, that was much easier than getting the Fire Emperor to cry!

No, the Flaming Sun Princess would have to do. But to make that girl cry? Haha! That’s going to be a little tough. No, no… I think getting to the shit-eating Fire Emperor would be easier!

Xu Que shook his head and was extremely gloomy. It took him a great deal of effort to be able to finally reach this point within the tombs only to be informed that the Dragon Veins was lost under this sea of magma.

"Eh? Wait, wait. Magma…" All of a sudden, Xu Que thought of something.

His eyes lit up excitedly as his lips curled into a smile.

"Hehe… The Dragon Vein is hidden within the magma, huh? I shall suck this entire lake of magma dry and see how you can remain hidden from me!" Xu Que laughed out coldly as he thought to himself.

"God of Hell’s Compulsion, activate!"

Boom!

At that moment, a loud rumble reverberated out from Xu Que’s body as his meridians roared.

Soon after, a whoosh sound could be heard as Xu Que activated the God of Hell’s Compulsion and jumped right into the fiery magma pit!

chapters.title: Chapter 234: Fire Emperor’S Ritual
chapters.body:
Chapter 234: Fire Emperor’S Ritual

Chapter 234: Fire Emperor’s Ritual

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Boom!

The sea of magma started exploding in bursts of fire as Xu Que absorbed the entire sea bit by bit.

The magma would occasionally splash onto dry land and melt the rocks around it instantly. Since this was the magma of the Fire Nation, with its source of heat coming from the Dragon Veins, the heat was anything but normal and the temperatures were astounding!

"Fuck!!!"

"Ouch, ouch, ouch, AH SHI BA!!!"

(T/N: Ahshiba is a korean swear word…..)

As soon as Xu Que leapt in, his scalp started to burn and the heat on his skin was so intense that he was screaming out in pain.

Even with the God of Hell’s Compulsion, it was hard to endure the extreme temperatures of the sea of magma!

Whoosh!

Xu Que had equipped himself with the Spirit Visage and the Banshee’s Veil to protect himself since he didn’t dare to underestimate the powers of this molten magma.

If Xu Que didn’t equip himself with these items before jumping in and only relied on the God of Hell’s Compulsion, it was inevitable that Xu Que would get boiled alive and face death.

"Boom!"

With his pair of armor around him, he could feel the molten magma repelling away from his body. The temperature around him also fell slightly as he started to feel a bit more relaxed. He even felt... comfortable!

According to most conventional stories, the protagonist of the story would almost certainly roll around in excruciating pain as he was reborn from the flames as his body was tempered by magma.

However, Xu Que was very different from the other conventional protagonists. This kid only enjoyed acting tough and would do everything he can to avoid pain and suffering. With the system and God of Hell’s Compulsion, all he had to do was remain in the vicinity of the magma in order to start absorbing it. He certainly wouldn’t be willing to subject his body to unnecessary trauma.

Hence, with all his protective gear around him, Xu Que soaked in the warm and comfortable magma and slowly waited for his ability to complete absorbing!

"Ding! The system has detected that the host is nearby a powerful Fire Essence. God of Hell’s Compulsion has started absorbing!"

"1%… 2%…3%…"

The numbers which flashed across his eyes moved rapidly. At the same time, Xu Que could also feel the level of magma within this pit starting to decrease.

Wisps of core Fire Essences started swirling around Xu Que as it penetrates his pores and entered his body and meridians. Before long, the fire Essences were coalesced around his dantian!

Such Essences were so powerful that once again, his body could be tempered just by being around it. Additionally, the strength from the Fire Essences could strengthen his meridians and bones!

Ever since the Tribulations in which Xu Que managed to strengthen his body in lightning, he became much stronger. Along with this second time which he showered within the core of the earth, the magma from the Fire Nation’s Dragon Veins, his body had become immensely strong. A cracking sound could be heard from his bones as it cracked and repair many times over. Each time, with added Fire Essences within.

The fire spiritual roots within his dantian were being subjected to strengthening as well as they became stronger and started radiating faint light.

"It’s so comfortable!"

Xu Que’s face was filled with satisfaction as he started swimming around within the molten magma.

The level of magma within the crevice was starting to lessen further!

Several hours later, only one third of the total magma remained and the temperature wasn’t as high as before. Most of it had already been converted into Essences and absorbed by the God of Hell’s Compulsion!

Xu Que’s eyes gleamed as he took off the Banshee’s Veil and Spirit Visage.

Indeed, his flesh and body had became strong and sturdy. It was to the extent that he didn’t feel a single bit of pain despite the lack of protective armor!

"Looks like to deal with this Fire Emperor, all I need is a single punch to crack him!" Xu Que smiled before he closed his eyes once more, absorbing the remaining core Fire Essences!

Time trickled by gradually…

Several more hours passed before the system notification rang out in Xu Que’s mind.

"Ding! Congratulations to host! The God of Hell’s Compulsion has been fully absorbed. You’ve gained new ability to fully control fire elements!

"Ding! After completing its checks, the system has detected that the host’s ability, ‘Buddha’s Fiery Lotus’ has been upgraded by another 10%!"

"Eh? Completed?" Xu Que opened his eyes and was somewhat taken aback.

Everytime after the God of Hell’s Compulsion had successfully reached completion, he would always gain complete control of the respective element. The last time was electric energy. This time, it was fire. It even added a 10% upgrade to Buddha’s Fiery Lotus.

That’s to say that his Buddha’s Fiery Lotus has already reached 40% proficiency and that he could now control four mystical fires!

"Hahaha! Four colored fiery lotus? Along with the Full Glory Killer Book, I would be able to slaughter the Fire Emperor even with the Imperial Qi as protection, huh?" Xu Que laughed out energetically!

At the next moment however, the smile froze on his face.

He was still within the molten magma, but the God of Hell’s Compulsion had already finished its absorption. All the fire Essences around had already been sucked dry but there was still a considerable amount of magma left.

"Fuck me. System, can you suck the remaining magma away? Why don’t you loan to me another few thousand act tough points? I wish to buy a sucking device to get all the magma out. What do you think?" Xu Que asked the system.

The system then replied plainly, "It’s not advised for you to do so. Once all the magma is being sucked dry, the Dragon Veins would lose its power and nutritional capabilities. This would cause all the Genesis Fire Herbs to wither and die instantly.

"What are you talking about? If the magma was sucked dry, the Genesis Fire Herbs would wither and die? Fuck! Why didn’t you say so earlier! What if I accidentally absorbed all of it? Wouldn’t that be a huge problem for me?" Xu Que replied, extremely shocked.

"Ding! After careful calculations, the system realized that it was impossible for the God of Hell’s Compulsion to absorb all the magma here. Hence, the system didn’t notify you!"

"..." Xu Que had no words to say. There was no choice since the system often withheld information from him. What else could he do?

This pushed him to further conviction that he wasn’t going to return the 8,000 act tough points which he had borrowed from the system!

He had made up his mind and was determined to do as he had intended!

However, Xu Que had also accepted a fact.

The fact was that he had to run all the way out, catch the dog Emperor and bring him here. He would have to beat the Emperor up until he cried, extract his blood which now contains sorrow and force the Dragon Veins to appear!

"Dog Emperor, I shall beat you till tears roll down your cheeks!" Xu Que cleared his throat as he rose up from the magma and walked towards the tomb entrance.

At the same time, he didn’t know this, but there was utter panic going on within the Imperial Palace!

This was because Xu Que had completely sucked the Fire Essences away from the surrounding area of the Dragon Veins. This caused the Imperial Qi to weaken severely since it no longer had Essences to draw. At the same time, the Dragon Veins was unable to replenish the amount of Fire Essences quickly enough. This thus caused the strength of the country to dwindle significantly, causing the Fire Nation to be extremely vulnerable!

Fire Emperor and Flaming Sun Princess, as part of the Imperial Family, with the Imperial blood flowing within their veins could feel this and their faces turned pale!

"How… How could this happen? I can’t feel the Imperial Qi any more?"

"Is there a problem with the spell or…"

"No, no, that’s not right. This omen meant the collapse of our nation!"

The Fire Emperor’s heart trembled in fear, as he resembled a deflated balloon and fell to the ground in despair!

Collapse of the nation? As the most prosperous nation among the five nations, was it finally going to collapse today?

Flaming Sun Princess was in utter disbelief as well. She had no idea why this was happening but something told her that this had something to do with Xu Que entering the Imperial Tomb.

Could it be… that he managed to get through to the Dragon Veins? No, that’s impossible. The Dragon Veins had been hidden. There’s no way for him to find it!

"Flaming Sun, quickly send someone to perform a ritual. I wish to sacrifice something to the heavens, to the Fire God. My Fire Nation… it cannot collapse like this!"

All of a sudden, the Fire Emperor stood up, his eyes and mouth were wide open in resolve.

When the Flaming Sun Princess heard this, her face fell!

"Emperor father, you… Are you going to... Madam Ya…"

"That’s right, there’s no other way. We have to sacrifice her to preserve the Fire Nation!"

"But..."

"No buts! Quickly get on with it. The Water Empress is coming to our city tomorrow. We have to appease her and thus have to conduct the ritual now!"

"...Your daughter understands!"

chapters.title: Chapter 235: Xu Que Is Back Again!
chapters.body:
Chapter 235: Xu Que Is Back Again!

Chapter 235: Xu Que Is Back Again!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Within the Imperial Tomb...

Xu Que had just came up from beneath after bathing within the magma. His God of Hell’s Compulsion had already reached completion and his mind was sharp and focused.

However, the set of black robes which Xiao Yan wore was ruined. When he leapt into the magma, he’d forgotten to remove it. Xu Que had also somewhat underestimated the temperature which instantly reduced his favorite robe to ashes!

At this point, he wore a set of scholarly long robes and flat shoes as he trudged upwards step by step.

When he returned to the tomb rooms, Kim Fatty and the other spirits were squatting down, unmoving.

It was as if their transformation was so great that they fell into deep meditation as their cultivation levels increased rapidly. Their physical form which used to resemble something like gas had started to take solid forms.

Xu Que didn’t wish to disturb them since he had to come back later anyway. When that happens, he would probably purchase another pagoda and accept them as little disciples!

It’s just that leaving the tomb wasn’t as smooth sailing as entering was!

Xu Que traced his original footsteps back to the very first room he’d landed in.

When he raised his head up to look, the hole which he had created earlier had completely vanished!

"Fuck! Have I seen a ghost? This was clearly the same tomb room! Why did it look like this?" Xu Que was startled.

He was extremely sure that he had came down through the ceiling in this room as his footsteps were still visible up on the ceiling!

And now, the large hole which he’d created was now a concrete ceiling. The distance from his head wasn’t large. About 2 meters.

This wasn’t right. When he landed from up above, he took several minutes to land and had even used Lightning Haste to descend down!

According to that logic, the ceiling should be at least several kilometers in height but was now reduced to two meters and the large gaping hole was no longer there!

The shock he received truly felt as though he’d seen a ghost!

Xu Que was astonished as he retrieved the Infinity Edge from his system inventory and started hacking away at the ceiling!

"Boom!"

Pieces or rocks and debris fell from the ceiling as it started breaking apart. However… behind the ceiling was a hard, solidified soil!

Xu Que opened his eyes wide in shock as he conjured the system.

"System, what’s going on here?"

"Ding! After conducting checks, this place has been sealed up completely. Only physical strength would get you out of here!" The system replied.

Xu Que was stumped. Wasn’t that the same way he’d gained entry?

Digging a hole downwards was easy. But digging upwards was extremely difficult. If he wasn’t careful, he would bury himself!

"That’s not right! What happened to the hole which I dug while entering?" Xu Que asked again suspiciously.

"The location which host entered the Imperial Tomb was through a teleportation spell and isn’t necessarily within this room!" The system announced once more as it provided an illustration within Xu Que’s mind.

When Xu Que saw it, he understood it as his lips quivered.

The spell within this ancient tomb were truly crafty. No wonder it was often said that anyone who came in wouldn’t come out alive.

This ancient tomb was surrounded by a huge sealing spell. When he entered, he drilled a hole. But when he crossed through the spell, he was teleported to a random location within the tomb.

That was exactly what had happened to Xu Que. However, the teleportation spell was too weak and thus took a long time to teleport him to the location. During this teleportation process, he assumed that he was travelling downwards. However, the duration it took him to reach the place doesn’t indicate how far he was being transported.

Hence, regardless of what had happened, he was trapped!

"Looks like I have to start using the excavator once again!" Xu Que thought helplessly as he retrieved the excavator out from his system inventory.

Indeed, as soon as he took it out, the system reminded him, "12 hours had passed and the rental timing for the excavator has passed. Please pay another 500 act tough points to resume using it!"

"Fuck! Here we go again." Xu Que nearly imploded from anger for this system was too shrewd.

However, when he actually calculated the hours, it had truly been 12 hours.

He only had 500 act tough points left on him. How could he afford to waste it on this machine?

"No. No matter what you say, I shan’t be cheated by you again. Even if I don’t use the excavator, I shall be able to find my way out!"

Xu que seemed to have thought of something as he rejected the system’s suggestion. 500 act tough points? Hmph! This Act Tough King won’t let you earn a single cent more from me!

He remembered clearly what Kim Fatty and the group of spirits had mentioned before. A hundred years ago, an old man had came here before and left with a Luminous Grail.

Since that old man managed to leave, that meant that he would be able to leave as well. All he had to do was to find the route taken by the old man…

As soon as he recalled this, Xu Que took out the piece of jade from his robes and examined it. When he flicked his wrist, he felt a gush of core energy rush into his body.

Faint black light started flickering from the jade tile as the aura from the old man started filling the room he was in before diffusing outwards.

Xu Que paced about several steps as the light became dim. When he walked in the opposite direction, the light became stronger.

"Yo, so it’s this simple!" Xu Que was beyond elated. If the old man had dug a way out, he must’ve used some spells and that would be where traces of his power would be the strongest. Likewise, this piece of jade would be able to trace where the power was most concentrated and lead him towards it.

Hence, Xu Que started following the light on the piece of jade as he made his way out.

When the light dimmed out, Xu Que would turn the opposite direction. When the light was bright, he would walk faster in the same direction.

Handling the exit strategy this way, Xu Que walked further and further in till he reached a large wall. At this point, the jade tile was shining brighter than ever before.

Right at the corner of this wall was a hole. Beside the hole, there were several words scribbled. However, since many months and years had passed since the words were written, it was smudged and faded!

Xu Que couldn’t be bothered by the words as well. He bent down and squirmed his way into the hole.

"Eh? Why is everything black here? Has the exit been sealed?" Xu Que glanced up ahead and was disappointed that he couldn't see anything but continued forward.

After all, he was only left with this route to take. If this didn’t lead him out, he would then consider talking to the system about the excavator again.

However, this passageway was too big and long. Sometimes, it would lead upslope and other times, downslope. It would meander along the way as Xu Que walked on for nearly two hours!

He was starting to feel that something wasn’t quite right. Where did this path dug by the old man lead to? It’s already been two hours and Xu Que felt like he’d only been walking rounds.

"Forget it then. Since I’ve already started this path, there’s no reason for me to turn back!"

Xu Que frowned and continued walking on, this time with increased speed. He conjured the Lightning Haste and started soaring forward.

It was largely due to his patience and perseverance that he finally saw a light at the end of the tunnel after several more hours.

"That old man is truly insane! The tunnel which he dug required the person to walk for an entire day before arriving!" Xu Que’s lips curled upwards in a snarl and yet he was in admiration of the old man for something as crazy as this couldn’t be done by any normal man!

However, it was also a relief that Xu Que could find his way out. This was better than spending 500 act tough points and thus was worth feeling happy.

He increased his speed. His shadow turned into a blur as he moved rapidly forward.

Whoosh!

Before long, he could feel fresh air and cold wind blowing into the tunnel, which meant that he was getting close to the exit. He made a last break for it before finally leaving the tunnel.

At the next moment however, he was stumped.

The exit of this tunnel actually led to the man-made mountains by the Great Lake!

"Straight back to the Imperial City?" Xu Que was in disbelief at how crazy this old man was. He actually dug a way to enter the Imperial Tomb from within the Imperial City and even placed the exit by such a scenic place, next to the Great Lake!

Big brother, you are fantastic. It’s just that he probably went senile over the course of the last hundred of years when I finally met you!

"Hehe... Xu Que is back again!"

Xu Que laughed out coldly as he patted the dust off his robes and examined his surroundings. The skies had already turned dark as the night descended. The people out on the streets were few and the only light around the Great Lake were lanterns that was scattered across.

"That’s right. Madam Ya also has blood of the Imperial family. Getting her tears would be much simpler!"

Xu Que’s eyes gleamed as he sniggered before his body disappeared into the shadows and made his way towards Madam Ya’s residence.

There were several dome-like spells which covered her residence but this wasn’t enough to hold him back.

What rubbish spells. It was nothing compared to those within the Imperial Tomb. With Xu Que’s powerful soul strength, all he had to do was to concentrate and he could walk right through the spell. It even seemed like nobody had recognized him!

Xu Que recalled the path from his memories as he started making his way across the yard.

He walked past several students but Xu Que didn’t intend to reveal his identity as he walked straight for Madam Ya’s room. Just as he was about to knock on the door, he heard…

"Young mister Li…" Madam Ya’s soft voice could be heard from within.

Xu Que was stumped. Fuck! How did she know that I’m here?

Just as he was about to acknowledge, more strange sounds started coming out from beyond the door!

"Ehhh… Ehhhh… Mmmmmm... Young mister Li… Harder…"

chapters.title: Chapter 236: Disturbance In The Night
chapters.body:
Chapter 236: Disturbance In The Night

Chapter 236: Disturbance In The Night

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

The night was dark.

Within Madam Ya’s compounds, only Xu Que was capable of sneaking in as there were many powerful guards standing outside the spell, preventing anyone from entering or leaving. However, to Xu Que, these guards were nothing.

He wore his Human Skinned Mask and once again, he took on the face of Hu Ge who was known as Li Bai.

Just when Xu Que walked over to Madam Ya’s room and was about to knock, he actually heard strange sounds coming out from beyond the door. When he heard this, his entire body trembled in excitement.

"Fuck me now! Is Madam Ya… thinking about me? She’s actually thinking of me deep in the night, when she’s alone on the bed…"

Hearing such sounds caused Xu Que to be extremely shaken.

He initially planned on walking in casually. However, he’s hesitating now.

Then he saw that faint yellow candle lights could be seen from the side of the room.

Xu Que was rather curious at this point!

"Let’s talk about this later on. I wish to see if Madam Ya has ‘missed’ me…" As he spoke, Xu Que walked over to the windows by the side of her room.

It was lucky for him that this window was nicely placed in such a way that her bedside could be seen through it.

After crossing over to the other side, Xu Que gazed through the windows and saw the shadow of Madam Ya’s slim and petite figure resting on the bed. Her breathing was ragged and she was mildly panting. Just seeing this was enough to cause every single cell on Xu Que’s body to stand on its edge.

"Fuck me! This little temptress. Why isn’t she sleeping properly so late at night and was instead calling out my name? Even for someone as gentlemanly as myself also finds it hard to control one’s self!"

Xu Que’s was already feeling extremely hot and flustered. In actual fact, Xu Que was anything but someone who followed the rules. His hands started acting dishonestly as he looked at the windows.

The windows were made up of small pieces of wood forming a cross and paper was used to fill the four corners. When Xu Que saw this, he recalled how the people on T.V. shows wet their fingers with saliva before poking through the paper. This was especially done when people needed to spy on their enemies!

At this point it, was important for him to spy on the current situation of the enemy and investigate what the subject, Madam Ya, is up to for he was sure it was something bad.

"Wa taaaaaaa…" Pointing out a pair of fingers, he licked them before poking them fiercely at the pieces of paper by the window that’s obscuring his vision.

Png!

A soft sound vibrated in his ears. It was then that Xu Que realized that those television shows all depict fucking fake scenes!

Who the hell said that window paper could be poked through easily with a wet finger?

Madam Ya’s fragrant scented window paper were anything but inferior quality goods. Even if Xu Que were to poke it till his fingers broke, it wouldn't ever tear.

"Fuck me! What’s going on? You won’t tear after getting poked? I don’t believe this… I’m going to poke till I tear you…"

As an Act Tough King, Xu Que had always felt like nothing could hold him back. And yet this piece of paper refused to tear?

It’s just a thin layer of paper!

Nothing more than a thin membrane!

Don’t you dare obstruct the Act Tough King from getting his way!

Since you have the audacity to stand in the Act Tough King’s way, be prepared to face utter annihilation!

Hence, Xu Que withdrew his hands and clenched his fists… before unclenching his fists as he started to peel the piece of paper away from the windowpane. Then he gently lifted the entire pane aside.

"Heheh! Why did you have to make life so difficult for me? All I had to do was to remove you away. What can you do about it?"

Chi ya!

Xu Que completely took apart a portion of the window panel!

At this point, a fragrant and aromatic smell filled his nostrils.

This was the floral scent of a woman and it had intoxicated him!

Under the dim lights of the flickering candles, Madam Ya was wearing a thin, sheer blue sleeping gown. Her eyes were shut as her legs were rubbing itself on the sheets of her bed. Her entire body was covered in a thin layer of sweat, as her lips opened before closing as if she was mumbling…

"So it wasn’t that Madam Ya realized that I had came. Instead, she was… Dreaming! Why did she see me even in her dreams? Ai… That’s quite normal. After all, I’m so refined and elegant. It’s no wonder that Madam Ya is in love with me! And no wonder the dog Emperor would lock her up like this."

Just a simple jump was enough for Xu Que to leap through the missing window pane and enter the room. His movements were agile and deft, ensuring that nobody around realized what he had done. Soon after, he added another layer of protective spell around the area which would prevent noises from leaking out.

However, despite how quiet Xu Que had been, he still managed to wake Madam Ya from her slumber.

"Mister… Mister Li? Is that really you?" Madam Ya’s eyes were half opened as she looked at Xu Que and asked aloud.

As soon as she realized that it was truly him and that she wasn’t dreaming, she jumped up awake in astonishment.

She was just dreaming about him and now…

Could this still be a dream?

What if, this was truly a dream?

Then, she wouldn’t have to be so wary and cautious anymore!

Madam Ya stretched herself as her face blushed a deep shade of red. She then tucked her legs to herself before extending an arm to touch Xu Que, who was now seated on the bed. With a certain tone of false anger, she spoke, "Mister Li, I thought I would never get to see you ever again…"

"Don’t worry Madam. Am I not here now?"

At this point, Madam Ya’s behavior was completely different from how she had been during the banquet. She had lost all her authoritative air and now felt like a young lady who was extremely shy and filled with desire.

Madam Ya who resembled an extremely ripe and juicy peach hanging from the tree was the object of most men’s desire. If anyone saw her in this state, it would be hard for them to control themselves.

Who was Xu Que?

He’s the Act Tough King!

Most men wouldn’t be able to control themselves but Xu Que was different. At such a time, the only thing in his head was… Why did he have to control himself?

He extended a hand to hold Madam Ya’s waist and pulled her over. At last, his hands finally touched her mature skin.

"Oh..."

As soon as Xu Que touched Madam Ya, her body let out an involuntary shiver as she started panting and her breathing became ragged.

"Mister Li…"

Madam Ya was about to speak but Xu Que stretched a hand out and placed a finger to her lips, "Don’t call me mister Li. This would affect the mood…"

"Then… What should I call…"

"Call me official sir!"

As soon as Xu Que said this, his arms tightened around her as he lifted her up and placed her back down on the bed.

Light. She’s so light.

Madam Ya was slender and soft as though she had no bones beneath the smooth skin of hers. Her weight almost felt like she could be blown away by the wind!

The expression of intense desire could be seen across her face. It was obvious that she was doing this so that Xu Que could appear masculine and… tough.

"Official sir, from today onwards, you shall be my official sir..." Madam Ya who still thought that this was all just a dream had placed aside her identity as the Princess of the Fire Nation. Before Xu Que, she was just a hot blooded and passionate young lady. Both her hands reached out to grab Xu Que’s neck. At that moment, she felt like the most blessed girl in the world.

Her lips parted into an innocent smile!

Her eyes exhibited the amount of happiness and bliss in her heart, something that she had never experienced in her entire life.

As the oldest daughter of the previous Fire Emperor, her fate had always been a "wife to the Fire God". This meant that she had to preserve herself and remain single her entire life. This was such a tortuous and difficult thing to do as a woman!

Whenever the nights were long and lonely, the only thing that Madam Ya had been able to rely on for comfort and solace were the poems composed by the outstanding students of the nation.

However, whenever the poems were on the topic of passion or love, Madam Ya could feel the loss deep within her heart and her loneliness became more pronounced.

Up till the person before her eyes showed up, her only companion had been loneliness. This young mister Li was extremely talented and had recited numerous amazing poems with just a few steps. The one she remembered the most was, "While others are teasing my madness, I am laughing at their short-sightedness!"

Such a talented and brilliant individual, standing in the middle of other average students, young mister Li had been outstanding. She had been in awe of him ever since the banquet and she’s shuddering at how talented her was.

And now, this person was right here before her eyes. Everything felt like a surreal dream and Madam Ya couldn’t distinguish reality from dreams. "Official sir, I..." Madam Ya bit her lips, as though she was unsure of what to do.

Indeed, Xu Que used his finger and thumb to gently grip her chin. He then smiled slyly before using a gentle voice to speak, "Don’t say anything. Just kiss me!"

chapters.title: Chapter 237: Breaking The Fire God’S Protection
chapters.body:
Chapter 237: Breaking The Fire God’S Protection

Chapter 237: Breaking The Fire God’s Protection

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Kiss?

Asking her to initiate a kiss?

Madam Ya had never seen anything like this before!

Of course, she had never been so close and intimate with any other scholar before.

Many of those students were always filled with desire and lust whenever they saw her. However, nobody had dared to be this direct with her.

Hence, when Xu Que said this, Madam Ya was taken aback as well.

Still, Madam Ya felt like she was in a dream and didn’t have much to worry about. She closed her eyes and mustered her courage before leaning forward and planting a kiss on Xu Que’s lips.

Passion!

Gentleness!

Strength!

Being around him made her feel warm, safe and secure.

Could it be… that this was how it felt to kiss a man?

It’s no wonder that so many women would lose sleep because of something like this!

It was such a shame that after so many years, she had been sleeping alone on a large bed and she had never experienced anything as sweet as this. The only time she was exempted from such feelings was when she dreamt.

‘So soft! Madam Ya’s little lips are truly different from those of other women!’

When Xu Que felt Madam Ya kissing his lips, he too felt something extraordinary.

However, he could also feel Madam Ya’s nervousness and lack of experience. She was even shuddering slightly when she kissed him.

All of a sudden, Xu Que thought about how the dog Emperor had sealed her here, forbidding her to leave. He then thought about how she was subjected to a lifetime of loneliness, since she had to remain pure for the dogshit Fire God. Xu Que felt that such a practice of condemning a woman to singlehood by force was an intolerable one. Something that he couldn't stand.

He truly couldn’t stand it. He had to go and rescue Madam Ya even if it meant giving up his own body while doing so!

That’s right! In order to destroy the protection and blessing of the Fire God, all he had to do was to break… Madam Ya’s purity!

Thinking this way, Xu Que’s eyes gleamed.

Since he knew that this is needed in order to destroy the entire Fire Nation, he realized that he didn’t have much choice but to sacrifice his noble self for the greater good!

However, when he saw the gentle and charming smile which lingered across Madam Ya’s face, Xu Que suddenly recalled his purpose here. The reason he had broken into her compounds was to make her shed tears!

With that reason, he would have to make her cry. But why was he making Madam Ya laugh now?

‘This cannot do. Making her laugh meant that the mission was failing. How can I just care about my own pleasure and forsake the mission?’

But how should he make her cry?

Could it be to… make her cry while sleeping with her?

No, no, no, the Act Tough King is a true gentleman!

Although Xu Que knew that he could make her cry from how good he was, doing something like this was too vicious and lowdown and he shouldn’t even consider this.

But to fulfill a mission like this, he had to have a certain domineering approach to this while acting tough!

His head could break and his blood could leak, but he must never forsake his toughness!

He raised his head gently and turned to the side. It was then that he noticed a musical instrument by the side of Madam Ya’s bed. It was a pipa and an idea formed in his head.

Since Madam Ya had always enjoyed talented individuals and she had a deep appreciation for good lyrics, that was how he was going to accomplish the mission.

When the idea had formed in his head, Xu Que gently extricated himself from Madam Ya before speaking gently to her, "How can we not have music at such a setting? I wonder if Madam Ya would agree if you played the pipa while I sing to it? I shall create an ambience and compose a song for you. How about that?"

"Official sir, I shall obey your commands!" Madam Ya spoke out, knowing how Xu Que was very talented.

All he had to do was open his mouth and streams of brilliant poems could flow from it. A step was all that was needed to compose poems which had never been heard in thousands of years. Madam Ya then flipped herself off the bed and took the pipa in her embrace. She then asked, "Does the official want something with a fast beat or a slow beat?"

"Slow beat. You should accompany the beat of my qin…" As soon as Xu Que said this, he whipped out his qin from the system inventory and started strumming to the famous Pipa Tune.

At the same time, Madam Ya’s eyes opened wide as she started playing her pipa as well, accompany Xu Que’s instrument. As she pricked her ears to hear, she harmonized perfectly and in sync with his qin.

Xu Que exhaled deeply as he started singing.

"At night, by the Xunyang River to a guest, we bid farewell. With autumn chills, maple leaves and reed flowers fell.

On the boat was the guest, on a horse arrived the host. Alas there was no music; still we raised cups for a toast,

Drunk without joy; in sadness we had to say goodbye. The river was misty then, reflecting the moon up high.

Suddenly across the water came the sound of pipa. The host forgot to leave and the guest didn't depart.

Towards the sound in the darkness we inquired about the player. The playing stopped but the player hesitated to answer…"

The lyrics were paired very naturally with Xu Que’s high voice as he sang. The sounds of the pipa and the qin caused the story to almost come alive before their eyes.

"To ask the musician to join us, we moved our boat closer. Adding wine and brightening lamps, we resumed the dinner.

Only after many pleas did she come out of her place, still holding the pipa that shadowed half of her face."

When the line ‘still holding the pipa that shadowed half of her face’ was sang, Xu Que looked right into Madam Ya’s eyes.

Madam Ya was taken aback by this as well, as she inadvertently took the role of the female lead in the story.

She was rather curious as well. Xu Que sang this beautiful song as though he had a purpose. A story to tell her.

"She plucked the strings and turned the pegs to tune. Even before the music started, we already felt boon."

Her notes were restrained but full of sentiment as if she was voicing her lifelong disappointment.

The bass strings rumbled like thunderstorms pelting. The treble strings rustled like lovers whispering.

Rumbling and rustling interwove at a fast rate, like large and small pearls falling on a jade plate.

...

"Yet a dark and gloomy feeling had grown. At this moment, silence eclipsed any sound."

In each stanza, Xu Que’s lyrics and songs were already brilliant but were made better by the sounds of their instruments playing together. Just hearing the lyrics would be enough to dampen anyone’s mood for it was such a sad song. The line ‘at this moment, silence eclipsed any sound’ was particularly effective!

She said that the capital was originally her home. She lived in the neighborhood of the ancient tombs.

An accomplished pipa player at the age of thirteen, she was with the music school and on the elite team.

Over the years, she indulged herself in pleasure and feast. Autumn moon and spring breeze were noticed the least.

Then her brother enlisted and her aunt was deceased. As time went on, her beauty gradually decreased.

Fewer and fewer carriages stopped by her door. Finally, she married a merchant when a youth no more.

The merchant was profit-minded, always on the road. He went to Fuliang to buy tea two months ago.

…

"In this uncaring world we are two wretched drifters, treasuring this encounter even though we're strangers..."

The beautiful chords and tune was played to emphasize the sorrowful story. A pipa playing lady didn’t have a choice but to marry the merchant. This further reiterated Madam Ya’s loneliness and sadness in the depths of her heart.

The pipa lady married the merchant, who only cared about profits but was never around and flourished at her expense…

Wasn’t this a representation of how the Fire Emperor married her off to the Fire God as a sacrifice? He benefited from this but sacrificed her life and happiness.

There are way too many pitiful women in this world!

And most of these women were often oppressed by the same means. Thinking up to this point, Madam Ya was already teary eyed. Before long, tears started to stream down her cheeks.

Xu Que was also sighing out incessantly. He never thought that the song which he plagiarized would also affect him as much as it had affected Madam Ya.

He saw that Madam Ya was tearing but didn’t make any attempts to console her. This was because the song had said ‘In this moment, silence eclipsed any sound’. Hence, he remained quiet while he secretly collected her tears.

Madam Ya then slowly placed the pipa down and looked at Xu Que. The line ‘In this uncaring world we are two wretched drifters, treasuring this encounter even though we're strangers’ echoed in her mind.

Also, Madam Ya still felt like this was still inside her surreal dream. Maybe it was only in her dreams that this unobtainable and multi-talented Li Bai could become so bold and brazen to personally come down here and accompany her?

Since it was just a dream, why should she care so much then?

Why should she worry about the Fire God?

Why should she care about the well-being of the nation?

Why should she care about the protection of the Fire God?

Everything… disappear!

She then stood up and walked towards Xu Que before she allowed her robes and every inch of clothing on her body to fall off, completely exposing every bit of her body to Xu Que.

"Official sir, it’s time we took a break…"

The warm and gentle tone in her voice was coupled with a certain insistence as she pushed Xu Que gently onto the bed.

chapters.title: Chapter 238: The Arrival Of The Water Empress!
chapters.body:
Chapter 238: The Arrival Of The Water Empress!

Chapter 238: The Arrival Of The Water Empress!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"Ah! Official sir…"

The entire room was filled with gentle shouts and scented smells.

Xu Que had never expected himself to ever be shoved so violently this way before. Are you kidding? You dare to push me? Let me show you the powers of the little Act Tough King who managed to do it seven times in one night!

"Tah! Eat my rod!"

Xu Que overturned the situation as he decided to be more forceful and dominant. Soon after, the sounds of Madam Ya’s soft moans could be heard…

This was a night where the naughty acts of love making was accomplished!

All the injustice and unfairness which Madam Ya kept to herself over the past few decades of her life was finally released all at one go tonight.

This night, the blessings and protection of the Fire God upon the Fire Nation which had been around for thousands of years, was finally broken!

When morning arrived, drops of rain landed gently outside the windows and onto the lush green grass. Xu Que opened his eyes, feeling immensely satisfied. It’s been a long time since he last slept so peacefully.

He looked at Madam Ya who was cradled in his arms and couldn’t help but recall the crazy night he had. Who would’ve expected that the pipa along with the song he played would be so effective because of his Four Star Musician talent?

Madam Ya was supposed to be married off to the Fire God. Just thinking about this fact made Xu Que pause in shock. Did he just make a cuckold out of the Fire God?

However, when he saw that time was passing by quickly, he realized that he had something important to do today. He had already gathered the tears from Madam Ya and… had to settle scores with the dog Emperor. He wanted to capture the Fire Emperor and extract his damned blood.

"Sleep peacefully! When you do wake up, everything will no longer be the same!"

He then gently touched Madam Ya’s pitiful looking face as Xu Que slowly got up. He wore his clothes and felt a sense of reluctance in leaving Madam Ya’s residence.

However, as the Act Tough King of this generation, how could he possibly not do what he has to over his feelings for a woman?

Acting tough was the only career in this life which one was able to make it big.

Xu Que stuck out his chest and walked out of Madam Ya’s room proudly.

At this point, the sun was shining brightly down upon the lands. The green grass and colorful flowers were in full bloom. It was a good day.

Xu Que walked to the exit of Madam Ya’s domains and was about to gather his soul strength so as to walk through the protective spells, when he overheard two men having a conversation.

When he turned his head to look, he saw a pair of Original Infant guards. They are squating down beside the door and was probably guarding it to ensure that nobody would come or leave this area. They were also speaking very loudly.

"We’ve had so many problems as of late. First, the Prince Consort returned for revenge. Next, the Heavenly Explosion Faction decided to rob the Imperial Tombs!"

"This was probably thoroughly planned out. Do you remember who showed up before the Prince Consort did? It was Li Bai. This Heavenly Explosion Faction is quite a big deal. Everyone of their disciples are so powerful and heroic!"

"And yet their talents were of much use. After the Emperor gave the decree to seek Li Bai out, he vanished into thin air. Even the Prince Consort has disappeared. Today, Zhang Qi Ling entered the Imperial Tombs. It seems like he’s most likely dead as well!"

"That’s true. Looks like the cost of disgracing the Fire Emperor was to lose a disciple and the other two have probably fled into exile!"

"But today is the day the Water Empress will visit our city. Hence, the security is very tight throughout the entire city. It’s probably out of fear that one of these disciples from the Heavenly Explosion Faction would show up today and cause trouble!"

"But that’s not likely. Even the commoners had been ordered not to leave their houses. Even the merchants and people selling food down by the streets are all imperial guards in disguise!"

"That’s a shame. Seems like we won’t have any chance of meeting the Empress. It’s been said that she is both beautiful and intimidating at the same time, with all the elegance of an Empress!"

"Haha! But if anyone from Heavenly Explosion Faction decides to come today to cause problems, they would almost certainly be trapped and would find it hard to flee!"

"That’s for sure. When that happens, the Empress had to act in defense of the Fire Nation. Along with our Emperor, even 10 Xu Ques won’t be of any use!"

The pair of the Imperial Guards were by the side laughing and sniggering.

Xu Que glared at them before walking past them from behind. He had a cold smile etched on his face, "Is that so? 10 Xu Ques wouldn’t be of any use?"

"Eh?"

"Who are you?"

Both the imperial guards’ faces fell as they turned around swiftly.

Xu Que didn’t even waste time speaking. He punched both of them squarely in the face without a second’s hesitation!

"Pow pow!"

These Imperial Guards didn’t even have a chance to react and fell to the ground, knocked unconscious.

If he was an ordinary cultivator, doing something like that was impossible. However, Xu Que had already acquired two different elements and channeled both to full completion. His physical body was extremely tough so the force from these punches was extremely powerful and was equivalent to a very strong spell.

The force from these punches felt like two mountains crashing down on their faces. It was also fortunate for these guards that they were of the Original Infant Stage. If not, their brains would probably have exploded!

"What Water Empress or Fire Emperor? Whichever monarch comes, I shall claim them all the same way!"

Xu Que clapped his hands once and glared at the pair of unconscious guards sternly. Just as he was about to step over their bodies, he saw a flash of light. When he looked closely, he realized that it was the reflection of a pair of command tiles hanging from their waists.

Guards will be disguised as merchants?

"Hehe... this is going to be fun!" Xu Que laughed as he waved a hand in the air. Instantly, both their command tiles were sucked into his palms.

Soon after, he conjured several spells and took of the imperial guard’s uniform and wore it. He then used his core water energy and formed a water snake, bounding them both. He then lifted the pair of them and dumped them into a storage room.

Before he left, he even decided to add another enchantment to ensure that nobody would find them and it would also prevent them from escaping.

When he had finished all this, Xu Que transformed his appearance into that of an Imperial Guard. The tile which he wore on his waist had the word "Ban" on it. As he walked, it swung and hit his legs.

However, he still had to spend another 20 act tough points in order to alter his appearance.

He purchased a normal Human Skinned Mask and equipped it. At this point, he realized that he no longer looked handsome or charming. Instead, he wore a very normal face!

As he walked along the streets, he realized that everywhere was empty and quiet.

The entire population of commoners were expressly forbidden from leaving their homes. The Imperial City thus looked unusually empty!

However, along the main road leading up to the city was a completely different sight. This road was very broad and was filled with lively sounds. Lanterns were hung along the sides of the streets.

This was the large road which the Water Empress would be welcomed on.

Many hawkers and stall keepers were running their usual businesses and canvassing for sales. Several Imperial Guards were also patrolling the area.

Most of the people present had looks of excitement and eagerness on their faces. It was like they weren’t in the least worried that someone from Heavenly Explosion Faction would show up!

There was another group of people around who had cautious looks across their faces. They examined their surroundings regularly, afraid that troublemakers would show up and expose their rouse.

Xu Que looked at these group of people and laughed out mockingly. "This dog Emperor really knows how to have fun. He actually gathered a group of Imperial Guards and made them stall keepers and merchants. I wonder what technique he used to hide all their cultivation levels. Was he waiting for me to show up before springing a surprise on me?"

Xu Que had to admit that this was quite a good plan.

Each of these fake merchants and stall keepers were all of the Original Infant Stage and were experienced fighters. Concealing their cultivation levels and making them appear to be normal civilians was a very good plan, for most cultivators won’t even spare a second glance at civilians, and wouldn’t expect them to be able to fight. If something were to happen here, these merchants would immediately spring into action.

Thankfully, Xu Que had seen through the ploys and was smiling in happiness. He was trying to find an opportunity to join up with the rest of the Imperial Guards!

Right at this point, one of the Imperial Guard leaders turned to look at Xu Que and walked over. He was frowning as he spoke, "Hey, you! Why are you daydreaming? Come over here. We need two more people as merchants. You and I would have to play the part. Go and get dressed."

As soon as he finished speaking, the leader then handed a roughspun tunic to Xu Que. He then pointed at a stall selling pork, "You shall pretend to sell pork later on."

Fuck.

Xu Que opened his eyes wide as if to say, "I’m such a good looking lad and you actually assigned me a position as a butcher?"

However, when he touched his face which bore the Human Skinned Mask, Xu Que then turned around and started changing into his outfit. He grabbed a butcher’s knife and walked over to his post.

It wasn’t because he felt that this mask he donned resembled a butcher. The reason he went along with the plan was because he wanted to find a way to have fun with the Fire Emperor and play along with his games.

"You diguised your guards as merchants to trick me? Heheh... then I shall pretend to be a merchant and kill you! This seems like a good plan!"

Xu Que was now disguised as a butcher and hid in the crowd, waiting for the appearance of the Fire Emperor and humiliate him once again with his own plan!

Come on, quickly come then, you dumb Fire Emperor!

My butcher’s blade is getting impatient to have a taste of your blood!

Your ancestors are also excited for you to meet me that they’re all dancing in excitement!

The more Xu Que thought about what was to happen, the more excited he became. This was a great acting tough opportunity!

"Wnggggg!"

Right at this point, the sound of a horn blared out from the city gates.

Everyone turned their heads to look across.

A eunuch was riding on horseback as he entered the city. He was holding tightly onto the reins as he shouted, "The arrival of the Water Empress along with the magnificent Fire Emperor!"

chapters.title: Chapter 239: Discussing Life
chapters.body:
Chapter 239: Discussing Life

Chapter 239: Discussing Life

Translator: Translation Nation

Editor: Translation Nation

Boom!

An entire calvary of soldiers which emanated boundless of majestic and powerful auras strode into the city on horseback. Their might and power was almost palpable.

Following closely behind, under the heavy protection of thousands of armed soldiers, was a woman dressed in light blue dragon embroidered robe. This woman rode atop a flying water sword with her hands crossed behind her back. She had an air of majestic nobility around her and her face revealed a radiant smile. It was almost as if she was the goddess of the earth and heaven with her resplendent mannerisms.

Under such glorious splendor, there was a very discernable might and authority wafting out from her. As the water sword beneath her feet glided across, everyone raised their heads to get a better glimpse of her. They all felt as though the entire world could be trampled under her magnificent feet.

This was the Water Empress, a fabled and legendary figure known throughout the entire cultivation world. She was also the only female monarch amongst the five nations!

Indeed, as Xu Que turned his head to look, he was stumped!

Water Empress?

She’s the Water Empress? Fuck me!

"How’s the possible?" Xu Que exclaimed involuntarily.

The Water Empress who was heavily guarded was actually the woman whom he had met atop the Soul Tower!

That woman who he found extremely hard to forget after all these while!

Recalling back to the first time he met her within the Soul Tower, his first impression of her was that this was a woman who could only ever be fucked by Gods.

She was way too composed and calm, as though she could never be antagonized or angered. She would always remain noble and benevolent, just like an old and amiable senior towards his subordinates.

She had a face that could easily overturn nations and her otherworldly figure makes her seem like a goddess who didn’t belong in this world. She was perfect.

There was a faint glow around her body which seemed to be made of water elements. Just looking at her once would almost ensure that she would remain unforgotten for eternity!

Xu Que was still reeling from shock.

If he were to guess the status of this woman back then, he would’ve thought that she was a powerful figure of the Sky Incense Valley, maybe an elder at most. After all, she was of the Infant Transformation Stage. It was perfectly normal for her to hold such a lofty status!

He would never have imagined that this woman would actually be the legendary Water Empress!

If only we met each other just once in this lifetime!

The woman who could only be fucked by gods was actually the Water Empress!

Xu Que shook his head in regret and didn’t have any plans to reveal his identity. He was clear of his intention to act against the Fire Emperor and won’t give that up ever!

And if the Water Empress decides to help the Fire Emperor, he still wouldn’t show any mercy!

Because as the Act Tough King, he needs to stick by his own principles and acting tough codes.

When one starts to act tough, he has to see it through!

"Welcome Water Empress! Long live Water Empress, long live!"

Many merchants and street side stall keepers, along with the patrolling guards were all shouting in jubilation!

Their cheers were ear piercing as if it could shoot through the clouds and skies.

They were cheering and shouting from within their hearts since everyone had long revered the mystical Water Empress and were guessing how she would look like.

Today, they finally had a chance to see for themselves and they were all astounded.

Ay that moment, the Water Empress, Hong Yan, was deeply stirred. Ripples formed across her heart, causing her to palpitate.

"He’s here too?"

Her heart was filled with amazement. She could finally sense his presence. The young mister Hua who impressed her and made her feel something no other man had managed to do.

When Xu Que escaped from the Soul Tower, the Water Empress Hong Yan managed to place a talisman on him. Even though Xu Que had already removed the talisman from his physical body, it left a mark on him. Hence as soon as Hong Yan entered the Imperial City, she could feel the presence of this mark around.

In spite of this, the only change in her expression was in her eyes, which revealed a subtle astonished look. The rest of her face remained the same as she scanned the large crowd before her, hoping to get a glimpse of him.

The Water Empress was certain that this young mister Hua Wu Que was nearby.

As she continued streaming deeper into the city along the broad streets and to the awestruck faces of the people around, the Water Empress could feel the pulsating mark becoming stronger and stronger.

Her calmness and composure had never left her and she had always been in control of her emotions. At this point however, her heart was fluttering.

She was filled with anticipation and excitement. If only she could meet that interesting young man again, would there be more excitement and intrigue in her life?

"Eh?" As she passed a pair of merchants on both sides, the Water Empress froze in her tracks.

Soon after, her lips parted into a sweet smile.

She found him!

Just a short distance away from him, right in front of the pork selling counter. That butcher with a normal looking face who was clutching onto a butcher’s cleaver, was radiating with the mark she had planted all those months ago.

"Hua Wu Que, I’ve finally found you!" The Water Empress was giggling hysterically deep within her heart.

Even though Xu Que’s face had changed, the Water Empress could spot him and see right through his disguise at once. This was because she could recognize those glistening eyes. A person’s appearances could be altered, but his eyes can never deceive!

"For the eyes are the windows to a person’s soul!"

The Water Empress laughed out inside once again when she recalled the words Xu Que had spoken to her in the Soul Tower!

Indeed, Xu Que had been trying to court her then and had used a method which he learnt from the internet. He said something about both parties staring into each other’s eyes for ten seconds in order to generate romantic feelings between each other. Then, he had said that the eyes were windows to a person’s soul.

He probably couldn’t remember it now but the Water Empress could recall every word he said. Indeed, every single action or word spoken by him had been etched deeply in the recesses of her memories.

At this point, the Water Empress had completely stopped moving, causing everyone around to feel rather bewildered, as a look of suspicion crept up over their faces.

Why did the Water Empress stop moving?

Could it be that we’ve done something wrong?

That’s not right. We did everything according to the instructions of the Fire Emperor. Nothing went wrong. According to the information on the Water Empress, she adores the common folks and enjoys being near them. This also means that she’s probably not objecting to these merchants being near her.

At the next moment, the Water Empress’ actions caused everyone no small amount of astonishment.

She actually got off her flying water sword and walked over to a merchant standing by the side. She then picked up some ear accessories and looked at the female Imperial Guard who had disguised herself as a merchant and asked, "How much for this accessory?"

"Gulp… Ten… Ten coins!"

"I want this!" The Water Empress then took out ten coins and placed it gently down on the counter before taking the accessories along with her.

Soon after, under the bewildered expressions of everyone around, she walked towards the next stall.

Everyone around were stumped.

She’s actually buying items and even took out money to purchase it!

"This…"

The few old eunuchs who were in charge of welcoming her into the Fire Nation were also shocked by her actions.

However, nobody around dared to speak and everything fell into deep silence. Their eyes were focused on this Water Empress as she moved from one stall to the next.

Xu Que didn’t pay much attention to the Water Empress as well. Instead, he threw a glance towards the Imperial Palace, wondering why the dog Fire Emperor haven’t showed up yet.

Everything around was still silent as he paused in shock. When he turned his head back, he realized that the Water Empress was actually shopping here!

Fuck me, this woman has also learnt how to act tough?

Xu Que was rather joyous to realize that she was acting tough by acting unconventionally as well.

At the next moment, after the Water Empress had purchased several normal looking handkerchiefs, she walked towards his stall, causing Xu Que to be taken aback.

What the... I’m actually selling pork meat. Why do you have to come to my stall?

Xu Que was in utter disbelief, unable to tell what this Water Empress was trying to do.

The Water Empress walked over to him, her face was filled with smiles as she glanced down at the few pieces of meat on his chopping board. She then asked gently, "The meat looks good. How’s business?"

"Gulp, it’s alright!" Xu Que replied embarrassingly. He felt like she had seen right through his disguise and was playing along with him.

"How much meat have you sold today?" The Empress asked again.

Xu Que touched the tip of his nose, "I didn’t manage to make a single sale!"

"Why is that?"

"Because you have come into the Imperial City and the commoners aren’t allowed to leave their homes." Xu Que replied without hesitation.

Everyone opened their eyes in shock. Fuck! What was this kid doing? Why was he being so honest?

女帝却并未在意,仿佛早已知晓,依旧看着徐缺,淡笑道:"那...我买2斤!"

The Water Empress didn’t seem to mind, for she had expected this as well. She looked at Xu Que and smiled before speaking, "Alright, I shall take two kilograms!"

"不卖."徐缺直接拒绝了.

"Not for sale!" Xu Que rejected her flat.

全场众人眼皮猛地一跳,这家伙到底怎么回事?水皇要买肉你就卖啊,讲这么多话干什么?

Everyone around felt their eyelids twitch. What on earth is wrong with this guy? The Water Empress wanted to buy meat, why was he speaking so much?

"为什么?"女帝脸上依旧带着颇有深意的淡笑.

"Why not?" The Water Empress looked at him, clearly intrigued as she laughed out.

徐缺撇了撇嘴,真装起了杀猪佬,应道:"因为你没来的时候每斤200文钱,你来了之后,每斤只能卖20文,我卖一斤就得亏180文,卖两斤得亏360文,所以你还是快走吧,去别的摊位看看."

Xu Que wiped his mouth with his sleeves, acting like a true coarse butcher, he replied, "Because when you’re not here, I can sell every kilogram for 200 coins. When you’re here, I can only sell it for 20 coins. Every kilogram I sell, I lose 180 coins. If I sell 2 kilograms, I lose 360. So you should leave now, buy your items from other stalls."

众人彻底呆了,什么情况啊这是,难不成这家伙并非禁卫,而是真正的百姓,混进来卖猪肉了?

The crowd all froze in shock. What was happening? Could this person not be an Imperial Guard, and was actually a civilian trying to earn his keep, and managed to sneak his way in here?

"无妨,你可以按每斤200文卖!"女帝继续说道.

"No matter. You can sell it to me for 200 coins per kilograms, I will buy it." The Water Empress explained.

"还是不行."徐缺再度摇头.

"That still won’t do." Xu Que shook his head again.

"这又是为何?"

"And why is that so?"

"因为我不是卖肉的,其实我是一名禁卫."

"Because I’m not actually a butcher selling meat. I am actually an Imperial Guard."

"嘶!"全场众人立马倒吸一口凉气,满脸愕然,这禁卫是疯了啊?竟然将这事说出来?要是火皇知道了,肯定得收拾你呀!

"Hsss!" Everyone around inhaled deeply, their faces filled with astonishment. Was this Imperial Guard crazy? How could he say something like this? If the Fire Emperor found out about this, he would slaughter you!

女帝也没想到徐缺会应得这么干脆,微微错愕一下,眼眸间又浮现一抹笑意:"那...把你的队长叫过来,朕与他谈谈人生."

The Water Empress didn’t expect Xu Que to be so forthright as well, and was taken aback by his reply. A look of mischievousness crept up and was evident in her sparkling eyes, "Then… You should call your team leader over, I wish to discuss life with him."

"呃...谈谁的人生?"徐缺有些虚了,感觉自己好像真的被认出来了.

"Gulp… Whose life do you wish to speak to him about?" Xu Que was feeling rather shy at this point, rather certain that he had been exposed.

"谈你的."女帝轻声应道.

"Discuss your life." The Water Empress replied.

徐缺顿时嘴角一抽,果然被认出来了呀,这女人怎么猜到的?

Xu Que’s lips trembled. Indeed, he had been found out. How did she guess this?

当即,他板起脸,摇头道:"不行,队长在卖海鲜!"

At this point, Xu Que’s expression turned stoic as he shook his head once again, "Not possible. Team leader is selling seafood now!"

...

...

chapters.title: Chapter 240: Eat My Butcher’S Cleaver!
chapters.body:
Chapter 240: Eat My Butcher’S Cleaver!

Chapter 240: Eat My Butcher’s Cleaver!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Selling… Selling seafood?

Everyone around were completely floored. Even the Water Empress was astonished by this statement.

Some distance away, the merchant selling seafood who was indeed the team leader, was stumped as well.

My god. Who did I offend for this to happen to me? Why did I pull this idiot over and disguise him as a merchant? Why was I such a fool!

The Imperial Guard was extremely flustered and he peeled his sleeves up to his forearms and was about to slap himself several times over for being an idiot!

"Why have you come here?" The Water Empress was trying her hardest not to smile as she spoke to him wordlessly using soul strength to convey her message.

Xu Que’s heart was filled with suspicions. He had no idea how she could recognize him.

He then replied her using his soul strength as well, "How did you recognize me even after I’ve disguised myself this way?"

"Your eyes!" The Water Empress whispered.

Xu Que was taken aback before he composed himself and sighed out. "Indeed, I’ve always known. Someone as outstanding as myself will always stick out like fireflies in the night. I would always shine brightly and magnificently. Especially these eyes of mine which are deep and mysterious, and has captivated you. No matter which corners of the world I end up, you will always be able to recognize me. Is that right?"

When the Water Empress heard this, she laughed gently. When she laughed, her features straightened up and caused waves of beauty to radiate from her in all directions.

Everyone who had seen her laugh were shocked. Even the female Imperial Guards were stumped by this.

How could someone so perfectly beautiful exist in this world!

"The arrival of the Fire Emperor!"

Right at this point, a sharp and high pitched voice rang out from the end of the streets.

Boom!

Soon after, another powerful wave of energy was sent rippling outwards with the emergence of the Fire Emperor.

He was dressed in golden and red robes which were also filled with dragon embroideries. He was floating above fire clouds and appeared extremely awe inspiring as boundless majestic aura shot out from him.

When everyone turned around to look at him, they held their breaths in utmost reverence and admiration!

Even though he had been humiliated countless of times by Xu Que and caused him to lose face, he was still the Fire Emperor, the monarch of the Fire Nation.

This lofty and regal status was something that nobody could alter.

The Water Empress frowned as she withdrew her smile. She then looked at Xu Que as her lips moved faintly, but she conveyed her words through soul strength once again, "Were you sent here by the Heavenly Explosion Faction?"

She had long heard of the exploits of this powerful sect while on the way to the Fire Nation and had also heard of all the things they had done here. She was taken aback and had never expected to meet Hua Wu Que here, of all places!

However, she had known Hua Wu Que before and was aware of the cultivation realm he was in. Hence, she knew that Hua Wu Que wasn’t as powerful as the Lord Prince Consort Xu Que. But still, she was in full admiration of Hua Wu Que and his talents and didn’t wish to see him being implicated here.

Xu Que didn’t reply to her, his face was still filled with a cold smile as his eyes emanated killing intent. At this point, he didn’t even bother hiding it!

The Fire Emperor looked rather magnificent, like a mighty tiger about to spring on its prey.

After he had been severely wounded by Xu Que, the Fire Emperor’s wounds hadn’t fully recovered. Additionally, Xu Que had absorbed all the Fire Essences from the magma pools. When he found out about this, he was enraged, knowing that the nation’s fortunes had been depleted. Hence, he had secretly arranged for a ritual to be conducted and he was ready to sacrifice Madam Ya to restore his prosperity.

However, it was a pity that just last night, Xu Que had already taken Madam Ya’s purity. Hence, unbeknownst to him, he had already lost the protection of the Fire God.

The Fire Emperor was still in the dark about this matter and his face revealed a smile as he received the Water Empress.

"Hehe... dog Emperor, I shall let you smile for now. Before long, I shall make your cry." Xu Que was laughing hysterically in his heart.

His plan was very simple. He would wait for the Fire Emperor to come nearer before he attack him. Xu Que would catch him off guard and beat him into a pulp. He would then use a spell to capture him, and act tough from start to end!

At this point, the Water Empress spoke in his mind via soul strength once again.

"Please don’t be reckless. The Fire Emperor has already sent out many spies to find out more about the Heavenly Explosion faction to exact revenge upon you. If you were to show up now, you would be slaughtered like monkeys and chickens."

"Slaughtered like monkeys and chickens?" Xu Que laughed out coldly. Nobody could ever be sure of who would kill and who would be killed.

The Water Empress shook her head, "There are hundreds of hired assassins waiting outside the city gates. They are the notorious Tian Sha Assassins and even their elder came along. He’s level eight of the Infant Transformation Stage and is a known killer. They’re all waiting for you to reveal yourself!"

"Oh? The dog Emperor even hired the Tian Sha Assassins to come as well?" When Xu Que heard this, he was elated.

This dog Emperor was truly crafty. He actually disguised his guards as merchants and even hired Tian Sha Assassins to trap him.

And yet Xu Que thought that all this was getting fun. He could act tough and even gain a huge amount of experience points by killing these assassins. The more he thought about it, the happier he became.

The Infant Transformation Stage assassin couldn’t be underestimated. But once they lack the protection of Imperial Qi, a single three colored Fiery Lotus infused with the full Glory Killer Blade would be able to finish him off!

"Don’t be brash and wait here for me. I will seek you out later!" The Water Empress Hong Yan spoke to him wordlessly as she soared to the skies.

Whoosh!

The water sword flowed seamlessly under her feet and looked extremely majestic, before she soared upwards.

The Fire Emperor was smiling as he exclaimed, "Hong Yan, how’ve you been of late?"

"I’m alright! How has the Fire Emperor been?" The Water Empress smiled as she politely returned the salutation.

Yet her heart wasn’t present. She was prepared to finish this small talk before coming back for Xu Que.

She’d already planned to convince him to leave Heavenly Explosion Faction and join Sky Incense Valley.

Right at this point, Xu Que’s heart and mind was in a mess.

Big sister, what the hell did you fly up for? If you fly up to meet the Fire Emperor, that means he isn’t going to come down. If he’s not fucking coming down, how should I attack him and catch him by surprise? Aren’t you going to let me act tough?

Xu Que’s expression was plain as he cleaned his butcher’s cleaver. If it weren’t for the fact that the Water Empress was so beautiful, he would’ve probably thrown this knife over at her!

"Hong Yan probably already knows of what happened, but she still asked. I’ve been subjected to humiliation over the past few days!" The Fire Emperor shook his head and smiled bitterly, pretending as though he didn’t really care about being humiliated by Xu Que and appeared magnanimous.

The Water Empress drew her lips into a light hearted smile but didn’t speak.

The Fire Emperor then continued, "I guess I’m to blame for being too careless and allowed him to enter the city. Although I managed to make him flee, I failed to capture him. But if he ever dares to show himself here again, he wouldn’t be able to make it out alive."

"As for this, I can tell!" The Water Empress nodded her head enthusiastically.

The Fire Emperor had taken such a huge setback that he even resorted to inviting the Tian Sha Assassins down and called the notorious and powerful Killer God who was an elder. Clearly, he was confident of his abilities to take down any Heavenly Explosion Faction members if they showed up.

Hence, this was why she had tried to coax Xu Que against being rash.

However, Xu Que had never been afraid of this dog shit Killer God. As soon as he heard the Emperor acting tough, he couldn’t take it anymore.

What a joke. Even the Acting Tough King could act tough, you decided to do it first. What right do you have to say that I wouldn’t be able to make it out alive?

"Whoosh!"

At that second, Xu Que flicked his wrist and sent the butcher’s cleaver flying in the direction of the Fire Emperor’s face.

The blade sliced through the air and made a loud whooshing sound.

However, this was just a normal knife and the Fire Emperor’s strength was immense. He congealed his energy around him and cleared his throat.

"Ba dang!" The cleaver shattered into thousands of fragments as it fell to the ground.

Everyone around was silent and some of the guards were roused. At the next moment, everyone turned to look at Xu Que.

The Water Empress’ face fell. She knew that this wasn’t good and was about to open her mouth to defend him.

However, the Fire Emperor had already stretched his hand out as a wave of powerful crushing pressure rippled out from him. He then shouted out, "The audacity! How dare you attack me in stealth. Who are you?"

"Did you just ask who I am? Haha!!! I’m your father!" Xu Que laughed out icily as he withdrew the Spirits Prison Pagoda. With a simple command in his head, he released the spirit of the Fire Emperor’s own father!

chapters.title: Chapter 241: Come And Kowtow To Your Father!
chapters.body:
Chapter 241: Come And Kowtow To Your Father!

Chapter 241: Come And Kowtow To Your Father!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"Boom!"

A large puff of black mist appeared on the streets before taking the shape of a human. As soon as it appeared on the streets, it soared upwards as though trying to escape into the skies.

Everyone around strained their eyes to get a better look of the spirit, before they heard a loud "kwa-dang" sound.

The spirit flew several hundreds meters up when it was violently stopped in its tracks by the metal chains around it and was pulled back down.

"Roar!" The spirit roared its head back and let out a fearsome roar, its face was filled with sinister hatred.

At this point, everyone around were stumped as their eyes opened wide in apparent disbelief!

"Previous Emperor, this... This is the previous Emperor, His Majesty?"

"How’s this possible?"

"My god. Didn’t the previous Emperor pass away in his Imperial Tomb?"

"No. This is his spirit. The spirit of the previous Emperor!"

"Could it be that the previous Emperor didn’t die? His spirit is still alive!"

The Imperial Guards were exclaiming in fear, their faces filled with bewildered expressions.

They had all seen the drawing of the past few reigning monarchs and were thus very familiar with the previous Emperors. That’s why soon as they saw his features, they were all stumped.

In this world, there were not much stories about the supernatural realm.

To a cultivator, it was alright if his physical body died. As long as his spirit continued living, there was a chance in which he might return to life through reincarnation.
