Everyone around were all very suspicious. The previous Emperor had lived out his last remaining days after his lifeforce had expired. Under such a situation, both his physical body and spirit would’ve died. How could he show up here?

The Fire Emperor was stumped as well. Seeing his father appear before him, he almost fell to his knees and shouted out, "Father Emperor!"

He managed to get a good look as well and was certain that this spirit was definitely his father.

The Water Empress was clearly startled by this as well. According to the tales she had heard of the previous Fire Emperor, he had been an evil and fearsome man!

"Kwa dang!"

At this point, the Fire Nation’s previous Emperor tried to soar into the clouds once again but was being restricted by the chains around his body. He couldn’t move very far without being pulled back violently.

The crowd then reacted to the sight before them and understood. This previous Fire Emperor had been captured!

Everyone fell into despair and deafening silence.

All eyes were on Xu Que.

The heavily rusted chains which restrained the spirit was held in Xu Que’s hands!

The chains were extremely old and seemed to give off a certain iciness to it. When everyone looked at the chains, they couldn’t help but tremble. Their own souls felt extremely frightful just by looking at the chains!

"Outrageous! How dare you, small bandit! You dare to show disrespect to the previous Emperor. Give me your life!"

The Fire Emperor was clearly enraged. Regardless of whether this anger came from the admiration and love he had for his father or from preserving the integrity of the previous Emperor, it didn’t matter. He had to act!

"Boom doom!"

A powerful and majestic Dragon Flame erupted in the air as it wrapped around the clouds, resembling a golden colored dragon in the skies. It was enormous that it almost seemed to obstruct the skies from the land. It coiled around for several moments before shooting straight for Xu Que.

"Dog Emperor, have you forgotten the pain once your scars have healed?" Xu Que laughed coldly as he clenched his fists and soared into the air, straight for the golden colored Dragon Flame with his fists extended out!

The entire air was filled with rippling air, twisting around Xu Que.

"Boom!"

A loud and dull thud resounded as the gargantuan golden flame was punched and exploded ferociously. Before long, it was reduced to a tiny ember as it scattered into the skies.

The crowd opened their mouths wide, all of them were filled with tremendous fear.

A single punch… A single punch was enough to scatter the Fire Emperor’s Dragon Flame?

My god. Who was this person? His physical strength was so powerful!

"Whoosh!"

Xu Que floated in the air, as he swept down towards the Fire Emperor. He held the chains in his left hand, dragging the previous Fire Emperor with him and laughed out coldly, "Dog Emperor, I’ve dragged your father here to meet you. Instead of showing appreciation to me, you actually tried to attack me? How evil and vile!"

"It’s you?" The Fire Emperor seemed to have recognized Xu Que. His face fell and he retreated several steps back.

He could recognize Xu Que from his tone and the sound of his voice. All this made him snap out of his thoughts in fear.

Xu Que then peeled off his Human Skinned Mask. After all, there was no need for any disguise now, because… It was finally time to act tough!

"Shua!"

As soon as his mask was removed, his handsome face with such eloquent features were revealed to everyone around.

The Imperial Guards standing aside were all astonished by the revelations!

"The previous Lord Prince Consort, Xu Que!"

"My god! Why is he here again?"

"He really wouldn’t rest until either he or the Fire Emperor is dead. But how did he manage to sneak into our midst?"

"Fuck, we’ve been betrayed and nobody realized this?"

"Quickly protect the Fire Emperor! Rescue the spirit of the previous Fire Emperor!"

These Imperial Guards were all extremely loyal to the Emperor. When a crisis presented itself, these guards were unafraid of death and would rise to the occasion. All of them flew into the air and surrounded the Fire Emperor.

Even the Water Empress who was calm and composed was stumped by this. She was completely taken aback.

No matter how she thought, she wouldn’t ever have figured out that Hua Wu Que and Xu Que were the same person!

Heavens…

"This... This kid really knows how to have fun! He even managed to deceive me!" The Water Empress was very shocked by everything she had witnessed. She was especially astounded by Xu Que’s current strength, for it had improved leaps and bounds since the last time they met by the Soul Tower. In fact, it was stronger by a hundred times over!"

With such ferocity shown, even she was somewhat shaken!

"Dog Emperor, why don’t you roll over here and kowtow to your old man?" Xu Que dragged the chain which was attached to the Spirit Prison Pagoda as he exclaimed.

The Fire Emperor had already retreated a safe distance away from Xu Que but his eyes were cast on the spirit who was his father.

Indeed, the spirit of the previous Fire Emperor was the same as any other spirit, completely lacking in intelligence and resembled a rabid dog. It’s face was filled with anger as it struggled unrelentingly, trying to escape from the chains.

The crowd started to feel like something wasn’t right. Why did the previous Emperor’s spirit behave so strangely?

The Fire Emperor’s brows furrowed as well and suspicions welled up within his eyes.

He could be certain that this was the spirit of his father but the spirit was acting so strangely as though it had completely lost all intellect. It still retained its previous likeness, but it wasn’t the same father Emperor which he once revered.

Thinking about this point, the Fire Emperor then heaved a sigh.

In actual fact, he didn’t wish for his father Emperor to be alive as well, for he was too accustomed to ruling and sitting on the throne. He didn’t wish to have to obey anyone or come under the powers of anyone ever again.

"What a good deception, you bandit. But you actually dared to create an illusion of my father Emperor’s spirit to deceive everyone. I shall not fall for it! The last time, you managed to flee. This time, it’s not going to happen again!" As soon as the Fire Emperor said this, he insinuated that the spirit which Xu Que was holding onto was a fake.

Because this was the only way which he could break Xu Que’s plans and not be restrained by the image of his father. It was only in doing so, that everyone under the heavens wouldn’t blame him for hurting the peacefulness of his own father.

However, the Fire Emperor had fallen right into Xu Que’s plans, for his predictions were off.

Xu Que had long expected him to say this. He thus chuckled and pointed at the Spirit Prison Pagoda.

"Whoosh!"

With a ray of white light, yet another black shadow emerged from the pagoda. Likewise, another chain extended out from the tip of the pagoda. Fearsome waves of crushing pressure emanated out and filled the atmosphere.

Xu Que then spoke, "Aren’t you evil? How can you disown your Father Emperor and call him a fake? Fine then. Look at this, how can your grandfather be fake as well?"

"Hssss..."

Everyone around sucked in a breath of cold air as they watched the new spirit who had just materialized and were all afraid.

The Fire Emperor’s grandfather, that’s the previous previous Fire Emperor!

Why is he here too?

The Fire Emperor was taken aback by this and looks of disbelief could be seen written across his face

The Water Empress opened her mouth in shock as well.

At this point, Xu Que then pointed at the Spirit Prison Pagoda once again.

"Whoosh!" A third spirit emerged from the pagoda!

Xu Que’s face was filled with smiles, "Dog Emperor, look, even your great grandfather is here. Quick look and tell me if he’s fake too? Hurry up will you? Your father, your grandfather and your great grandfather… are all waiting for you to come and kowtow to them!"

chapters.title: Chapter 242: How About You Kneel This Time?
chapters.body:
Chapter 242: How About You Kneel This Time?

Chapter 242: How About You Kneel this Time?

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"Hua!"

At that second, there was an uproar in the crowd.

Nobody could maintain their composure any longer.

The previous Emperor, the previous previous Emperor and the Emperor before him, three generations of ancestor had all appeared?

Where… Where did this kid get these three spirits from?

And the cultivation level of these three spirits were exactly the same before they departed this world!

Was this really a deception?

And yet who could create an image of spirits which were of the Void Refining Stage and there were three images as well. Was Heavenly Explosion Faction so powerful?

Doubts started to materialize in the hearts of many people. They all started to feel that these three spirits could truly be the ancestors of the Fire Emperor.

The Fire Emperor was stumped. He never imagined that Xu Que could even summon the spirit of his great grandfather, whom he himself had never met!

The Water Empress was visibly shocked by this as well. Her eyes were glowing, when she realized that she had truly underestimated this young man.

This young man was much more talented and unpredictable than she had imagined him to be!

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 100 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 120 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 160 act tough points!"

The system notifications rang out repeatedly in Xu Que’s mind.

The rewards for acting tough this time was truly abundant.

Xu Que laughed out plainly, still hovering in mid air. He was dragging the three spirits by their chains as he bellowed, "Dog Emperor, even your great grandfather has appeared. Why aren’t you showing your respects to them?"

The Fire Emperor was enraged as he shouted out, "How dare you create images of my ancestors? Such an action violates the heavens. Today, I shall discipline you and punish you for your crimes! Men, take down this bandit and his false images!"

"Yes!" All the Imperial Guards shouted out in acknowledgement as they conjured spells and charged towards Xu Que.

Xu Que stood his ground in defiance as he laughed out once again, "Truly only this dog Emperor is capable of killing his own ancestors. His methods are truly vile."

"Outrageous! You are clearly using a spell to replicate the likeness of my ancestors’ spirits. How dare you attempt to deceive all of us and trick us by such means?"

The Fire Emperor had killing intent radiating out from his eyes as he shouted, "And yet it seems like you only managed to create images of my ancestors who were of the Void Refining Stage. Everyone under the heavens knows that I also have many Form Synthesis Stage ancestors. It’s obvious that you were unable to replicate their likeness, since their cultivation level were too high."

Although he didn’t know how Xu Que managed to conjure the images of his ancestors. He was certain that Xu Que didn’t have more tricks up his sleeves.

When everyone heard this, they were stumped.

The Fire Emperor sounded so convinced and certain. Could it truly be that these spirits were all just illusions?

Who was speaking the truth here?

Many people started to have doubts in their hearts.

"It seems like it’s impossible for the Fire Emperor to acknowledge that the spirits are his ancestors without losing out." An Imperial Guard whispered, clearly suspicious.

"It’s very possible that these three spirits were just illusions and images conjured by him."

"Looks like this Xu Que is truly an outstanding member of his Heavenly Explosion Faction. He probably paid a huge price and got the strength of his entire sect to create these illusions!"

"That makes sense. His motives would be to undermine the Fire Emperor. It’s a shame that the Fire Emperor saw right through it."

"Although the Void Refining Stage was very powerful, an illusion of someone of that cultivation level could probably be created using a great deal of resources and underhanded methods!"

"But when it comes to the Form Synthesis Stage, it’s possible to create an image of that form!"

Boom!

At this point, the group of Imperial Guards had already conjured a myriad of powerful spells. Each guard had casted his own spell, causing the entire sky to be filled with an assortment of colors as they converged down upon Xu Que.

It was a spectacular scene!

The Water Empress stood some distance away, observing Xu Que and everything around him.

Although she had heard of Xu Que’s powers and how he had defeated the Fire Emperor numerous of times, she had never seen it for herself.

Hence, she was unable to determine if the rumors were true or false.

At this point, she saw an entire group of Imperial Guards surrounding Xu Que. Each of them had conjured a powerful spell and directed it at him. She was filled with immense doubts and yet she had made a decision in her mind as well.

If Xu Que truly was unable to fend them off, she would lend him a helping hand. Even though that might incur the wrath of the Fire Emperor and thus make an enemy out of him, she felt the need to intervene. After all, Xu Que was a one in a million talent and she wanted to snatch him away and pull him into Sky Incense Valley!

However, against so many powerful Imperial Guards and their spells, Xu Que remained unusually calm. In fact, his lips had curled into a smile, as he whispered, "You’re asking for death!"

At the next moment, there was a loud "whoosh" as Xu Que conjured his black flame. The Eight Waste Destruction Flames!

As soon as the black flames appeared, the surrounding area felt incredibly hot as the temperature around soared. Everyone around could feel the heat radiating out from this mystical flames and were afraid.

The Fire Empress’ eyes opened wide in shock!

"Eight Waste… Destruction Flames!" Xu Que whispered as he turned once, drawing a ring of black flames around him.

Soon after, he clapped his palms together, sending out a powerful blast of boundless energy.

The air around him was undulating as ripples of aftershock was sent out in all directions from his body. The air around him blew the ring of fire which surrounded his body and scattered the black flames in every direction as well.

Boom!

The black flames enveloped all the Imperial Guards around and swallowed them in the unbelievable heat.

With his mystical flames sent out in all directions, the Imperial Guards were unable to dodge them. Even before any of them could scream out, they were turned into dust and was scattered along with the ripples of air.

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 120 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 160 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for killing an Original Infant Staged cultivator. The reward is 200,000 experience points..."

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for killing an Original Infant Staged cultivator. The reward is 200,000 experience points…"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for killing an Original Infant Staged cultivator. The reward is 200,000 experience points…"

Xu Que’s act tough points and experience points swelled!

Everyone around who watched this was filled with immeasurable shock!

Such a scene was only too familiar to them. Just several days ago, they had seen the power of his three colored Fiery Lotus and it’s powers were terrible to behold.

However, they never expected that this Lord Prince Consort would actually show up a few days later and use only a single mystical fire of his to kill dozens of Imperial Guards.

"How… How was this possible? It had only been two days. How did he get so much more powerful?" The Fire Emperor was appalled.

Two days ago, he relied on the Imperial Qi and was still defeated effortlessly by Xu Que.

Today, he was outside the domains of the Imperial Palace. He knew that if Xu Que conjured his three colored Fiery Lotus once again, he wouldn’t be able to win him and he might even lose his life.

And now, it was apparent that Xu Que had became much stronger, especially his tougher physical body which was extremely terrifying.

Just by using his palms, he was able to send out such devastating energy and even sent the black mystical flames soaring in all directions.

Such powers… Was clearly equivalent to someone of the Infant Transformation Stage level seven!

The Water Empress was at a loss for words. The strength exhibited by Xu Que had exceed all her expectations.

The glare in her eyes started to turn to one of admiration!

"Dog Emperor, why were you so excited to attack? Were you afraid that the presence of your ancestors would undermine your position as Emperor?" Xu Que laughed out mockingly.

The Fire Emperor didn’t respond immediately as he retreated several steps backwards, in the direction of the palace. He then replied, "If you wish to fight it out, let’s fight in the palace. Stop using the reputation and honor of my ancestors to create deceptions and illusions. These three spirits are fake!"

"Oh? Indeed, you wouldn’t shed tears until you’ve seen your own coffin then! These spirits had been led out by Zhang Qi Ling of the Heavenly Explosion Faction from within the Imperial Tombs! Are you sure you don’t wish to acknowledge them? Or… Should I call for the rest of them to come out?" Xu Que sniggered before he flicked his wrist and shook the Pagoda.

"Boom!" A loud crashing sound could be heard from within the Pagoda.

Soon after, the dozens of spirits gushed out, each of them bore fearsome and intimidating aura.

"One, two, three, four, five, six… Yo! Dog Emperor, eighteen generations of your ancestors are all here. You should probably fall to your knees and acknowledge them now, huh?" Xu Que laughed out.

chapters.title: Chapter 243: Abandoned Dog!
chapters.body:
Chapter 243: Abandoned Dog!

Chapter 243: Abandoned Dog!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 140 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 150 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 180 act tough points!"

The system rang out repeatedly in Xu Que’s head and his act tough points increased dramatically.

At this point, everything was silent!

All the Imperial Guards including the Water Empress were stumped.

They’re thoroughly shocked!

Spirits of the Form Synthesis Stage, all of them were previous Fire Emperors. They were eighteen generations of ancestors belonging to the Imperial family and they had all arrived!

The crowd could only watch on, feeling as though their minds were completely blank!

Additionally, the fight earlier had also alerted many civilians and cultivators inside their homes. At this point, many of them spilled out onto the streets to watch the spectacle. They came out just as Xu Que started to release all the spirits from the Pagoda.

Even them were stupefied by this scene!

"The spirits of historical Fire Emperors! How... How’s this possible?"

"Even the spirit of the very first Fire Emperor who had established this Nation is here too!"

"What... What kind of feud is this? He actually had to drag his enemy’s eighteen generations of ancestors into this dispute. He really wants the Fire Emperor to never have a moment of peace!"

"This Xu Que is truly a chip of the old block. I am almost certain that he’s the disciple of Duan Jiu De. This pair of master-disciple are truly Que De, lacking in morals!"

"They're too scary!"

"And have you heard? These spirits were brought out by Zhang Qi Ling of the Heavenly Explosion Faction."

"That means to say that the rumors of Zhang Qi Ling entering the Imperial Tombs a few days ago are true. And that he managed to come out of the Tombs alive!"

"Damn it. This Heavenly Explosion Faction is too powerful! Each one of their disciples were so talented."

"First, it was the master of poems, Li Bai who was unrivaled. Then came Xu Que, whose strength and powers were monstrous. Today, we’ve finally heard of the expert grave robber Zhang Qi Ling!"

"That’s not all. I’ve even heard more news about the Heavenly Explosion Faction. Guess what I’ve heard?"

"What did you hear?"

"About half a year ago, a disciple of the Heavenly Explosion Faction called Xiao Yan annihilated an entire Sect with nine of their Elders being at the Original Infant Stage. And Xiao Yan was only at the Core Bearing Stage then!"

"Fuck me!"

"Is that true?"

"Of course it’s true. Even before that, another Heavenly Explosion Faction disciple showed up at the Sky Incense Valley Trial Area. His name was Hua Wu Que and was of the Core Bearing Stage. He killed more than a hundred cultivators who was of the same cultivation level as him easily and even burnt all the Sky Miscanthus without batting an eyelid. He then vandalized an area in the testing grounds. Soon after, he managed to ascend to the eighth floor of the Soul Tower before vanishing just like that!"

"Hsss!" The crowd inhaled deeply.

Damn it. This Heavenly Explosion Faction was too scary. Just a random disciple from their sect was so powerful and awesome!

And, each one of them would kill without hesitation!

The Water Empress’ eyes were completely focused on Xu Que and never left his body.

Her once still and calm disposition was now replaced by frantic and violent heartbeats.

Xu Que’s performance had left her completely dumbstruck, having exceeded her wildest imaginations.

At first, the Water Empress had thought that Heavenly Explosion Faction was a secret sect that was full of talented individuals and the entire sect was worthy of being recruited into Sky Incense Valley.

But now, she finally understood Xu Que’s identity and recognized that he was the "Hua Wu Que" from before. She also started hearing rumors about this Zhang Qi Ling!

The Water Empress seemed to have realized something, for she was completely bowled over at the next moment.

‘Could all these people be the same person? Could they all be disguises of this young man? If he was the only person in Heavenly Explosion Faction from the start… That would really scare countless of people!’ The Water Empress thought to herself.

The Imperial Guards on the streets were trembling in fear at this point and they stopped doubting Xu Que.

These spirits were definitely the ancestors of the Fire Emperor.

If not, who would ever be capable enough to create images of spirits who were of the Form Synthesis Stage?

No, that was absolutely impossible!

Form Synthesis Stage was impossible to be replicated or created!

For that cultivation level meant that a cultivator was already very close to becoming an immortal, even if it was just a spirit, nobody would ever be able to create a likeness of such a powerful realm!

But, these previous Emperors, how did they end up becoming mere spirits and why did they remain within the Imperial Tomb?

What happened to them?

And how did Zhang Qi Ling of Heavenly Explosion Faction managed to enter the tombs so effortlessly and come out of it alive? He even managed to bring out eighteen generations of Fire Emperors out. That’s almost doing the impossible and unthinkable!

The Fire Emperor had long turned pale since. His entire face froze as he watched on.

His fists were clenched up and his veins were bulging out. He gritted his teeth, not in humiliation but in rage. He was so angry that his body was trembling violently.

"Dog Emperor!" Xu Que shouted out angrily.

The Fire Emperor jumped up in shock and looked at Xu Que with eyes filled with dread.

"Eighteen generations of your forefathers are here. Why aren’t you kneeling down?" Xu Que’s voice was powerful as it resonated in the air. At the same time, he dragged all the eighteen spirits as they inched closer towards the Fire Emperor.

Xu Que didn’t wish to end this conflict between them yet. However, since he had already finished acting tough, it was now time to drag the Fire Emperor into the Imperial Tombs and make him bleed.

However, the Fire Emperor’s movement speed was extremely fast since he was in the Infant Transformation Stage. He was also trying to keep a safe distance away from Xu Que with his back facing against the Imperial Palace.

Xu Que didn’t wish for the Fire Emperor to dash into the palace and hide there. Although he had already extracted all the Essences from the magma pool above the Dragon Veins, he knew that there was still a small amount of Imperial Qi from the Dragon Veins which the Fire Emperor could draw upon once he was near the boundaries of the palace.

Trying to defeat the Fire Emperor with his Imperial Qi was going to be a little difficult and troublesome for Xu Que who hasn’t purchased his fourth mystical flame yet.

Additionally, Xu Que wasn’t particularly confident of chasing him down before the Emperor reached the palace.

Hence, the only other option was to take advantage of this situation and inch nearer to the Fire Emperor, step by step.

"Whoosh!"

All of a sudden, the Fire Emperor could feel Xu Que’s attempt to close in on him and his face fell.

Under the watchful eyes of everyone else, he forsaked the Imperial Guards around him and turned around to flee as fast as he could towards the Imperial Palace!

Everyone present were stumped by this!

As the monarch of the Fire Nation, did he just run away in fear? He looked like an abandoned dog speeding towards the palace, scared for his life.

Even the Water Empress was astonished. She never expected the Fire Emperor to be so cowardly.

When Xu Que saw the Fire Emperor fleeing, he was displeased, as he shouted out, "Dog Emperor, come out and fight me alone!"

Soon after, Xu Que dragged eighteen generations of Fire Emperor spirits and soared into the air before speeding towards the Imperial Palace!

"Xiu!" At the same time, a sound rang out in the skies above the Imperial Palace. A red flaming arrow shot into the air before exploding while in the midsts of clouds. The red arrow exploded in a powerful and bright burst of lights!

This was the signal from the Fire Emperor to the Tian Shan Assassins, that it was time to move!

"Be careful!" The Water Empress frowned as she communicated a message to Xu Que’s mind.

Xu Que didn’t seem too worried by it as he continued dragging the eighteen spirits along with him as though he was flying a kite around the domains of the Imperial Palace.

"Dog Emperor! Quickly come on out! Eighteen generations of your ancestors are flying in the air!"

Eighteen Fire Emperor spirits were being swung around wildly by Xu Que in the air!

One took the form of an "S".

While another took the form of a "B"

Indeed, the Fire Emperor decided to not show his face any longer. He would never leave the palace and fight with Xu Que, away from his Imperial Qi protection!

"Young man, please don’t be rash. There’s an Imperial Qi protection in the palace. You shouldn’t go in. If the Tian Sha Assassins combine strength with the Fire Emperor, you wouldn’t stand a chance of winning. The Tian Sha Assassin’s have many unorthodox methods of killing!" The Water Empress reminded Xu Que once again.

"Heheh... I’m not thinking of going in, not because I think I won’t succeed. It’s because that dog Emperor’s tortoise shell is way too hard and too inconvenient for me to break through. Come on then, my lady, stand by the side and watch me make him cry!"

Xu Que laughed coldly as he swung the chains in his hands once more. At the same time, he retrieved the electronic keyboard from his system interface and allowed it to float in mid air before him.

Soon after, he condensed his dantian and allowed his voice to ring out.

"Dog Emperor, if you don’t come out, don’t blame me for using my ultimate technique!"

"There’s a limit to my patience and I shall count from ten to one!"

"Ten!"

"One!"

"Good. I admire your courage. Wait here. I shall let you experience the horrors of dancing songs!"

"Come on out, Most Dazzling Folk Style!"

(T/N : Did a little bit of research, apparently Most Dazzling Folk Style was an annoying track played multiple times over year 2014. It’s like a Chinese Rick Astley’s Never Gonna Give You Up)

chapters.title: Chapter 244: Dancing Outside The Imperial Palace
chapters.body:
Chapter 244: Dancing Outside The Imperial Palace

Chapter 244: Dancing Outside The Imperial Palace

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"What’s he doing?"

Everyone around were thrown into confusion and were filled with shock.

Many of the commoners and cultivators around had stopped worrying about the lock down placed by the Fire Emperor and left their houses as they started surrounding the Imperial Palace.

Once again, a huge group of people appeared around the palace.

As for Xu Que who had counted down from ten to one just like that, everyone was at a loss for words.

He just said "ten" followed by "one". That means he didn’t even want to give the Fire Emperor a chance to come out.

Yet everyone also knew that even if Xu Que had counted properly, the Fire Emperor would never agree on leaving the Imperial Palace. Since he had already forsaken his pride and dignity by fleeing into the palace, why would he ever come out just because Xu Que was threatening him?

"But, what are dancing songs?"

"That’s right. I’ve never heard of dancing songs before. He could even use songs as a threat?"

"Most Dazzling Folk Style? I don’t like the sound of it…"

"Scary… Could it be a skill used by the disciples of Heavenly Explosion Faction?"

"Heavenly Explosion Faction is truly amazing!"

...

The crowd were all speaking in hushed tones. Although they’re all whispering, they were many. Hence, the area outside the Imperial Palace resembled a wet market with all the noise.

Up in the skies, the Water Empress was smiling radiantly while watching over Xu Que.

She was extremely intrigued and she truly wondered about the background of this young man.

He clearly knew that the Tian Sha Assassins had surrounded him and even their elder who was a notoriously powerful assassin, Killer God and an Infant Transformation level eight cultivator, was around. However, he didn’t seem the least fazed by it.

At the same time, Xu Que gripped onto the Spirit Prison Pagoda tightly, dragging the eighteen spirits with him everywhere he went as he soared high up into the air above the palace.

Soon after, five white and splendid fingers could be seen way up high in the skies as it descended down upon the electric keyboard.

"Deng deng deng deng…"

At once, the sounds of various electrical instruments rang out in the skies as a happy and upbeat tune started playing.

Everyone could feel their scalps turning numb as goosebumps started to appear across their bodies.

Some of the cultivators who were of lower levels could feel themselves swaying and dancing to the beat of the music.

As soon as the instrument started playing, Xu Que opened his mouth wide and started singing loudly!

"The boundless horizon is my love.

At the foot of the green mountain, flowers are in blossom,

What kind of rhythm causes the most swaying,

What kind of singing sounds the most pleasant..."

His loud and coarse voice rang out through the entire palace and reverberated across the lands.

Everyone around who watched were stumped.

"Fuck me. What… What’s this tune?"

"It sounds so scary. I almost couldn’t control myself and started dancing."

"He must be a Musician!"

"Heavens! Why is this kid so proficient in everything? Forget the fact that he’s already so powerful! Now, he’s even proven himself to be a high level Musician?"

"Indeed. Based on the way he’s playing the qin and how he sings, he’s of a higher Musician level than Li Bai!"

The expressions of the crowd froze on their faces as they looked at Xu Que and were filled with shock.

It was extremely hard for them to imagine how someone could have such a diverse range of talent and he was so good in each of these talents. Even for someone who was a genius, it would be hard for him to ever compare to Xu Que.

The Water Empress was the most shocked among them all. She was aware of Xu Que’s identity, having met his alter ego Hua Wu Que some time ago. Back then, this Hua Wu Que managed to create the mysterious smelly tofu which would help to increase a person’s soul strength. He even cooked the delicious tasting chicken wings. Now that she recalled these incidents, it was hard to unify these impressions.

She then realized that not only was this kid skilled in cooking, he was powerful and could even sing and play musical instruments!

"In this world… can anyone be more talented than him?"

The Water Empress had been impressed twice in her life by another person and both these incidents were of the same person!

"The winding river comes from the sky,

And flows to the colorful sea,

Thrilling songs fulfill our expectations,

Walking and singing at leisure all the way,

We sing and enjoy it to the fullest…"

Xu Que shouted out loudly as he shook the Spirit Prison Pagoda in his hands.

"Kuang dang dang dang…"

The eighteen chains attached to the pagoda shook violently, letting out a vibrating sound.

The spirits of these eighteen Fire Emperors were also dancing and moving to the beat at a frenzied pace.

Each one of them had been revered and widely feared throughout their days as the monarch. Everyone within the five nations had nothing but respect for these Emperors!

The crowd were already dumbstruck by this sight. Void Refining Stage, Form Synthesis Stage... If anyone were of these cultivation levels now, they would be able to rule all the five nations by themselves!

And now, eighteen of the strongest cultivators of all time, who had been widely feared and revered, were being chained by someone. In fact, they were chained up and dancing to the monstrous beat which he played. Now, they resembled clowns who were flailing their hands and legs to the music. If word leaked out, nobody would ever believe this.

"Deng deng deng deng deng…"

At this point, Xu Que increased the tempo of the melody, causing the movements of the spirits to increase in speed as well. Their hands and legs were flailing in a frenzy!

These dance movements were too contagious.

This evil tune could force its way into your head and brainwash a person!

There’s no need to even mention the effects of being a Four Star Musician on the audience. When Xu Que started singing, the cultivators whose levels were lower couldn’t even defend themselves against it!

Several cultivators who were of the Golden Core Stage seemed to have been infected by this music and lost control of their soul strength. Before long, they found themselves dancing to the music.

Outside the Imperial Palace, everything was thrown into a mess.

Right at this point, there was a pause in the melody of the tune. What used to be a fast paced and upbeat melody became silence.

At the same time, a microphone appeared in Xu Que’s hands as he shouted out loudly.

"Ladies and gentlemen, young and old, everyone listen up! Those in front of me, follow along the beat and raise your hands. My friends over by the Great Lake, let’s do this together. One, two, move your hands and legs, summer is fast passing and we shall move till we can’t breathe..."

At this point, all the cultivators who were lower than the Original Infant Stage were waving their hands and stomping their feets, moving along to the beat of the new melody.

They seemed to have no control over their bodies whatsoever as they danced and swayed to the beat. Everyone was moving in coordinated fashion as though they were all doing a synchronized dance together.

Even several Original Infant Staged Imperial Guards couldn’t help but start to dance as well. They felt like they had to dance. If not, they would feel extremely uncomfortable.

Their brains were filled with the sinister sounding music as they looked at Xu Que, who shot them a look of satisfaction and indignation.

Looking at this scene before him, Xu Que was extremely satisfied and consoled.

This was all possible because of the song the Most Dazzling Folk Style! Everywhere I take this song, crazy things begin to happen. I might even consider using this song as the hymn for the Heavenly Explosion Faction.

With so many people down below dancing, Xu Que started singing louder, extremely proud of his accomplishments!

"You are the most beautiful cloud in my heart, filling wine in order to make you stay with me!"

Everyone shouted out, "Stay with me!"

"You are the most beautiful cloud in my heart, filling wine in order to make you stay with me!"

"Stay with me!"

"Melodiously singing the most dazzling folk song, let the love sweep all the dust away..."

As the song continued ringing out, the entire group of people seemed to have been riled up by the music as they danced in a frenzy.

The Water Empress floated high in the air as she watched Xu Que and a smile had formed across her face.

At the same time, everything within the palace was in complete silence!

chapters.title: Chapter 245: Ear Rape!
chapters.body:
Chapter 245: Ear Rape!

Chapter 245: Ear Rape!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

The entire throne room which had been destroyed by Xu Que a few days ago had already been rebuilt and refurbished.

It only took an entire day and night as the Flaming Sun Princess led a group of cultivators while they repeatedly casted spells and joined efforts to rebuild the entire throne room.

Although it wasn’t as glorious or beautiful as it once was, it still resembled a majestic throne room fit for an Emperor.

However, the atmosphere within the throne room was one of utter silence. Even the air around was still and tense. Outside the palace, the group of people were cheering and shouting in joy as they danced uncontrollably to Xu Que’s music.

The many high ranking officials and ministers within the throne room had strange looks etched across their faces and the Fire Emperor was extremely enraged as well, as killing intent swirled around him!

These ministers and officials had been invited to the palace to welcome the Water Empress on this very day.

Now, the Water Empress didn’t enter the palace. Instead, Xu Que had come and caused such a spectacle outside. He was singing songs about beautiful clouds and about the most dazzling folks which sounded extremely bizzare to everyone inside the palace.

Clouds your sister! Winds your sister! What kind of rubbish are you singing?! Low class!

The few ministers and officials had looks of displeasure written across their faces.

There were several high ranking generals in the palace as well, who clenched their fists tightly, looking rather worried that something might happen.

In actual fact, most of the people within the room were trying their hardest not to burst out in song and dance. Despite the fact that these people had received a great deal of education, they were still being tempted by the loud music going outside. It took all of their concentration not to rush out of the door and join everyone outside.

If it weren’t for the fact that they were stuck within the throne room, they would have praised the song for sounding very upbeat and catchy!

Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan were only of the Golden Core Stage. However, they were relying on the protection from the remnants of Imperial Qi in the palace. Hence, they were excluded from the effects of the alluring music on their souls!

At this point, their faces looked grim and severe.

Zi Xuan had long anticipated this. She had been certain that Xu Que would be able to walk out of the throne room unscathed and she had been right.

However, the Flaming Sun Princess never entertained this possibility at all.

From her perspective as a member of the Imperial family, she understood how the tombs worked and how dangerous it was. She had been brought up thinking that anyone who entered the tombs wouldn’t be able to make it out alive.

Many years ago, one of her ancestors entered the throne room and never made it out alive. She knew how powerful that ancestor was. If he’d failed to emerge alive, that goes to show how many powerful spells there were within the tombs.

And yet Xu Que who was only a kid of the Original Infant Stage could enter so easily and come out of the throne room in such a short span of time. In fact, he even managed to bring out eighteen generations of her ancestors. This had completely surpassed her expectations!

"Emperor father… what should we do now?"

Even the bright and resourceful Flaming Sun Princess didn’t know what to do in this current situation as well.

She knew that her father had called for the assistance of the Tian Sha Assassins and she knew that there was a level eight Infant Transformation Staged elder, nicknamed Killer God who had come as well. But for some strange reason, she felt that even them would have a hard time killing Xu Que.

After all, that person… couldn’t be seen as someone ordinary anymore. Thus, extreme measures would have to be taken to deal with him.

It was impossible for an ordinary cultivator who was of the Original Infant Stage to be able to survive or even defeat an Infant Transformation Stage cultivator.

It was impossible for an ordinary person to be singing songs at such a crucial time outside the Imperial Palace.

The more she heard the song, the more flustered and irritated the Flaming Sun Princess became.

The Fire Emperor was enraged at this point. His own ancestors of eighteen generations had been dragged out and made to dance outside of the Imperial Palace and he was forced to retreat into his palace. He knew that he had completely thrown his dignity and face away.

He also realized that he had fled and ran away in front of the Water Empress which caused him to feel even more embarrassed of his own actions!

"Looks like… only the group of Tian Sha Assassins can stop that slimy bastard. When they finally capture him, I shall use my Emperor’s Energy and kill him with their help!" The Fire Emperor spoke in a hushed tone as his eyes revealed a look of intense hatred.

"This time, we must not let him escape. If not, the Emperor’s Energy would once again go to waste!" The Flaming Sun Princess nodded her head in agreement.

"Haha! This time, he won’t be able to escape! When I call upon the Emperor’s Energy again…" The Fire Emperor laughed out as he tried connecting himself to the Emperor’s Energy. However, even before he could complete his sentence, his laughter froze on his face.

"How could this be? I can’t feel the Emperor’s Energy anymore!" The Fire Emperor was beyond astonished and his voice trembled in fear. The Emperor’s Energy was his ultimate and last resort!

When the Flaming Sun Princess heard this, her face fell.

Can’t feel the Emperor’s Energy anymore? How was this possible?

As a member of the Imperial family, with the blood of Emperors flowing in his veins, it was impossible that he couldn’t feel the Emperor’s Energy anymore. Unless it had been completely used up… wait a minute. The Emperor’s Energy had been used up?

The Fire Emperor and Flaming Sun Princess looked like they were thinking the exact same thing as their pupils dilated and they lost all color in their faces!

Zi Xuan was standing by the side and heard them speaking. She then saw both of them turning pale before she understood what had happened.

Emperor’s Energy? In the Imperial Tombs?

"Could it be…" Zi Xuan started thinking about the frightening possibility.

Could it truly be that Xu Que forced his way into the Imperial Tombs and released all the Emperor’s Energy?

"That’s impossible! Absolutely impossible! How did he manage to enter the tombs where the Emperor’s laid to rest?" The Fire Emperor shouted out in anger.

All the ministers and officials paused in shock as they turned to look at the Fire Emperor as their faces were filled with suspicions.

What’s wrong with the Fire Emperor?

Flaming Sun Princess and Zi Xuan were shocked to their core and were in disbelief!

The room where all the Fire Emperors were laid to rest was the part of the Imperial Tombs which had the strongest and most powerful restrictive spells. Even cultivators of the Void Refining Stage would find it hard to break through the spells as only people with blood of the Imperial family would be able to gain entry.

Hence, even if they knew that Xu Que managed to break into the Imperial Tomb, they weren’t worried that he could enter the most sacred places where the spells were the strongest.

But now, the Fire Emperor couldn’t feel the Emperor’s Energy at all. Didn’t that mean that… Xu Que had already found his way to expand all the Emperor’s Energy through their physical bodies? And those eighteen spirits were being extracted from their bodies?

The entire throne room fell into absolute silence once again.

The crushing and tense atmosphere was almost unbearable as it filled the entire throne room!

However, the events outside the palace resembles a huge crazy party!

It was as if Xu Que himself had organized the party of the year with the best sound system around. Once again, he activated the automatic function of the system to control the electronic keyboard and allowed it to play on itself.

Soon after, different work out songs and music started playing throughout the entire area around the palace.

"You are, you are my little apple, no matter how much I love you, it would never be enough. Your red little cheeks fill my heart with love, as you are the fire which ignites my life… fire fire fire fire fire!"

"Yo, yo, yo, check it out! Fahai, you don’t understand love, Leifeng Pagoda will fall, Fahai you don’t understand love, Leifeng Pagoda will fall..."

"Everybody, raise your hands, work it!" Xu Que shouted loudly into the microphone.

Whoosh!

All of a sudden, the music stopped and everyone froze. Xu Que then placed the microphone close to his lips and spoke in a low voice, "Oppa Gangnam Style!"

"Deng deng deng deng…" The music rang out loudly once again.

"Areum dawo sarang seureo wo, Jigeumbuteo gal dekkaji gabolkka… Oppa gangnam style… Gangnam style…"

Everyone started dancing in a frenzy as they cheered loudly, moving their arms and legs in a wild fashion. They were all completely immersed by the Four Star Musician ability and were completely under his control.

Since this old man is in control, of course he moves in a steadfast and stable manner!

The Four Star Musician talent had been completely loosed on the crowd, causing the eighteen spirits to lose all control of their own will to move. Some of them were dancing so hard that their pants had dropped to their ankles!

Many Original Infant Staged cultivators were unable to control themselves. At this point, even several Imperial Guards had joined in the dancing!

Xu Que had completely brainwashed all of them by his music. In fact, one could say that their ears were being raped by Xu Que and were soon becoming pregnant!

(T/N : This is a chinese slang, which I personally find a little strange.)

The entire area outside the Palace was filled with cheers and dancing. The Water Empress watched on from above while a sweet smile hung across her face as she watched Xu Que as though she had gained a new insight into Xu Que and looked at him in a different way!

"Whoosh!"

Right at this point, numerous flashes of lights could be seen in the air and looked like a majestica display of fireworks. These flashed of lights surrounded Xu Que and wrapped around him.

"Careful!" The Water Empress was taken aback as she reminded Xu Que. At the same time, she waved her hand to conjure a protective spell.

Indeed, Xu Que’s face was filled with cold smiles as he activated his Eight Waste Destruction Flames.

"Boom!"

At that point, a large pair of black wings formed from behind his shoulder blades. They were so massive that they obscured the skies.

The heat which radiated out from his wings were very extreme as it coursed through all directions.

"Ah!!!" At the same time, several cultivators around Xu Que shouted out in pain.

The few shadows around Xu Que didn’t even had a chance to allow their bodies to materialize as they were burnt to dust. One by one, the Tian Sha Assassins who had surrounded Xu Que were being obliterated by the intense heat and turned to ashes, being carried away by the winds.

The Water Empress watched on in shock as her face was filled with astonishment!

"Deng deng deng…" the song changed once again. Xu Que had activated the automatic ability of the system and the current track had ended, allowing a new track to be randomly played!

"It’s so lonely to be peerless!"

"It’s feels so empty to be peerless!"

"Standing atop the highest mountains, with the cold air blowing ferociously against my skin!"

"Who can understand me, who can understand my loneliness..."

chapters.title: Chapter 246: Sacrifice Ritual Preparations
chapters.body:
Chapter 246: Sacrifice Ritual Preparations

Chapter 246: Sacrifice Ritual Preparations

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

In the throne room...

The Fire Emperor and Flaming Sun Princess had ugly looks written across their faces. Even the few officials and ministers in their presence could feel the tense atmosphere and didn’t dare to even breathe.

The Fire Emperor was shaking as killing intent radiated out from him and filled the entire room.

"Emperor Father…" Flaming Sun Princess opened her mouth gently to speak, "Maybe things aren’t as bad as we think it is. Maybe the Emperor’s Energy wasn’t destroyed and that Xu Que used a spell to prevent you from tapping into it!"

When the Emperor heard this, his eyes lit up as he nodded his head and whispered, "That’s right. The protective spells within the tombs are so powerful. With that small bastard’s cultivation level, he wouldn’t be able to break through. Since we haven’t reached a point of desperation yet, we shouldn’t be nervous!"

At this, the Fire Emperor then swept a glance out of the palace and inhaled deeply. His eyes were filled with an intense look of hatred as he whispered, "Flaming Sun, since the situation has gotten to such a state, it’s time to conduct the ritual!"

"Emperor father, this…" Flaming Sun Princess was taken aback as she opened her mouth in shock.

"There’s no need to speak further. I understand what you mean. But this is our only option left. Madam Ya has been kept pure all her life. The reason was so that we could eventually sacrifice her to the Fire God."

The Fire Emperor waved his hand and interrupted Flaming Sun Princess mid sentence before speaking out, "I guess the Dragon Veins had probably been disturbed and manipulated, resulting a consequence over the nation’s fortune. Even our sacred tombs had been broken into by that kid from Heavenly Explosion Faction. Hence, the sacrifice ritual is our only remaining option."

To the Fire Emperor, the only reason he was defeated repeatedly wasn’t because he wasn’t powerful enough. Instead, it was because the luck and fortunes of the nation had been affected!

The fortune of the nation also represents the life of the Fire Emperor and the success of the Imperial family in their endeavors!

As long as the nation was flourishing and prosperous, the Imperial family would never be destroyed. Likewise, if the nation’s fortunes were doing poorly, no matter what they did, luck would always be on the side of their enemies.

Hence, the Fire Emperor assumed that the Dragon Veins were the source of the nation’s fortunes and was closely linked to his battle capabilities and powers.

As long as he could use the pure and innocent Madam Ya as a sacrifice to the Fire God, the Dragon Veins would be restored once again. The fortunes of the Fire Nation would thus take a turn for the better and he wouldn’t lose to Xu Que anymore.

"Go and prepare. Send someone to escort Madam Ya to the Imperial Tomb’s Altar. Once the ritual is complete, we shall call upon the protection and blessings of the Fire God to renew our fortunes. We might even be able to restore the Emperor’s Energy. When that happens, Xu Que is dead for sure."

The Fire Emperor waved his hands as his decision was made. At the same time, he instructed Flaming Sun Princess, ensuring that she had no choice but to obey.

The Flaming Sun Princess opened her mouth but decided that she was in no position to disagree.

In actual fact, she found it hard to do something like this, for Madam Ya was her aunt who had watched her grow up. She knew that Madam Ya was well loved by the people. And now, she will be used as a sacrifice. This was hard for Flaming Sun Princess to do.

But things had already reached such a state. She knew that she had no other options. Madam Ya’s sacrifice was necessary in order to protect the entire nation and to protect the Imperial family from further farm.

"Flaming Sun understands. I shall now instruct some men to fetch Madam Ya!" Flaming Sun Princess made her difficult decision before retreating.

Zi Xuan had been beside her all this while, listening attentively. She wasn’t a member of the Imperial family and wasn’t a citizen of the Fire Nation. When it came to such matters, she simply had no rights to offer her opinion and thus remained silent. She then departed along with the Princess.

When the both of them had left, the Fire Emperor sat down on his dragon throne. His eyes were blinking in a daze as he sighed before closing his eyes.

The entire court filled with ministers and officials didn’t dare to say anything as well and remained silent.

However, the happy and fast-paced music outside could now be heard from within the throne room.

Several officials couldn’t bear the strange lyrics and jovial rhythm of the music and were particularly affected by it.

Additionally, they weren’t as disciplined and powerful as the Fire Emperor to repel it. All they could do was to grit their teeth and stand still as they struggled inwardly with themselves.

‘What kind of dog shit beat is this? The lyrics doesn’t even make sense.’

‘Eh?’

‘The song changed again?’

‘You are my little apple?’

‘Too low class. Way too low class! These lyrics are so stupid and they could sing it so loudly and so proudly? Aren’t they ashamed singing such song which lacks class and culture!?’

‘Eh?’

‘The song changed again!’

‘Fahai you don’t know love? Leifeng Pagoda will fall?’

Pu!

Many of these officials almost spat blood from the rubbish that they were listening to.

‘Rubbish, what rubbish songs. These lyrics are absolutely nonsense!’

The ministers and officials cursed under their breaths as their faces were filled with unease while they shook their heads.

However, many of the uneducated war generals within the halls were stirred up by the music. Their eyes beamed as they looked outside. If it weren’t for the presence of the Fire Emperor, they would’ve burst out in crazy dances to vent out the urge in their hearts.

They pricked their ears attentively to listen. The more they heard, the more they enjoyed the songs.

"You are, you are my little apple, no matter how much I love you, it would never be enough… Wow! Fantastic. These lyrics are so mysterious. They’re so frank and direct and the singing is so good and clear. It’s a very suitable song for confessing your feelings to a woman."

"Unlike those ministers and officials who think they know it all, whom, instead of singing songs that are direct and simple, they had to beat around the bush and sing those dog shit idioms and fanciful lyrics that nobody can understand. How is that manly at all? When it comes to love, it has to be expressed directly and not in riddles!"

"Yo, the song changed again!"

"Fahai you don’t know love. Leifeng Pagoda will fall?"

"Powerful. Way too powerful lyrics! Just hearing these lyrics, I can tell that there’s a fascinating story behind it!’

"It should be about a hero and a fighter who was abandoned by a woman named Fahai. Hence, in his rage, he decided to shatter and destroy the Leifeng Pagoda!"

The ministers and war generals held different opinions on Xu Que’s music. However, what was undeniable was that Xu Que had made them all feel something from his music! Their thoughts and attention had all been drawn towards it.

Regardless of whether they were critical about it or whether they liked it, everyone was listening to it. Gradually, their soul strengths were being affected by his music!

In confusion, an Original Infant staged official looked like he was in a daze and was impacted by the music. He cleared his throat before speaking out loudly, "It’s so lonely to be peerless, it’s so lonely…"

"Eh?" The Fire Emperor who had been deep in thought the entire time opened his eyes in shock.

Formidable strength and crushing pressure emanated out from the Fire Emperor, causing the official to awaken from his daze.

The Fire Emperor had maintained a neutral and unaffected expression. However, in actual fact, he had also been affected by Xu Que’s songs, causing his emotions to be in a whirl. He simply felt like killing someone for allowing himself to fall into it!

And now, someone from within his court dared to sing along to the songs? That was outrageous!

The Fire Emperor glanced down at his subjects before asking angrily, "Who was singing?"

Even before anyone of them could reply, there was another change in the song.

There was a temporal silence as the new track started playing. Soon after, the unabashed and confident voice of Xu Que rang out.

"Who was singing… her voice is filled with loneliness!"

"The white and puffy clouds hovered in the blue skies, just like tears floating in the air..."

"..."

The group of officials and ministers had to do their utmost to stifle a laugh.

That… That was too damn coincidental!

The Fire Emperor shouted out in anger "Who was singing" and Xu Que sang the exact same lyrics as though he was mocking the Fire Emperor’s anger.

Indeed, that was truly a coincidence!

Xu Que had already dedicated a portion of his soul strength to the system and allowed it to play songs automatically. The system thus queued several tracks to play at once randomly.

At this point, Xu Que had already engaged with a dozen of Tian Sha Assassins and was fighting a huge battle.

The pair of black wings from his back made him look exactly like a powerful and ferocious demon.

With his mighty fists, he punched and conjured spells in the air, looking extremely magnificent.

When the Water Empress watched him fighting, she seemed to have lost herself in how awesome he looked…

chapters.title: Chapter 247: Why Am I Only Worth Eight Cities?
chapters.body:
Chapter 247: Why Am I Only Worth Eight Cities?

Chapter 247: Why Am I Only Worth Eight Cities?

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

"Boom!" The massive ripple in the air spouted out in the sky.

A single Original Infant Stage Tiansha Assassin wasn’t prepared as he didn’t even have time to move his hands and was already pounded by the powerful punch. He was then transformed into a mist of blood at once as he exploded in the air.

Xu Que’s physical body was way too powerful. With the God of Hell’s Compulsion, he was terrifying.

He was way more powerful than how an Original Infant cultivator should be.

This was especially after completing the fire and electrical energy portions of the ability. His body was now at 25% of being an immortal!

His speed was astonishing as well. A pair of Eight Waste Destruction Flames wings spouted out from his back along with his Lightning Haste spell, making his figure a blur whenever he moved as it was too quick for anyone to keep their eyes on him. Normal cultivators wouldn’t even be able to see his shadow.

Under such intense speed, the amount of power he dished out whenever he punched someone was immense. His physical body had become such a formidable weapon.

"Boom!" A loud crack sounded as Xu Que appeared and punched the air.

Another ripple emerged in the space where Xu Que had punched. The rippling air emanated powerful energy as it coursed through the air towards another Tiansha Assassin. When it reached him, he fell to the ground and died instantly from the severe wounds sustained.

Just his brute strength alone was enough to destroy many protective spells.

The crowd had stopped in their frenzied dancing. When they heard the song "Peerless", everyone paused.

This song was rather slow and sad, hence, it was hard to dance to!

But this song was truly too accurate!

When they looked up at how Xu Que was slaughtering the assassins to the lyrics of this song, they were all beyond astonished!

It was so lonely to be peerless!

It felt so empty to be peerless!

Some time ago, Li Bai of the Heavenly Explosion Faction had sang this song before. When he did that, everyone around thought that he was intentionally doing this to humiliate Zhao Wu, the leader of the four great students!

But now, as this song highlighted how powerful and heroic Xu Que was, everything was different!

"He’s formidable!"

"These assassins were sent here to kill him. But now, it seems like he’s assassinating the assassins instead!"

"Even the Fire Emperor is terrified of him that he retreated back into the palace. What could these assassins possibly do to him?"

"He truly is peerless!"

When the crowd looked up to the skies, they couldn’t help but sigh out regretfully.

"Boom! Boom! Boom!"

Xu Que’s form took the shape of a lightning bolt as he flashed around in the sky. Wherever he went, the Tiansha Assassins were transformed into mists of blood.

The vast skies above the Imperial Palace was littered with fireworks of blood, splattering around.

As raindrops of blood fell to the ground, the roof of the palace was dyed red!

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 120 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 130 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for successfully acting tough. The reward is 160 act tough points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for killing an Original Infant Staged cultivator. The reward is 20,000 experience points!"

"Ding! Congratulations to host ‘Xu Que’ for killing an Original Infant Staged cultivator. The reward is 20,000 experience points!"

The system notifications rang out loudly in Xu Que’s mind. He couldn’t even count how many people he had slain at this point. He only knew that the system beeps wouldn’t stop.

"Tiansha! All of you are a bunch of trash!" Xu Que halted in mid air as he scanned his surroundings with his eyes and laughed out coldly.

At this point, none of the assassins dared to approach him. Nobody even dared to show themselves around him.

The power and strength which Xu Que had demonstrated shocked everyone present!

"Dog Emperor, stop hiding! You’ve been hiding from the first day of Chinese new year till the fifteenth day. No matter how long you hide, you won’t be able to elude the powerful and magnanimous Xu Que of Heavenly Explosion Faction!" Xu Que started ignoring the cowardly tortoises of Tiansha and turned his attention to the palace once again and started challenging the Fire Emperor.

Everyone around was speechless.

Big brother, did you just call yourself powerful and magnanimous?

Maybe you are indeed powerful. But magnanimous? Please forget about it. You are just like your master Duan Jiu De. Both of you together truly lack morals!

"Killer God, why haven’t you made your move? You don’t have to worry. I shall use my secret spells to help you out now!" The sonorous voice of the Fire Emperor rang out. Despite retreating into hiding, his voice still sounded confident and mighty!

He was pushing the Killer God of Tiansha to make his move now.

When everyone around heard the words "Killer God" they all jumped up in shock!

"Fuck, Killer God? Tiansha’s Killer God is here?"

"That person is truly powerful and shouldn’t be messed around with. He’s level eight of the Infant Transformation Stage. That’s higher than the Fire Emperor himself!"

"That’s not all. It’s been said that the Killer God owns a powerful mystical sword which can be transformed into a sword or a dagger. He moves faster than lightning, and often kills without his victim even realizing that he’s dead!"

"Nobody has ever seen his sword for those who had seen it are now dead!"

"It’s been said that the Killer God has killed a cultivator who was at level nine of the Infant Transformation Stage!"

"That’s too scary. The Fire Emperor must’ve paid a huge price in order for him to come!"

Everyone around retreated several steps back in fear, wanting to put some distance between themselves and Xu Que. Even though Xu Que was in the air and they were on the ground, nobody dared to stand closer than they should, afraid that their lives might be lost to them by accident.

When Infant Transformation cultivators fight, blood would flow like the river and anyone who stands between them would be wiped out from the face of the earth.

Indeed, with the appearance of the Killer God, many of them could feel a chill running down their spines.

"Thud! Thud!"

A loud dull sound rang out and everyone turned their heads towards the sound and saw a large empty street.

When they saw who was walking on the streets, they were all roused.

An old cultivator with a full head of white hair holding onto a walking stick was walking across slowly.

The way he moved so slowly was very strange!

Every single step he took could cause the air around his body to ripple and vibrate.

For an assassin to make such an appearance was very indicative of how he didn’t even respect his opponent.

The way he moved was just like telling Xu Que, "I’m coming to kill you!"

When Xu Que looked, he was first stumped by this. His shock quickly transformed to happiness!

An old acting tough foggey has appeared! Indeed, one should act tough all the way till a ripe old age. Xu Que felt like he could learn something from this old man!

"Killer God, it’s been a long time!" A warm and gentle sounding voice rang out from the skies.

The Water Empress took a step forward before moving towards the ground. She smiled warmly as she spoke out.

Even before she could speak her next sentence, the old man paused in shock and stopped moving forward.

He then raised up his walking stick and looked at the Water Empress. He then shook his head, "I can’t do this favor for you!"

Even before the Water Empress wanted to open her mouth to speak on behalf of Xu Que, the Killer God had already rejected her. Although his voice sounded very normal, there was a certain force and strength to it. It was clear that he wasn’t afraid of the Water Empress.

"Many years ago, I owed the previous Fire Emperor a favor. Today, his son had come to me for help and promised me eight cities to call my own if I helped! Hence, I wouldn’t listen to you even if I wanted to. This kid’s life, is mine!"

"Eight cities?" The Water Empress heard this and was visibly shocked.

In order for the Fire Emperor to kill Xu Que, he could actually pay such an exorbitant price and gave away eight cities of his kingdom to the Killer God. This… was such an unnecessary price to pay!

When everyone heard this, they were stumped as well. In order to claim Xu Que’s life, the Fire Emperor was willing to give away his own lands? And he even gave away eight cities just like that? That was almost a quarter of his entire kingdom!

Such a deal had never been made ever since the creation of this realm!

Xu Que hung in mid air and was shocked as well. Before long, his shock turned to anger as he shouted out.

"Dog Emperor, screw your sister and your eighteen generations of ancestors! Why am I only worth eight cities?! Come out here now. You have to come out and explain this matter to me properly. If not, do you believe that I can make all eighteen generation of your forefather strip naked and start dancing?!"

chapters.title: Chapter 248: I Shall Let You Act Tough!
chapters.body:
Chapter 248: I Shall Let You Act Tough!

Chapter 248: I Shall Let You Act Tough!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Pu!

Everyone around almost spat out a mouthful of blood.

Damn it! Eight cities in exchange for your single life, yet that’s not enough?

There are only fifty cities in the entire Fire Nation big brother. What are you unhappy about?

You sound extremely unreasonable right now. Threatening to make the eighteen generations of Fire Emperors strip naked and dance? Do you have to be so evil?

"Outrageous! Would you dare?" The Fire Emperor within the throne room couldn’t hold it in any longer and roared out in fury.

Xu Que laughed coldly, "Dog Emperor, watch and see if I dare to. Not only would I make them strip naked and dance, I would also make them eat their own shit while they’re naked!" As he finished, he whipped out the Spirit Prison Pagoda and shook the chains, causing all eighteen spirits to freeze.

"Junior, come on down! I am already old and it’s not easy for me to run up and down!" At this point, the Killer God of Tiansha finally made a move.

He waved his hands and a massive sea of flames appeared in the skies.

With a loud roar, the entire sea of fire coalesced into a fiery palm, which obscured the sky from view. The fiery palm then soared towards Xu Que.

"Hssss!" The crowd sucked in a breath of cold air as their pupils opened wide in shock.

This Fire God was too powerful! All he had to do was wave his hands to conjure such a powerful spell.

After the sea of flames had transformed into a palm, terrifying power emanated out from it, causing everyone to feel extremely fearful.

"Fuck! Old thing, what are you trying to do?" Xu Que’s eyes were opened in shock. At this point, he forgot about making the eighteen spirits dance naked. With a flip of his hands, he retrieved the Dark Buster Sword and Killer Sword from his inventory!

Under such a powerful opponent, Xu Que knew that he must not underestimate him. With his Killer Sword at Full Glory, he raised his Dark Buster Sword and charged towards the fiery palm.

Flame Devouring Wave!

"Boom!"

Formless waves of air swept outwards from Xu Que’s body towards the fiery palms and crashed into it, causing the fiery palm to dissipate into thousands of small, harmless flames before it disappeared into thin air.

"Eh?" The old man was shocked and revealed a look of surprise. He never expected that a lowly junior of the Original Infant Stage would be able to break his spell so easily!

The Water Empress was stumped as well.

This was a spell conjured by a level eight Infant Transformation cultivator. Even though it didn’t encompass his entire force with it, the spell was powerful enough to supposedly vanquish him.

And yet it was destroyed just like that. Everyone around who was watching was filled with disbelief.

Every step which Xu Que took had far surpassed the Water Empress’ expectations. However, his most powerful spell wasn’t even the Flame Devouring Wave!

"Old man, I don’t wish to lecture you but you’re not putting enough effort into your profession. That’s not how an assassin should behave! A true assassin wipes out his foe with a single move. Even your juniors all around know this better than you. They know how to hide and conceal themselves, waiting for an opportune timing to sneak a fatal attack. But you, ai, I am disappointed! You should start practicing to improve!" Xu Que shook his head with a look of disappointment.

The crowd drew their lips into a line and were speechless.

A level eight Infant Transformation Staged cultivator wishes to kill you. Do you really expect him to sneak up on you to kill you in a single stroke?

Big brother, you really think too highly of yourself. Although it’s true that you are very powerful, this is the Killer God who had even killed a level nine Infant Transformation cultivator!

If he wished to screw you over, he wouldn’t even have to open his eyes to do it, yet you could even find it in you to lecture him?

The old man also shook his head and spoke, "Although your powers are far from average, you won’t be able to amount to anything. I’ve met with people who were more talented and powerful than you. However, they were too complacent and arrogant. Even before they had the chance to grow up, they were killed! Today, you shall have the same ending as them!"

As he finished speaking, the old man swung his walking stick!

"Wng!"

An ear piercing shriek filled the air which came from the old man’s walking stick. The loud sound resonated in all directions, causing the eardrums of everyone to hurt.

The crowd seemed to react in fear as they gaped their mouths.

"That’s the Killer God’s sword! He actually hid it inside his walking stick!"

"In order to kill Xu Que, the Killer God is actually going to reveal his sword!"

"Could it be… that we might have such good fortunes to be able to see the renowned Killer God’s Single Stroke?"

Everyone around started screaming out happily. The Killer God’s Single Stroke wasn’t just a spell. It also meant that the Killer God only needed a single stroke to claim lives!

A single stroke to obtain a person’s soul and a single stroke to take a life. Nobody would be able to defend himself successfully!

Even a level nine Infant Transformation Staged cultivator had been a victim of his sword before!

"Xiu!" The sharp sound of blade slicing through the air could be heard. The old man has made another move!

His physical body had vanished from where he stood and not a trace of the old man could be found. Not even the sword which he had drawn was seen by a single person!

The Water Empress was equally shocked. She subconsciously invoked a water spell from the tips of her finger. A large burst of water spouted out and wrapped around Xu Que. Immediately after, the sheet of water froze and became ice, enveloping him from any harm.

At the next moment, the Water Empress’ face fell as she shouted out, "Careful!"

As soon as her voice rang out, a damaging ripple of air appeared threateningly behind Xu Que!

The Killer God is here!

The Killer God was an extremely seasoned assassin and could almost read the situation. He had long anticipated that Water Empress would assist Xu Que. After doing the necessary calculations, he slipped through a space in the Water Empress’ spell with unimaginable speed and appeared behind Xu Que, ready to kill him.

"Xiu!"

The ringing sound from earlier had dissipated a long time ago. And yet there was the whooshing sound of the Killer God’s blade slicing through the air behind Xu Que. The terrifying sound of it was crisp and clear, and everyone heard it.

They didn’t even see the old man’s shadow but could all guess that Xu Que was doomed.

The Water Empress had an anxious look written across her face. She was very powerful but it was impossible to rescue Xu Que from someone like the Killer God who was equally powerful. She had the will, but there was absolutely no way.

Normal cultivators wouldn’t be able to catch a glimpse of the Killer God. However, she was able to see the wisp of white light from the sword, appearing out of this air, aiming straight for Xu Que’s neck!

Everything happened in a single moment, not even longer than a breath!

That sword was way too quick!

"Damned retard! I told you to move stealthily and you really listened to me like I’m your grandfather? Do you wish to become my grandson? Hmph! Get lost from your grandpa and eat some shit!"

Right at that second, Xu Que turned around and cursed out as he raised his Dark Buster Sword and hacked down viciously at the air in a swift motion!

"What?" The shocked exclamation of the old man rang out.

At the next moment, a loud crash rang out as though Xu Que’s Dark Buster Sword had connected with something.

A black shadow emerged from thin air and fell from the sky towards the ground. It was indeed the Killer God!

"Whoosh!"

Xu Que’s pair of black fiery wings moved once as he stepped over his bolts of lightning beneath his feet, soaring downwards to meet the fallen old man. In a blink of an eye, he appeared in front of him and swung his Buster Sword once again.

Thud!

The old man was struck a second time. The impact from the force was so powerful that he was thrown up from the ground and flew a distance away!

"Killer God, huh?" Xu Que appeared where the old man had landed once more. He slapped his Buster Sword once and glared before swinging his sword at the old man in an upward motion.

"You’re supposed to be cool, huh?"

The old man flew into the air once again. Yet even before he could land on the ground, Xu Que was already there as he swung his Buster Sword at him once again.

"Thud!"

Another dull crash rang out.

Before anyone could react, the old man was thrown up into the air once again.

"Thud!"

The old man flew high up yet again

"Thud!"

And again!

He was the highly esteemed and widely feared Killer God, but he didn’t even have the chance to retaliate. He was being hit around by Xu Que like a golf ball, from one end to another end and back again.

The entire scene was just about Xu Que giving him a thorough thrashing.

While he was doing that, Xu Que was shouting and cursing him!

"I shall let you act tough!"

"Thud!"

"I’ll let you act tough again!"

"Thud!"

"Killer God’s Single Stroke, huh?!"

"Thud!"

"Your grandfather here has the Troops secret character!"

"Thud!"

...

Down below, everyone had turned quiet.

Everything were in silence.

chapters.title: Chapter 249: At Your Age, You Shouldn’T Be Doing Business!
chapters.body:
Chapter 249: At Your Age, You Shouldn’T Be Doing Business!

Chapter 249: At Your Age, You Shouldn’t Be Doing Business!

Translator: Translation Nation Editor: Translation Nation

Everyone watched with gaping mouths and eyes in disbelief!

That’s the Killer God! Among the Tiansha Assassins, he was the most reputable and feared killer!

An Infant Transformation Staged level eight who managed to kill a level nine cultivator of the same realm!

Even with such power and ferocity, he was still beaten up so mercilessly by Xu Que who was only of the Original Infant Stage.

"How… How is that possible?"

Everyone’s eyes were filled with shock and were all at a loss for words.

The Water Empress couldn’t help but cover her tiny mouth while her pretty eyes were opened wide in astonishment.

Several moments ago, she had assumed that she’ll lose Xu Que and that he would be killed by the Killer God’s stealthy blade.

If the target had been her, she probably wouldn’t have been able to dodge it.

However, right at the very final moment, the Killer God’s Sword was blocked by a certain force and he couldn’t bring it down in time upon Xu Que. Soon after, Xu Que proceeded to beat him up savagely.

Additionally, that huge black sword could actually produce such unbelievable power and supernatural speed!

When combined together, it didn’t give a single chance for the Killer God to retaliate or defend himself!

In actual fact, Xu Que was ready for the attack when it happened. He could sense the approaching danger so he used the "Troops" Secret Character immediately. He then waited for the old man to appear before catching him by surprise in a brilliant counter attack!

With his full Glory Killer Blade providing him with an additional 30x strength, along with the full absorption of two elements by his God of Hell’s Compulsion, his power and speed had taken huge additional boosts!
