There were many stalls on the streets, selling all kinds of desserts and snacks. The whole street was filled with the fragrance of mouth-watering food.

Buttface was drooling as he walked along the street. His eyes were transfixed by all the delicious food he saw. "Young man, let's get some food," urged Buttface. "This deity has fought all day today and needs food to replenish energy!"

Coming to this place that was filled with human and activities, Buttface was full of excitement. After all, he had been trapped for so long without even a mouthful of water to drink.

Standing at the foot of the Imperial City where there were all kinds of appetizing snacks, Buttface could only think about food right now.

"Oh, there's a stall selling steamed buns over there, you can go buy some!" Xu Que pointed to a stall.

Although the flavor of the food was very charming in the night market, Xu Que was not interested at all, as the food was too rough for him. The seasoning would never compare to that of the modern world on Earth.

Besides, he was a foodie with a penchant for strongly flavored food. He loved barbecued food, stinky tofu and spicy hotpot that frequently cost six yuan. Most of the night market food belonged to the category of lighter snacks that could not stir up Xu Que's appetite!

"But the steamed bun isn't enough to replenish much of my energy. Young man, get some silver or spirit stones," urged Buttface. "This deity will personally go get some food!" Buttface was unable to endure the temptation of the treats and tugged at the sleeves of Xu Que.

Xu Que smiled. "You can have some silver or spirit stones but, you need to get something to exchange. Don't look at me this way. I do this for your own good. I can't let you develop the bad habit of being spoon-fed. You need to learn to work for money! Labor is most glorious!"

Xu Que felt that he had to decisively eliminate the bad habit of Buttface wanting to be spoon-fed for good.

"Bullshit, this deity has always been relying on labor to earn money. On what basis are you accusing this deity?"

"When did you work for money?"

"I'm doing it right now! Can't you see that this deity is already moving his hands by tugging at your clothes? This is a kind of labor!"

"Yo, are you trying to commit a robbery? With me as your target?"

"You can say that if you want. Anyway, this deity is relying on strength to get money!"

"Hmm, there's nothing wrong with your words. Fine then, all my money's with the Sword Spirit. You want money, right? Okay, I'll let the Sword Spirit out!"

As he spoke, he pulled out a sword from his system storage.

Small little thing!

If you're not happy, we can spar!

I have the Sword Spirit, do you think I fear you?

"Owww!"

Buttface immediately howled, his tail tucked between his legs. He ran away in a blur!

Xu Que had no choice but to use the Sword Spirit to scare Buttface. This husky was like the Monkey King after he had begun to wear the hoop given to him by his master, the Tang Monk. He sure was a big headache to Xu Que.

Xu Que gave a cackle and replaced the sword again.

He needed to teach Buttface a lesson for asking for money in such a manner. That personality of his, if left be, would become overly arrogant.

"Heh, Buttface, why did you run? Still want money?" Xu Que saw Buttface hiding in the corner of a wall and used his soul strength to speak to Buttface.

"Damn, boy, you have guts! Just wait and see, this deity will get his own food!" Buttface got angry and turned away to leave.

"Don't go, I'm just messing with you," laughed Xu Que. "Okay then, I'm hungry as well, I'll grill some chicken wings for you, how's that?"

"Fuck, chicken wings? That's for dogs. This deity is not going to eat such lowly food. Goodbye!"

Buttface suddenly dashed into an alley and disappeared!

Deeper into the alley, the fragrance of food floated in the air, as if someone was cooking in the kitchen of some household!

Following the fragrance, Xu Que saw that it was actually the kitchen of a restaurant. He shook his head and a bitter smile appeared on his face.

"And I thought this silly dog suddenly got backbone. I didn't expect him to still be so shameless that he would enter other people's kitchen to steal some food."

Xu Que turned to leave. He decided to make his own food.

This stupid Buttface actually looks down on the grilled chicken wing?

Grilled chicken wings are a delicacy!

But first, the problem of raw materials needed to be solved. It has been a long time since he had hunted for demonic beasts. There was not a single chicken wing left in his system storage even if he wanted to make some to eat.

Xu Que strolled along the street but there were no stalls that sold chicken meat!

Sometime later he finally found a stall selling meat patties. There was chicken drumstick, chicken meat and many other cuts available, except chicken wings!

According to the stall owner, chicken wings were too thin and contained more bones than meat. They were the same as chicken necks. Nobody wanted to eat or buy them. Generally they threw or gave them away to refugees!

Xu Que was not pleased to hear that. This group of idiots were the same as those from the Fire Nation. They were actually wasting such a wonderful raw ingredient!

He continued his search as he was bent on finding chicken wings!

At last, when he reached the end of the street, his eyes locked on a stall!

Whether it was the ancient times or the modern world or another totally different world, the more prosperous a piece of land was, the more expensive it would be!

All these stalls on the street needed to pay rent.

And the amount of rent in the central zone would definitely be more expensive than the less crowded and quieter zones.

Xu Que arrived at the end of the street. Basically it was far away from the central zone of the night market, and might even be considered remote. There were very few people walking by in the area, and they did not even stop to look at the stalls!

The business of the stalls here were bleak. Firstly, they did not have enough money to rent a better location. Secondly, what they were selling was not unique enough to attract people.

Xu Que was staring at a stall run by a mother and son in plain clothes. The woman looked very young and beautiful. She had a five to six-year-old son who seemed to be very densible helping out at the stall.

They were selling some minced meat pies.

Perhaps they did not have enough money and the woman could not afford to buy other forms of chicken meat. She was sitting quietly on the edge, picking out the meat from chicken wings to make the pies!

"Mother, your meat pies are so delicious and cheaper than sugar-coated haws. Why don't people come and buy them?" The young child looked at his mother with his big innocent eyes as he asked the question.

The woman looked at her child lovingly and smiled. Patting the head of her child, she answered, "this is because the sugar-coated haws are nicer. Don't you want to eat them when you see them?"

"No, my favorite food is mother's meat pies. I won't eat sugar-coated haws anymore!" The young child clenched his fist and looked resolute, as if he had made a difficult decision!

Xu Que couldn't help but feel amused by the young child's behavior. He walked over to them.

chapters.title: Chapter 321: I’Ll Teach You How To Grill Chicken Wings!
chapters.body:
Chapter 321: I’Ll Teach You How To Grill Chicken Wings!

Chapter 321: I’ll Teach You How to Grill Chicken Wings!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"Mama, look, there's a man coming!"

The kid pointed his little finger at Xu Que the moment he saw him.

The woman rarely had any customers, so she shot up to her feet immediately and timidly addressed Xu Que. "Mister, would you like…"

She bit her lips and paused mid-sentence when she looked up at Xu Que.

His attire and appearance gave him a unique sense of presence that prompted the woman to think that perhaps he was a rich young master of some noble family!

His bonus charisma points helped as well. In that moment it would be no surprise at all if an average person thought of him as an angel or a white knight!

The woman was dumbstruck for a moment as she took in the sight of this extraordinary man in front of her. How could a nobleman like him end up in this part of the city?

"S-Sir, would you like to buy some meat pies?" asked the woman nervously.

She might have lived in the Imperial City all her life, but she was still just a commoner, so she had never been so up close and personal with upper-class people before. This was why she was suddenly so nervous!

"Hey mister, my mama makes the best meat pies in town! Try it!" said the kid, trying to help his mother.

Xu Que smiled and stroked the kid's head gently. "I'm not buying meat pies, I want chicken wings!"

"Huh?" The woman froze in confusion and was unable to formulate a replt.

He wanted chicken wings?

Had she heard him right? Who would spend their money on chicken wings?

Xu Que looked at the woman and said, "Ma'am, picking out the meat and throwing the wings away like this is just too wasteful! Let me teach you my secret recipe for the best grilled chicken wings, then I'll get three pairs of wings for free, how about that?"

"Grilled… grilled chicken wings?" asked the woman, even more bewildered now.

Did he say he was going to grill chicken wings? Who would eat that? There was barely any meat on chicken wings! Wouldn't it be more sensible to grill chicken drumsticks instead?

The boy kept on picking the meat off the chicken wings with his head down while adding, "mister, try my mama's meat pies! They're really the most delicious pies in the world!"

"I know, I know," replied Xu Que with a laugh. Then he turned to the woman and said, "So what do you think? I'll make you an offer. You can just give me two pairs of chicken wings instead of three!"

The woman finally regained her senses and waved her hand and laughed nervously, "sir, you must be joking! If you want chicken wings I can just give them to you for free! They're not worth any money anyway."

"That won't do! We from the Exploding Heavens Faction would never cheat or rob anyone! Come on, let me teach you Exploding Heavens Faction's secret recipe for the best grilled chicken wings in the world!"

As he spoke he rolled up his sleeves and pulled out a pile of charcoal and a barbecue grill from the storage in the system. Then he twirled his finger in the air and a small flame appeared at the tip of his finger which lit up the charcoal instantly!

Both mother and child were flabbergasted.

This man was a divine spirit!

But what… what the hell was he trying to do exactly?

The woman's face turned pale and she held her son closer to her immediately as she stared at Xu Que with a face full of apprehension.

Obviously divine cultivators had left a very bad impression on them. This woman's reaction to Xu Que was full of fear and alarm, as if she was concerned that Xu Que might hurt them.

After all, they were just powerless commoners, so they had never had the chance to interact with any immortals at such a personal distance before.

But still, this spirit was acting strange. Why would he want to teach them how to grill chicken wings? Even lowly mortals like themselves didn't eat chicken wings, so naturally it was impossible for divine spirits to want anything to do with these scraps… right?

And what was this spirit going to do to them?

Xu Que smiled cynically and said, "Ma'am, you're misunderstanding me. All I want is to teach you how to grill chicken wings. You can't break the promise, though! Once I've taught you how to grill the chicken wings you must give me two pairs of them for free!"

"S-Sir, w-we're just lowly commoners…"

"I know, I know! Look, don't worry! I'm not like any of those fuckhead Cultivators out there! I'll have you know that I'm the cream of the crop in the World of Cultivators!"

Xu Que then casually went to work and started piercing the chicken wings through an iron skewer and placing them on the grill.

"Now pay attention. This is the first step. You must always grill the chicken wings with moderately high heat!"

The woman was completely flummoxed and clueless as to what Xu Que was doing. All she did was silently stand and watch him, unsure of what to do.

Then Xu Que continued to take out more ingredients for the chicken wings from the system—chili powder, honey, barbecue sauce, a basting brush…

The woman had never seen such exotic things before and was getting more and more confused. The boy simply stood there curiously watching Xu Que with eyes as wide as saucers.

This immortal spirit sure was strange!

The boy kept on watching him even more keenly now, hardly daring to blink!

Meanwhile, though, the woman pulled her child even tighter against her body. She bit her lips as she watched Xu Que's strange actions as he played arounf with his peculiar bottles and jars. She was completely at a loss as to what to do.

Flap!

Xu Que pulled out a chef's apron from the storage in the system and swiftly wrapped it around his body. Then, with his left hand holding the skewer, he used his right hand to brush the marinade onto the chicken wings.

"These steps are key to making delicious chicken wings, you see. You must remember the exact order—baste the chicken wings with the marinade, then grill them until they're golden brown, then brush the honey onto the chicken. Now, for the sauce ingredients…"

Xu Que explained as he basted the chicken wings with the sauce he had made. In fact, he was meticulous in every step of the cooking process and made sure that everything was done perfectly.

The woman gradually calmed down as she saw how engaged Xu Que was in his task. He started to think that this cultivator really was different to the others that she had encountered before!

Sizzle, sizzle…

The chicken wings coated in sauce had been grilled until their skin was a scrumptious golden brown. The oil and fat that dripped out from them fell onto the charcoal, sizzling and spitting whilst filling the air with an irresistibly delicious aroma.

"It smells yummy!" cried the child who was clasped in his mother's arms.

The woman was stunned herself. She stared wide-eyed at Xu Que, expression incredulous. Who would've thought that once grilled, chicken wings could give off such an enticing smell? It was probably the most appetizing fragrant she had ever smelled in her life!

"Now, time to brush on the honey!"

Xu Que's movements were quick and efficient. He picked up a new brush and basted the golden honey onto the chicken wings with smooth swipes of his wrist.

At that moment, his movements were so smooth that he looked extremely cool, even though he was only grilling chicken wings!

Sizzle… sizzle…

After the chicken wings had been brushed with honey, they were now golden and glistening. The sumptuous smell became even more intense as the steam from the grilled chicken filled the whole area.

What a heavenly smell! The common folk in that area had never smelled anything like it before!

The hawkers nearby began to flock to Xu Que, lured by the mouth-watering aroma of the chicken wings. In no time at all, he was completely surrounded by a huge crowd of people trying to catch a glimpse of what was producing such a tempting aroma.

"Do you believe me now, Ma'am?" asked Xu Que. "These chicken wings should be done now. You can ask the customers how spicy they like their chicken wings and adjust the amount of spice you add accordingly. As for me, I like them fiery hot!"

As he spoke, Xu Que sprinkled a generous pinch of chili powder onto a pair of wings. They turned from golden brown to flaming red! As for the rest, he sprinkled a tiny pinch of the same chili powder on them, making them look instantly more scrumptious!

And so the inviting aroma of grilled chicken wings spread further and further into the heart of the night market…

chapters.title: Chapter 322: Exploding Heavens Faction Kfc
chapters.body:
Chapter 322: Exploding Heavens Faction Kfc

Chapter 322: Exploding Heavens Faction KFC

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"Eh?"

Many people in the originally lively and noisy night market suddenly stopped walking and looked around.

The fragrance of barbecued meat that they had never smelled before was filling the entire street!

For those who had been eating light-tasting food for years, this smell hit them like a mattress!

The fragrance was strong, with a faint hint of chilli that actually stimulated the appetite of the countless people who were smelling it.

"This smells too good. Is it a new snack?"

"Who's making this dish?"

"Where is it?"

"Damn, where the hell did it come from?"

"I can't help it, it smells too good!"

...

Many people commented on the sudden smell and they began to scurry around the stalls in the night market, searching for the source of the fragrance!

The patrons of some nearby restaurants were also attracted by the fragrance. They walked out and took a deep breath, faces full of enjoyment!

"There's actually a delicacy in the world that emits such a wonderful fragrance. Come! Go buy it for this young master!" ordered a well-dressed young man.

The boy servant next to him took a big breath before running into the streets, looking for the source of the fragrance!

In a luxurious restaurant, in a private dining room on the second floor, the fragrance drifted in through the window!

Several good-looking and refined young men and a woman were also stunned by the wonderful smell!

"This smell…"

"It smells too good. Such a unique fragrance of meat actually exists among the common folk. How is this food being prepared?"

"This prince has tasted all kinds of delicacies in the palace, but never before have I come across any food with such a smell!"

"Elder brother is right. We must find it and try out its taste. Xiao Li Zi, go quickly, buy the food no matter the price!"

These young men, fascinated by the fragrance, were actually the princes of the Metal Nation. One of them ordered a white-faced man to buy the food. The man agreed immediately and hurried downstairs, leading a group of several other men!

At this time, one of the young men turned to look at a woman, who was wearing a veil and standing by the window.

"Seventh sister, since you're travelling outside most of the time," the young man said with a smile, "you should be more well-informed than us. Do you know what food is emitting ths fragrance?"

"Elder brother, you must be joking. I'm on the path of cultivation and have abstained from food for many years. I'm not as good as any of my royal elder brothers in this aspect!"

The Seventh Princess shook her head slightly. Even with the veil, one could still see her bitter smile from the way her eyes did not crinkle.

As per what she said, she had already lost her desire for food as she had abstained from food all these years. However, after smelling this fragrance, she was affected, and actually felt like tasting the food!

The several princes laughed when they heard that.

"Looks like we're going to satisfy our tastebuds tonight!"

"I'm already sick of the delicacies served in the palace. Encountering this extraordinary food tonight outside the palace is totally unexpected! This prince actually has the desire to taste the food!"

"I'm curious as to what kind of food it is!"

"It feels like the fragrance of chicken meat. But even roasted chicken meat is not as fragrant as this?"

"There's no hurry, wait for Xiao Li Zi to come back with the food, and all will be clear!"

...

In an alley, Buttface was now satisfied after filling his stomach. He snuck out carefully from the backdoor of a kitchen. His two eyes sneakily looked around when suddenly, he began to drool again!

"Owww, what is this smell? It dares to tempt this deity? This deity is going to attack it!"

The next moment, Buttface was dashing into the crowd and heading straight to the end of the street without hesitation.

Most of the people were still searching for the food like headless flies when they coincidentally saw the husky dashing by.

Someone immediately exclaimed, "quick, follow the dog, the dog's nose is thr most accurate!"

Everyone came to a realisation.

That's right, the dog's nose will know where the smell came from, just follow it!

With a 'wow', large crowds of people headed towards the end of the street!

...

...

At the same time, people were already surrounding a stall right at the end of the street. They were other stall owners who had been attracted by the smell of the food, and were all wearing dumbstruck expressions on their face!

The mother and son pair were also bowled over by the wonderful smell of the food. They watched in a daze as Xu Que sprinkled cumin powder onto the chicken wings, a flavorful scent that made them swallow a mouthful of saliva!

After all, this was cooked by Xu Que, a One-Star Chef. Ordinary folks would find his food irresistible!

"Young… young master, is… is this really chicken wings?" the woman who was hugging her child asked Xu Que in disbelief.

She had not expected that the world's most useless chicken wing, something nobody wanted even when given away for free, could be transformed into a delicacy with such a wonderful flavor.

This took some superb culinary skills!

"Have you watched carefully? In future, you can sell grilled chicken wings. You can call the name of your store… Exploding Heavens Faction KFC!" declared Xu Que cheerfully.

He handed the chicken wings to the mother and son. He also took two chicken wings for himself and raised them to his mouth!

He took a bite. It was crispy on thr outside and tender on the inside. The flavors of cumin and chill exploded in his mouth!

"Oh my God, this monstrous level of spiciness is amazing. Ooh, delicious!" Xu Que turned into a foodie in that instant. He took out a stool and sat there, enjoying his chicken wings without caring for his image!

The woman took the chicken wings, and with some reservations and doubt, slowly held them to her mouth and took a small bite.

Crunch!

The crispy skin of the chicken wing crunched loudly, followed by a soft and smooth taste that filled her mouth.

The woman's head went blank with a boom in her head!

This must be the most delicious food in the world!

From childhood to adulthood, even after she had gotten married, she had never tasted anything so appetizing!

What was even more amazing was that the food was actually just chicken wings!

"Mother, Xiao Bao wants to taste it too!" The young child was also drooling and wanted to have a bite.

The woman dhook herself from her daze and with a doting smile, she gently blew the chicken wing a few times before handing it over to the young child. "Xiao Bao, take small bites, it's still hot!"

"Yes, mother!" Xiao Bao answered obediently and took a small bite from the chicken wing. In no time, he was chewing the food with a face full of satisfaction.

The stall owners who surrounded their stall could no longer stay silent. They asked with great interest and curiosity, "young lady, what is the name of these chicken wings?"

"Uh, the young master over…" the woman began to answer.

But before she could finish speaking, a large crowd suddenly swarmed over with a huge commotion. And there was a dog right in front of the crowd, actually running on his hind legs!

"Owww!"

In front of the human race, Buttface dared not talk recklessly so he could only howl like a wolf!

The crowd behind him was loud and clamorous.

"Here it is! The fragrance is getting thicker!"

"Look everyone, it's that stall!"

"Lady, what are you selling? Hurry, my young master will buy all of them!"

"Damn, who's your young master? My young missy wants to buy all of them too!"

"Bullshit, I'm under the orders of the Third Prince to purchase the food. Do all of you want to snatch it away from me?"

"Fuck, we shouldn't provoke this eunuch!"

"Don't fret about him. Just buy it!"

...

The crowd was noisy as each person wanted to come up to the front.

The woman and the surrounding stall owners were startled as they had never seen anything like this in their whole life.

Clang!

The grilled chicken wing that the woman was holding fell from her hands abruptly and landed in front of a pot. She hurriedly carried her child and took a few steps back. In an uneasy tone, she said, "this … these are roasted chicken wings, all of you can take what you want…"

Shoosh!

Suddenly a muffled sound was heard!

Xu Que stood up abruptly from his stool and shook his head with a smile. "Take what you want? No, these are made using a secret recipe!"

After saying that, he came up to the stall. With a wave of his hand, he shouted in a serious voice, "come, come, come. If you are on the way or just passing by, don't miss the freshly grilled Exploding Heavens Faction chicken wings. Ten taels … bah, wrong, 100 taels for a pair of chicken wings. Everyone can only buy a pair every day. If you want to buy it, you have to queue. If anyone dares to create any trouble, I'll kill you without mercy!"

chapters.title: Chapter 323: The Name Rings A Bell!
chapters.body:
Chapter 323: The Name Rings A Bell!

Chapter 323: The Name Rings A Bell!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

One hundred taels for a pair of grilled chicken wings!

Everyone was astounded as Xu Que yelled out these words.

The woman hugged her child closer to her body. She was speechless as her head went completely blank!

One hundred taels! That much money would be equal to three to five years' worth of living expenses for an average family! As for the hardworking mother and son, this money would be enough for them to live on for up to a decade!

Was he really going to sell a pair of chicken wings at that exorbitant price? Had he lost his mind?

Many people were disgruntled and shouted, "are you kidding me? This is daylight robbery! Who'd pay one hundred taels for worthless scraps like chicken wings?"

"That's right! You're clearly conning people! You should be reported to the authorities and get dragged into jail for this!"

"His greed must've clouded his judgement. Who'd be foolish enough to put the price of chicken wings at one hundred taels?"

The crowd was buzzing with shouts and murmurs of discontent.

...…

Xu Que remained calm and unperturbed. He shook his head with a smile and said, "chicken wings may be worthless scraps, but my recipe is definitely not! Look, this bottle of spice is called chili powder. Have any of you ever eaten anything with chilli powder before? I've brought it over from overseas and it cost me more than ten thousand taels a bottle!"

Xu Que then picked up the bottle of chilli powder and showed it to everyone. People in thr crowd were staring at it with eyes full of doubt.

It was true that they had never seen chilli powder before, but they had definitely seen and eaten chilli peppers before and there was no reason a small bottle of chilli powder would cost that much!

"And this is honey! Well, obviously you've all had honey before so I'm not going to dwell on that. But what about this one? This is cumin powder! I bet none of you have even heard of cumin powder! You wouldn't be able to buy this abroad even if you had the money! This is a special spice exclusive to the Exploding Heavens Faction! Do you get it now? We're not just selling the chicken wings, we're selling the extraordinary techniques and high-quality ingredients that go onto the chicken wings!"

Xu Que kept a straight face all the while as he explained it to the crowd.

The crowd stared at the cumin powder with skepticism and curiosity.

This was their first time hearing the name of such an exotic spice. They had also indeed smelled a striking aroma coming from the chicken wings which was unlike anything they had ever smelled before.

Now they knew that it was because of this strange spice!

All of a sudden, their eyes gawked at the bottle of cumin powder with greed—if they could just get a hand on the spice, they'd certainly make a fortune in the future!

"Did you say a hundred taels a pair? I'll take them! I'll take them all!" said one person from the crowd who was wearing what looked like the livery of a rich household. He had a haughty air about him.

The crowd turned to him in surprise, but once they saw his face, their shock instantly vanished.

"Ah… it's the servant of the city's richest merchant family!"

"Well, if it's the Liu family then they'd have no problem paying thousands of taels anyway!"

"What's a thousand taels to the Liu family? I heard they have enough silver to cover the whole Imperial City!"

The crowd now rustled with whispers about the merchant.

But then, another man came out and said, "excuse me, but my young master wanted all of these chicken wings!"

Gasp!

The whole crowd drew in a sharp breath. They knew who this man was as well!

"That's the Senior Minister Wu's clerk!"

"Who'd dare to compete with the powerful Minister Wu?"

"That's right, it doesn't matter how much wealth the merchant Liu has, he's no match for Minister Wu's power!"

...…

"Wait!" shouted a squeaky voice among the crowd. "No one gets the chicken wings! They're all going to the palace!"

It was a fair-skinned man with an oddly gentle demeanor. Some people immediately recognized him as a eunuch—and a high-ranking one at that!

"Holy shit, I know him! He's the eunuch serving the Third Prince!"

"They say he's a cruel man who must not be provoked!"

"No shit. Don't you know how powerful the Third Prince is these days? Provoking this eunuch would be the same as provoking the prince himself!"

"Surely the senior minister wouldn't offend the Third Prince just for these chicken wings?"

"I never thought I'd see anything like this in my life! The rich and the powerful of the Imperial City are all fighting for some chicken wings!"

...…

The crowd was abuzz with murmurs and whispers. Judging by the current situation, the reputation of the Exploding Heavens Faction would surely spread across the Imperial City by the break of dawn.

Meanwhile, Xu Que remained as expressionless as ever as he stood at the stall with his chicken wings, paying no attention to the tense atmosphere in front of him.

Then the eunuch stomped up towards Xu Que and glared, saying, "what are you waiting for? Are you deaf? I told you that the chicken wings will all go to the palace!"

"Pah!"

Xu Que spat out a piece of bone and raised an eyebrow as he swept a glance up and down the eunuch's body. "You're not getting any fucking chicken wings!"

The night market went as silent as a graveyard.

Everyone was stupefied. Their jaws dropped, and their eyes bulged out.

What… what had this kid said?

He wasn't getting any fucking chicken wings?

Shit, had he lost his mind?

Didn't he know that crossing the Third Prince's servant was tantamount to suicide?

The woman who owned the stall was so scared that all the blood drained from her face. She had never expected Xu Que to be so brazen and disrespectful to the palace eunuch!

"You… you impudent fool, how dare you speak that way to me?" shouted the eunuch, pointing his finger at Xu Que. He was seething with rage, so much so that his whole body shook. Ever since he had become the Third Prince's personal servant, he had never been treated this way before and he wouldn't stand for it!

"Shut up, eunuch! How dare you raise your voice at me! Go to hell! If it weren't for this kid here, I would have slapped your bitchy face!" yelled Xu Que as he stared the eunuch up and down. He was only at the Golden Core Stage... in other words, completely unworthy of Xu Que's precious time at all!

"You...you..." The eunuch pointed at Xu Que in so much shock and anger that he seemed to be on the verge of blowing up. He couldn't even complete his sentence.

But Xu Que was getting impatient with him.

"What 'you'? Are you stupid? Didn't you hear what I said? I told you to queue up and that everyone can only buy a pair of chicken wings a day! Did you think that just because you've got a little bit of money you could just step over everyone else?"

"Y-you…" The eunuch flapped his flowy sleeves in fury and yelled, "fine! Just you wait, I'll teach you a harsh lesson for daring to cause such a ruckus in the Imperial City!"

"I'll wait! What's so great about this Imperial City anyway? We at the Exploding Heavens Faction can easily blow you up in no time! If you don't believe me then just ask around, you'll see what the Fire Country has become thanks to our faction!" sneered Xu Que, completely unperturbed by the eunuch's threat.

He couldn't wait for the incident in Fire Country to finally spread to the ears of these people in Metal Nation. Once that happened, he could easily use the Exploding Heavens Faction's reputation to act tough any time!

Unfortunately, due to the vast distance separating the two nations and their hostile relationship, news from Fire Country rarely traveled to Metal Nation. It would probably take another month or two before anyone here got wind of the incident in Fire Country.

"Humph!" The eunuch harrumphed pompously and left the scene with a scowl on his face.

Then the crowd fell into silence for a few moments and just stared at Xu Que. They thought he'd be dead meat soon for sure!

The shouting match he had had with the eunuch was definitely going to land him into hot water! Offending the eunuch was just as bad as offending the entire royal family after all!

Still, that didn't stop him from conducting his business! The moment the eunuch left, the senior minister's clerk and the wealthy Liu family's servant rushed up and ordered the chicken wings from Xu Que.

A hundred taels a pair to them was nothing. What was most important was that they'd completed their masters' commands.

"Give me a pair of chicken wings!"

"I want a pair as well!"

"So do we!"

By that point there was a long line in front of the stall!

Xu Que was insistent on his 'hunger marketing' strategy where he'd reduce the production and only sell one pair of chicken wings to each customer so that the demand would shoot up and he'd be able to sell them at a sky-high price. This way he could easily put a spotlight on the reputation of the Exploding Heavens Faction!

Some people were smart to get around Xu Que's rule, though. They paid some common folk to get in line for them so they could get more chicken wings!

Xu Que couldn't be bothered about it, though, now that his Acting Tough Points were shooting up steadily.

"Don't worry, Ma'am," said Xu Que. "I'll be guarding the situation here so no one will dare to cause you any problems! You go on and keep grilling these chicken wings here, after a few days you'll have enough money for the rest of your life so you can just stay home raising your kids!"

Xu Que then took all the spices bottles and sauces and replaced them in his storage in the system. He pulled out a stool and sat beside the stall, wearing a cool and intimidating expression befitting a man who would be 'guarding the situation'!

The woman's face was still full of doubt and worry, but she nonetheless pulled her child close and started to grill the chicken wings the same way that she had seen Xu Que going about it.

Soon, they had sold more than ten pairs of chicken wings and made more than a thousand taels. The woman stared at the money incredulously and pinched herself to make sure that she wasn't dreaming.

Xu Que wasn't just going to take advantage of this hapless woman. He would guard the stall and make sure that she could make some money for as long as possible. In any case, she would make enough money soon enough to ensure a comfortable life for her and her child!

But soon afterwards, Xu Que's eyebrows furrowed as he noticed something wrong!

He was sure that the woman had grilled no less than thirty pairs of chicken wings so far and had only sold about fifteen or sixteen pairs, yet right now the grill was completely empty!

"Fuck, there's a thief!"

Xu Que immediately stood up and walked around the stall.

Sure enough, there was a dark shadowy figure hiding under the stall, gnawing on the chicken wings. As he looked more closely, he realised that it was none other than Buttface!

"Buttface! You shameless petty thief! Are you so heartless that you would even steal from a powerless woman? Pay up, you son of a bitch!"

Xu Que was now enraged and started to go after Buttface, demanding payment for the chicken wing.

Buttface didn't dare to expose his talking abilities in front of such a huge crowd, so all he did was bark "oww!" Then he turned and ran!

"Where do you think you're going, Buttface?"

Xu Que then chased Buttface around with an empty skewer in his hand.

The crowd watched as Xu Que chased a dog round and round the stall, perplexed by his strange reaction to a dog stealing his chicken wings.

So what if a stray dog stole your chicken wings? A normal person would just chase him away and leave it at that. Who in their right mind would demand the dog to pay up?

This kid was definitely insane!

Better not provoke him further…

...

Meanwhile, in an inn near the night market, the eunuch who had demanded the chicken wings from Xu Que earlier suddenly returned!

In front of the princes and princesses, his demeanor changed, and he was now playing the role of the poor, bullied character, aggrievedly wailing and complaining of how cruelly he'd been treated.

"Your royal highnesses, you should have seen how aggressive the man acted towards me. He pointed at my nose in front of everyone and declared that he would blow up the entire Imperial City! Then he refused to sell me any chicken wings, saying that they were a hundred taels a pair and that everyone could only buy one pair of chicken wings each!"

Bam!

The Third Prince banged his fist on the table and his face turned dark.

"What a brazen commoner! Does he think that he's the most powerful man in this city? This behavior is unacceptable!"

"It sounds like there's more to it than meets the eye. Could he be deliberately causing a scene?" asked another prince with furrowed brows.

The eunuch knelt down and hurriedly explained, "I did tell him that these chicken wings were going to be served to the princes and princesses, but that man claimed he didn't care because he was a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction!"

"Exploding Heavens Faction?" The princes and princesses frowned. They had never heard of such a faction before!

Only the Seventh Princess turned thoughtful.

"Exploding Heavens Faction…" murmured the princess. "Hmm… the name rings a bell!"

chapters.title: Chapter 324: We’Ll All Go Together
chapters.body:
Chapter 324: We’Ll All Go Together

Chapter 324: We’ll All Go Together

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"What?"

In the private dining room, the chatter of the princes paused in an instant and they instantly looked towards the Seventh Princess. They were all stunned!

The Seventh Princess wore a faint smile. "A young lady from Spirit Treasures Pavilion happens to be a friend of mine. She told me that something bad happened today at the Trial of the Sword Catacomb. Even if I say nothing about this, you'll certainly receive news tomorrow as well!"

"Something bad happened at the Sword Catacomb? What was it?" The princes were bewildered.

Although the Trial of the Sword Catacomb was only a small competition, it was still valued highly by the various clans and factions that would send their Infant Transformation Stage elders there. How could something bad have happened?

"I heard that a young man by the name of Takumi Fujiwara, who proclaimed himself to be from the Exploding Heavens Faction disturbed the trial all by himself. His real name is Xu Que. He killed Jade Sword Sect's Legendary Swordsman, Ye Chang Feng, and all of his guardians. Many people died by his hand!"

"What? How is that possible?"

Several princes stood up suddenly in shock. Their eyes were wide with disbelief.

Ye Chang Feng, the Legendary Swordsman of Jade Sword Sect…

To them, this name was not unfamiliar. One of the princes even enjoyed a good friendship with Ye Chang Feng, and knew how strong Ye Chang Feng was!

Moreover, Ye Chang Feng held an extremely high status in Jade Sword Sect… how could he have gotten killed?

"This doesn't stop here!"

The Seventh Princess paused for a while before continuing. "After this person left the Sword Catacomb, he drove a divine chariot that has never been seen before. It could transform into a steel giant that massacred many cultivators from various clans and factions. Even the Sixth elder from Jade Sword Sect died by his hand with a single hit of his cannon beam!"

Gasp!

The princes inhaled a mouthful of cold air. They were so shocked that they were speechless!

The elder from Jade Sword Sect had been a Level Four Infant Transformation Stage cultivator. He had very strong sword skills and his attacks were ferocious. He was such a strong and skilled master—yet he had died by the hand of a nobody?

"Seventh Sister, this Xu Que from Exploding Heavens Faction… is he actually at the stage of Infant Transformation?" asked the puzzled Third Prince, whose brows were furrowed. "But this is not right, just now you said that he is a young man, right?"

The Seventh Princess shook her head. "Xu Que is at Level Nine of the Original Infant Stage! When his divine chariot transformed into a steel giant, his abilities must have increased many times over. After he dealt a critical blow to the Sixth elder, his dog rushed up to the elder and with a kick, the elder died!"

"Ah?"

The princes were now dumbfounded.

A dog?

Kicked an elder of the Jade Sword Sect to death?

This… how is that possible?

"This is absolutely true," continued the princess, looking grim. "That young man is extraordinary, and so is his divine chariot. Even the esteemed Spirit Treasures Pavilion felt that it was no simple thing!"

The Third Prince furrowed his brows again. "We must not let this matter be known to our Second Brother and Eighth Brother. No, they will know very soon anyway. But we need to strike first!"

"Yes, if the one who is grilling the chicken wings is Xu Que from Exploding Heavens Faction, we need to get him on our side before they do!" agreed the Seventh Princess with an emphatic nod.

But as soon as she said this, the expressions of the princes became very strange!

"Seventh Sister, you're saying… to get Xu Que on our side?" The puzzled Third Prince asked.

The other princes were also confused. "Why do you want to please him and get him on our side? You can't do this!"

"Exactly! Seventh Sister, if what you said is true, he killed the Legendary Swordsman and an elder of the Jade Sword Sect. If we rope him into our side, we'll be enemies with the Jade Sword Sect!"

"Not only that, but you just said that he killed a lot of other people there as well. If he becomes a part of our team, that will be equivalent to directly opposing many major clans and factions! This will be extremely unfavourable for Third Brother who is fighting for the position of the Crown Prince."

"My elder brothers are right!"

The Seventh Princess shook her head. "Yes, he has offended so many people," she said softly, wearing a slight smile, "his enemies are everywhere and he might be cornered soon! But have you ever wondered why he dared to come to the Imperial City at this point in time? Moreover, he did it so ostentatiously. Clearly, he's not afraid of being hunted!"

The princess's words startled the princes!

"Generally in this kind of situation," the Seventh Princess continued, "there are only two possibilities! Either that man is a madman or… he has full grasp of the situation, possesses absolute confidence, and has powerful backing!"

The princes fell into silence and pondered the princess's words.

"Seventh Sister, continue!" said the Third Prince earnestly.

"Third Brother, I feel that you should really use this opportunity to rope in this man! With our current situation, instead of competing with the other brothers for the support of Jade Sword Sect and the rest of the major clans and factions, why not just… go all out!"

Upon hearing that, all of the princes looked grim and solemn!

The princes knew their seventh sister very well; she was both intelligent and bold.

But they hadn't expected her to be bold to this extent. Simply because of the rumours, she wanted to place all her bets on an unknown young man who had countless enemies!

Go all out?

From the Third Prince's perspectie, his situation was not that desperate.

"Seventh sister, your idea is a bit extreme!" The Third Prince shook his head. "If we place the wrong bet, we'll suffer a complete defeat! Besides… I really can't think of any other sect, with the exception of Sky Incense Valley and Enlightenment Sect, which has an influence stronger than Jade Sword Sect!"

"Third brother, ain't no mountain high enough, ain't no valley low enough. Over these years of travelling around, I've learnt that there's always someone better out there! Maybe Jade Sword Sect is very strong in the five nations, but it might only be a small sect overseas!"

"Do you mean… Xu Que might have come from overseas?"

"I'm not sure." The Seventh Princess shook her head slightly, her eyes flashing. Her eyes seemed to be affixed on something out the window.

The rest of the princes remained silent as well. Only the eunuch, who was kneeling on the floor, broke out in a cold sweat!

From the moment the Seventh Princess had talked about what Xu Que from the Exploding Heavens Faction had done, he felt petrified with fear!

That fellow is actually that strong? So that means that I could have died just now?

Thinking back to what Xu Que said earlier, the eunuch couldn't help but feel frightened. Had it not been for the child who was present, he really might have been dead right now. He was now full of gratitude to the child!

He was a dignified Imperial eunuch of the Imperial Palace yet he had been spared by Xu Que because of the child. That really felt strange… but now that he was thinking back to the incident, he trembled with fear.

The Third Prince suddenly stood up and spoke. "How about this? We'll all go together to meet Xu Que of the Exploding Heavens Faction and find out about his origins! Instead of speculating here, why not… go personally to find out for ourselves!"

"Ah?"

The eunuch shivered when he heard that. His face was ashen and he felt like wetting himself from fright!

What … what should I do?

How can the royal princes and princess go to such lengths?

Moreover, if that young man really is Xu Que of the Exploding Heavens Faction… then as the Princess has said, he is a ruthless man. Just now I scolded that Xu Que, so will I be seeking my own death if I go back there again?

This … this is too dangerous!

"Xiao Li Zi, why are you so frightened? Hurry, get up and lead the way for us!"

chapters.title: Chapter 325: You Have Found The Wrong Person!
chapters.body:
Chapter 325: You Have Found The Wrong Person!

Chapter 325: You Have Found the Wrong Person!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Moonlight spread across the floor like water.

If things was under normal circumstances, the night market would have ended around now. However, the streets were still filled with people.

Xu Que's barbecue stall was still emitting white smoke, and the charcoal smell of barbecued chicken wings was wafting across the street.

Many couldn't afford the wings but it was enough to smell them—that was an enjoyment too.

However, there was still a long queue to buy the wings. After all, in a place like the Imperial City, there was not a lack of rich people.

Xu Que left the stall in the charge of the woman, who was becoming more familiar with the process. After 2 hours, she had managed to sell over 50 sets of wings, and had taken in almost 5000 taels.

Xu Que was still going after Buttface for his debt. He was pinned to the ground by Xu Que many times when he ran too slowly. Getting poked by the barbecue stick left him yelping in pain.

The crowd couldn't stand the sight. Wasn't it just a dog? Wasn't it just stealing some wings? This was too cruel!

However, slowly, they started suspecting something too!

How can this dog withstand all these pokes?

After being pierced so many times, it hasn't been injured at all?

"Oww!"

At this point, Xu Que had caught up with Buttface again, his stick accurately… oh wait, accidentally piercing Buttface's butthole.

Buttface shrieked in pain. He was really hurt this time and he was pissed!

"Damn it, you little brat, this deity will not take this lying down!"

Buttface couldn't control himself any longer and he turned around and lashed out in anger, charging straight towards Xu Que.

Everyone was shocked!

This dog can talk?

Oh my God, It is a demonic beast. No wonder it was alright despite so many strikes!

In a moment, many of them lost all sympathy for Buttface. Some of them even started getting angry.

Evidently, humans were still incredibly prejudiced towards demonic beasts.

Priests regularly went out to hunt for them and demonic beasts regularly hunted humans for food. Between the two of them, it was hard to say who was right and who was wrong; however, it was hard for them to co-exist.

"Buttface, you really are daring! You dare to speak now? I poked you as a sacrifice for the humans. If you do not want to die then give me the money for the wings!"

Xu Que continued chasing. He wasn't afraid of Buttface causing any trouble—after all, this dog was very hard to beat to death!

"Brat, you ingrate, isn't it just a few chicken wings? I'll make some for you some other day! But you poked my delicate spot—this is a huge violation and I will fight to the death with you!"

Buttface was incredibly angry as Xu Que had used the barbecue stick to poke his sensitive area.

"Come, I want to fight to the death with you too. However, you will need to defeat the Sword Spirit first. If not, I'm afraid that if I take action, you will die a terrible death!" Xu Que laughed.

In actual fact, he really wanted to try and see if Buttface would be able to withstand his Buddha's Fiery Lotus!

However, upon hearing the name 'Sword Spirit', Buttface stopped immediately. He didn't want to lose face in front of everyone though, and hence stuck his chest out and said, "enough, I will not hold it against you seeing that you are young and insolent! If you make a dozen more wings, I will let this matter go!"

"Uh-uh! You only give up when you know you are about to lose, and here you are still acting all tough in front of me. And yeah, sure, sure, sure, there are no more chicken wings, but do you want some barbecued dog meat?"

"Oww…" Buttface was angered again, ready to pounce on Xu Que.

However, right at this moment, there was a commotion amongst the crowd.

What followed was a sharp piercing noise. "The Third Prince, Fourth Prince, Fifth Prince, Sixth Prince and Seventh Princess are here!"

"Wah!"

The crowd broke out in a frenzy. Everyone retreated two steps to open a way through the crowd and started dropping to their knees. Solemnity fell over the area!

Even the woman barbecuing the chicken wings in front of the stall grabbed her child and dropped to her knees, lowering her head.

Evidently, these commoners had an inborn fear towards the might of the royal family.

Hearing that so many people from the imperial family were arriving, everyone had naturally dropped to their knees in fear, not daring to even lift their heads. If they offended the royals, it would be an offence punishable by death.

Xu Que had seen such sights before and thus didn't kneel. Only he and Buttface remained standing.

However, he was surprised too that the eunuch didn't find it tiring to announce the arrival of all four princes and the princess!

His gaze swept across the area as he saw four elegant-looking men and a young woman with a thin veil over her face gathering at the center of the main road. They were walking over.

They walked incredibly slowly but had an intimidating aura to them. They each seemed high and mighty, and shone in their opulence like the stars holding up the moon.

Another eunuch was making way for them—Xiao Li Zi, the one who had argued with Xu Que before.

At this moment, he didn't dare to look at Xu Que, lowering his head and trying to hide his face. He was afraid that Xu Que would recognize him.

"Hey you, the one without a dick, have you really called your masters over? Do you all want to fight me one-on-one or all at once?"

Xu Que stared at the eunuch and laughed.

Everyone shuddered, horrified.

Was this young man not afraid of death?

The princes and the princess were here yet he was still acting this arrogant?

Moreover… saying something like 'no dick'… he was too brazen!

But Xu Que was acting tough successfully, as his acting tough points were going up again.

He ignored the notifications, his gaze still on the people from the imperial family who were walking towards him. He wore a faint smile on his face as he coolly looked on.

He was acting tough!

Naturally he had to act as if he was the one on top. If he didn't, how would he be able to call himself a good lad from the Exploding Heavens Faction?

Xiao Li Zi didn't dare talk back to Xu Que. Even with the Third Prince around, he didn't dare look up. After all, what had happened with Xu Que had left him feeling extremely intimidated!

Ignoring everything else, just the fact that he had killed the Legendary Swordsman from the Jade Sword Sect and the other guardians meant that his power was so great that he would be able to kill a small eunuch like him hundreds of times within seconds.

However, a frown appeared on the Third Prince's face. He furrowed his brows slightly. Evidently, he was not taking a liking to this 'crazy' Xu Que!

As the favorite son of the royal family, he had grown up feeling superior to all others. He couldn't stand such crazy geniuses!

Seeing such craziness from Xu Que, he was unhappy too. However, it wouldn't be smart for him to act up now.

At this point, a streak of hatred flashed past the face of another prince. "You are Xu Que from the Exploding Heavens Faction?" he asked Xu Que impatiently.

Xu Que laughed. He knew… the rare opportunity to act tough had come again.

He smacked his sleeve and gave a dry cough. Wearing a wry smile, he walked forward with his hands pressed to his chest and said, "I am Ma Yun from the Exploding Heavens Faction. I am starting a business now, preparing to dabble in Taobao. You have found the wrong person!"

chapters.title: Chapter 326: If It Were Me, I Wouldn’T Tolerate This
chapters.body:
Chapter 326: If It Were Me, I Wouldn’T Tolerate This

Chapter 326: If It Were Me, I Wouldn’t Tolerate This

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Ma Yun of Exploding Heavens Faction?

The crowd was very confused!

However, a figure sprang out of nowhere, raising a fore leg and shouting, "bah, don't believe this boy. This deity can testify that this boy is Xu Que of Exploding Heavens Faction. He also has used the fake name of Takumi Fujiwara, self-proclaimed Mount Akina Speed Star, nickname Old Driver!"

Buttface had betrayed Xu Que without hesitation.

Xu Que's mouth twitched. Fucking evil dog, what a cheapskate, he thought. I'm going to teach him a lesson later!

The most intolerable thing in this world was disrupting others from acting tough.

This was a moment fraught with possibilities for acting tough, yet Buttface had interrupted in such an uncouth manner…

"Buttface, just you wait," Xu Que said in a vindictive manner. He stared coolly at Buttface.

Buttface was totally unaffected. He stood on his two hind legs, straight and steadfast. "You should quickly arrest him," continued Buttface. "This boy is crazy. He killed many people at the Sword Catacomb. This deity couldn't tolerate that as well, and wanted to arrest him too."

The Third Prince did not bother himself with Buttface's words. Instead, he looked slightly surprised. He stared at the husky and asked, "The Sixth Elder of Jade Sword Sect was killed by you?"

"Nonsense, this deity is the embodiment of righteousness and would never kill!" Buttface immediately replied. His voice was loud and forceful!

Xu Que was instantly amused. This dog is f*cking brazen! he thought.

It was lucky that Xu Que was now in Metal Nation. If he were in Fire Country and people had heard what he was thinking, they would definitely be vomiting out approximately three litres of blood. After vomiting out the blood, they would then say, "brother, you are more brazen than he is!"

...

"This prince has come here today, but not because of the incident at the Sword Catacomb!" The Third Prince shook his head slightly and looked at Xu Que. "You are Xu Que of Exploding Heavens Faction? Come with me, we need to discuss something with you!"

"What the f*ck, can't you see that I'm tending to my business?"

Xu Que gave him a dressing down!

What the hell?

A mere prince also has the nerve to show off in front of the Act Tough King?

...

Obviously, Xu Que felt displeased with the Third Prince's high and mighty attitude!

He felt most irritated with those princes who had been born with acting tough qualities. They relied on their distinguished statuses. When they looked at people, others regarded them with eyes that were always upward-looking.

Don't just go ordering people around and expecting them to follow your orders!

As a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction, I'm not someone at your beck and call, alright?

...

The Seventh Princess, who was standing behind the princes, shook her head slightly. She knew that the Third Prince had failed in his attempt to get Xu Que to join their side.

Third Brother did not adopt a modest attitude!

She sighed in her heart and felt disappointed!

Her intuition told her that this young man called Xu Que was absolutely extraordinary!

Xu Que's swearing instantly shocked everyone. Their faces were aghast and filled with panic.

Insulting the Third Prince in public?

That offence could warrant the death penalty!

"You … you dare to scold a prince?" The Third Prince's expression was slightly perturbed, followed by a sudden surge of anger.

The other princes were also staring at Xu Que coldly.

"So what if I scolded you? Count yourself lucky that I didn't beat you up. I'm selling my chicken wings nicely and you have to come here to show off? I can't do my business. If I don't earn 10,000 taels tonight, I'm going to twist your head off and play football with it!"

Xu Que was very arrogant. It was evident that he was not afraid of trouble!

In fact, with his present strength and capability, there was no one in the five nations who could do anything to him!

Killer God's Single Stroke, Buddha's Fiery Lotus plus Killer Skill Book… just these methods alone would be enough to kill any Infant Transformation Stage cultivator. Even if a Level One or Level Two Void Training Stage cultivator came for him, he could put up a fight!

So Xu Que was completely unafraid and could act tough without worry!

He could act tough by being wild, arrogant and cool without qualms!

The only thing left, perhaps, was to explode the heavens!

...

Because of Xu Que's air of arrogance, the princes were taken aback.

It was clear that they were true princes of the Metal Nation, and yet Xu Que dared to treat them so shabbily. Only two types of people would dare to treat them this way—the mentally ill or people who had extraordinary origins and great backing!

However, the princes were not sure which category Xu Que would fall under!

The surrounding commoners kneeled on the ground. They dared not make a sound, so the atmosphere was eerily silent.

...

"The Second Prince has arrived!"

Just then, another high-pitched yell was heard coming from the back of the crowd.

There was some commotion in the crowd and a pathway appeared as the crowd made way for the Second Prince!

A slightly older, rather plump man appeared, walking in large strides. A eunuch trailed closely behind him together with more than ten guards!

The crowd trembled at his appearance!

Subconsciously, everyone's heads bowed lower, and their bodies sank closer to the ground!

Obviously, the people were even more fearful of this title—The Second Prince!

The Third Prince, Seventh Princess and the rest of the other princes looked somber as they furrowed their eyebrows.

In comparison, when the slightly plump Second Prince came over, he wore a bright smile. He seemed very approachable and charmingly naïve, as if inviting people to let down their guards before him.

However, his smile was too contrived for Xu Que, who thought that it had been expertly crafted.

In his opinion, this kind of smile totally fit the saying 'hide a dagger behind a smile'!

He saw the way the Second Prince glanced towards the Third Prince and the rest of his group. His eyes flashed with a chilling gleam that was sharp and merciless.

In general, one should never get too close to such people, for they were certainly good at scheming.

"Wow, people from the royal family are all scheming bitches!" Xu Que muttered under his breath!

Buttface had sharp ears. When he heard Xu Que's muttering, he immediately told the princes. "Your royal highnesses, this boy is saying that all of you have dirty minds, are stupid and look like pigs!"

Xu Que mouth twitched heavily. Fucking cheapskate!

Swish!

Immediately he pulled out a sword and hacked at Buttface!

"Owww!"

Buttface could not evade in time and was hit by the sword on the head. He was howling very loudly, and scurried around holding his head.

However, this incident did not arouse the attention of the Second Prince.

Wearing his usual smile, as if he had never even heard what Buttface had said earlier, he looked directly towards the Third Prince and the rest of his group. "My brothers and my sister, are you here because of the chicken wings? Can you let your elder brother try it first?"

The Third Prince's brows furrowed, then he squeezed out a fake smile and said, "of course …"

Cough, cough!

Just as the Third Prince wanted to nod his head and agree, sounds of coughing interrupted him.

Afterwards, Xu Que's faint but faraway voice was heard.

"It's not that I want to create trouble, but trying to jump the queue with just a sentence? If it were me, I wouldn't tolerate this. If you can, doesn't that mean you're weak?"

chapters.title: Chapter 327: Get Lost If You’Re Not Buying
chapters.body:
Chapter 327: Get Lost If You’Re Not Buying

Chapter 327: Get Lost If You’re Not Buying

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que's words left everyone stunned!

Even the Second Prince and Third Prince looked towards him wearing grim expressions on their faces.

You're the one creating trouble! You accused the prince of being weak!

Damn it, you are obviously stirring sh*t!

It was obvious that such words were meant to drive a wedge between them.

However, in actual fact, Xu Que didn't need to say anything for everyone to be able to tell that the Second Prince, Third Prince and the rest of the family didn't have the best of relationships between them. The Second Prince and Third Prince were both fighting to be the crown prince!

However, on the outside, it wouldn't do them any good to fall out publicly.

Because of Xu Que's words though, their differences had been made obvious!

Everyone could see it for themselves. The Third Prince had arrived first and the Second Prince had arrived later, smiling and saying that he had come for the chicken wings and asking to try them first.

Usually, a younger brother giving way to his older brother would not be the marker of any problem—indeed, it was a virtue!

However, their identities and statuses were anything but normal. As they were both fighting for the crown prince position, they had a complex relationship!

Xu Que's words had highlighted the Third Prince's cowardice, making a tear in their relationship!

Under the gaze of the crowd, if the Third Prince were to give way to his brother again, it would be akin to him showing weakness. It would give the commoners the incorrect impression that he was afraid of the Second Prince. With news of current events spreading quickly, it would not bode well for his prospects for seeking the crown prince position in future!

The princes were smart people too. They had immediately connected everything together and were now staring angrily at Xu Que. The smile on the Second Prince's face had faded a little. He stared intensely at Xu Que, not saying a word.

"Second Prince, actually I haven't had dinner either and I was just about to try this chicken wing. How about we try it together when the woman is done barbecuing them?"

The Third Prince was indeed someone worthy of being the crown prince, as he had calmly managed to propose a solution.

The two of them eating together would leave no room for gossip or rumors!

The Second Prince rubbed his belly as he nodded and laughed, about to agree.

However at that moment, Xu Que said, "Second Prince, I'm not trying to cause any trouble but your younger brother is asking you to eat with him. That means he doesn't even have the spirit of giving. He is basically disrespecting his elder, which is too much! If this were me, I wouldn't be able to let this slide!"

Everyone was silent.

No one dared to look at what was unfolding. Someone was close to fainting.

Brother, you really are here to cause trouble!

You're obviously putting both of them in tight spots, yet you dare to say that you're not stirring trouble?

If you just keep quiet, everything will be fine!

"Shameless! This deity has never seen such a shameless person!"

Buttface's face was filled with disdain. He moved back a few steps, almost as if he couldn't bear standing beside Xu Que!

Xu Que was instantly gladdened. He shook his head and said, "Buttface, you're the only shameless one here! If you don't believe me, just go ask around. Everyone knows that I, Xu Que from the Exploding Heavens Faction, am a gentleman! Lady, am I right?"

Xu Que looked towards the lady barbecuing as he let out an innocent smile!

The lady was seized with terror. Her face instantly turned a deep shade of red. She looked down and as softly as she could, whispered, "yes."

One had to admit that Xu Que's handsome and tender face was filled with deception. Together with his bonus charisma points, a simple smile was enough to be a killer grin for any female!

Be it an old lady in her eighties or even a young kid under the age of three, Xu Que would be able to captivate all of them!

Buttface looked at the side as he opened his mouth and snapped, "young lad, you really are shameless, how dare you use such tricks!"

"If you're not willing to accept them, then fight me one-on-one!"

Xu Que looked on smugly. Someone who counted on his face to survive was this powerful…

Buttface waved his paws. "I will not fight with someone like you!"

…

At this point, everyone's faces, including those of the Second and Third Prince, had gone pale!

A few of them shot daggers from their eyes, staring coldly at Xu Que. It was as if a murderous aura was forming around them!

Xu Que was incredibly unperturbed. He walked over to the barbecue rack and started chewing on a wing that he picked up.

The expression that he wore while he was eating showed that he didn't care about anyone!

Firstly, slowly savoring each taste in his mouth, he started biting the strands of meat from within the gaps in the bone. Finally, he started gnawing on the wing loudly, salivating occasionally…

This kind of calm composure drew the respect of many!

"Under these circumstances, you're still able to eat a chicken wing so calmly. You are good!"

"This kid must have some background!"

"Bullsh*t, in actual fact, this fellow must be terrified!" Buttface chimed in.

Everyone took a step back upon seeing the husky. They didn't want to get too close to a demonic beast!

Buttface was furious, staring murderously at the crowd: "Hmph, you're all a bunch of weaklings, retreating from my prowess!"

"Enough, Buttface, stop being so shameless. Come have some chicken wing bones, your favorite! Come and gnaw on them!" Xu Que threw a few chicken bones towards him, gesturing at Buttface as if he was teasing a dog.

"Oww!"

Buttface rushed over and shouted, "this deity is a wolf, I only eat meat!"

Xu Que thought he wanted to battle and grinned. He prepared to take out his sword and call upon the Sword Spirit. This would not only teach Buttface a lesson but impress the crowd of royals!

However, Buttface ended up pouncing onto the barbecue rack. With a flick of his tongue, he snatched up a few chicken wings. Grabbing them in his claws, he started chewing on them.

Xu Que's lips twitched as he shook his head, speechless.

Everyone was sweating. They gave off looks of contempt for Buttface's actions!

However, this drama didn't change the present atmosphere.

The few royals had remained silent and had still been staring coldly at Xu Que the whole time.

Xu Que was a little pissed off. He calmly scanned them and said coldly, "are you all still buying the wings? If you are, then queue up. If you are not, then scram and stop getting in the way of my business!"

"Outrageous!" the old eunuch beside the Second Prince shouted angrily, glaring furiously at Xu Que.

On the other hand, the eunuch beside the Third Prince trembled but immediately started gloating inwardly at the situation. He knew that someone else would shield him from Xu Que this time…

This young lad was so ruthless that offending him would really be asking to die!

Xu Que looked lazily at the eunuch and said calmly, "if you have no dick, then shut up! However, our Exploding Heavens Faction have indeed rolled out a new technique recently—organ transplants. There are many varieties! If you cannot afford the expensive one, we can do the cheap one. If we can't do the human one, we can change to a beast's one. Donkeys, dogs… do you need to take a look at our samples? Come, Buttface, show them your dog balls!"

"Damn it, you bastard, you're asking for it!" Buttface exploded in anger.

The old eunuch started trembling with rage after hearing Xu Que's words. He pointed at Xu Que, a murderous aura filling the air.

chapters.title: Chapter 328: You Want To Test Me?
chapters.body:
Chapter 328: You Want To Test Me?

Chapter 328: You Want To Test Me?

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

The people at the scene were scared silly by Xu Que's words!

What do you mean by 'if you can't afford the expensive one, we can do the cheap one'?

And 'if we can't do the human one, we can change to a beast's one'?

Damn, why are such things coming out of this kid's mouth so easily? He actually suggested the eunuch get a transplant from the organs of a donkey or dog, won't that then make the eunuch a beast man?

This is too disgusting and too weird!

...

Many people took their hats off to Xu Que for his creativity!

However, despite the situation, the Second Prince was still smiling. With a gentle wave of his hand; he motioned to the old eunuch not to act rashly.

He looked at Xu Que and shook his head. "All you know is how to grill some chicken wings, yet you remain so arrogant about it. This is called conceit! Not only that, but you deliberately raised the prices extremely high to create sensationalism. In turn, the commoners are unable to buy them. This is called injustice! People like you are not welcome to stay in the Imperial City!"

Woah? You're using morals and ethics to deal with me?

Xu Que sneered at the slightly plump Second Prince and said, "isn't this just sour grapes? Didn't you just come over here happily to buy chicken wings? Now you're angry because you don't get to eat it, right? Aiya, come, come, come, I'll give you some!"

As Xu Que said so, he threw over the chicken bones that he was holding.

He then threw over another bone, speaking with a cheerful voice. "This one has more meat than the other. Is it enough, you mongrel? If not… I'll get you more? Look at you, you have a little brother but you're looking a little more like the guy beside you, tsk, tsk, tsk…"

Gasp!

The crowd inhaled a mouthful of cold air!

This was a way of suggesting that the Second Prince was a dog as well as a eunuch. Too daring!

Moreover, even though he wasn't using any curse words and was only speaking with a rude tone, it made people feel like vomiting blood until they died.

Although the Second Prince was not someone who could be angered easily, he couldn't help being angry this time. The flames of fury in his eyes burned wildly. Nevertheless, he didn't want to show his anger before his people.

He took a deep breath to control his anger. With a sneer, he said, "this prince just wants to help the mother and son, so it's not all about your chicken wings. The food made from this kind of raw material won't taste nice anyway. Any royal chef from the palace would be able to make a dish better than yours. What makes you so conceited?"

"Sigh…"

Xu Que puffed a sigh and looked up at a 45 degree angle to the night sky. His facial expression was that of an unparalleled master who was isolated due to his sheer skill. "The world laughs at my madness, I laugh at them for not being able to know why! Do I really have to expose my true identity? Yes, actually, I'm the… God of Cookery!"

God of Cookery?

The crowd suddenly froze!

But why had they never heard of this title before?

The Second Prince was slightly startled as well. He looked at Xu Que questioningly before an idea came to mind. "God of Cookery, right?" said the prince with a cold smile. "Then this prince wants to test you. If you're able to complete my request, this prince will promise you one thing. If you fail, you'll kneel down and kowtow to this prince to apologise. You'll also roast chicken wings for the commoners for free for the next three years, how's that?"

"Oh? You'll promise me one thing? Are you sure?"

Xu Que's lips curled upwards. You're asking for trouble!

You dare to test me? There's nothing in the world that can make this Act Tough King back off!

Don't you fucking know that I have a System!

Oh yes! You really don't know!

Okay then, this Act Tough King will act tough properly this time so you'll know why things are the way they are.

One has to be fast in acting tough and one's posture must be suave.

If the opportunity for acting tough comes knocking, one need to be serious about acting tough and deliver a slap to the face of the challenger. Don't hesitate, act tough valiantly… no need for explanations!

"The words spoken by me, the prince, cannot be taken back. Everyone here can be the witnesses! But… don't be happy just yet, when you're really able to solve the problem, then you'll be able to talk about the condition!" The Second Prince laughed teasingly, as if victory was within his grasp!

"Fine, what is your request!"

Xu Que was excited. This was a great opportunity to act tough!

...

On the other hand, the Third Prince and his group were furrowing their brows and seemed grim.

"Looks like this young man is going to lose face!" a prince whispered.

"Second Brother's always been sly and scheming. Since he is the one who dared to set up this wager, he must be very confident!" Another prince nodded his head slightly.

They knew their Second Brother very well. He possessed wisdom and had means, which was rather fearsome.

"This boy is so impulsive that he has fallen into Second Brother's trap," the Third Prince said, shaking his head. "Even if this person is really strong, he won't be of great use!"

Only the Seventh Princess remained silent. She glanced at Xu Que and seemed to be thinking about something!

On Xu Que's face, she saw great confidence.

At this time, the Second Prince stepped out. His face had regained his usual smile. He looked at Xu Que as if he was really confident and said in a joking manner, "since you self-proclaim to be the God of Cookery, you must be good at cooking. So this prince will test your culinary skills!"

"Oh, continue, I'm all ears!"

Xu Que was calm and relaxed. Test my culinary skills?

Is this a joke? This Act Tough King is the top student at New East Cuisine!

What kind of cuisine has not been seen in my great country?

Do you think I'm afraid of you, little boy?

If the topic is food, no matter what kind of tricks you play, you're not going to escape the clutches of the Act Tough King!

"Haha, then listen well," said the Second Prince loudly. "This prince will give you a time limit. By the time a stick of incense burns down, you must make a foul-smelling but tasty dish. Can you do it?" The Second Prince's expression became even more mocking!

Everyone was shocked by that!

Foul-smelling and tasty?

How is that possible?

Isn't that a complete contradiction?

How can smelly food be tasty?

Making two conflicting flavors blend into a dish… isn't this just the prince trying to make things difficult for the young man?

Everyone's expressions were bitter and sympathetic towards Xu Que after they heard the Second Prince's request.

As for the Third Prince and his siblings, they were not surprised. They already knew that the request by the Second Prince would no doubt be a trap. The request was so tricky… perhaps no one would be able to complete it.

"Sure enough, the boy is defeated directly!"

"Second brother's request is really unassailable. That's our second brother!"

The Third Prince and his group were shaking their heads, sighing. The Second Prince had always been their formidable enemy, and with this incident, they would have to focus more energy and attention on him.

The Seventh Princess gave a slight frown, shaking her head slightly and sighing.

She had confidence in Xu Que. But when she heard the request, she was disappointed as she felt that Xu Que would be unable to win!

This was because there was no solution to this request!

The woman at the stall had a face full of anxiety. She looked towards Xu Que worriedly.

Buttface was gloating at the plight of Xu Que. He held his belly and cackled loudly. "Hahaha, boy, you're going to lose face this time! You deserve it! Hahaha!"

Whack!

"Shut your dog mouth!"

Xu Que smacked Buttface's mouth and held his jaws shut, not letting him speak another word.

Immediately, he glanced towards the Second Prince and a sneer formed on his face.

"A foul-smelling and tasty dish? Heh, I really admire your IQ! Come, come, come, Uncle Pixy's lesson is starting now. Today I'm going to show all of you what is both smelly and delicious!"

With a wave of his hand, he called out the system interface and shouted in his head, Come out, my stinky tofu!

chapters.title: Chapter 329: This Guy Must Be Crazy!
chapters.body:
Chapter 329: This Guy Must Be Crazy!

Chapter 329: This Guy Must Be Crazy!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que summoned a huge pot from thin air and with a large clanging noise, placed it on the barbecue rack. He began by pouring peanut oil into it.

He didn't forget to add, "this oil is the oil used exclusively by the Exploding Heavens Faction. It doesn't have any added preservatives and has been created naturally. It is non-GMO and one bottle is as good as five."

Swish!

Under everyone's shocked eyes, he brought his fingers together and squeezed out a magic code. The Fire Element steam became flames and rapidly rose up under the pot.

Boom!

The flames quickly brought the temperature of the oil pot up as the oil started to sizzle, and gradually boiled!

Buttface was a little amazed as he said in shock, "lad, can you really create a smelly yet delicious dish? Young people can't brag, this is a bad habit!"
