Not only is he not bothering to help defend against the ancient armored puppets, but he is even going around and commenting on the work of the weapon forging masters! And saying that they are pathetic!

This is really infuriating!

The crowd even felt that they wanted to rush in to beat up Xu Que.

This guy is scum!

...

But soon, the crowd started to exclaim.

"Look! Master Du's second magical weapon is about to be completed!"

"He's so fast! They entered in less than six hours and their second magical weapon is about to be completed!"

"Looks like the Eldest Prince is going to secure first place this round!"

"Not necessarily. Look at the other princes, the speeds of their masters are increasing!"

"It's useless! The elite cultivator of the Eldest Prince's team is still leading by a puppet kill!"

"Indeed, this gap could prove to be difficult to catch up to!"

The crowd was busy giving their opinions. According to previous years, the first burial chamber was essentially the deciding round. Successfully taking the position of Crown Prince depended on being able to win this round.

Inside the burial chamber, the various masters were now at a critical time in their forging. They had taken several pills and finally, they managed to finish their second magical weapons.

With that, the various princes went up to the line of defense, using newly created magical weapons to battle against the puppets themselves.

The strength of the princes and their battle prowess were, without a doubt, extraordinary!

After about ten or so rounds, they managed to each take down an ancient armored puppet.

Both the people inside the burial chamber and the people in the crowd outside gave the princes a round of applause for their wonderful performances!

chapters.title: Chapter 367: Step Aside! Back Off! I’Ll Take Them On!
chapters.body:
Chapter 367: Step Aside! Back Off! I’Ll Take Them On!

Chapter 367: Step Aside! Back Off! I’ll Take Them On!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"The princes are so strong!"

"It is our country's blessing that the princes have such amazing power!"

"The Eldest Prince's skill art 'lashing the waves' is simply wonderful!"

"The Second Prince is not weak either, his skill art 'breaking through manifestations' totally destroyed the ancient armored puppet!"

"The Third Prince has the strongest power, look at his 'explosive hammer blast'!"

"The Eighth Prince should be the strongest. He's taking on two puppets at one time and has withstood three hits so far without shedding any blood!"

...

Many people scrambled to flatter the prince that they were supporting!

Booommm!

Suddenly, a deafening sound was heard that seemed to come from deeper inside the tombs. That sudden ruckus made everyone descend into silence!

Everyone stayed quiet. They were puzzled and looked at the passageway that led to the deeper tombs with uneasiness!

The noise had been very loud and it made a lot of people feel dismay and fear.

A magnificent aura could be felt from the depths of the tombs, followed by heavy, constant sounds of something knocking against the ground!

Stomp!

Stomp!

Stomp!

Every time the heavy sound was heard, it was as if a hammer was mercilessly dealing a blow to everyone's hearts.

Everyone was shocked; the several princes were appalled too. They quickly dealt a finishing blow to the puppets that they were engaging with and retreated to the back.

"What's that thing?"

"Could it be that new ancient armored puppets are coming out?"

"But it can't be. There has never been such an event in the previous contests!"

"This aura somehow doesn't feel right!"

"We are just dealing with the third wave of the ancient armored puppets. Come on, there shouldn't be anything new at this point?"

"Did someone accidentally activate a trap or something?"

Everyone was increasingly perplexed by the unforeseen situation.

Outside the Imperial Tombs, the Metal Emperor and the crowd were taken aback as well.

From the Heaven and Earth Mirror, they could clearly see and feel what was happening. They could also feel the reverberations of the sudden deafening sound and the mighty aura, as if they were also inside the burial chamber as well!

"This is bad, such aura, it's the golden puppet that appears every 100 years!" exclaimed the Metal Emperor who suddenly thought of something. He suddenly stood up with a flabbergasted expression. "Quick!" the Emperor shouted abruptly to the old eunuch. "End this contest and get them out of there!"

"Ah? Your Majesty, it's… it's too late now," the old eunuch replied in a terrified manner. "The restrictive enchantment has blocked all the entrances. Nothing can get inside now. We can only wait for them to come out!"

"This is abominable! The golden puppets only appear every 100 years. The last time they appeared was 30 years ago. Why did they appear again?"

The Empress Dowager inside her divine chariot spoke calmly, "do not worry, my son. The golden puppet moves slowly, so once they see them, they'll quickly retreat!"

...

The crowd started to create a commotion.

The golden puppet that the Emperor had spoken of… they had heard of it before.

That was the strongest obstacle in the Imperial Tombs and would only appear every 100 years!

The golden puppets were seven-star magical weapons. There were over a hundred of them and they were extremely sturdy. They were equivalent to Infant Transformation Stage cultivators.

The cultivators inside the burial chamber were all in the Original Infant stage. Even if they had their six-star magical weapons, they wouldn't stand a chance against the golden puppets!

"This is bad!"

"How did this happen?"

"Maybe something has happened to the restrictive enchantment and released the golden puppets?"

"Seems like this year's contest is going to end here!"

"The contest used to last for several days during the previous years. Looks like this year's contest won't even last for a day!"

"We have stronger contestants this year, and I thought they would proceed to the next round. Looks like our hopes have been dashed!"

"Ai, the Dragon Veins are being too well-protected! The forefathers of the Royal Family of Metal Nation were really strong!"

The crowd outside the Imperial Tombs shook their heads.

...

Inside the burial chamber, the group had not guessed that the commotion had been caused by the golden puppets. They stared at the tunnel watchfully as they continued to fend against the ancient armored puppets!

A short while later, they saw some golden rays coming from the tunnel.

Stomp!

Loud, uniform sounds were heard and the group suddenly saw several golden puppets moving in the tunnel.

Everyone stared in disbelief at the golden puppets. Their faces went ashen!

"Heavens, it's the golden puppets!"

"What's happening? It has not even been 100 years, why have the golden puppets come out?"

"Could someone have accidentally activated a trap or something?"

"No way, all of us stayed together in one place, there's no way anyone could have activated another restrictive enchantment!"

"Back off, retreat!"

"We can't continue with the contest!"

"It's such a pity! This year we had the best line-up so far but we encountered the golden puppets!"

"D*mn, why did this happen? I haven't even fought the puppets for the Eldest Prince yet!"

"Me too, I haven't fought the puppets for the Second Prince yet either!"

Many of them were bitter about the current situation. Besides being unable to perform, another main reason was that they were hopeful to go on to the next round of the contest. However, their hopes had now been dashed by the unexpected appearance of the golden puppets!

"Forget it, let's retreat! That's all we can do now!" announced the Eldest Prince.

He knew very well how terrifying the golden puppets were. Even if the whole group took on the golden puppets together, they would only be able to handle 10 golden puppets!

Not only that, but there were also thousands of smaller ancient armored puppets, and over a hundred golden puppets. It would be impossible to continue the contest.

"Huh?"

Xu Que raised an eyebrow and was somewhat dumbstruck by what he heard.

The golden puppets that only show up every 100 years have appeared earlier?

Something must be amiss. Maybe someone really activated a hidden restriction or trap?

Xu Que was pondering over this matter and suddenly he thought of something.

Nah!

Could this have been activated… by that f*cking dog?

Xu Que finally thought of Buttface. He had not seen Buttface since he had started participating in the contest.

With that dog's temperament, it was impossible for him not to show up.

Moreover, Xu Que knew that Buttface had previously dug a hole, but it had been turned into barracks for the guards.

Now that he thought about it, Buttface must have entered the Imperial Tombs before him.

And these golden puppets might have been activated by Buttface, who might have been reckless whilst exploring the area!

"Young Master Xu, things are looking bad. Now that the golden puppets have appeared, we need to leave this place!" the Seventh Princess hurriedly informed Xu Que as she slipped through the anxious crowd to get to him.

Master Zhou had stopped his weapon forging as well. The Third Prince and the rest of their team were now ready to retreat!

However, Xu Que shouted to everyone, waving his hand, "calm down, everyone! Aren't all of you the nobility and elites of the Metal Nation? All the more reason why we should be calm in such situations, right? As everyone here represents the future of the Metal Nation, you must believe in yourselves! Understand? Be more confident, yes! Be like me, keep your back straight, stick out your chest, tidy your hair and face the danger bravely…"

Everyone was startled and stopped in their tracks. They looked at Xu Que in astonishment.

"Furthermore, what's there to panic about?" Xu Que continued his speech with a domineering aura. "It's just the golden puppets. Just because they look nicer and they think they are so powerful? Hahaha… they're just trash to me! Step aside! Back off… I'll take them on!"

With that, he took a large stride forward.

chapters.title: Chapter 368: Iron Man Suit Up!
chapters.body:
Chapter 368: Iron Man Suit Up!

Chapter 368: Iron Man Suit Up!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Confidence?

Stick out your chest?

Tidy your hair?

Golden puppets are trash?

Let you deal with it?

Everyone in there was stunned beyond words!

The golden puppets in the distance were fully activated now. One by one, they began to emit powerful auras to which common puppets would never have been able to hold a candle.

However, as the situation was precarious, Xu Que's shameless boasting was an attempt to make everyone feel more confident.

In everyone's opinion though, his were pure boasting and did not sit well with them.

"Oh my, this guy's crazy!"

"Does he know how horrifying the golden puppets are? How can he dare to boast like this?"

"The golden puppets' attacks are comparable to the attacks of cultivators in the Infant Transformation Stage. Moreover, there's no way we can take them out with our skill arts, how are we going to fight them?"

"Precisely! If we had an eight-star magical weapon, maybe we would be able take out four to five golden puppets… but that would be all we could handle!"

"If we had an inexhaustible amount of power and used brute force to take them out, we might have been able to succeed!"

"Unfortunately most cultivators nowadays pursue skill arts. There aren't as many people who cultivate in order to strengthen their bodies!"

"In the past, only one golden puppet being carelessly activated still caused great losses. And this time, there are so many golden puppets that have been activated… we'd better get them to retreat!"

Outside the Imperial Tombs, the crowd shook their heads and talked about Xu Que's behavior.

The Metal Emperor creased his brows as well. He seemed somewhat displeased with Xu Que's actions.

At this time, all the people inside needed to retreat as soon as they could to reduce the number of casualties!

But this guy was actually encouraging everyone to stay, telling them to be confident and saying that he would be battling against the puppets. This was tantamount to trying to get oneself killed!

In a divine chariot further away, the Empress Dowager was shaking her head lightly. A hint of mockery flashed in her eyes. She smiled and stayed silent!

...

Back inside the burial chamber in the Imperial Tombs, everyone was treating Xu Que's words as a joke!

"This rascal must have gone crazy!"

"There are so many golden puppets and he is actually saying that he's going to take them on!"

"Is he a psychopath?"

"Don't bother about him, we'd better hurry and run!"

Everybody started to retreat after dismissing Xu Que's words as jokes!

"This is an ignorant lad who wants to be in the limelight and use his flashy tactics!" Master Zhou, who was very unhappy with Xu Que, taunted him as this was a good opportunity to do so.

The Third Prince and the Seventh Princess also appeared slightly cross. They looked grim and their mouths twitched slightly.

They had tried to turn a blind eye when Xu Que had stepped out of line in the past. But this time, they found his words unacceptable!

There were so many golden puppets advancing slowly. Their attacks were at the level of cultivators in the Infant Transformation Stage. How could he be able to beat the puppets?

Even if you want to brag, you shouldn't brag like that!

They had thought that perhaps Xu Que had not known the actual prowess of the golden puppets. That could explain why he was still acting so bold.

"Young Master Xu, we'd better leave now. These golden puppets are not something that we can deal with now!"

"Yes, Young Hero Xu, we can come again next year!"

"There's no need to hurry!"

The Seventh Princess and the princes tried to persuade Xu Que to leave out of fear that he would mess up and throw his own life away.

Nevertheless, Xu Que just waved his hands indifferently. He was calm and composed. With a toss of his hair, he smiled. "No matter how strong the golden puppets are, they were still created by us, the humans. Man is the master of his own fate. Now you're scared of just a bunch of puppets? Okay, fine, alright! You're scared! But I'm not! The Exploding Heavens Faction fears nothing! Watch how I crush them! Iron Man, suit up!"

Boom!

With a wave of his hand, a terrifying, intense energy radiated from Xu Que's body!

Communicating with System, he activated all parts of Iron Man simultaneously!

Swoosh!

Swoosh!

Swoosh!

In an instant, all the parts appeared. As if they had an automatic sensor, they flew directly towards Xu Que.

Clang!

Clang!

Clang!

Piece by piece, the metallic parts rapidly assembled themselves on Xu Que's body. Every part fit together mechanically.

"What… what's going on? These metallic materials do not have the slightest spiritual Qi. How is he doing it? How are the parts fitting with each other automatically and so perfectly? This… this is absolutely impossible!"

Master Zhou, who had been taunting Xu Que earlier, was now totally dumbstruck by the sight before him.

"Master Zhou! What is that? Which sect has such skilful weapon forging techniques? Look… the way the metal parts pieced together, it's so natural! Even during the process of assembling, fire was not required…"

Another weapon forging master who was on good terms with Master Zhou was so stunned that his jaws fell wide open.

"How would I know? If this is really a method of weapon forging… I'm afraid that this is the best weapon forging method in the world!"

After Master Zhou said that, he sat on the ground, dazed and seemingly drained of energy.

The metallic parts slowly assembling on Xu Que's body came together to form a suit of armor. As Master Zhou watched, his pride in his own abilities were being thoroughly crushed.

Even without considering the strength of the armor, just the fact that they could automatically assemble was extraordinary. Master Zhou knew that there was no way that he could catch up to such forging techniques!

In no time, Xu Que was entirely covered in the metallic parts!

The graceful lines of the armor… the bright red and gold paint… it was totally Iron Man!

At that moment, everything was silent!

People inside the burial chamber and outside the Imperial Tombs reacted in the same way—their eyes opened wide with disbelief and astonishment!

No one had thought that the small metal pieces could be combined to form an impressive suit of gallant armor that covered the whole body!

When compared to the puppets in the Imperial Tombs, Xu Que's armor won hands-down in terms of appearance. It belonged to the category of the super powerful!

The gold and red color combination bedazzled everyone!

And the luminous object that Xu Que had been holding all this time was now placed inside the chest. It glowed brightly and a strange energy seemed to radiate from it, making people feel both wary and fearful!

"This… what the hell is this?"

"This is amazing! I thought he was just fooling around earlier… I didn't think that he could really create a magical weapon!"

"But it doesn't seem right. This doesn't feel like a magical weapon as there isn't any spiritual Qi emitting from it, but instead, a strange energy force!"

"Well the materials are not indestructible," Master Zhou said confidently. "If I were battling against it, I would still have confidence in my ability to destroy it in a single stroke!"

Clang!

At this time, another metallic sound was heard as the last piece of Iron Man's helmet clicked into place.

After the two metallic eyes lit up, the transformation was complete!

At the same time, system notifications started to ring in Xu Que's head!

Ding! "Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 280 Acting Tough Points!"

Ding! "Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 310 Acting Tough Points!"

Ding! "The host is now wearing the Iron Man suit. This suit has 20 different Iron Man styles, and the host is free to switch around between each of them."

chapters.title: Chapter 369: Open Your Eyes &Amp; Have A Good Look
chapters.body:
Chapter 369: Open Your Eyes &Amp; Have A Good Look

Chapter 369: Open Your Eyes & Have A Good Look

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que was amazed when he heard the special notification!

Twenty different styles for Iron Man?

In the movies, the Iron Man usually had one style throughout. But this suit rented from the System could actually alternate between twenty styles. That was a really cool feature!

"Heheh, an item that requires more than 10,000 Acting Tough Points to rent is indeed cool as hell!" Xu Que was overjoyed!

He used his Soul Strength to control the suit and turned to face the group of ancient armored puppets before him.

Under everyone's perplexed gazes, Xu Que lifted up the metallic arm, facing the tunnel. A white light appeared in his palm. "Come on, you pieces of trash! When you stand before the Iron Man, all of you are nothing but a pile of scrap metal!"

Omm!

With a faint mechanical sound, the white light in the Iron Man's palm suddenly glowed radiantly. In an instant, a white beam of light burst out! Swoosh!

Boommm!

The white beam of light landed on a puppet and it instantly exploded into numerous pieces of metal that scattered on the ground!

...

At that moment, the whole group froze in their positions with dazed looks!

Just one blast?

He took out a puppet with just one blast?

But… how is this possible?

The elite cultivators who were holding six-star magical weapons had needed at least ten rounds to take out an ancient armored puppet.

But this guy has actually taken out one puppet with just one blast?

Is this a dream?

Everyone was overwhelmed and in a state of bewilderment. The prowess that Xu Que had just displayed was unprecedented!

However, this was just the beginning for Xu Que!

The blast from his palm was just an ordinary attack for the Iron Man. Xu Que was simply testing its power!

Booomm!

Xu Que activated the power on the suit's legs and two beams of light appeared. Xu Que rocketed into the air and dashed towards the tunnel, stretching his two metallic arms forward!

Swoosh! Booomm!

Another two attack beams blasted several ancient armored puppets into pieces of broken metal!

Tsk!

The group of participants gasped and wore glazed expressions.

Is this a f*cking dream?

When did these puppets become so weak?

Swoosh!

Another two beams of light shot out from Xu Que's palms!

Booomm!

With that explosion, another small group of puppets was blasted into pieces!

At this time, several other puppets that had moved very close to Xu Que. Before they could attack, however, Xu Que lifted his metallic arm and swung down hard!

Clang!

A puppet was smashed, and a huge dent appeared on its head!

Xu Que immediately shot out another beam of white light and the puppet exploded!

The saying 'four hands is better than two fists' was not applicable to Xu Que!

Everyone was still dumbfounded and in shock!

Both the people inside the burial chamber and the crowd outside the tombs were now all as quiet as mice!

Swoosh!

Boom!

Explosions were repeatedly heard coming from the tunnel!

Groups of ancient armored puppets were turned into scrap metal by Xu Que's relentless attacks!

Everyone started to feel numb and their hearts began to feel cold!

As time went by, piles and piles of scrap metal from the exploded puppets were left lying near Xu Que's feet!

The originally countless numbers of ancient armored puppets had been reduced to only a few hundred!

By now, the over a hundred golden puppets had gotten closer to Xu Que!

"Hmph! A bunch of weaklings!" snorted Xu Que in dissatisfaction. "I killed so many of you but I didn't even get a single Experience Point. I might as well destroy all of you now!"

System had not awarded him any Experience Points for taking out these puppets. He felt that he should protest vehemently to the System for discriminating against the puppets. The puppets could easily be classified as a type of monster. How could System refuse to award him any Experience Points? That was unreasonable and definitely unfair! Does the law even apply to me anymore? he thought gloomily.

With a click, two long, thin missiles appeared and ejected from Xu Que's metallic arm.

Swoosh!

The two thin missiles flew straight towards the ancient armored puppets. Clink! Both missiles knocked onto two ancient armored puppets, like an arrow rather than a missile!

And then, nothing happened?

The two puppets continued to walk towards Xu Que!

Xu Que did not bother with them. He turned away from them and walked out of the tunnel!

Everyone was puzzled by Xu Que's actions:

Are the two weird-looking 'arrow' things similar to a sneak attack? They didn't work out?

Why did he come out of the tunnel? Can't he win against the puppets?

Kabooomm!

Before the crowd could figure out what was happening, a deafening explosion was heard in the tunnel!

It was an explosion made by the two missiles. Flames blasted through the entire tunnel; the entirety of the Imperial Tombs shook from the impact!

Everyone stared with their eyes big and wide. They saw hundreds of puppets explode and get destroyed in the tunnel. Clink! Clink! The puppets shattered into numerous pieces of broken metal and fell to the ground.

In just an instant, so many ancient armored puppets of unmatched numbers had been destroyed so easily by Xu Que!

The whole tunnel was filled with countless broken metal pieces, and seemed to have transformed into ruins.

Many golden puppets had not been spared either. Those that had gathered closer to Xu Que had also been destroyed in the explosion.

The broken pieces of golden metal lying in the debris shone and looked very distinctive!

Gulp!

All those who witnessed the scene could not help but gulp. Their mouths felt dry. They could not believe what they had just witnessed!

"No… no way? Even the golden puppets… were also destroyed by just a single blast?"

"This is incredible! Totally unbelievable! A golden puppet is equivalent to a cultivator of the Infant Transformation Stage!"

"What exactly did Xu Que create? After he wore the suit, despite only having a cultivation level at the Original Infant Stage, he was actually able to take out so many golden puppets in one go..."

"This is a supreme treasure! Xu Que's magical armor suit is absolutely the top-ranked treasure among the supreme treasures!"

"It didn't even use any spiritual Qi yet it had such a tremendous amount of power! This is just so unbelievable…"

...

All the princes and their men, who had planned to evacuate quickly from the Imperial Tombs, were now completely stunned beyond words.

This was totally different to what they had expected!

Even though Xu Que had taken out large numbers of the ancient armored puppets, they still firmly believed that the over a hundred golden puppets would have been a nightmare!

But now, the golden puppets had also proved to be just as fragile. They could not withstand a single blast from Xu Que. He had become the nightmare of the puppets instead, an outright nightmare…

Shoosh!

At that time, Xu Que flew out from the tunnel swiftly!

Clunk!

He landed on the ground steadily, appearing before everyone.

Ding! Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 300 Acting Tough Points!"

Ding! Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 320 Acting Tough Points!"

Ding! Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 350 Acting Tough Points!"

...

System notifications kept ringing in his head continuously.

He did not bother much about them. Instead, he turned slowly to look at the heaps of scrap metal lying around the tunnel. "Hmph, it's so f*cking meaningless!" complained Xu Que with a sneer. "It's as if I used a butcher's knife to kill a chicken! It's all because of you silly idiots for bragging that the golden puppets were really life-threatening. So see what has happened? Open your eyes and have a good look… Not even one of them could stand up to a single blast!"

chapters.title: Chapter 370: Why Am I So Strong!
chapters.body:
Chapter 370: Why Am I So Strong!

Chapter 370: Why Am I So Strong!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Is there not even a single one that can fight me?

When the crowd heard this, they nearly spat out a mouthful of blood!

Brother, these are puppets that can't be taken out using skill arts!

God knows what kind of maniac weapon you have forged that is so formidable that it can take out the whole lot of them by itself!

Brother, why didn't you go to heaven?

Everybody was silent; they were unable to face Xu Que. They lowered their heads and pretended that they had not heard anything!

The Eldest Prince looked slightly dazed.

The Second Prince's face was ashen.

The Third Prince's mouth was agape.

The Seventh Princess and the rest of the princes were wide-eyed with disbelief. They were unable to react.

Master Zhou and the other weapon forging masters were unable to raise their heads before Xu Que as well.

Previously, when Xu Que had criticised their methods for weapon forging, they had been enraged.

But now they had nothing to say, especially Master Zhou!

He had claimed earlier that he could destroy Xu Que's armor in a single stroke. But Xu Que had proven to everyone that his armor could defeat the golden puppets effortlessly. That was a blow to Master Zhou, whose face had reddened with embarrassment!

Outside the Imperial Tombs, the atmosphere was quiet as well!

Everyone was aghast with shock!

Nobody thought that the metal parts he had been fiddling with could combine together into something so powerful!

"This… this is a good thing! Maybe the mining plans can be achieved in advance!" the Metal Emperor muttered to himself, looking somber and furrowing his brows.

He was aware that if Xu Que was able to break through the ancient armored puppets, there would be new progress with regards to the Imperial Tombs Contest… and there would be hopeful prospects for mining the Dragon Veins!

...

Further away, over at the Empress Dowager's divine chariot, the Empress Dowager was also astounded. Her mouth hung slightly agape!

She had said earlier that Xu Que was just trying to be in the limelight and was just fooling around. She had even claimed that those metal pieces were useless!

But now, it was as if Xu Que had proven her wrong by mercilessly giving her a hard slap in the face!

The Empress Dowager's feelings at this moment could be summed up in one thought—

This is f*cking embarrassing!

...

In fact, Xu Que knew that if his Iron Man suit were to face a cultivator of the Infant Transformation Stage, it would be smashed to pieces in no time!

But the thing was, these puppets were not human!

Both the ancient armored puppets and the golden puppets had no intelligence—they simply attacked any intruder they saw!

Most importantly, the restrictive spells on the puppets were very similar to those Xu Que had come across in Fire Country—they were all created to be strong against the cultivators' skill arts!

When skill arts came into contact with these restrictive spells, they would lose their usefulness. It was even possible that they would turn into spiritual Qi, which could even strengthen the restrictive spells!

The only way to deal with these restrictions was with brute force—and from a distance!

After all, the puppets used long distance attacks as well. Iron Man's energy did not constitute a skill art, but simply a form of energy!

Hence, an accessory like Iron Man or the Transformers would be the best choice for crushing these puppets, as they did not lack in attack power or agility.

When Xu Que had first revealed Iron Man, he had instantly harvested a high amount of Acting Tough Points!

This was definitely a huge act tough effort on his part!

Nevertheless, so far he had only recovered a little over 3,000 points, which was around one fourth of the initial cost. This made him feel bitter!

And so, Xu Que started to clamor for attention.

"Come! All puppets come to me!"

Swoosh! Boom!

A beam of white light shot out from his palm, headed towards a golden puppet. Cracks instant appeared when it was struck. Although it wasn't smashed to pieces, it lost its mobility and was paralysed like a toy that had run out of battery!

"Come on, come at me! I want to fight ten puppets!"

Swoosh! Boom!

"Any more? I'll just ask again, who else is there?"

Swoosh! Boom!

"Is it really so hard to hope for a worthy adversary? I'm so lonely that it's shameful!"

Swoosh! Boom!

"Is it really so hard to find a strong opponent? Heavens, why am I so strong? Why?"

Swoosh! Boom!

...

Xu Que continued taking out the puppets. Each and every golden puppet fell one after another!

As the crowd watched on, their hearts were filled with awe!

"This magical weapon can actually attack endlessly?"

"There is not even the slightest fluctuation of spiritual Qi. Doesn't it need spiritual Qi to activate and power up?"

"Isn't this like a divine chariot? The armor suit can be powered by Soul Strength and used to display such tremendous power!"

"From the looks of it, he's going to… handle this round all by himself!"

Many of them were astounded as they continued to think deeper!

For decades, this round had been unbeatable. But looking at the way that Xu Que was taking out the puppets as if he was harvesting crops… this round could actually be beaten this time!

Outside the Imperial Tombs, the Metal Emperor and the crowd were looking forward to that.

...

Booommm!

However, just as Xu Que destroyed more than half of the golden puppets, a deafening noise suddenly reverberated through the Imperial Tombs!

The ground trembled as if it was about to split!

Lots of rubble was falling inside the burial chamber. The people outside the Imperial Tombs could see that the whole mountain had trembled!

"What's going on?"

"What happened?"

"Could someone have activated a horrible trap?"

Everyone was appalled and looked around vigilantly!

Boom!

Suddenly, another deafening noise was heard and the ground shook violently once more. Some people almost stumbled to the ground as they were unable to keep their balance!

At that moment, everyone felt uneasy.

They could sense a powerful aura approaching them, fast!

Boom!

Another thundering sound was heard, this time closer than before!

Everyone inside the burial chamber held their breaths involuntarily.

Those outside the Imperial Tombs stared intently at the Heaven and Earth Mirror.

They found the source of the deafening sounds coming from the depths of the tomb. There seemed to be a huge shadow rising out of the darkness, knocking into the walls of the tomb and crushing them to bits. It was heading in their direction!

As Xu Que was wearing the Iron Man suit, he could use Iron Man's intelligence system to scan through the layers and layers of walls and locate the source of the thunderous sounds!

"A gigantic golden puppet? Can this be the big boss of the puppets?"

Xu Que was slightly surprised.

Boom!

At this time, one side of the tunnel suddenly exploded in front of the cultivators!

With the collapse of the wall, an enormous golden figure stood in front of everyone.

This enormous golden puppet was more than three meters tall and very huge. The earlier golden puppets looked like dwarfs beside it!

Tsk!

The cultivators gasped, taking in a mouthful of cold air. They were petrified by the sight before them!

To think that such a gigantic golden puppet was actually hidden so deep inside the Imperial Tombs!

Must things go to such an extent?

The Founding Metal Emperors of Metal Nations must have been incredible, to bury such a daunting puppet in order to protect the Imperial Tombs!

The golden puppet before them was not only gigantic in size, but also possessed strength that was equivalent to a Level Five or Six Infant Transformation Stage cultivator!

What did that mean, then?

It meant that this puppet had strength that could contend with the Metal Emperor!

It could also contend with the leader of the Jade Sword Sect!

How could they f*cking fight this thing, then?

"This is no good, run!"

"Run! Don't stop!"

"Young Master Xu, run now!"

"Young Hero Xu, quick, retreat!"

Everyone inside the burial chamber rushed towards the exit like tides of water!

The Seventh Princess and the other princes were amongst the agitated crowd moving towards the exit. They turned around and shouted at Xu Que, telling him to leave the place.

Xu Que was now standing before the tunnel, directly facing the giant puppet!

If that giant golden puppet were to kill someone, its first target would definitely be Xu Que!

"Oh no! Quick, get him out of there! Don't let him die inside!" yelled the Metal Emperor who suddenly stood up outside the Imperial Tombs.

Xu Que was now the king of the elites in his eyes. Hence, the Emperor would not be able to stand seeing him die inside the Imperial Tombs!

However… he could do nothing but shout!

Once the Imperial Tombs Contest started, the restrictive spell had sealed off the exit so nobody could enter from the outside. They could only wait for the people inside to come out by themselves.

"This is bad. Why isn't this guy running?"

"He's probably scared silly by the puppet!"

"Will he die inside there? That giant golden puppet is bad news!"

Many people were frantically shouting.

Contrary to the crowd's expectations, Xu Que had remained calm and indifferent inside the burial chamber!

"What reason is there to run? Didn't I just say that we need to be calm in the face of danger, and that we need to be confident in ourselves?"

Xu Que laughed casually and shook his head. He looked right up at the giant golden puppet before him and sneered. "It's just a bigger version of the other puppets. Can it be more powerful than the Hulk? Well, my apologies then, I happen to have the Hulkbuster Iron Man suit among the 20 different styles available to me! So… come out, Hulkbuster!"

chapters.title: Chapter 371: Do Not Discriminate Against The Puppets
chapters.body:
Chapter 371: Do Not Discriminate Against The Puppets

Chapter 371: Do Not Discriminate Against The Puppets

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Booomm!

The Arc Reactor in the center of Xu Que's chest suddenly glowed with blazing bright light!

A surge of energy suddenly filled his entire body!

This was a system-modified version of Iron Man. It was apparently different to the original version of Iron Man; this was a more high-tech and advanced version!

Everyone was taken aback by the sudden energy surge. They could not react, their mouths simply hung agape at what was happening before them…

Clunk! Clunk! Clunk!

A series of mechanical sounds rang in everyone's ears. The metallic suit Xu Que was wearing changed rapidly as if vines were creeping across the whole suit from the Arc Reactor. The size of the suit also grew significantly bigger.

In just a few seconds, the Iron Man suit had transformed into an enlarged version… the Hulkbuster style!

"F*ck!"

Everyone watching was in shock. Their eyes nearly popped out!

This was because they had seen how Xu Que had assembled the small pieces of metal earlier. This sudden transformation was too alarming for them.

Just those small pieces of metal alone were able to deliver so many surprises. Firstly, Xu Que's body had become fully covered by the metallic armor. Then the suit had enlarged; it was now three meters tall. There was not much difference between it and the gigantic golden puppet!

"This is too powerful! Such an equipment forging method is simply magnificent and out of this world!"

"Although it still doesn't look as powerful to us because such armor is considered fragile, it should be a strong nemesis for the puppets!"

"No, no, no, although this armor is really weak, let's not overlook the white beam of light that had fired at the puppets. I could feel that the white beam of light would have also been life-threatening to us as well!"

"This is really marvellous! I didn't know that such a magical weapon existed in this world!"

"What's so strange about that? Take for instance the divine chariots. Only us, the Metal Nation, have them!"

"Looks like the Exploding Heavens Faction is really impressive!"

...

The group was discussing amongst themselves. They gradually stopped moving, and were no longer feeling confused.

Xu Que's Hulkbuster transformation had calmed many of them down.

After all, such a display of prowess had given them a strong boost of confidence.

Ding! "Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 310 Acting Tough Points!"

Ding! "Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 330 Acting Tough Points!"

...

Xu Que was gladdened by his effect as well, as system notifications kept ringing in his head.

"Hoho, seems like the transformation has brought good results. I've earned a lot of Acting Tough Points!"

He was rejoicing inside his mind.

However, the gigantic golden puppet opposite him was not to be underestimated either.

Xu Que did not let his guard down even though he had been destroying the other puppets with one blast. He could sense that the giant golden puppet was not only got bigger in size, but was also exerting an invisible pressure that made him feel serious as well.

But he didn't want to waste too much time on this giant golden puppet either.

"System, activate the laser beam cannon to slice that puppet up, and end this battle fast!" Xu Que issued a command to System.

Ding! "The laser beam cannon will be fully activated 60 seconds from now…"

What the...? There's still a countdown timer for this? he thought. Fine, fine, 60 seconds, so be it!

Xu Que's mouth twitched but he continued to stand at the entrance of the tunnel and faced the giant golden puppet, unfazed. "Come on big guy, I'll give myself a handicap for this fight. I'll fight you with one hand!"

With that, Xu Que placed a metallic hand behind his back. It was as if he really meant what he had said.

Everyone almost fainted when they heard that.

Brother, why did you f*cking give yourself a handicap?

Do you think the puppet needs that?

More importantly, that giant golden puppet does not have a mind of its own. Whether you have a handicap or not, it's coming for you, alright?

Can you please be serious and use both hands?

"Young Master Xu, do not treat this lightly!" reminded the Seventh Princess.

The Third Prince chimed in as well, "Young Hero Xu, maybe you want to use a magical weapon to make up for the handicap?"

"Yes, Young Hero Xu, that's a puppet equivalent to a cultivator of the Level Six or Seven Infant Transformation Stage. It's really strong!"

"Don't handicap yourself! Go all out!"

The other princes also tried to persuade Xu Que to rethink his decision.

After all, the results of the battle would also be crucial to them as their lives were all at stake as well.

The crowd outside the Imperial Tombs were getting pins and needles. They wished they could get into the tombs and give Xu Que a good thrashing.

You f*cking want to handicap yourself at a time like this?! Are you trying to kill yourself?

However, Xu Que was surprisingly calm and composed, watching the giant golden puppet walk step by step towards him. "A puppet is still a life. We can't discriminate against them." Xu Que shook his head. "They don't have a mind of their own. Only by giving myself a handicap will it be a fair fight!"

The crowd felt like coughing out blood when they heard that.

Can't discriminate against puppets?

So who's the one who kept saying that these puppets are ugly?

In addition, the giant puppet is as powerful as a Level Six or Seven Infant Transformation Stage cultivator. Why do you need to a handicap yourself? Even if it has no mind of its own, you may not necessarily be a match for it, alright?

"Young Master Xu, please do your best!" implored the anxious Seventh Princess.

"Young Hero Xu, don't be like this," urged the Third Prince. "Use both hands, quick!"

"Young Hero Xu, don't be reckless!"

The group tried to persuade him as well.

Xu Que could not take it and nodded his head. "Alright then," he sighed, "I'll use both hands but I'll change the handicap to me noy being able to use a leg then."

When Xu Que said that he would use both hands, everyone still did not feel relieved, as he was still going to handicap himself by not using a leg instead. They almost puked out blood once again.

You still want a handicap?

D*mn! Can't you just do your best?

"Young Hero Xu, why do you have to be courteous to these puppets?" said a prince solemnly with a hint of anger. "They do not have a brain and moreover, you've destroyed so many of them already. Is there really a need to do this?"

Xu Que shook his head lightly. "This is because my path of the strong focuses on one word... fairness!"

"Ah?" Everyone was stunned.

Fairness? Are you kidding me?

"All things have a spirit; flowers and plants have life, let alone these puppets," continued Xu Que righteously. "Moreover, as a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction, we do not bully the weak. We uphold 'Justice', 'Fairness' and 'Transparency'. This is also known as the Three Rights!"

Booommm!

At this time, the giant golden puppet had gotten very close.

Everyone felt a chill run down their spines.

The giant puppet is right before you yet you are still bullsh*tting about the f*cking 'Three Rights'?

Can't you just put up a good fight?

The enemy is up close already and here you are, still dicking around. That's the greatest form of discrimination towards an enemy. You're not respecting your opponent!

"Forget it! Looking at your dazed faces, I know nobody understands what I'm talking about! I've decided that I'll not use either my hands or legs so we can have a hearty battle! Come on big guy, let me see your strength!" shouted Xu Que in a mighty manner!

Everyone was scared silly!

F*ck!

You won't use your hands or legs? How are you going to fight it then? Will you use your head to knock it down?

"Finally I've met a powerful opponent," said Xu Que loudly, not moving an inch even though the puppet made its way towards him. "I've been looking for a battle like this for a long time!"

At the same time, the giant golden puppet's chest also started to light up. An eerie aura started to fill the burial chamber.

The puppet's skill art was about to be unleashed.

Everyone's faces changed abruptly again.

"This is bad!"

"Young Hero Xu! Dodge!"

"Why won't you attack? If you don't attack, how can this battle be fair? You're courting death!"

Everyone was shouting in anxiety and fear.

However, in the nick of time, a system notification rang in his head!

"The laser beam cannon is now ready. Do you want to launch it now?"

"Yes!" Xu Que replied without further delay.

Ommm!

In an instant, a somewhat high-pitched sound was heard. His Arc Reactor on his chest turned to a shade of red. A red ray of light at an extremely high temperature instantly shot out of his chest, whizzing right towards the giant golden puppet!

chapters.title: Chapter 372: Line Up! Let’S Go
chapters.body:
Chapter 372: Line Up! Let’S Go

Chapter 372: Line Up! Let’s Go

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Boom!

Xu Que stood still and motionless. His armor suit had shot out a red beam of light that had hit the giant golden puppet!

The powerful, high temperature beam instantly melted the outer shell of the puppet and gradually penetrated its surface!

Tuomp!

The giant golden puppet fell out of the air and onto the ground, and stopped moving. The light coming from the attack that had been about to burst from its chest had now dimmed.

Everyone was startled!

What is the situation?

The giant golden puppet… why did it suddenly stop?

Everyone was puzzled. As their view had been blocked by Xu Que in his Iron Man suit, they were unable to understand what exactly had happened to the golden puppet.

Clang!

Just then, the sound of a heavy object fell to the ground.

That made everyone look solemn. They thought the circumstances might be dire due to all the noise. They thought that perhaps the gold puppet had attacked again!

However, the situation was not what they had expected!

After the initial crash, nothing was heard from the tunnel again.

Soon, they saw Xu Que's huge steel body start to regroup, piece by piece.

Clang! Clang!

The metal pieces started to diminish in size, and the armor suit returned to its initial form.

Now that Xu Que's size had returned to its original, the cultivators finally saw what had happened.

At that moment, everyone gasped. They were all stunned!

The giant golden puppet, a creature that had been invincible in their eyes, had been cut in two halves from the chest. The cut was clean and there were plumes of white smoke emitting from it. Its entire shoulder and head had fallen into a corner on the ground!

With that, everyone now understood that the heavy sound of crashing metal from earlier had been the sound of its head falling to the ground. Xu Que was not being attacked at all!

Everyone glanced at Xu Que's back view, surprised and fazed. They could not believe their eyes!

"How… how did he do it?"

"I swear he didn't even move an inch. How could he have destroyed the giant golden puppet so effortlessly?"

"This is too much for me. What has he done to achieve this?"

...

Everyone was overwhelmed and dazed. They were reminded of what Xu Que had previously said about not using all four limbs so as to seek a fair battle!

From the looks of it now, even though he had not used all four limbs, the battle still hadn't been fair!

You took the puppet out with just one strike. Such strength! How can this be a fair fight…

Outside the Imperial Tombs, the bulk of the crowd had seen clearly everything that had happened in the Heaven and Earth Mirror!

They had seen a red beam of light emit from the chest of Xu Que like a long, slender sword. It had sliced through the body of the giant golden puppet in one clean, effective cut!

That horrifying red light had appalled everyone out there!

However, the Metal Emperor and some of the others were delighted. There was a gleam in their eyes!

With that giant golden puppet taken out, that also meant that they could progress to the next round!

In just one day, and due to Xu Que alone, the second round of the ancient armored puppets—something that had blocked their advance for decades—had just been conquered!

"Looks like… we are not too far from success!" The Metal Emperor's heart began to stir with excitement!

Over the years, he had tried countless ways of excavating the Dragon Veins, but to no avail.

He had never thought that his plan might succeed due to Xu Que alone. This made it difficult for him to suppress the excitement in his heart.

...

Meanwhile, inside the burial chamber, the Seventh Princess, the Third Prince and all the others came out of their dazes.

Only then did they realize that it was difficult to estimate the scores for that round due to Xu Que's methods for taking out the puppets.

But this also certainly meant that the Third Prince had taken first place for the round as well, a ranking that no one would be able to surpass.

He had successfully secured the position of Crown Prince!

"Young Hero Xu, this prince will remember your help for life! In future if you need anything, just let me know. I'll do my best to repay your favor!" promised the Third Prince.

Xu Que, who was still wearing his Iron Man suit, turned around and said casually, "actually, I have a very simple request. I know the Metal Nation wants to mine the Dragon Veins which lie deep inside the tombs. My goal is also to go deep inside the tombs, but I don't want the Dragon Veins. Instead, I want a spiritual herb that grows in there. I hope you won't fight against me for them, or you will regret it!"

"The spiritual herb inside the Dragon Veins? Do you mean the Genesis Metal Herbs?"

The Third Prince and the rest of crowd thought for a moment.

They had heard of the spiritual herb but they had never seen it before.

As Xu Que had specifically asked for this spiritual herb, this had escalated to a big issue!

The Third Prince was caught in a predicament as this was not something that he could decide!

Xu Que saw the Third Prince's expression and couldn't help shaking his head. "Don't think too much about it. I'm not asking for your approval. I'm just informing you that the spiritual herb is mine!"

Woah!

Everyone inside and outside the Imperial Tombs started to chatter and exclaim.

Cool!

This is too cool!

Saying such words in front of so many people, even in the face of the Emperor and the princes! As the saying goes, when one is powerful enough, one is bolder as well!

Unexpectedly, the Metal Emperor did not get angry. Instead, after pondering for a while, he gave a cryptic smile and said nothing.

From his perspective, the Dragon Veins were more important than the spiritual herb.

He was not that concerned over the Imperial Family's pride.

In his opinion, if there had been no Xu Que, the Dragon Veins would have likely remained untouched for another few decades.

...

"Why are all of you still in a daze? Hurry up, line up and enter the tombs with me!"

Inside the burial chamber, Xu Que activated his suit and began to float in mid-air. He flew towards the tunnel.

When everyone heard his words, the corners of their mouths twitched.

Damn! Why are you ordering us around?

Why must we line up and enter the tombs with you?

Don't think we have to listen to you just because you took out all those puppets!

Most people felt resentful, especially the Second Prince and his team. They all wore gloomy expressions.

Nonetheless…

In the end, they still queued up to enter the main tomb!

The tunnel was not so big that it would allow a large group of people to enter it in one go. As a result, they had to queue in order to advance deeper into the tombs.

Pfft!

The Seventh Princess tried hard to stifle her chuckle when she saw the disgruntled group of people queuing up to enter the tombs. Her beautiful eyes flicked over to Xu Que, who was walking right in front. She smiled to herself. Young Master Xu is such an interesting person!

The princess and her brothers also stepped into the tunnel.

As Xu Que was in the lead, he took out all the remaining puppets guarding the tomb. Every one of them was destroyed with just one strike.

While passing through the tunnel, everyone was stunned once again. They did not need to do anything but watch as he took them out.

When they reached the end of the tunnel, just as Xu Que was about to take a step over the threshold, the Third Prince suddenly gave a shout. "Young Hero Xu, please wait!"

"What happened?" Xu Que paused and turned around.

"According to our map, the next round features a terrible restrictive enchantment and lot of traps," said the Third Prince in a low voice. "Isn't it better to stop, observe and consider the situation first?"

The rest of the people nodded their heads. The map of the Imperial Tombs had been made public before, so they knew all about the challenges that they would be facing.

The next round should involve a scary restrictive enchantment that would have been potent enough to kill an Infant Transformation Stage cultivator.

When Xu Que heard that, he was puzzled.

This was because he was standing right at the front, meaning he could clearly see the situation in the next burial chamber.

The burial chamber before him did not contain a restrictive enchantment. Not only that, but it was, in actual fact, a mess!

chapters.title: Chapter 373: The Formidable Young Hero Xu!
chapters.body:
Chapter 373: The Formidable Young Hero Xu!

Chapter 373: The Formidable Young Hero Xu!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"Erm…"

Xu Que was stumped for a few seconds.

The burial chamber before him was visibly a mess.

Many fresh traces on the ground indicated that a fight had recently taken place within!

And in one corner of the chamber wall, several paw prints could clearly be seen. They looked like the paw prints of a dog.

F*ck! Xu Que cursed in his mind.

Besides that f*cking Buttface, who else could have created this mess?

It can only be Buttface!

This dog must have entered this place earlier. He surely had his own means. And not only did he successfully pass through the round of armored puppets, he also broke the restrictive enchantments here as well. That's really incredible!

"Young Hero Xu, let us discuss our strategy. From what I understand, in order to break the restrictive spell, we need ten cultivators who have the ability to move with speed and agility, coupled with a tacit understanding between them. Only then will the spell be broken!"

"Yes, and no mistakes are allowed. Otherwise, all ten of them will suffer the pain of tens of thousands of swords piercing their hearts. They will die on the spot!"

The voices of the Third Prince and his group were heard as they explained how to break the restrictive spell.

As the group was all standing behind Xu Que who was clad in his Iron Man suit, they were unable to see what had happened in the burial chamber. They were wearing solemn expressions and were wondering how to break the spell without anyone getting hurt.

Xu Que raised an eyebrow and waved his hand. He said heroically, "this is just a small restrictive spell. There's no need to be afraid! Didn't I say earlier that one should not back off when one encounters problems, but instead face the problem fearlessly! This type of common restrictive spell can be broken with a single strike from me!"

"Huh?"

The group behind him felt really worried when they heard that.

The Third Prince and his group hurriedly tried to convince Xu Que otherwise. "Young Hero Xu, you can't be reckless about this!"

"Yes, this restrictive spell was cast by our ancestors, the previous reigning Emperors of the Metal Nation. Even if His Majesty were here, he would likely not be able to get away unscathed either!"

"Exactly! When we step into the area affected by the restrictive spell, there will be tens of thousands of swords coming right at us at an astounding speed. That is impossible to defend against effectively!"

"Young Master Xu, come back. Let us come up with a good plan!" urged the Seventh Princess anxiously.

Xu Que waved his hand and shook his head. "Don't worry, this kind of restrictive spell is nothing to me. Everyone, relax!"

After that, he stepped forward so he was one step closer to the end of the tunnel.

Woah!

Most of the group behind instinctively exclaimed.

"Young Hero Xu, don't stand too close to the front. It's dangerous!"

"Yes, Young Master Xu, don't be rash. We still have a lot of time, there's no need to rush!"

"Come back quickly, Young Hero Xu!"

The Third Prince and his group attempted to make Xu Que change his mind. They were fearful that Xu Que might die because of the restrictive spell.

On the other hand, the Second Prince and his group curled their lips up and sniggered.

"Some people just don't know what's good for them. Don't think that by breaking the round of puppets, you'll be able to break this powerful restrictive enchantment as well!"

"A greedy person is like a snake that tries to swallow an elephant. Since someone wants to try his luck, what's the point of dissuading him?"

"That's right. If he wants to die, just leave him be!"

"Xu Que, why are you not going out now? Are you afraid?"

The Second Prince was the loudest amongst them. His face was filled with scorn.

However, Xu Que lifted his Iron Man arm slowly and aimed towards the burial chamber in front. "I've said," laughed Xu Que indifferently, "this kind of restrictive spell can be broken in one strike!"

With that, his palm started to shine brightly with white light!

Swoosh!

A beam of light headed towards the burial chamber.

With a loud explosion, the beam of light hit a corner of the burial chamber. It didn't create much damage, the dog paw prints at that corner was the only thing that got destroyed.

After all, the walls of the Imperial Tombs had been strengthened by the engravings of rune words on the walls.

Although the Iron Man was really a wonderful and dashing existence, its powers simply could not match up to the cultivation world. It managed to defeat the armored puppets easily as the powers of the Iron Man happened to be their sole, fatal weakness – there's always one thing to conquer another!

As for the second burial chamber, the restrictive enchantment was already broken by Buttface. Xu Que simply pretended that he was the one who broke the spell. There was no need to destroy anything else since the spell had been broken.

Nobody could see what Xu Que had done, as they were all behind and blocked by him.

They only knew that Xu Que had attacked with only one strike. And then, there was a loud explosion. After that, there was only silence.

At this time, Xu Que smiled pleasantly, "It's okay now. The spell has been broken. Everyone queue up and follow me to the next checkpoint."

When he finished speaking, Xu Que started to walk forward.

"Young hero Xu, no…"

The Third Prince and his group was appalled and shouted.

But before they could finish their sentence, everyone was dumbfounded.

Xu Que took big strides with his Iron Man suit stepping into the burial chamber and was perfectly fine. There was no restrictive spell at all. It was totally calm and peaceful!

All of a sudden, everyone was shocked:

How… how is this possible?

With just one strike, the restrictive spells casted by our previous reigning Emperors got destroyed?

This is called overpowered, right?

"Young hero Xu, you're fantastic!"

"We didn't know that young hero Xu is actually so brave and heroic. We have misjudged you!"

"Young hero Xu not only mastered the skill of controlling the divine chariots, his skills of magical weapon forging have also attained the peak of perfection. We didn't expect his ability to break restrictive spells could be so unfathomable either!

"Geniuses like young hero Xu is the indeed the role model of our generation!"

"Awesome, too wonderful!"

At that moment, most of them were filled emotion and marveled at Xu Que's strength!

After all, Xu Que's previous achievements had left them directly immersed in shock and had no energy to question if what he did this time was reasonable or not.

However, the crowd outside the Imperial Tombs had seen everything clearly.

Through the heaven and earth mirror, they saw the condition of the burial chamber as well as what Xu Que had done.

Before Xu Que fired a shot, they had already realised that the restrictive spell had already been broken. When Xu Que pretended to have broken the spell, everyone out there knew he was lying:

"Hmph, this Xu Que is really of shady character. He actually deceived the princes!"

"What he did is really despicable!"

"What kind of person did the Third Prince invite?"

"Precisely! Previously I saw from another heaven and earth mirror that it was a dog, not sure where it came from, that destroyed the restrictive enchantment!"

Many people were shaking their heads and were showing disdain towards Xu Que.

But at this moment, some of the people who saw Xu Que selling smelly tofu stood up and sneered, "You frogs in a well, don't you know that the dog you saw is actually young hero Xu's pet?"

"Obviously young hero Xu has foresight to let his dog clear the way by destroying the restrictive spell first then follow up by another strike. That was actually the finishing touch!"

"He's right. Young hero Xu is really the role model of our generation. Even his pet is so strong, let alone himself?"

"Are you sure? That dog is actually young hero Xu's pet?"

"No wonder it's so powerful!"

"We have misjudged indeed. Everyone, please do not take it to heart!"

In no time, the crowd outside the Imperial Tombs were full of admiration towards Xu Que!

Meanwhile, Xu Que continued to advance deeper into the tomb and system notifications were constantly ringing in his head.

Ding! "Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 320 Acting Tough Points!"

Ding! "Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for successfully acting tough. The reward is 350 Acting Tough Points!"

...

Ever since he exchanged and rented the Iron Man suit, his Acting Tough Points had been increasing steadily. Now Xu Que had almost recovered back his cost.

However, as they progressed deeper into the tomb, besides the first round where Xu Que took down all the puppets, he and the group had not met any other obstacles.

As they went deeper, whenever there was a checkpoint the group knew that indicated danger, there would be someone who would alert Xu Que to be careful.

Nonetheless, all the restrictive spells and traps had already been taken care of by Buttface.

As for Xu Que, he would not let any opportunity that allowed him to act tough to slip by. He would just pretend like what he did over at the second burial chamber with a shout, 'I can break it with just one single strike', followed by firing a beam of light. After that, under the respectful gazes of the group of cultivators, he would progress forward, taking big strides with a mighty aura.

Until finally, the group made it to the lowest level of the Imperial Tombs in just one day, stopping in front of a huge stone door.

chapters.title: Chapter 374: Why Can’T I Eat It?
chapters.body:
Chapter 374: Why Can’T I Eat It?

Chapter 374: Why Can’t I Eat It?

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

The stone door was huge, standing at about two meters long and four meters high. It looked like it had merged with the stone wall.

The door was inscribed with runes which, from afar, resembled countless tadpoles. A daunting aura exuded from these ancient yet simple inscriptions!

Xu Que stood in front of the stone door, his eyebrows slightly raised.

The door was already ajar and it could allow for one person to pass through it at a time. Clearly, this meant that Buttface was one step ahead.

But beyond the stone wall, things looked as calm and still as water. There was no movement. This made him feel ill at ease.

"Eh? Why is the stone wall ajar?"

Just then, the crowd behind him saw that the stone door was already opened and was very surprised.

"According to the map, this door can only be opened when the rune combination is cracked."

"Young Hero Xu, did you open the door? Are you that fast?"

"Hmm, is that really the case? If Young Hero Xu had opened the stone door, how come we heard no sound?"

The puzzled group of people looked at Xu Que with doubt.

Xu Que immediately curled up his lips and turned around, facing all of them. "It's true that I opened this door. The inscriptions on the stone door couldn't stop me at all. Moreover, I only used 80 percent of my strength and I pushed the door open faster than the speed of sound. So, naturally, none of you heard it."

"Faster than the speed of sound? But it's still weird to not hear anything," voiced someone who was mulling over this.

Xu Que immediately glared daggers at the person. "What do you know? Don't think you understand how we, the Exploding Heavens Faction, raid tombs. We have a special way of opening this type of door silently with barely any movement. If we created a scene just by opening a door, how could we call it tomb raiding? We might as well just call it archaeology!"

"Uh… Young Hero Xu is right!" All of the cultivators were frozen for a second and hurriedly nodded their heads in agreement, unable to refute the argument.

"Come on, the Dragon Veins should be in there, follow closely."

Xu Que gestured for everyone to follow. He led the group, one by one, through the door.

Behind the stone door was a huge, glittering, magma cave. The inside was filled with natural, shiny, metallic minerals.

There were more than ten smaller tunnels. Nobody knew where they would lead to. Each tunnel was as dark as the night, so it was difficult to make out where they would end.

When everyone saw the smaller tunnels, they all looked serious and deep in thought.

"These passages are not marked on the map. Obviously, the previous deceased Emperors deliberately decided not to mark it!"

"One of the tunnels must lead to the Dragon Veins. That means the rest of the tunnels will be very dangerous!"

"It's not easy to tell which tunnel is the correct one!"

Everyone started to feel distressed.

Some of them glanced at Xu Que, as he had been leading them, which had made them feel reliant on Xu Que for solutions and decision making.

This was especially evident for the Third Prince, Seventh Princess and their group. They totally viewed Xu Que as their leader, following his opinions.

"Young Master Xu, do you think we can crack this? Which one should we take?" the Seventh Princess asked softly as she came over to Xu Que.

Xu Que smiled. "This is too easy. I just need to make a prediction using my fingers!"

He was already equipped with geomancy skills as he had purchased the knowledge of various famous tomb raiders whilst raiding the Imperial Tombs of the Fire Nations. It was therefore not difficult to identify the real tunnel.

However when everyone heard that, they were astonished again.

F*ck! You also know this skill?

Just using your fingers to predict?

There are so many tunnels, how are you going to use your fingers to represent them? Have you really raided tombs before?

Swoosh!

Suddenly, Xu Que stepped out and starting moving his fingers and chanting. "Looking for the dragon curling within the mountains, every twist and turn becomes a test, each test is like a set of eight dangerous and risky trials, but the yin yang eight diagrams will not appear!"

Just as he finished his chant, his finger extended outwards, pointing at a tunnel.

The corner of his lips curled upwards. "This is the one!"

The whole crowd stayed frozen.

D*mn it, just like that?

It's that easy to find the correct tunnel?

Looking for the dragon curling within the mountains?

That sounds too cryptic. How did you calculate and work out the right tunnel?

The Seventh Princess and the Third Prince were staring with their eyes wide open. They had not expected Xu Que to know about geomancy and predictions.

Outside the Imperial Tombs, everyone was astounded as well.

"Looking for the dragon curling within the mountains, every twist and turn becomes a test! Awesome, really awesome!"

"This Young Hero Xu must have some background!"

"Seems like we really need to go find out who founded the Exploding Heavens Faction."

...

The Empress Dowager who was inside her divine chariot communicated to her son, the Emperor, via Soul Strength. "My son, where exactly did this boy come from?"

The Metal Emperor was unable to give an answer. He replied with a bitter face, "Mother, I have sent out men to investigate. The scouts we sent to the four nations happen to be on their way back and will reach the Imperial Tombs soon!"

"Hmm!" The Empress Dowager acknowledged the reply and did not ask anything else!

...

Meanwhile, Xu Que had led the group into the tunnel.

As they advanced through the tunnel, Xu Que found some paw prints and the claw marks of a dog inside. Apparently, Buttface had taken the same tunnel as well.

There were some traces of fighting that seemed to have been caused by traps that had been sprung.

This convinced Xu Que that Buttface was definitely of extraordinary origins!

All this time, Buttface had managed to crack all the restrictive enchantments and know exactly where to go. That dog was certainly not as weak as he seemed!

The crowd went deeper into the tunnel.

In no time, they finally reached the end of the tunnel.

"Owww!"

A familiar sound was heard.

Xu Que's mouth suddenly twitched and he darted forward, wasting no time.

The group quickly followed as well and exited the tunnel fast… only to be welcomed by another scene that made them dumbfounded.

They saw a big black and white dog, with a face full of surprise and excitement, squatting on the floor. He was about to put a glittering spiritual herb into its mouth.

Swish!

At that critical moment, a figure rushed right at the dog. It was Xu Que.

He was so fast that he resembled a flash of black lightning that had suddenly appeared in front of Buttface.

He lifted up his mechanical arm and slapped Buttface right in the face.

Piak!

The crisp sound was immediately heard.

Buttface was sent flying, but he still held on to the spiritual herb relentlessly. He stared at Xu Que, extremely shocked by what had happened.

"How dare you f*cking try to eat that!" Xu Que was enraged.

All the cultivators present were in a daze now due to shock.

So this is how Young Hero Xu disciplines his pet!

No wonder that dog is so powerful! It must be because of Young Hero Xu's teaching methods!

Boom!

Buttface fell to the ground, his face full of annoyance. "F*ck! What do you want? I relied on myself to get this herb. Why can't I eat it?"

"You're a f*cking dog, you should eat sh*t!" shouted Xu Que. "You want to eat the herb? Why? Is this the kind of spiritual herb you can eat? Bring it to me quickly!"

He had come to the Metal Nation because of the Genesis Metal Herb. Now Buttface had beaten him to it and had almost eaten it. It was no wonder that he was infuriated!

Buttface responded acrimoniously, "this deity is a wolf, why can't I have the right to eat it? Hmm…"

He was halfway through his sentence when suddenly, he paused, and looked at Xu Que's Iron Man suit fervently with great interest. "Boy, what are you wearing? Or… this deity shall trade this herb for your suit?"

"No f*cking trade, hurry up and give me the spiritual herb or I'll really feed you sh*t!" said Xu Que impatiently.

"Hmph, young man, don't take it too far. This deity is the descendant of the Magic Dragon after all. You really think you can threaten me? Either trade me the suit you are wearing now or one hundred pots of stinky tofu. You choose!"

Buttface could tell that this herb was especially important to Xu Que, and thus felt fearless.

Xu Que narrowed his eyes. "Seems like you're asking for a beating. You really want me to get the Sword Spirit to teach you a lesson?"

"Don't use the Sword Spirit to scare me. If you don't trade with me for this herb, this deity will definitely not hand it over." Buttface was rather terrified at the mention of the Sword Spirit, but his attitude was still firm.

Xu Que was irritated and was about to call out the Sword Spirit through System to teach Buttface a lesson.

But before he did that, he suddenly saw a new item that was selling in the System Store. It was a Golden Dog Collar!

[Golden Dog Collar]:

A collar that has the same effect as the Golden Circlet. It can be used on demonic beasts. Its size can be freely modified via spell arts! (Note: This item is especially tempting for canine types of demonic beasts and your control of them will be strengthened.)

Durability: 100

Price: 1,000 Acting Tough Points

chapters.title: Chapter 375: Will You Obey Me Or Not?
chapters.body:
Chapter 375: Will You Obey Me Or Not?

Chapter 375: Will You Obey Me Or Not?

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"Heh, Golden Dog Collar?"

A sinister plan came to mind. Xu Que's lips curled up into a smirk.

He immediately exchanged for the Golden Dog Collar, spending 1,000 Acting Tough Points. Although the durability would decrease with time, Xu Que did not find the item expensive!

This was because this thing had the same effect as the Golden Circlet, which had been used to fool Sun Wu Kong, the Monkey King.

All he needed to do was chant a spell to control the size of the collar. This was no different from the Incantation of the Golden Circlet. This item was simply a treasure!

The only flaw was, the beast had to put it on willingly of its own accord, otherwise there would not be any effect…

"Boy, how is it? Are you going to trade with me or not? If you're not exchanging, this deity is going to eat this plant!" clamored Buttface as he sat on the ground, leaning against the wall with his legs crossed.

All those watching the scene were somewhat bemused.

Is that really a f*cking pet?

Why does it behave so haughtily?

It makes me feel like giving it a good thrashing…

Everyone thought for a while and felt that this dog was really too unique. But after a bit of pondering, they no longer felt confused or stunned by the dog's behaviour.

After all, there was a saying that the dog would take after its master! Xu Que was incredibly arrogant—his pet would of course behave just as arrogantly as him!

"So are you willing to trade or not? If you want to, shout 666!" Buttface continued to speak in a haughty tone.

"I'll trade, of course I will. You want the Iron Man suit right? Okay, no problem!"

Xu Que wore a smiling expression but he was sneering with contempt inside!

You act arrogant now, but you're going to cry later!

...

Swish!

Xu Que stored the Iron Man suit into his system inventory. At the same time, he pulled out the Golden Dog Collar that he had just obtained!

As he had purposely done all of this swiftly, everyone thought that the Iron Man suit had simply turned into a golden leather collar the moment he took it off.

That golden leather collar was carved with inscriptions and embedded with golden tangerines, looking very strange!

"Take it, wear it, and you can instantly become Iron Man!" Xu Que waved the collar in front of Buttface.

It was uncertain if Buttface had mistaken the collar to be the Iron Man suit or if the collar's irresistible effect against canine type beasts had taken effect, but Buttface looked at the collar greedily. His tongue hung out on one side of his now agape mouth and his face was full of excitement.

"Come, boy, throw it over," exclaimed Buttface in agitated excitement. "The plant will be given to you after this deity has tested it!"

Xu Que raised an eyebrow and stared at Buttface. "F*ck, if I give this to you first, it will be equivalent to throwing a meat-stuffed bun at a dog—one will never get back what has been given away. Just cut the crap, we'll hand over the items together. Hurry up and come over here now!"

"D*mn, this deity is not a dog but a noble wolf!" Buttface cursed. Ultimately he could not resist the temptation. He stood up and walked towards Xu Que like a human.

Xu Que narrowed his eyes and held the Golden Dog Collar tightly. He wore an expression of reluctance, as if he did not want to part with the collar.

Buttface saw that look of reluctance on Xu Que's face and immediately put on a complacent smile. "Heh, heh, boy, don't feel bad. By trading this plant for your suit, this deity is also suffering a loss!"

"Hmph, don't act like you're suffering losses when you're clearly at an advantage," snorted Xu Que coldly. "If this herb were not of use to me, I wouldn't be willing to trade for it with such a precious magical weapon!"

The group of cultivators witnessing this scene also felt heart-ache for Xu Que.

The prowess of the Iron Man suit was obvious to all. Xu Que had taken down so many puppets singlehandedly wearing that suit. It had also broken the restrictive spells in one strike. Everyone felt that it was no doubt a supreme magical weapon.

Now that this magical weapon was about to become the property of a dog, everyone felt that it was a great pity!

"Ah, what a waste of such a good item!"

"What a pity!"

"No choice, this dog is Young Hero Xu's pet after all. But Young Hero Xu really is spoiling and indulging his dog too much!"

"I agree! This dog is too arrogant. What a temper he has! Young Hero Xu shouldn't spoil it anymore!"

"Yes, if pets are disobedient, they need to be disciplined!"

The crowd shook their heads and whispered amongst themselves.

Buttface had fine hearing and heard everything that the cultivators had said. "Damn, all of you are pets, all of your families are pets!" Buttface flared up in anger.

"Buttface, why do you curse all the time?" frowned Xu Que. "Can't you be more civilised? Ever heard of the phrase, 'cursing out loud brings temporary joy, but the whole family will be burnt to death'?

Pfftt!

The crowd could not help but burst out laughing.

Cursing out loud brings temporary joy, but the whole family will be burnt to death?

Haha, this is too f*cking vicious!

Young Hero Xu is indeed talented!

...

But Buttface took a longer time to react and when he realised what Xu Que had meant, he replied curtly, "stop jabbering, hurry up, trade and go!"

As he spoke, he extended both paws, one containing the Genesis Metal Herb and the other empty and waiting for Xu Que to hand over his 'magical weapon'.

Xu Que displayed some unwillingness again, with acting abilities that could score full marks. He looked like a man who was full of heartache as he handed the collar to Buttface.

Buttface did not play any tricks either. Man and dog completed the exchange smoothly and successfully.

Shoosh!

Xu Que stored the Genesis Metal Herb in his system inventory without hesitation. He immediately made a desperate gesture, as if he was trying to snatch back the collar.

Buttface seemed to have anticipated such a move from Xu Que and immediately gave a cackle. "Hahaha, young man, you're too young. You want to take back the exchanged item? There's no way you can do so as this deity has already seen through you!"
