He gazed intently at the Golden Dog Collar in his hands, getting more excited as he did so. "Hehehe, this deity has finally gotten hold of a treasure. Boy, you'll be shouting 666 soon!"

Instantaneously as he finished speaking, Buttface put the Golden Dog Collar right around his neck. It fit him perfectly.

"Hey boy, look! Does this deity look brilliantly mighty? This is really a nice treasure. Look at how fitting it is on me! It's like it was custom-made for this deity… Eh, boy, what are you laughing at? Why are you smiling in such a treacherous way?"

Buttface had been proudly showing off when he lifted his head and saw Xu Que's evil grin. Buttface's heart skipped at beat at that instant!

"Boy, what have you done?" asked a suspicious Buttface, trying to remove the Golden Dog Collar with his two paws.

That action made Buttface's expression turn to one of shock. "F*ck, boy, what did you do? This thing cannot be removed now!"

Buttface strained his energy to remove the leather collar but the collar did not move a single bit. It was as if the collar had grown into his neck. Nothing could make it move!

Now Xu Que could finally laugh without restraint. "Haha, Buttface, you're still too young! You dare to act arrogant in front of me? Try that again!"

The crowd present was confused. They had no idea what was happening.

Buttface had now realised that he had been fooled and flew into a rage!

"Bastard! This deity won't let you off!"

With a kick, Buttface made a leap towards Xu Que.

"Tsk, tsk, tsk, do you think you can fight me?"

Xu Que smiled casually and took a step back. He made a hand sign and started to chant the tightening spell!

"Owwww!"

In that instant, Buttface, who was in mid-air, gave a sudden howl and fell abruptly onto the ground.

Buttface started to roll around on the ground and screamed repeatedly in great pain.

"Owww… boy, you… what are you doing? Stop! Ahh…ahh, I'm out of breath…ahh, young… young man, this deity is wrong, stop now! You… you're murdering a Mythical Beast! You'll suffer divine retribution!"

Buttface was in extreme pain. His eyes were big and bulging out of their sockets. His tongue dangled out of his mouth as well. He really did resemble a 3D version of the husky in the emoticon pack.

The tightening spell brought him extreme pain, but he had not suffered any physical injuries.

However, this was still enough to make Xu Que happy. "How is it? Will you obey me? Let me ask you again. Will you obey me?"

"Obey! I'll obey!" Buttface answered with difficulty.

"You'll really obey me?"

"Really! I'll obey you!"

"Shout 666 for me?"

"Oww, 6666666666…"

chapters.title: Chapter 376: That’S An Offensive Term!
chapters.body:
Chapter 376: That’S An Offensive Term!

Chapter 376: That’s An Offensive Term!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que started to chant a spell. The collar around the dog's neck became tighter and tighter.

After hearing the dog shout '666' numerous times, Xu Que finally let Buttface off temporarily and allowed the collar to revert back to its original size. The collar remained wrapped around Buttface's neck.

Buttface was panting heavily, as though he had just had a close brush with death. He stuck out his long tongue and lay on the ground as if he was dead.

Xu Que was grinning from ear to ear, for he had successfully taught the dog a lesson!

"Buttface, you always claim to be a wolf, but only dogs find this collar especially irresistible. And this collar is also especially effective against dogs. Why did you fall for it so easily?" Xu Que asked, still grinning.

Buttface felt infuriated but the moment he thought about the collar on his neck, he instantly suppressed his anger. He explained, "this deity is a wolf but I can't deny the fact that wolves are also part of the canine family. It is not surprising that this deity has fallen for the trap. After all, even the wise are not always free from error!"

Xu Que gave a laugh. "Looks like the collar didn't shrink enough for you!"

With that, he mimed recommencing the chant.

Buttface was terrified and exclaimed, "no, no, no, I'm in awe of your strength, alright? Please, let's talk this over nicely."

Xu Que levitated stone from the ground into his palm, then threw it a distance. "Go on, Buttface." He smiled. "Fetch the stone!"

With a swoosh, Buttface dashed away to get the stone. But he didn't hold the stone in his mouth—instead he acted like a human holding the stone with his front paws and hurried back to Xu Que, wearing an eager-to-please expression.

Xu Que looked at Buttface with a smiling face without saying anything.

Buttface realised what Xu Que wanted. He grabbed the stone with his mouth then spat it out, then continued to look at Xu Que eagerly.

Everyone present was rendered speechless by both the man and the dog. They were secretly exclaiming in their hearts at how unusual and weird both the owner and his pet were!

"Okay, since I've gotten the spiritual herb, I'll take my leave then. All of you can go ahead and excavate the Dragon Veins without any worry. No need to be polite with me!"

Now that Xu Que had gotten hold of the spiritual herb, there was no need to continue staying here.

Swish!

He pulled out the Act Tough King Basic Suit and draped the black robe over himself like a dust coat!

The words 'Exploding Heavens Faction' glistened in front of his chest, attracting a lot of attention!

The princes and the cultivators all stared at him with their jaws hanging!

This was the second time he was changing his clothes since entering the Imperial Tombs. However, what he was wearing now had a majestic and domineering aura that was hard to describe!

"Let's follow Young Hero Xu and leave the place!" suggested the Third Prince.

Originally, they had been here only to participate in the Imperial Tombs Contest. They had never thought that they would complete the entire Contest in just one day. And all the rounds had been cracked by Xu Que and his pet dog!

Now that all those traps were cleared, the Imperial Tombs could now be opened up for the mining of the Dragon Veins. The only problem was that perhaps the Metal Emperor would need to advise everyone on methods of excavating the Dragon Veins.

Thus, no one else really had a need to continue staying there either. When the Third Prince voiced his opinion, everyone decided to follow his suggestion. They all left together with Xu Que.

...

Meanwhile, outside the Imperial Tombs, the Metal Emperor's heart was stirring with excitement and elation.

Now that the Imperial Tombs had been successfully opened up, his plans could finally be carried out. This would bring a major transformation and great development to the Metal Nation.

Swoosh!

A flash of white light appeared at the entrance of the Imperial Tombs. The restrictive spell started to form ripples.

Immediately, the entire group of cultivators, with Xu Que in the lead, stepped out of the Imperial Tombs.

Xu Que became the focus of everyone's attention immediately, as all eyes fell on him the moment he stepped out.

At that moment, he was in the spotlight.. He had become someone who was being respected and admired.

The Act Tough King Basic Suit that he was wearing gave off the aura of a majestic leader. His Acting Tough Points kept increasing as notifications rang ceaselessly in his head!

The crowd stared wide-eyed at Xu Que's clothes. His outfit was an eye-opener for them!

"So this is the uniform of the Exploding Heavens Faction that Young Hero Xu belongs to?"

"What an incredible aura! The material looks really ordinary but that aura is extraordinary!"

"Looks like the Exploding Heavens Faction is a big sect! Even their uniforms are so domineering!"

"Especially the three words on the chest 'Exploding Heavens Faction'. They must have been written by a Master."

"It's remarkable!"

Many people marveled at the effect the suit had on people. It impressed many.

The Third Prince was smiling radiantly in excitement. Besides winning the position of Crown Prince, he had done well in getting a capable man like Xu Que to rid the Imperial Tombs of all those traps and enchantments, and had ended up successfully opening it up.

Swish!

Suddenly, the Metal Emperor left his seat and flew over to where Xu Que and rest of the group were standing.

The Emperor had actually gotten down from his throne and flown over to the top of the mountain to receive Xu Que and the rest of the group.

"Young Hero Xu is indeed someone favored by the heavens," said the Emperor, greatly pleased. "The contest this round has truly been an eye-opener for me!" His voice was full of vigor and zeal that resonated through the area.

Everyone was envious but admitted in their hearts that Xu Que did deserve such treatment from the Emperor.

Well, there's no one else like him. Young Hero Xu is really formidable and cool!

In just one day, he had managed to defeat all the puppets, enchantments and traps. He had even found the Dragon Veins. Who would not be in awe of him?

...

Xu Que looked at the Metal Emperor, who was now standing before him, and smiled casually. "I'm not someone favored by the heavens," he said dismissively. "I'm just an ordinary young man. Moreover, in the Exploding Heavens Faction, 'favored by the heavens' is an offensive term to us."

The Emperor was baffled for an instant. Everyone else was slightly taken aback as well.

'Favored by the heavens' is offensive?

How is this offensive?

Why is the Exploding Heavens Faction so eccentric?

Eh? Wait a moment… Exploding Heavens Faction…

As everyone mulled over this, they suddenly realised why Xu Que had said that!

It is no wonder 'someone favored by the heavens' is offensive. The Exploding Heavens Faction is going to explode the heavens; of course they will not want to be favored by the heavens!

But then again, the one who named their sect 'Exploding Heavens Faction' is truly someone who has a lot of guts!

How can you explode the heavens on a whim?

...

Everyone was speechless and the Metal Emperor was slightly embarrassed. He gave a cackle and changed the topic. "Young Hero Xu, you've done well. Is there anything you want? I'll make sure to satisfy your demands!"

"Anything I want?"

Xu Que gave it some serious contemplation, feeling that perhaps he should take the opportunity to make a fast buck or something!

However, Xu Que was not short on anything. What should he ask for?

He glanced over at the divine chariot at the foot of the mountain. That was the Empress Dowager's vehicle!

Nevertheless, Xu Que was not that perverted. Even if the Empress Dowager was as beautiful as a fairy, it would be too awkward to ask for the Empress Dowager's hand in marriage!

That would be too embarrassing!

Shoosh!

At this moment, a few figures were moving at a great speed towards them. The figures landed on top of the mountain and kneeled on the floor on one leg. They then paid their respects to the Emperor!

"Greetings, Your Majesty!" The few of them said in unison.

They looked very alike and were all wearing the uniform of the Imperial Guards!

"You may rise!" said the Metal Emperor.

He wore a somewhat unnatural facial expression but managed to glance at Xu Que calmly.

However, one of the guards did not stand up. He looked anxious and said, "Your Majesty, this subordinate has just returned from Fire Country and has urgent information to report. Something major has happened in Fire Country!"

The guard then looked up at the Metal Emperor.

And when he saw Xu Que standing beside the Emperor, his expression changed drastically. It was as if he had seen a ghost!

chapters.title: Chapter 377: Yes, I Killed The Fire Emperor!
chapters.body:
Chapter 377: Yes, I Killed The Fire Emperor!

Chapter 377: Yes, I Killed The Fire Emperor!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"You… you are…"

The imperial guard looked terrified and pointed at Xu Que. His voice was trembling and he was unable to complete his sentence.

The Metal Emperor was puzzled and his eyebrows knitted closely together in thought.

These guards had been sent out by him not too long ago. Now that they were back, he wanted to know what they had discovered, especially now. He wanted information with regards to Xu Que or the Exploding Heavens Faction!

But it seemed from the terrified look of the guard that before he had been able to ask anything, he had definitely recognised Xu Que.

This surprised the Metal Emperor and he gave a swiftly order. "Men, bring them down for a rest!"

He knew that even if there was news on Xu Que from the other nations, the news should not be said in front of Xu Que.

That would make people misunderstand the reasons that the Metal Emperor had sent people to check up on Xu Que.

"Yes!"

Several eunuchs immediately acted on the order and walked over to lead the five imperial guards away.

But apparently, Xu Que did not want that. He immediately stopped them. "Wait!"

Just now when that guard talked about Fire Country, Xu Que knew that it was another chance to act tough!

Yet the Metal Emperor did not seem to want to hear about it and wanted to send them away. Xu Que would not let this happen!

This Act Tough King has stumbled on such a good opportunity to act tough, how can I just pass it up?

The guard must speak, and say it out loud to everyone… so that he can help this Act Tough King earn some publicity!

"Your Majesty, since he has something to say, why not let him say it first!" Xu Que crossed his arms whilst making his nonchalant comment.

The Metal Emperor paused for a while.

Xu Que had just done a great favor to the Metal Nation with regards to the Dragon Veins. With everyone watching, he felt that he should not turn down Xu Que's request.

He remained silent for a while then nodded his head, turning to the guard. "Alright, tell me what you know!"

"Yes, be rest assured, as long as I'm here, nobody will dare do anything to you!" Xu Que looked enthusiastic and gave a friendly smile.

The guard trembled for an instant and dared not look at Xu Que in the eye.

Inside, he was feeling agonised. Back when Xu Que had been in Fire Country, he had been there too and hadneven witnessed Xu Que ending the life of the Fire Emperor!

He also knew that Xu Que had slept with the Fire Emperor's concubine, sister and even the princess… no one had been left out.

Despite the fact that he had forgone his sleep and used various teleportation devices to rush back to the Metal Nation as soon as possible in order to report this news, this rascal had still been faster than him and had appeared here unexpectedly.

He was scared silly by Xu Que. He thought Xu Que had come to harm the Metal Nation!

He looked at the Metal Emperor, flustered. "Your Majesty, your loyal subordinate has just come back from Fire Country and has witnessed the Fire Emperor being… being… being killed!"

"What?"

Instantly, almost everyone present gasped in shock, including the Metal Emperor!

The Emperor of Fire Country has been killed?

Good heavens!

How is this possible?

Is the world descending into chaos?

Fire Country was considered one of the strongest amongst the five nations. It was in no way weaker than Metal Nation. How could the Emperor have died just like that? Could he have been taken out by an expert from overseas?

The crowd was shocked.

After all, Fire Country and Metal Nation had always been enemies. For many years, they had been fighting between themselves and had even sent killers to assassinate each other's princes and princesses.

Upon hearing the news of the death of the Fire Emperor, after the initial shock, they were actually glad.

Now everyone was curious about who had killed the Fire Emperor.

The Metal Emperor looked solemnly at the guard and asked, "do you know which venerable master did that?"

In his opinion, someone who could kill the Fire Emperor was certainly a strong entity and definitely above the stage of Infant Transformation… or even a master at the peak of the Void Training Stage!

Everyone looked at the guard in anticipation!

Shoosh!

Suddenly, Xu Que appeared at the top of the highest peak, his black cloak billowing behind him. No one knew when exactly Xu Que had gone up to the highest peak. He folded his arms before his chest and looked up to the sky at a 45 degree angle, looking proud and somber as if he was a formidable master!

The crowd was puzzled by his strange, unwarranted actions.

Brother, this is a crucial moment. Can't you focus on listening to what the guard will say?

What are you thinking of doing by going up so high?

You're not concerned about who killed the Fire Emperor but we are!

"Tell us, which venerable master did that?" The Metal Emperor turned to look at the guard again after being distracted by Xu Que earlier.

Everyone's attention was back on the guard again.

But instead, the guard shrank his neck and gingerly lifted his arm, pointing at Xu Que who was standing at the highest peak. The guard was unable to say a word.

"Hmm? What do you mean?"

Everyone was bewildered.

What does that mean?

We want to know who killed the Fire Emperor. Why are you pointing at Young Hero Xu?

Is it possible that Young Hero Xu is the one who did it?

Everyone furrowed their eyebrows.

The Metal Emperor's face turned grim and he said angrily, "audacious! Young Hero Xu is looking at the scenery. Why are you pointing at him? I'm asking you again, who is the venerable master who killed the Fire Emperor?"

The poor guard felt like weeping but had no tears. He had a bitter expression and answered carefully, "Your… Your Majesty, the Fire Emperor was… was killed by Xu Que of the Exploding Heavens Faction!"

Immediately, there was a moment of silence!

Everyone was frozen!

You said who?

Xu Que of the Exploding Heavens Faction?

A dignified monarch, the Emperor of Fire Country who was at the Infant Transformation stage, was killed by Xu Que?

Are you f*cking kidding me?

The Fire Emperor and Xu Que's level of cultivation are worlds apart. How can he have been killed by Xu Que?

By then, a sudden deep and rich voice was heard, coming from the highest peak of the mountain!

"Being invincible is really, really lonely…"

Eh?

Who's singing?

Everyone winced as they felt an uncontrollable, abrupt jolt. They turned their heads and looked up in shock!

They saw Xu Que standing on the highest peak, the cold winds blowing at his hair as well as his black robe…

His gaze was fixated on the faraway horizon and he continued to sing:

"Being invincible is really, really empty… Standing alone at the top, the cold winds blew endlessly… My loneliness, who can understand me…"

...

Everyone was now dumbfounded and thoroughly bewildered!

Being invincible is really lonely?

Being invincible is really empty?

The cold winds blew endlessly?

D*mn, by standing up so high, of course you'll feel the cold winds! What do you expect?

The corners of everyone's mouths twitched.

But soon, they started to realise something.

Why is Xu Que singing?

Because he wants to show off?

But what is he showing off now?

Could it be…

He really killed the Emperor of Fire Country?

Everyone held their breaths when they thought of that. They looked at Xu Que, tongue-tied.

When Xu Que finished singing his song, he continued looking into the horizon and puffed a long sigh. "Ai, since things have come to this, it seems like it is no of use to hide it anymore, no matter how hard I tried my best to keep a low profile! Yes, I killed the Fire Emperor!"

...

Woah!

All of sudden, everyone was floored!

Those who had been immersed in uncertainty and doubt earlier were deeply stunned now that Xu Que had admitted it himself!

Xu Que, a Level Nine Original Infant Stage, killed the Fire Emperor who was at Level Six of the Infant Transformation Stage?

How… how is that possible?

The princes who had entered the Imperial Tombs with Xu Que were clearly appalled!

The Third Prince, Seventh Princess and their group knew Xu Que was really powerful. But they had never thought that Xu Que was so talented… he could even take down the Fire Emperor!

The Second Prince who was standing behind the crowd broke out in a cold sweat. He felt chilly winds blowing at his spine and felt really terrified!

The Metal Emperor also went numb for a moment; his arm shook slightly as well.

If Xu Que could take out the Fire Emperor, doesn't that mean that he can kill me as well? thought the Metal Emperor.

When he thought of this, he took a step back involuntarily.

He looked towards the guard and asked seriously, "is this piece of news accurate?"

The guard wore a bitter expression and answered, "your loyal subordinate witnessed that scene!"

Gasp!

Immediately, the Metal Emperor took in a breath of cold air and looked aghast!

The guard then hesitated for moment, gritted his teeth and whispered, "Your Majesty, do remember to protect the princess and all of the concubines in the Palace…"

"What?" The Metal Emperor was confused.

The guard added, "Empress Dowager … Her Majesty must be protected too!"

chapters.title: Chapter 378: Earth Nation And Wood Nation Were Robbed?
chapters.body:
Chapter 378: Earth Nation And Wood Nation Were Robbed?

Chapter 378: Earth Nation and Wood Nation Were Robbed?

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

The scout guard tried his best to speak in the lowest tone possible, telling the Emperor what had happened in Fire Country.

When the Metal Emperor heard everything, he was completely shocked.

But what they didn't know was that when they had been talking, Buttface had snuck up behind them and listened in on everything without their knowledge.

The Metal Emperor did not realise anything and looked at the guard incredulously. "You mean… Young Hero Xu was originally the prince consort of Fire Country? He was plotted against by the Fire Emperor so he took revenge? The Emperor's concubine, sister and daughter were also…"

"Yes, your loyal subordinate would use his life to guarantee that every word is true!" said the guard firmly.

The Metal Emperor stayed silent for a moment.

At the same time, he secretly heaved a sigh of relief.

After all, he had not done anything to Xu Que, so he was able to stay calm.

However, his eyes involuntarily flicked over to the Seventh Princess who had followed behind Xu Que.

"Will this boy take my seventh daughter away?" muttered the Metal Emperor, feeling somewhat worried.

At this moment, a shadow suddenly chimed in. A low voice spoke, "he will, he will, this deity will guarantee with my life that the rascal will definitely, absolutely, surely do such things!"

"Eh?"

The Emperor and the scout guard were stunned by the abrupt appearance of Buttface. They each took a step back and stared at Buttface with much consternation. "You… when did you get here?"

Buttface rolled his crafty eyes and looked at them with feigned solemnity. "That's not important. The important thing is, that fellow Xu Que is certainly a dangerous person. Whoever he stares at will get pregnant!"

Whoever he stares at will get pregnant? Are you exaggerating? The Metal Emperor and the scout raised their eyebrows as they considered this.

"Buttface, you seem in need of some strangling again!"

Suddenly, Xu Que's voice was heard.

Buttface's expression instantly changed and his first instinct was to run away.

However, the collar on his neck shrunk rapidly at the next moment.

"Owww!"

Buttface immediately gave a miserable cry. His tongue stuck out to one side of his crooked mouth; his eyes were so wide that they seemed like they would pop out at any time. With a thump, he dropped to the floor and rolled on the ground in pain.

"Oww, hold… hold it! This deity did wrong! Really wrong! I'm guilty! I'm not a human!"

Buttface screamed and wailed like nobody's business.

"Uh…"

The Metal Emperor and the scout were startled by the sudden scene before them.

They turned to look at the peak of the mountain.

Xu Que was still standing at the peak, allowing the winds to blow at his black robe. He was chanting the spell so softly that only he could hear, but seemed bent on tormenting Buttface.

"You dare to speak ill of me behind my back? I'll strangle you first for twenty hours!" said Xu Que indifferently.

Buttface was full of tears. He had become a crying dog now. "Don't, I'm wrong. Just now these two fellows started it by speaking ill of you. This deity is muddled in the head and said a few regretful words! These two are the main culprits!"

The Metal Emperor and the scout's mouths twitched.

Darn! This dog is too brazen! It should be strangled to death!

Young Hero Xu did well in strangling it!

...

Xu Que continued to stay where he was, chanting the spell to teach Buttface a lesson as well as enjoying being in the wind.

Meanwhile, system notifications continued to ring in his head.

His Acting Tough Points increased again He had earned back more than 10,000 points now, making up for the points that he had spent earlier on renting the Iron Man suit.

However it didn't just stop there. His Acting Tough Points kept coming in under the thunderstruck expressions of the crowd!

Obviously, everyone was incredulous about the fact that Xu Que had killed the Fire Emperor. They were aghast by the news and they took a long time to calm down and digest the piece of information.

At the foot of the mountain, the Empress Dowager inside her divine chariot was now filled with respect for Xu Que.

Previously, she had thought that Xu Que was only good at controlling the divine chariots.

She had never expected that Xu Que and his dog could destroy all the restrictions and prohibitions laid down by their ancestors in the Imperial Tombs.

And now, the scout had brought back such shocking news.

That young man had actually killed the Fire Emperor.

The Empress Dowager found this unbelievable but she knew that the news the scout brought back couldn't be fake either.

...

Back at the top of the mountain, another scout suddenly kneeled down on the ground and said, "Your Majesty, your loyal subordinate is back from the Earth Nation… I have important news to report and it's related to the Exploding Heavens Faction!"

Another scout beside him heard that and paused for a moment, then kneeled right down as well. "Your Majesty, your loyal subordinate is back from the Wood Nation and has something to report with regards to the Exploding Heavens Faction as well!"

"Oh?"

The Metal Emperor was puzzled that the Earth Nation and the Wood Nation had news with regards to the Exploding Heavens Faction. Could it be that the Exploding Heavens Faction is active in these two nations? he thought.

Xu Que, who was standing at the peak of the mountain, was surprised at the words of the two scout guards as well.

He had not even been to the Wood Nation or the Earth Nation. How on earth did the two of them discover something about the Exploding Heavens Faction from the two distant nations?

Maybe the formidable name of the Exploding Heavens Faction has spread all over the world?

"What have you heard?" The Metal Emperor furrowed his eyebrows.

Everyone was curious as well and their sights were now on the two scouts.

After all, it was something related to the Exploding Heavens Faction. Many people were very interested in Xu Que's Exploding Heavens Faction. They wanted to know more about this sect.

But when they heard the information from the scouts, everyone was frozen on the spot, including Xu Que!

According to them, just a few days ago, there had been a major case of theft in the Earth Nation and the Wood Nation.

The Imperial Tombs of these two nations had been raided. The Genesis Earth Herb and the Genesis Wood Herb with the Dragon Veins had been stolen by the same person in just three days.

And that man was the legendary notorious figure Duan Jiu De!

"Duan Jiu De? Are you sure it's really him?"

"Heavens, I've always thought he was just a myth. I didn't expect there to really be such a person out there!"

"This is too scary! According to what I heard, that fellow is unparalleled yet he likes to steal from others!"

"Within five nations, there is no one who can stop him!"

The crowd was alarmed; many of them gasped loudly as this piece of news had shaken them more than the news of Xu Que killing the Fire Emperor.

After all, the legendary Duan Jiu De was too bizarre and too powerful. They found it hard to believe that there was such a formidable presence in the world.

However, Xu Que was thoroughly dumbfounded.

Duan Jiu De took away the Genesis Herbs of the Earth Nation and the Wood Nation?

What… what should I do?

How can I revive Xiao Rou without the other two spiritual herbs?

Xu Que found it difficult to accept this fact.

...

On the other hand, the Metal Emperor frowned and asked, "Aren't you supposed to tell us the news of the Exploding Heavens Faction? Why did you talk about Duan Jiu De?"

The scout hurriedly answered, "Your Majesty, there are some carved words left by Duan Jiu De in the Imperial Tombs of both nations. He claimed he is Duan Jiu De of the Exploding Heavens Faction and that he is the teacher of Young Hero Xu. He even said… if Young Hero Xu wants the spiritual herbs, just look for him!"

"What… what?"

The crowd froze once more and stood there like fools.

Duan Jiu De… is actually Young Hero Xu's teacher?

Oh my God, this is awesome!

No wonder Young Hero Xu has such a strange way of doing things!

So he's the disciple of Duan Jiu De!

When the two of their names are placed together, the characters 'Que' and 'De' form to mean 'wicked.' And so… they become The Wicked Duo, don't they?

At that moment, everyone turned to look at Xu Que in a dazed manner.

...

However, Xu Que was also taken aback by the news. He almost spat out a mouthful of blood!

When did I f*cking become Duan Jiu De's disciple?

In the past it was just for acting tough. But now… that notorious old man, is he even qualified to become my teacher?

F*ck! Duan Jiu De, just you wait!

chapters.title: Chapter 379: Will You Give Me The Empress Dowager Or The Princess?
chapters.body:
Chapter 379: Will You Give Me The Empress Dowager Or The Princess?

Chapter 379: Will You Give Me The Empress Dowager Or The Princess?

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que was furious.

He knew that Duan Jiu De must have come for him.

Initially, he had used Duan Jiu De's name to act tough. But he had never thought that the old geezer would find out about that.

Duan Jiu De was claiming to be from the Exploding Heavens Faction and pretending to be Xu Que's teacher. He had even taken away the Genesis Herbs from the Wood Nation as well as the Earth Nation.

Duan Jiu De's reason for doing all these things was obvious. By stealing the herbs, Duan Jiu De could force Xu Que to search for him so he could settle scores with Xu Que for using his name.

Xu Que was not afraid of how strong Duan Jiu De would be. He was worried about the two Genesis Herbs. If he could not get them back, he would lose the chance to revive Xiao Rou.

No, since the old man hasn't gotten hold of the Genesis Water Herb, I need to get to Water Nation immediately! he thought to himself.

Xu Que looked solemn and turned to the Metal Emperor.

"Your Majesty, just now you asked me if there is anything I want. I can answer you now!" said Xu Que earnestly. "I need a teleportation device that can let me teleport to the Water Nation in the shortest time possible!"

The Metal Emperor was dazed for a second. "You… want to go to the Water Nation?"

"Yes, as soon as possible!" Xu Que nodded his head.

"Although the Water Nation is not far away from us, there isn't any direct teleportation device that can take you there. If I were to build one now, I would need two days to do that!"

"Two days?" Xu Que couldn't help but furrow his eyebrows.

Two days was like nothing for a cultivator.

But time was of the essence to Xu Que now. If Duan Jiu De got there earlier than him, he would lose another spiritual herb!

"Young Hero Xu, why not return to the Palace with me first?" suggested the Emperor. "The spiritual Qi is rather rich there. It's the perfect place to build a teleportation device. I promise you that I'll definitely get my men to work at their fastest speed possible to build the teleportation device!"

"Thank you, Your Majesty!" nodded Xu Que as he made a gesture of respect to the Emperor. "Oh, about what Buttface said earlier, you don't have to worry about it. I, Xu Que, have always adventured around the world upholding chivalry and righteousness. How could a person like me ever even dream of setting my sights on the Empress Dowager? Rest assured!"

When the Metal Emperor heard that, he stumbled and nearly fell down.

Originally he had not actually felt worried about that. But now that Xu Que had made a guarantee by patting his chest in a righteous manner, he began to feel concerned.

By bringing this guy into the Palace, is that tantamount to inviting a wolf into my house? pondered the Emperor.

Mother consumed the Youth Retaining Pill and since then, her appearance has not deteriorated. Even in the Metal Nation, she is an unmatched beauty. If this guy were to see her beauty, there is no guarantee that there won't be accidents!

The more the Metal Emperor thought about it, the more worried he became.

Soon, the crowd left the mountain. Only the guards stayed behind to guard the Imperial Tombs.

Xu Que went back with the Metal Emperor. Whilst on the way back to the Imperial City, the Metal Emperor would turn to look at Xu Que time and time again in a thoughtful manner.

Well, the Metal Emperor didn't want to have such a young stepfather after all!

As for the Empress Dowager, she had already been sent back to the Palace at the fastest possible speed by the Metal Emperor's men.

Xu Que knew all of that and he was smiling without a word.

Hide?

Will hiding be effective?

Running away will not solve the problem!

You may run away now but you can't keep running away from the problem all your life!

I, Xu Que, the Act Tough King, can get any woman I want! None of them… bleh, bleh, bleh, f*ck, why am I thinking about this?

I'm going to the Water Nation to raid the tombs. So what if the Empress Dowager is a beauty? What business is it of mine?

Xu Que shook his head as he came back to his senses.

He felt that he had drawn the suspicions of the Metal Emperor becausen of all those protective actions that were being taken.

It almost made him think that he could be one of the types who would chase any female who knew how to walk, even if they were several hundred years old…

"Bleh, this Act Tough King is so noble and righteous. Why would I do something like that? F*ck! It's too hardcore!" Xu Que muttered to himself and shook his head.

Buttface was just beside him and of course he heard everything. He gave Xu Que a sly leer. "Just continue to pretend, this deity has already seen right through you. You're a bad egg who brings disasters which can last for thousands of years. You… Owww!"

Before Buttface could finish his words, Xu Que chanted the tightening spell and Buttface rolled on the ground, shrieking in pain.

Those who saw that exclaimed repeatedly.

Young Hero Xu trains his pet so often, no wonder his pet is so strong!

...

Finally, everyone arrived at the Imperial City.

Xu Que followed the Metal Emperor to the Palace. The Third Prince, Seventh Princess and the rest followed closely behind.

As for the Second Prince, when he saw that Xu Que had gained favor with the Metal Emperor and actually had such formidable powers, he became scared out of his wits and dared not enter the Palace.

When the crowd entered the Imperial City, he quietly left by taking advantage of the huge crowd and went to hide somewhere, as he was worried Xu Que might search for him.

Xu Que had better things to do now so he was not bothered with such small fry. He was sitting inside the Metal Emperor's divine chariot and talking with him.

Frankly speaking, he had a good impression of the Metal Emperor.

At least this Emperor was a good one. He had very advanced thinking and knew that in order to improve, reforms were a must!

Hence, Xu Que shared quite an amount of esoteric policies with regards to governing a country.

"Ah, Lao Jin, although you are right to excavate the Dragon Veins, they are not something that can last forever, you know? To get rich, build roads first. Look at your Imperial Tombs, the racing course is all sand and soil… that's no good. Roads across the country must be watered with concrete, then use asphalt to make them into highways. Oh yes, and you may want to look into high-speed railways."

To get rich, build roads first?

Make the roads across the country into highways?

The Metal Emperor looked dazed. Although he did not quite understand, he felt that those words made a lot of sense.

At the very least, he concurred with the saying, 'to get rich, build roads first'.

Therefore, The Metal Emperor and Xu Que shared and talked a lot on the journey back.

Xu Que mentioned three reform policies to the Metal Emperor; 'to get rich, build roads first', 'plant more trees and bear fewer babies' and 'time used to bear babies is better used on rearing pigs and planting trees'. He also stressed the importance of the implementation of these three 'representative' policies as a nationwide campaign!

The Metal Emperor felt that he had benefitted a lot from this discussion. Even though there were a lot of terms that he could not understand, he could remember the simple and easily comprehensible slogans!

"I'm surprised that Young Hero Xu is so talented and has such a high level of knowledge in terms of governing a country. This is really an eye-opener!" exclaimed the Metal Emperor, who was now totally in awe of his abilities.

Xu Que waved his hands. "Nah, we should keep a low profile. This is just general knowledge. But in order to reform, we need to work on being civilised first. The Imperial City may look bustling and prosperous but in actual fact, it has a foul atmosphere. Just not too long ago, I saw someone selling stinky tofu in the streets. The city must undergo a reform so as to set a good example for the other cities of the Metal Nation!"

"Young Hero Xu is right. Do you have any specific ideas on how to go about doing that?" The Metal Emperor nodded and smiled.

Xu Que narrowed his eyes as if in thought and replied, "it will depend on you to find the correct way. After all, there's a saying, a teacher can show the way to a student but how far the student goes depends on him alone. Lao Jin, my friend, you have to work hard!"

The Metal Emperor smiled pleasantly and nodded. "Why don't we do this? Young hero Xu, I'll personally oversee the construction of the teleportation device. As for you, you'll help me reform the Imperial City. When you're leaving, I'll give you another big present as my thanks to you, how about it?"

"You're letting me reform the Imperial City? And you'll give me another big present too?" Xu Que raised an eyebrow and felt interested. He smiled shyly. "Lao Jin, you're too polite. Everyone has a responsibility to serve the people. But the big present… will you be giving me the Empress Dowager or the princess? Eh, eh, eh, don't look at me like that. I'm warning you, in the name of justice, you absolutely cannot do this. Whether you give me the Empress Dowager or the Princess, I will not accept. If you don't believe me, you can try!"

chapters.title: Chapter 380: Xu Que Reforms The Imperial City!
chapters.body:
Chapter 380: Xu Que Reforms The Imperial City!

Chapter 380: Xu Que Reforms The Imperial City!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

If you don't believe me, you can try!

Try? If I really did that, they would be gone forever!

The Metal Emperor was dumbfounded and did not respond to Xu Que's words.

Nevertheless, throughout the journey, his mind was constantly on Xu Que's statement, 'give me the Empress Dowager or the Princess'!

Although Xu Que had affirmed righteously that he would not accept such a gift, the Metal Emperor was still apprehensive and felt that he must stay vigilant on this matter!

Otherwise, if he was not careful, the young man before him could become his son-in-law as well as his stepfather any moment now!

Finally, Xu Que and the Metal Emperor entered the Palace.

Without any delay, the Metal Emperor immediately sent his men to prepare all the necessary and valuable rare materials, as well as large amounts of spirit stones to build the teleportation device that could cross over to another nation.

At the same time, the Emperor did not dare to let Xu Que loiter in the Palace. He also wasted no time and issued an imperial decree that granted Xu Que the highest authority for two days in order to allow him to reform the Imperial City!

The thought of searching for the Empress Dowager had not crossed Xu Que's mind either. He just grabbed the imperial decree and left the Palace. He was thinking of looking for Buttface and was wanting to do something great together!

However, after they had entered the Imperial City, Buttface had run away and disappeared without a trace.

Xu Que chanted the strangling spell several times but Buttface never once came back to him.

Clearly, Buttface had resolved not to come back again and get tortured by him.

Xu Que could not help but shake his head in disappointment. He made up his mind that whenever he had nothing better to do, he would chant the strangling spell before the durability of the collar ended, so that Buttface could get strangled to death and would not harm anyone again!

Other than waiting for the Metal Emperor to finish building the teleportation device within the next two days, there really was nothing for him to do.

He thought that he might as well follow what the imperial decree had said and help the Metal Emperor do something great!

With the imperial decree in hand, his authority was tantamount to the Metal Emperor's, which was very convenient for him.

On the first day, he led all of the city guards within the Imperial City out on a patrol to understand the hardships of the commoners. He earned a lot of Acting Tough Points in return!

After that, he booked the most notorious Yi Hong brothel in the Imperial City and made the entire group of city guards and captains wait outside the brothel.

Many of them were angry about the arrangement but they dared not voice their unhappiness.

In the end, Xu Que came out after just a short while and kept shaking his head. "This industry isn't doing well enough. The girls are just average-looking. You there, hurry up and note it down that we must get His Majesty to build an Entertainment City, understand? It's a big building where the casino and bars are downstairs and a hotel is upstairs!"

With that, Xu Que walked away, leaving the group of city guards and the guard captains in a daze.

Entertainment City? What is that?

"Eh, young master, why are you doing this?"

Suddenly, a middle-aged lady rushed out from the brothel chasing after Xu Que and shouted, "Young master, you haven't paid up!"

Xu Que stopped in his tracks and turned around with a shocked expression. "Is this for real? I didn't do anything and you're asking for money?"

"You didn't do anything? You chased away all the customers and called all the girls into your room. Surely you need to pay for that? Our rules are like that, once you call for the girls, you have to pay!" yelled the woman in her sharp tone. She placed her hands on her waist, completely ignoring all the city guards who were there.

Xu Que gave a vexed laugh. "Why should I pay when I did nothing to them?"

Then with a wave of his hand, he commanded, "men! Seal up this Yi Hong Brothel! The Imperial City is such a civilised place, how can such an unhealthy industry exist here? Seal it up and shut it down!"

The captains and all of the city guards were instantly bewildered!

Darn, why did His Majesty send such a shameless fellow to put the Imperial City in order?

Just a moment ago he was saying to build an Entertainment City but now, he wants to seal up Yi Hong Brothel. Not only that, but he even refused to pay up when he called for girls in the brothel! This is too brazen of him!

However, Xu Que had the imperial decree with him. All of them dared not defy the orders and really sealed up the brothel.

When the woman cried and beseeched Xu Que to let the brothel off, Xu Que had an unyielding attitude. He declared, "in a civilised city, places like this are a hive of filth and are not to be tolerated! I don't have a problem with you wanting to do business in the entertainment industry. But your girls should not have gone into prostitution! I am Xu Que of the Exploding Heavens Faction. My wish is for world peace. Fight me if you're not convinced!"

With that, he left the place in a righteous manner.

The commoners who were on the streets yelled and shouted in joy.

"Good! Go, seal it up!"

"This Yi Hong Brothel should have been sealed long ago."

"Previously, because they had the backing of someone influential, they imposed all kinds of charges. Just a meal alone would cost over a thousand taels of silver. It's totally a rip-off!"

"His Excellency is really wise!"

"This is great news. Now let's see where my godd*mned husband will go tonight!"

The commoners applauded the forced closure of the brothel and Xu Que's Acting Tough Points increased once again.

Subsequently, he really started introducing major changes to the Imperial City.

In just one night, he commanded all of the city guards to hang up a variety of horizontal banners that contained slogans with regards to civilization!

The next day, he even woke up early to teach the commoners in the city to sing the most popular songs about ethics, as well as the Chinese square dance.

Undoubtedly, this act helped the grannies and grampas in the Imperial City tremendously, as this gave them a newfound healthy hobby that could help them relax and enjoy life.

In just one day and one night, Xu Que became well-liked and respected by the commoners. They knew that the Emperor had sent the young man to reform the Imperial City!

This was really doing things to improve the lives of the people. No matter how successful it was or if it was even effective, everyone could at least feel that the royal family valued their people.

And thus, Xu Que became the star of the Imperial City who was loved by the people. He would be greeted by people wherever he went and most importantly, they were respectful of him!

However the city guards and captains following behind him wore gloomier faces as time passed.

One captain could not tolerate it further. He left quietly to inform the Emperor what had happened.

"Your Majesty, please do something about this. Young Hero Xu has been messing around in the city."

"Oh? How did he mess around? I've actually heard that the people are very happy these two days."

"Eh? The people are indeed happy but the way he does it, it's too peculiar!"

"How peculiar is it? I'm busy with the building of the teleportation device and do not know what happened in the city. Tell me, what did Young Hero Xu do?"

"He… he shut down Yi Hong Brothel on the first day. Then he got us to put up banners with civilised slogans everywhere. He said that they could help the people to have civilised thoughts!"

"Oh? Civilized slogans? This seems interesting. What did he write?"

"If thou spit at whim, thou art utterly devoid of conscience!"

"Uh? Spitting is certainly not good. Anymore?"

"Robbery brings temporary joy but thou whole family shall be burnt!"

"Be civilized or die!"

"If thou breaks open another's brain, those in jail will break open thine own!"

When the captain finished saying the slogans, the Metal Emperor's face was stiff.

There was a long pause before he asked with a hint of embarrassment, "these… these are all written by Young Hero Xu, right?"

"Yes, Your Majesty, don't you think this is messed up? There's even something more dreadful… he taught people to sing and dance! Just this morning, someone came to the Magistrate's office to file an official complaint that many middle-aged women, grannies and gramps are disturbing other residents."

"Sing and dance?"

"Yes, and it's extremely unpleasant to the ear. Your loyal subordinate will sing one part and Your Majesty will know why. One of the songs is like this!"

The captain touched and cleared his throat. "Hey girl, come and grab… come and grab, come and grab… come and grab some melon seeds, eh…"

chapters.title: Chapter 381: The Empress Dowager’S Chamber!
chapters.body:
Chapter 381: The Empress Dowager’S Chamber!

Chapter 381: The Empress Dowager’s Chamber!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

On that day, the Metal Emperor almost suffered a nervous breakdown.

He had been very busy overseeing the building of the teleportation device, but he had still had a small hope that Xu Que would be able to create a miracle and give the Imperial City a makeover.

That young man had helped to implement changes, but everything was now a mess.

The people of the city were satisfied but his court officials constantly kept coming to him to complain that Xu Que was destroying the appearance of the beautiful Imperial City!

He had sent men to hang all kinds of horizontal banners with strange slogans on them. Xu Que also ordered the slogans to contain the words 'Exploding Heavens Faction' as well in order to boost its publicity.

The worst thing was, Xu Que had gone all over the city and taught all those funny songs to people. The songs had become so widespread that citizens ranging from 80-year-old ladies to little children who had just learnt how to walk were now all able to sing them.

When one took a walk down the streets, everywhere one went there would be people humming 'you are the most beautiful cloud on the horizon', 'you are my small ah, small apple', 'hey girl, come and grab, come and grab a handful of melon seeds, ah'!"

And some of the commoners had modified the lyrics in such a way that made the songs really strange.

For example, the songs had now become:

You are my small ah, small handful…

In any case, the Imperial City was filled with happy citizens but miserable eunuchs and officials!

On the third day, the Metal Emperor quickly sent men to get Xu Que to come to the Palace.

The reason was that the teleportation device would be ready very soon and Xu Que needed to hurriedly make preparations by going to the Palace.

Of course Xu Que was relaxed. When he received the news after waking up in the inn, he put on the Act Tough King basic suit, with the three shiny words 'Exploding Heavens Faction' on the front. He also donned a pair of sunglasses before going out.

Along the way, the people in the streets were very friendly and warm towards him. He was very popular.

Xu Que's Acting Tough Points were rising again, especially over the last two days. He had already earned several thousand Acting Tough Points and had gotten back what he had spent, as well as a lot of surplus points.

Now, looking at his System's personal interface, the Acting Tough Points had nearly exceeded 30,000!

Xu Que was delighted whilst he continued on his way to the Palace. He even hummed a song with enthusiasm:

"Hey girl, come and grab, come and grab, come and grab some melon seeds ah…"

Instantly, a commoner on the street continued the song:

"Hey boy, show that black fur, that black fur, those black furry pants, ah…"

The scene was bustling with activity and more people started to join in, singing louder and louder.

And so, Xu Que nodded in satisfaction as he heard the loud singing from the people. He happily strode along and entered the Palace!

...

The moment he entered the Palace, a eunuch immediately came to greet him. The eunuch had a subservient and eager-to-please attitude. "Young Hero Xu, Your Majesty has sent me to lead the way for you. Come, this way please!"

Xu Que nodded and followed.

But soon, he felt something amiss. He seemed to be going deeper into the Palace. It did not seem that the teleportation device would be built so deep inside its walls!

"Eh? Isn't this the way to the Empress Dowager's chamber?" exclaimed Xu Que, seeming to recall something.

"Young hero Xu, please forgive me," implored the eunuch, who shuddered in fright. "This old servant has lied earlier. Actually the… the Empress Dowager, Her Majesty, wants to see you!"

Xu Que gasped.

"Her Majesty wants to see me? Why?" said a perplexed Xu Que. "I'm handsome but Her Majesty, being an elderly figure, can't just do this. This is broad daylight, it's embarrassing!"

"Ah?"

The eunuch was confused for a moment. "Young Hero Xu, please don't misunderstand," said the eunuch, waving his hands. "Her Majesty just wants to invite you over for a chat. She doesn't have any other intentions and she won't hold you up for long."

"So it's just some chitchat? Then forget it. Relay my message to Her Majesty that I'm not going to see her!" said Xu Que, who turned and walked away.

The eunuch was flustered and he hurriedly stopped Xu Que in his tracks.

"Young Hero Xu, don't be in such a rush!" said the eunuch, smiling somewhat bitterly. "Her Majesty did tell me that she knows that you're going to the Water Nation. And she has something to discuss with you!"

"Something related to the Water Nation?" Xu Que looked startled.

The eunuch replied with a nod. "Yes, it is something related to the Imperial Tombs of the Water Nation!"

Xu Que frowned slightly when he heard that:

Something related to the Imperial Tombs of the Water Nation? I have to make this trip then.

But this Empress Dowager… there might be something that she wants. This looks like a major deal to me!

Xu Que curled up his lips into a smile. "Fine, let's go, to Her Majesty's chamber. I happen to have a big secret with regards to the Second Prince that I wanted to share with her as well!"

"Alright, Young Hero Xu, this way please!"

The eunuch responded with a face full of joy and continued to lead the way.

Soon, both of them arrived at the main entrance of the Empress Dowager's chamber.

At that time the doors were shut tightly and Xu Que could not sense anyone inside the chamber. Clearly, the Empress Dowager was not inside.

Xu Que was instantly unhappy about this. Is this a f*cking no-show? he cursed inside his head.

The eunuch also realized that the Empress Dowager was not around. He explained, "Young Hero Xu, please wait for a moment. Her Majesty had ordered this old servant to wait for you at the Palace gates since early morning. She does not know that you have arrived!"

"What shall I do then? I'm in a hurry, the plane is going to… bleh, the teleportation device is going to start soon."

"Her Majesty should be inside the library, reciting scriptures," smiled the old eunuch apologetically. "This old servant will go inform her right now. Young Hero Xu, please pardon me while this old servant quickly goes. I will be back soon!"

As the saying went, 'do not slap a smiling face'. Xu Que did not make things difficult for the old eunuch and let him leave to inform the Empress Dowager.

After all, he was so curious as to what she wanted to say!

But after waiting for a while, the eunuch still had not come back. Xu Que started to take a closer look at the courtyard of the Empress Dowager.

Apparently, there was nothing interesting in the courtyard.

But the bedroom of the Empress Dowager would likely be interesting!

Thinking back, he remembered that even the Second Prince had a secret treasure vault that contained many treasures. Maybe the Empress Dowager had some good stuff too!

With that, Xu Que reached for the knob of bedroom door.

Creak!

He opened the door lightly. Before he entered, he detected a faint scent in the air.

"Eh, there's actually some floral fragrance here!"

Xu Que raised an eyebrow, went in and surveyed everything in the room.

The furnishings inside the room were simple, mainly furniture made of sandalwood which exuded a light, refreshing scent.

However, the floral fragrance was not from this furniture.

Xu Que felt an urge to search for the source of the floral fragrance.

Maybe Her Majesty has hidden a secret garden somewhere, like some indoor planting?

He started to wander about the room and time to time, he would touch the furniture or items to see if there were any secret doors or anything of the sort.

Before long, he found himself standing in front of a neatly arranged bed!

This was because the faint floral scent came from this very bed!

To be precise, there were some small, colourful and neatly arranged pieces of cloth on the bed. And they were actually the undergarments that women wore during ancient times!

Xu Que was a well-informed person but undergarments that could emit floral scent were really rare.

"Hmm!"

He pondered for a short while before picking an undergarment up.

Sure enough, the material for making the undergarment was silk threads that he had never seen before. Besides the faint floral scent, they also had a soft gleam!

The fabric felt smooth to the touch, so soft and smooth that it felt like it could seep through the fingers like warm water.

Wait… why is this warm?

Has this just been taken off?

Xu Que raised his eyebrow again in thought.

When facing new things, people tend to look, touch and even smell them, even if it's only instinctive!

Therefore, now that Xu Que had seen and touched the undergarments, and was pondering the reason why they were slightly warm, he instinctively held the undergarment over to his nose and took a sniff.

The faint scent of the flowers was indeed more concentrated in the undergarment.

However, at that moment, Xu Que felt a chill run down his back.

In no time, an icy, cold voice was heard from behind him as well.

"What are you doing?"

"Eh?"

Xu Que was taken aback and hurriedly turned around. He had not even known that a beautiful woman had appeared and was standing at the entrance of the room. The woman had a nice figure and wore a veil over her face.

A faint floral scent wafted from the woman's body as well. Xu Que could detect that the floral scent was exactly the same as the one coming from the undergarment!

She also exuded a mature and charming aura!

Obviously, this had to be the beautiful Empress Dowager!

However, she was glaring at Xu Que coldly. Her gaze fell on the undergarment that Xu Que was holding and she looked furious.

Xu Que put down the undergarment calmly. "I know you might not believe me!" said Xu Que seriously. "But I only wanted to smell it to see what brand of washing powder you're using!"

chapters.title: Chapter 382: Deep Waters Of The Royalty
chapters.body:
Chapter 382: Deep Waters Of The Royalty

Chapter 382: Deep Waters Of The Royalty

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

The air inside the whole bedroom seemed to have frozen.

The Empress Dowager stared at Xu Que coldly but with a righteous aura. He stood upright and looked at her with a clear conscience.

Perhaps she thought that there was nothing that she could do to Xu Que, so she could only let the matter rest by entering her bedroom and sitting down on a chair.

She also poured herself a cup of warm tea and said indifferently, "Young Hero Xu, I've invited you over because I have an important matter to discuss with you!"

"Your Majesty is too polite, please go ahead to say it," said Xu Que in a gentlemanly manner, sitting right down on a chair opposite her.

The Empress Dowager pushed the cup of warm tea over to Xu Que. In a nonchalant tone, she said, "if I am guessing correctly, Young Hero Xu wanted to go to the Water Nation because of the Genesis Water Herb, correct?"

"Ah, you're so clever. You actually guessed it!" Xu Que blinked and smiled. He didn't bother about the cup of warm tea and pretended that he had not noticed it.

After all, he was all by himself—one should not simply eat or drink things offered by strangers! Who knew if the Empress Dowager had done something to the drink?

What if she covets this Act Tough King's body and has drugged the drink? thought Xu Que.

The Empress Dowager could sense Xu Que's worry about the cup of tea but she remained silent about it. In her usual indifferent tone, she continued, "Young Hero Xu may not know that the Dragon Veins in the Water Nation are very special, for they are sealed in ice. If you break it forcefully, the spiritual herb may dissipate. I happen to have a treasure called Godly Ice Permeable Shuttle that can help you pick the spiritual herb with ease!"

"Oh? There exists such a thing?" Xu Que smiled faintly and appeared unaffected by the piece of news.

So what if the Water Nation's Dragon Veins are sealed in ice?

This Act Tough King has a System. Do you think ice can daunt me? System has the ability to directly extract the Genesis Water Herb. Why should I need to use your Godly Ice Permeable Shuttle?

The Empress Dowager was quite taken aback by Xu Que's apathetic attitude.

"Young Hero Xu, what I've said is really true," said the Empress Dowager earnestly. She thought that Xu Que did not believe her. "The Genesis Water Herb residing in the Dragon Veins of the Water Nation is really special. Only the Godly Ice Permeable Shuttle can help you get the herb."

Xu Que shook his head. "Your Majesty, I don't agree with you. As the saying goes, the world is full of wonders—ain't no mountain high enough, ain't no valley low enough. The Exploding Heavens Faction has at least a hundred ways of extracting the Genesis Water Herb!"

The Empress Dowager was dumbfounded by Xu Que's claims.

Originally, she had wanted to use the Godly Ice Permeable Shuttle as her bargaining chip to negotiate with Xu Que!

However, Xu Que was not at all impressed by the Godly Ice Permeable Shuttle. He even claimed to have a hundred ways of obtaining the spiritual herb. This had totally upset the Empress Dowager's plans!

If such a situation had happened on Earth, the Empress Dowager would certainly make this remark: you boast so well that you scatter all my thoughts!

...

After a brief moment of silence, the Empress Dowager nodded her head slightly. "Seems like I've underestimated Young Hero Xu's capability. If Young Hero Xu does not think that this rare shuttle can help you, then I won't waste Young Hero Xu's time any longer. Speaking honestly, I know that there is a type of pill that can be found in the Imperial Tombs of the Water Nation. I would like to ask young hero Xu to help me remove it, since you're going there anyway!"

"Oh? What kind of pill is it?" Xu Que's curiosity was piqued.

The Empress Dowager replied solemnly, "Eight-Star Ice Jade Pill!"

An eight-star pill?!

Xu Que was taken aback by her reply. What kind of country is the Water Nation to actually have eight-star pills? he thought.

Within the five nations, even six-star pills were rarely seen. And now he had been told that the Imperial Tombs of the Water Nation actually contained eight-star pills. If this news were to get out, many cultivators from all over the world would be flocking to Water Nation's Imperial Tombs to become tomb raiders!

"From what I know, the Water Nation's Imperial Tombs contain three Ice Jade Pills," the Empress Dowager said softly. "These pills are priceless and only have an effect on female cultivators. I would like young hero Xu to bring back one pill to me. Please feel free to state your conditions!"

Xu Que was left speechless.

What kind of effect does this Ice Jade Pill has that could make the Empress Dowager say 'please feel free to state your conditions'?

Tsk, this is too embarrassing! This Act Tough King is not that kind of person!

"Your Majesty, what kind of effect will the Ice Jade Pill have on female cultivators?" asked a curious Xu Que.

The Empress Dowager's eyes shifted slightly away. She replied indifferently, "Young Hero Xu should be able to tell that I have been caught in a kind of… bottleneck for many years. This pill contains an immense amount of essence of dao and spiritual Qi that can help me break through this bottleneck in life."

"I see!" Xu Que nodded his head.

However, he was sneering inside his head.

He didn't believe what the Empress Dowager had said. An Eight-Star Ice Jade Pill to help her break through her bottleneck? Well, there wasn't any problem with that claim!

But, simply for the sake of breaking through her bottleneck in life, a well-respected figure like the Empress Dowager was actually asking Xu Que to state his conditions freely. Xu Que smelt a rat!

Instantly, Xu Que called out System and inquired, "System, what use is this Ice Jade Pill?"

Ding! "This Ice Jade Pill is high-grade medicine that purifies and rejuvenates bone marrow. Only a female virgin cultivator at the stage of Infant Transformation can consume the pill. After taking the pill, their innate talent and spiritual roots will be greatly enhanced so that chances of evolution will be higher!" explained the System inside Xu Que's head.

Xu Que was confused in that moment!

What?

This pill only works for female virgin cultivators?

The Empress Dowager even had grandchildren. Why would she need that pill? Could it be that the pill was meant for the Seventh Princess?

But the Seventh Princess was only at Level Three of the Original Infant Stage. To consume that pill, one had to be in the Infant Transformation Stage. In any case, the Empress Dowager really seemed to want the pill for herself.

Xu Que was filled with doubt. Thinking back to when the Empress Dowager had been explaining the use and purpose of the pill, she had been avoiding eye contact. Xu Que knew then that this matter was not as simple as it seemed!

The waters of the Royal Family are indeed deep!

If the Empress Dowager is a virgin, how many people will be scared to death?

Xu Que's eyes narrowed slightly at that thought as he took a look at the woman who was wearing a veil before him. He smiled lightly at her.

"What do you say, Young Hero Xu? Why are you smiling at me? Is there anything on my face?" asked the Empress Dowager with a slight frown.

Xu Que smiled and replied, "everyone has a love for beauty. The Empress Dowager is as beautiful as a fairy, I'm purely appreciating your beauty."

"Young Hero Xu, please show some respect!" The Empress Dowager gave an icy glare and her brows knitted closer together than before.

"Alright, I'll cut to the point now. There's no problem in getting the Ice Jade Pill! But…" Xu Que paused and looked serious. "The focus here is the 'but'! Why should I bring back the pill to you? You said that I can state anything I want, but I don't need anything. This deal is meaningless to me!"

The Empress Dowager was confounded. "Young Hero Xu," she quickly said in a persuasive voice. "I have numerous treasures and magical weapons. I can give them to you if you like. I can even… I see that you're rather close with the Seventh Princess. If you really like her, I can help with that!"

"Ah? You are giving me the princess?"

Xu Que was stunned and without much thought he blurted, "so… can you be given to me?"

chapters.title: Chapter 383: I’Ll Wait For You
chapters.body:
Chapter 383: I’Ll Wait For You

Chapter 383: I’ll Wait For You

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que really had not expected the Empress Dowager to be so generous. For only one Ice Jade Pill, she would give the Seventh Princess away just like that.

At that time, Xu Que was wondering if the Seventh Princess was really the granddaughter of the Empress Dowager.

The Empress Dowager chose to ignore Xu Que's question, 'can you be given to me'. Although her cold aura of killing intent betrayed her feelings, she still pretended that she had not heard anything and continued to negotiate with Xu Que.

"Young Hero Xu, I believe that the Seventh Princess does like you. If you can bring back the Ice Jade Pill, I will arrange a marriage between the both of you. Furthermore, I've collected many rare herbs and medicines as well as magical weapons. Some of them are very suitable for tiding over the heavenly trials, as well as Six-Star Spiritual Pills that can help you cross over to the Infant Transformation Stage!"

The Empress Dowager smiled. "Of course, with Young Hero Xu's strength," she continued, offering all kinds of favorable terms that she could think of. "Even without the help of the spiritual pills, reaching the stage of Infant Transformation is simply a matter of time. But if you become the Prince Consort of the Metal Nation, you might be able to become the heir to the royal throne as well!"

From the Seventh Princess, to magical weapons and spiritual pills, and now, she had even given a subtle hint that she could assist Xu Que to become the future Metal Emperor, if he wanted to.

All these terms were based on a single condition, the Ice Jade Pill. It simply meant that the Empress Dowager attached great importance to it. It was as if that rare pill was more important to her than anything.

Xu Que was someone who could talk very well. When the Empress Dowager had ignored his question, he had also pretended that nothing had happened, sitting at his seat and wearing a faint smile, staying silent.

However that faint smile of his was no different from a cheapskate's smile in the Empress Dowager's eyes. In the end, she asked solemnly as her patience ran out, "so, what are your thoughts, Young Hero Xu?"

Xu Que gave a chuckle; his gaze fell on the scenery outside. "Aiya, we have had such a happy chat but it's getting late now. I still need to rush over to the teleportation device. Goodbye!"

He got up abruptly and strode out the door.

The Empress Dowager was stunned for a moment as she had not expected Xu Que to leave just like that.

She immediately gave a shout when she realised that Xu Que had really walked out without any hesitation. "Wait!"

"Don't bother!" answered Xu Que without turning his head, and he continued to walk.

He had never even considered agreeing to the deal. Although obtaining the Ice Jade Pill was not something difficult to do, the thought of bringing the rare pill back was troublesome.

Moreover, he did not like this Empress Dowager at all. Somehow, he could feel an air of aggressiveness and sense of superiority coming from the Empress Dowager. That made him very uncomfortable.

However, as soon as he stepped over the threshold, the Empress Dowager spoke again.

"I can agree to your condition."

"Ah?"

Xu Que was frozen on the spot.

Although the Empress Dowager's voice was rather subdued when she said that, Xu Que could hear the implication very clearly and he was stunned.

Agree to my condition?

What condition did I state?

F*ck, could she be referring to that 'can you be given to me' matter? This… this is too much for me!

"You… you're serious?" asked Xu Que who could not believe his ears and had turned around to face the Empress Dowager.

She stared hard at Xu Que and was gritting her teeth. Her lips even quivered a little. "I mean what I say," said the Empress Dowager coldly. "If you bring me the Ice Jade Pill, I can agree to the condition you stated earlier!"

Xu Que was at a loss. He did not know what to say.

Don't, I was just fooling around earlier for some fun. Why did you take it so seriously?

It's not fun now!

Xu Que felt funny but at the same time annoyed inside his heart.

He was also puzzled by the fact that the Empress Dowager seemed bent on getting the Ice Jade Pill?

Could it be that she was really a virgin and wanted to change her fate by evolving her spiritual roots?

But this thought was really absurd. If she was really a virgin, how had she become the Empress Dowager?

With a mind filled with doubts, he asked without a second thought, "I know the effects and uses of the Ice Jade Pill very clearly. What are you using it for?"

There was a sharp contraction of the pupils in the Empress Dowager's eyes. She seemed very surprised that Xu Que knew the uses and effects of the Ice Jade Pill.

However, in no time she regained her composure. "This has nothing to do with you," she said coldly. "You only need to bring the Ice Jade Pill back and I shall grant you your wish!"

"Hoho!" Xu Que gave a fake smile. Then he answered ambiguously, "I see!"

After that, he walked away quickly.

"Young Hero Xu, I'll be waiting for you!"

He heard the Empress Dowager's voice again after he took a few steps.

Xu Que's lips twitched but he did not stop. He went straight towards the center of the Palace.

The Empress Dowager stood in her chamber, watching Xu Que far away till he disappeared from view, and her eyes gradually turned cold and sharp.

"Shameless scum," she muttered under her breath. "If I didn't need to rely on you to enter the Imperial Tombs of the Water Nation, I would have killed you. Who are you to lust after my body?"

Boom!

With a wave of her hand, the doors of her chamber abruptly closed and were now tightly shut!

However, what she did not know was that Xu Que had never thought of coming back.

This guy often never meant what he said. Earlier on, he had replied using the words 'I see'. He had not promised that he would bring back the Ice Jade Pill.

...

After Xu Que was quite a distance from the Empress Dowager's chamber, he suddenly turned around.

Thinking back to the Empress Dowager's last sentence, 'I'll be waiting for you', his lips curled up with disdain.

Are you kidding me? Waiting for me?

Why are you waiting for me? This Act Tough King has the important task of acting tough as well as reviving Xiao Rou. I don't have the time and nor do I want to make the effort to come back here and give you the Ice Jade Pill!

What an arrogant Empress Dowager! Why would I want you?

Ice Jade Pill right? When I find them, I'll go back to Fire Country and give one to beautiful Sect Leader Su, then one for the Nine-Tailed Demon Fox, Su Ling'er, and one for Madam Ya. That leaves none for you, the Empress Dowager!

Oh yes, and one for the Water Empress!

Oh no, only three Ice Jade Pills. There's not enough to go around…

Xu Que instantly realised a dilemma. He furrowed his eyebrows and pondered over who he should give the Ice Jade Pills to. Unknowingly, he had reached the front hall of the Palace.

A eunuch saw him and scurried over anxiously. "Aiya, Young Hero Xu, I have finally found you now. The teleportation device is complete. His Majesty has sent me to lead the way."

"So this time it's really His Majesty who sent you right?" remarked a suspicious Xu Que who puckered an eyebrow.

The eunuch was baffled for a moment. "Young Hero Xu, what do you mean?"

"It's nothing, hurry and lead the way!" said Xu Que who waved his hands dismissively.

"Alright, Young Hero Xu, please follow this old servant," the eunuch hurriedly responded. "His Majesty and your pet have been waiting for a long while now." The eunuch led the way attentively as they swiftly made their way to the teleportation device.

When Xu Que heard the words 'pet', he was slightly startled. "Buttface is there too?"

"Yes, your pet has been here these two days and has refused to leave the Imperial Kitchen," nodded the eunuch. "When he heard that you are going to take the teleportation device today to teleport to the Water Nation, he finally left the Imperial Kitchen and wanted to leave with you."

Xu Que's lips gave an uncontrollable twitch.

He thought Buttface had a lot of backbone as he had disappeared when they had returned from the Imperial Tombs. Never had he thought that Buttface had just been stealing food in the Imperial Kitchen.

It was a no-brainer that Buttface had definitely borrowed his heroic, prestigious name to get nice food and drink!

...

In no time, the eunuch had led Xu Que to the place where the teleportation device had been built.

A huge, ancient-looking teleportation device appeared before him.

The entire teleportation device had been built using spirit stones which were engraved with runes. Moreover, the spirit stones had been inlaid with metal to supply an immense amount of metal spiritual Qi.

There were several figures standing beside the huge teleportation device. They were the Metal Emperor, the Third Prince and the Seventh Princess.

And of course, Buttface was there too!

In just two days, that cheapskate dog had actually gained weight. Now, he was lying lazily atop the teleportation device, sunbathing.

"Young Master Xu, you're here!"

"Young Hero Xu!"

The Seventh Princess and the Third Prince greeted Xu Que with warm smiles when they saw him.

Xu Que clasped his hands in salutation and exchanged a few words with them as courtesy.

As for the Metal Emperor, when he saw Xu Que and the Seventh Princess talking cheerfully and humorously with each other, his facial expression seemed concerned, as though he was worried that his daughter might get abducted.

"Little Seven," interrupted the Emperor. "Young Hero Xu has urgent matters to attend to. Do not waste Young Hero Xu's time!"

"Oh…"

The Seventh Princess stopped chatting in slight embarrassment. She bade farewell to Xu Que. "Young Master Xu, farewell!"

"Well, I should be on my way too! Everyone, farewell!"

Xu Que clasped his hands again to bid goodbye as he did not want to waste too much time as well. He stepped inside the teleportation device and stepped on Buttface's belly.

"Owwww…"

Buttface howled when he was awakened by the pain.

"Start the teleportation device!"

At this time, the Metal Emperor ordered his men to start the device. Clearly, he wanted to send Xu Que, the big disaster, away as soon as possible.

Booomm!

With a loud sound, the entire teleportation device glowed with white, bright light.

Under the sad gazes of the Seventh Princess and the Third Prince, the teleportation device started to rotate rapidly and the spiritual Qi started to intertwine. Xu Que and Buttface's silhouettes gradually faded away!

chapters.title: Chapter 384: Boy, Help!
chapters.body:
Chapter 384: Boy, Help!

Chapter 384: Boy, Help!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Building an inter-country teleportation device required much more time than a normal teleportation device.

In addition, as this teleportation device had been built in a hurry, it was consuming quite a lot of the best-grade spirit stones.,, but its speed could not yet compare to the engraved teleportation spell runes that Xu Que had used back in the Fire Nation!

During the teleportation, both Xu Que and Buttface were buffeted by violent, strong winds. Their vision was blurred and they somewhat felt as if they were seeing scenes in reverse, as though they had entered a time travel portal instead.

"F*ck, is this really a proper teleportation device?" cursed Buttface, who had both fore limbs covering his head.

Xu Que shook his head. This teleportation device was indeed hastily made.

Nonetheless he also knew that this was already considered a magnificent teleportation device within the five nations. After all, to be able to teleport to another nation requires an immense number of spirit stones. The Metal Emperor had been very generous in this aspect.

"If this deity's actual prowess were not sealed, I would create a giant teleportation device that would let us arrive in the Water Nation in the bat of an eyelid!" boasted Buttface loudly.

Xu Que gave him a glance of contempt and sneered, "if I engraved the rune words for the teleportation device myself, I would be able to arrive in Water Nation instantly as well!"

What Xu Que had claimed was the truth. When he had been inside the Imperial Tombs of the Fire Nation, he had copied the rune engravings through the System. However, if he were to have engraved the rune words himself, he would have needed at least four to five days to complete it. He would rather go for something much faster.
